title: Ah So Cat
wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Ah_So_Cat}} {{Character|name=Ah So Cat|aliases=Gusic's creation|relatives=Gusic (Creator)
Cheeseburger (Cousin)|affiliation=None|occupation=Fighting Insam (Formerly) Prison (Currently)|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=The Void|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=8 sauces|weight=22 sauces|eyes=Black|imagecaption=Ah! So Sorry!|image=Ah So Cat.png|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Unknown}}|breed=American Shorthair|fur=White, grey, and black|firstappears=The Shining Fate of the Universe|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 3}} '''Ah So Cat''' is a minor side character in the Silly Cats franchise. He was created by [[Gusic]] as a source of entertainment but was eventually forgotten by him. He eventually caused many other dangerous events and became the archrival of [[Insam]]. ==Appearances== ===Silly Cats=== Ah So Cat appears in the [[Silly Cats]] series in almost every season except for season 3, Medical Madness. He appears in cutaway gags and in the corner of frames in around 72 episodes in total. He is depicted in humorous situations or gags, where he performs crazy stunts and fails miserably almost each time. Ah So Cat is depicted as apologetic and often times slightly schizophrenic, with multiple occurrences of Ah So Cat apologizing to household objects, mailboxes, and even trash cans. Ah So Cat also had a filler arc in season 2, called the Motorcycle Arc, where Ah So Cat and Insam prank each other in increasing levels of dangerousness. This arc began when Ah So Cat bought Insam's dream motorcycle. This would climax with them burning the Silly City Circus, which would become one of the leading causes for the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. ===Silly Dogs=== In episode 24 of season 1 of [https://silly-dogs.fandom.com/wiki/Silly_Dogs_Wiki Silly Dogs], "Trappings of The Silly Kitty Temple," where the main group of silly dogs explore an ancient temple in Egypt dedicated to the myth of the Silly cats. Here, Ah So Cat is hinted to in an easter egg, where hyeroglyphs depict Ah So Cat and Insam throwing pipe bombs at each other. Ah So Cat never appears in the Silly Dogs series besides that Easter egg. ===Silly Cats: Babies=== In hidden archives, in various beta episodes and scripts for [[Silly Cats: Babies]], Ah So Cat appears in major areas. Not much is known about this phenomenon, but theorists believe Ah So Cat was a main character of this series, where we get an in-depth view of their background and backstory. A popular creepypasta has circulated around fan circles of Silly Cats: Babies called Ah-So-Gato. This creepypasta is a 200 word short story about the soul of Ah So Cat haunting soldiers of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]] who ate Ah So Cat's candy. ==Biography== Ah So Cat started as a loose soul spark that was wandering around the emptiness of the Void. When Gusic was separated from his brothers, he was very sad when he saw this spark floating towards him. He grabbed the spark and engineered a body for it to inhabit. This newly created cat would be named Ah So Cat. Ah So Cat entertained Gusic for these many years separated from his brothers, but Ah So Cat started wanting more. Luckily, he would get his chance when Gusic and the other brothers escaped the pocket in space and time and killed [[Bingus]] by redirecting the energy into his soul. Ah So Cat was now free, but he suffered from extreme boredom. He didn't know what to do. He then got an idea. He saw a stick of butter and looked inside it. Inside was a small caracal that seemed to be in a deep slumber. Also next to him was an orange cat that was also in a deep slumber. Ah So Cat, feeling powerful, got into an argument with the caracal. This caracal was named [[Floppa]] (The orange cat was [[Photosynthesizing]], just without his plants on him). The argument was very one-sided though. Gusic saw this and became enraged, Gusic was enraged because this was supposed to be a peaceful land and Ah So Cat was breaking the peace. This started an event called The Banishing. Gusic then created Silly Planet to banish Ah So Cat to it. Ah So Cat was angry but he could do little to nothing to stop it, as Gusic was much more powerful than him. Ah So Cat sat on Silly Planet in a daze. He had hit his head pretty hard on a rock and he was knocked unconscious. He woke up a few days later. He was on a rocky beach and he had no idea where he was. He had forgotten all about the Void and Gusic. Ah So Cat wandered Silly Planet, looking for things to do. He met various other cats on his journey. His goal was to make a land called Silly Country, which supposedly was a sanctuary for silly kitties and held peace for all. Ah So Cat walked for years on end to make it to his destination. He did not need to consume anything though, as he was supernaturally immortal. He eventually climbed over the Arctoac Mountain range, while passing many other sights, like the Rabbit Empire. In the distance, he saw the majestic Silly City. Although still developing, it was still a marvel of engineering at its time. Ah So Cat took residence in this city. He enjoyed life there and was generally content. He spent most of his life here. Ah So Cat was perusing storefronts, looking for potential things to buy. Ah So Cat had a lot of money from an investment he made on a race. He eventually saw a glistening motorcycle in the storefront and he knew it had to be his. He forgot about though and continued to do other things in his life. Ah So Cat decided he wanted to explore outside of Silly City for once, so he set off to see Silly Town. He was excited at the prospect of an adventure and he prepared thoroughly for it. He specifically packed tools that would help him traverse the terrain, as he had gotten mild arthritis from walking so much to make it so Silly Country. After many days, he arrived at the gates of Silly Town. The guards at the gate asked for his information and he gave them it. The guards were suspicious since the information on the wallet he had given them was a couple of centuries old. Ah So Cat could've sworn he renewed a year ago but the years all blurred together for him so he was unsure. Ah So cat was s bit disappointed. but he could nothing about it. He trekked back to Silly City. Ah So Cat was walking to the registry office to get his license renewed but the storefront he had seen a few years before caught his eye again. The motorcycle was still there. His wallet was full of cash, so he jogged over yo the store and opened the glass door. He walked up to the owner of the store and gave the cash to the man. It was his. Little did he know, Ah So Cat ignited the rage of Insam. Insam stared through the glass of the store and threw a rock, breaking the glass. They then engaged in a fist fight, which Ah So Cat won because of his melee practice. Insam was knocked unconscious and Ah So Cat escaped. This began Insam and Ah So Cat's constant fights and pranks. They pranked each other commonly, and it often resorted to them throwing pipe bomb sat each other. Their pranks soon started to escalate in dangerousness. Soon, Ah So Cat got a letter from a kitty he did not know, [[Axle the Kitty]]. The letter told him that Insam was secretly at [[Sillyton Adventureland]]. Ah So Cat rushed over and saw Insam. For the next few hours, they engaged in pranks and continued to do this until the circus event started. They went into the circus tent, continuing their pranks. Their pranks eventually reached a boiling point, when Insam threw a pipe bomb at Ah So Cat. The pipe bomb ignited near a box of fireworks and they ignited, resulting in the [[Silly City Circus Burning]]. Ah So Cat and Insam were accused and they were arrested and questioned. But, they were let go because they couldn't get any answers. Sides formed and one side supported Insam and the other supported Ah So Cat. They called themselves the Insane Army and the Sorrowers respectively. They had heated arguments and they engaged in fighting, officially starting the War of the Silly and Unsilly. Ah So Cat and Insam wanted no part in the war, so they hid in a military bunker that used to be owned by the Gnarp Gnaplians. They picked the same bunker, which they didn't like. At first, they refused to talk to each other. But then, they finally decided to settle their differences. Ah So Cat apologized for ruining Insam's dream of owning the motorcycle and Insam apologized for being too violent. They made up and they enjoyed their time with the supplies present in the bunker. They were eventually discovered by the SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces) and captured. Under the Treaty of Silly City, Ah So Cat and Insam were persecuted in federal court instead of civilian court, since they were partly responsible for starting the war. They were sentenced to life in prison and they currently live in the same jail cell to this day. ==Trivia== * Ah So Cat is named that way because the first thing he said to Gusic was "Ah! So sorry!" * Ah So Cat loves candy * Ah So Cat keeps a copy of [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]], gifted to him by [[Future Kitty]], who gifted it to multiple other silly cats * Ah So Cat has never been seen "Dashing through the snow" * Ah So Cat has the highest dentistry bill out of any other kitty alive due to his candy addiction * He has a lot of imaginary friends that he likes to talk to {{Top|Canon}}

title: Bag
raw_text: Bag "Bag in a yellow bag" Status Unknown Nationality Unknown Aliases Relatives Unknown Unknown Affiliation Occupation Unknown Unknown Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth Unknown Unknown Marital Status Unknown Physical Description Gender Unknown Height Weight 5 Sauces 4 Sauces (Without bag) 7 Sauces (With bag) Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance A Yellow Bag A Yellow Bag This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! Very, very little is known about Bag . He appears in one singular episode, hanging from a door, for less than a second in the background. The only thing we know about Bag is that he has been stuck inside his bag since 23 BC and his favourite food is 'hambourgir', answered on a VerySilly Interview episode. We don't even know if he is hanging there dead or not. Many fans say he is the stupidest character to be added to Silly Cats , and even Ben Dover agrees, stating it was just a 'prank' character. Bag is truly one of the most mysterious, weird and stupidest character in the VerySilly Team history, but, "from how unpredictable Ben Dover is, Bag will probably make a sudden return in some spin-off and be the villain or some crap" - A popular fan on twitter .

}}'''Axle the Kitty''', or just '''Axle''', was the owner and manager of the super popular park, [[Sillyton Adventureland]]. He held an extremely successful career and his only goal was to bring a smile to everyone's face.

==Biography==
Axle did not the most glorious upbringing. He was born in Germany during the Third Reich. He was poor as his family supported the opposing party. The Nazis had restricted rights to them and had stripped away all of their valuables. Axle kept thinking that every day could be his last day. This would cause Axle to develop long-lasting anxiety issues later in life. Axle made occasional trips to the grocery store to support his dying mother. She had caught a rare strain of Polio that Axle was immune to. The Polio had paralyzed his mother. He was very young, but he cared for his mother deeply. Axle did everything he could for his mother. His father had been run over by a car three years earlier.

On a day that seemed normal, Axle wandered to the store to gather his food coupons. He gathered a bag of apples and canned goods and headed home. The streets were ransacked and there was chaos everywhere. Axle even had to outrun a mugger on his way home. When he opened the rickety door, he was met with a somber sight. It was his mother. She was cold and motionless. The Polio had reached her lungs which caused her to fall into cardiac arrest. Axle could do nothing but cry. He came to the conclusion that no one should feel this sad ever again. Axle didn't know what to do. He was broke and he couldn't even pay for groceries anymore since a burglar broke in and stole everything valuable overnight. Axle then saw a poster blowing through the wind. He snatched the poster out of the air. It read "Come to Silly Country, the land for the free!" Axle thought that this was his chance to get out of poverty.

He booked a ticket with the last of his money, and made the flight to Silly Country. The flight was very boring until a terrorist tried to blow the plane up. In a stroke of luck, the terrorist had eaten 3 cans of baked beans that morning and he was struck with severe stomach cramps and an irresistible urge to go to the bathroom. The terrorist rushed to the bathroom, but was arrested upon landing. Axle had landed in Silly City and it was even more amazing than he could've ever dreamed of. Towers dotted the skyline and the streets were bustling with automobiles. Excitedly, Axle began his new life in Silly City. He bought a studio apartment and took residence inside. The apartment was cozy but there was no running water thanks to a pipe leak down the road. He still had a money problem, so he started looking for jobs.

He soon found a job at an ice cream parlor. He found that the customers were excessively rude and entitled. One even spat in his face. This was the last straw for him and he quit that same day. He thought about working for [[FACT]], but he thought otherwise, thinking the job would take too much of his time. What he really dreamed of doing was making other kitties happy. He would brainstorm this thought and idealize anything that came to mind. At this time, Axle's anxiety issues started getting in the way of his life. Every time he saw a ransacked store or hear a gunshot, he would start getting panicked. He attended therapy and got medication to support his issue. Feeling lucky, Axle signed up for the lottery. He didn't think he would win but he thought it was worth a shot. To his surprise, he had won second best prize. It was S฿300,000. He contemplated on what he would spend with his money and he decided he wanted to be an architect.

Axle continued trying to find ways to make other kitties happy. He would give some of his cash to homeless kitties on the street. He was praised in his community, but he wanted to do better. He attended architecture school and graduated. It was tough, but he learned from the best of the best. He still had no idea what his legacy would be. He researched online for what he could do. He then came up with the perfect idea, to create an amusement park. He realized that this would be the perfect way to make other kitties happy. He met with city supervisors and they accepted his plan. He got to work. He hired several construction crews and they got building. The building took 4 years and a lot of money. Axle had spent all of his lottery winnings on the theme park. The park was finally finished. He called it, Sillyton Adventureland, after the name of his of grandfather, Sillyton. Business was slow but once it got started, he started raking in cash. Axle wasn't going to stand by and watch though, he publicly participated in all of the attractions. He believed that this way, the customers could see the managers could have fun too.

Axle managed the park for the next 20 years of his life. That's when he got a letter from the Silly Traveling Circus. They asked if they could hold their event in his theme park. Axle signed the letter and the event was scheduled for the 12th of February, 1984. Axle had time to plan. He was watching TV when he saw [[Insam]] and [[Ah So Cat]] getting into their fights. Axle thought that if he got them to come to the circus event, that it could bring some extra business at the park. He wrote letters to both of them, tricking them into thinking the other was supposed to be at the park. It was finally time for the event and Axle couldn't be happier. It was the busiest day he had ever seen. Insam and Ah So Cat were there too, much to his delight. He thought nothing of them and continued on with the celebrations. That was until the circus event started and Insam and Ah So Cat entered the tent. They started getting to fights and it climaxed when Insam threw a pipe bomb at Ah So Cat. It ignited a box of fireworks next to it. This ignited the tent in an event that would be called the [[Silly City Circus Burning]].

Axle was torn. He lost a lot of revenue and he was responsible for it. He couldn't take the pressure. He disappeared mysteriously and it is thought he ended his own life, but no one knows for sure.

== Trivia ==

* Axle was an expert in balloon tricks
* Axle's family tree is known to be very wealthy. It's just that his great grandfather never made a will
* His network before his disappearance was S฿3,000,000

He was broke and he couldn't even pay for groceries anymore since a burglar broke in and stole everything valuable overnight. Axle then saw a poster blowing through the wind. He snatched the poster out of the air. It read "Come to Silly Country, the land for the free!" Axle thought that this was his chance to get out of poverty. He booked a ticket with the last of his money, and made the flight to Silly Country. The flight was very boring until a terrorist tried to blow the plane up. In a stroke of luck, the terrorist had eaten 3 cans of baked beans that morning and he was struck with severe stomach cramps and an irresistible urge to go to the bathroom. The terrorist rushed to the bathroom, but was arrested upon landing. Axle had landed in Silly City and it was even more amazing than he could've ever dreamed of. Towers dotted the skyline and the streets were bustling with automobiles. Excitedly, Axle began his new life in Silly City. He bought a studio apartment and took residence inside. The apartment was cozy but there was no running water thanks to a pipe leak down the road. He still had a money problem, so he started looking for jobs. He soon found a job at an ice cream parlor. He found that the customers were excessively rude and entitled. One even spat in his face. This was the last straw for him and he quit that same day. He thought about working for FACT , but he thought otherwise, thinking the job would take too much of his time. What he really dreamed of doing was making other kitties happy. He would brainstorm this thought and idealize anything that came to mind. At this time, Axle's anxiety issues started getting in the way of his life. Every time he saw a ransacked store or hear a gunshot, he would start getting panicked. He attended therapy and got medication to support his issue. Feeling lucky, Axle signed up for the lottery. He didn't think he would win but he thought it was worth a shot. To his surprise, he had won second best prize. It was S฿300,000. He contemplated on what he would spend with his money and he decided he wanted to be an architect. Axle continued trying to find ways to make other kitties happy. He would give some of his cash to homeless kitties on the street. He was praised in his community, but he wanted to do better. He attended architecture school and graduated. It was tough, but he learned from the best of the best. He still had no idea what his legacy would be. He researched online for what he could do. He then came up with the perfect idea, to create an amusement park. He realized that this would be the perfect way to make other kitties happy. He met with city supervisors and they accepted his plan. He got to work. He hired several construction crews and they got building. The building took 4 years and a lot of money. Axle had spent all of his lottery winnings on the theme park. The park was finally finished. He called it, Sillyton Adventureland, after the name of his of grandfather, Sillyton. Business was slow but once it got started, he started raking in cash. Axle wasn't going to stand by and watch though, he publicly participated in all of the attractions. He believed that this way, the customers could see the managers could have fun too. Axle managed the park for the next 20 years of his life. That's when he got a letter from the Silly Traveling Circus. They asked if they could hold their event in his theme park. Axle signed the letter and the event was scheduled for the 12th of February, 1984. Axle had time to plan. He was watching TV when he saw Insam and Ah So Cat getting into their fights. Axle thought that if he got them to come to the circus event, that it could bring some extra business at the park. He wrote letters to both of them, tricking them into thinking the other was supposed to be at the park. It was finally time for the event and Axle couldn't be happier. It was the busiest day he had ever seen. Insam and Ah So Cat were there too, much to his delight. He thought nothing of them and continued on with the celebrations. That was until the circus event started and Insam and Ah So Cat entered the tent. They started getting to fights and it climaxed when Insam threw a pipe bomb at Ah So Cat. It ignited a box of fireworks next to it. This ignited the tent in an event that would be called the Silly City Circus Burning . Axle was torn. He lost a lot of revenue and he was responsible for it. He couldn't take the pressure. He disappeared mysteriously and it is thought he ended his own life, but no one knows for sure. Trivia [ ] Axle was an expert in balloon tricks Axle's family tree is known to be very wealthy. It's just that his great grandfather never made a will His network before his disappearance was S฿3,000,000

== Artyom ==
Artyom, a superior being in the universe of silliness, for being  known as "The One Who Watches", His job is to watch who is silly and who isn't, Artyom has a lot of the same powers that [[Panko]] and [[Milly]] have. Artyom is known for his wild gaze, Which he acquired in World War II, after fighting in a firefight for 8 hours. He is sentient in two Universes, That being in the Silly Universe, (As The One Who Watches) and the The Universe (As a normal cat named Artyom), 

== Origin Story ==
Artyom was born on a couch, by a mother by the alias of "Mom". He was obviously gonna be special, as the litter was all black, except for him. (Not related to Mo'.) While he was born in The Universe, His Origin Story before he was actually born into The Universe goes way farther back. He was originally born on the 1st century of Silly Universe, he was born to a litter of 4, Panko, "The God", Artyom, "The One Who Watches" Mo', "The Punisher Of Unsilliness" And Milly, "The Silly". They were born for these purposes, but sometimes went to the Silly Earth, For some events such as The Napoleonic Wars, World War I, And World War II. In these events, they were usually under disguises as fake names, identities, and appearances. Artyom was a Canadian Troop, who fought for his country and allies. on one particular day in 1940, he joined a firefight against the Germans, and after 8 hours, was still standing, he was physically okay, but was experiencing very strong PTSD for the next couple of weeks, until he died by gunshot by a Russian troop during another firefight.

All we know is it has no eyes, 10 rows of teeth, its fast, its stealthy, and it often consumes it victims like a wood chipper. Its known to seem to disappear in the blink of an eye after killing and consuming its victims, according to a few witnesses. It has an estimated kill count of 274, but that number is rapidly growing as most cats strong enough to defeat him can't ever find him. It often feeds on small defenseless kittens or weak cats that others wouldn't notice if they were to disappear. We also know it has a strange connection with [[Pobis]] since it is often seen next to the asylum Pobis is held in. If more information is found of this cat please add to this article and to all silly little cats be careful. Confidential Document. Proceed with caution. [[File:S.B.I.png|center|220px]]
This information is under protection of the S.B.I., any leakage of this information will result in your elimination. Proceed with caution.

[Information Log]
Through an interrogation with Pobis on the 13th of December, 2023, more information was found on "832." It was found that "832" is Underling #832. It was also found that it loves ketchup more than anything else. "832" was summoned out of Pobis' twisted mind. Pobis summoned him to get revenge on his enemies. The ritual was to put the candles into a shape of a pentagram and to draw the lines with ketchup. It was called the Ketchup Demon by the book that Pobis got it from. The book was called The Black Book of Silly Magic.
[Incident Report]
On the 2nd of March, 2023, there was a break in, involving the theft of 30,000 fries from a secret vault owned by the McDonald's corporation. In the break in, a ketchup canister was exploded. The large amount of ketchup seemed to attract "832" to its location. It was seen following the scent. Upon arriving, it killed all of the personnel on site. Although, the perpetrator was never caught. This incident is called the McDonalds tragedy.

title: Baby Kiwi Kitten
raw_text: Baby Kiwi Kitten "Kiwi Kitten blending in with his surroundings" Status Alive Nationality Kiwi Aliases Relatives "i thought it was a food" Unknown Affiliation Occupation Unknown, formerly B.A.D, sometimes The GOODINGS Being Yummy, and Destroying things. Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth Unknown, presumably when Kiw was 40. Unknown, presumably Kiw's lab. Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Unknown, some male, some female. Kiwi Kiwi Height Weight 1 sauce 3 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance Creation of the beasts... War Of The Silly and Nonsilly PT 3. This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! Kiwi Kittens are a tiny minion that was used by Kiw himself. Kiwi kittens are ruthless and will devour anything that gets in the way of their path. Kiwi Kittens also have the ability to blend in with many different objects though mainly fruit and other vegetation. They mainly hide in farms and grocery stores. The estimate of kills every Kiwi Kitten has combined together is higher than Kiw's count himself. They are ruthless but they aren't monsters, they are known to befriend and help any other kittens enemy or not. They are nearly extinct with only about 150 left though its rapidly decreasing because of them being ruthlessly hunted for being Kiws past followers, but they are also repopulating very quickly, due to their ability to lay camouflaged eggs. They soon manage to repopulate by 500, using photosynthesis. They slept next to kiwis (plant kiwis) and those Kiwis turned into Kiwi Kittens. It also worked on kiwi birds. In the silly cats games they are enemies that appear in the forest. Some NPCs give you high reward quests if you manage steal their eggs but these quests are incredibly difficult with how dangerous the kiwi kittens are when their eggs are threatened by anybody. Later on in the series they fight in "War Of The Silly of Silly and Unsilly" since by then there are about 650 left, but only 50 were the originals. They are villains, but they aren't monsters, and only hurt you if you try eat them, their young or their eggs. After the war of silly and unsilly the remaining kiwi kittens went into hiding and tried to repopulate bringing their numbers back up to about 2000. due to their master Kiw being killed in the war they mostly took up simple lives creating a small village called Kiwiville near the cave system they hid in while repopulating. Though some left and took up lives of evil once more working for remaining B.A.D cells and other new evil organisations particularly George 's cohort

Terrorist | birthDate =25 January 2021 | birthPlace =Silly City Outskirts | marital =Single | gender =Male | breed =Domestic Longhair | fur =Orange & White | height =8 sauces | weight =24 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram =drpeppercherryzerosugar | tiktok =drpeppercherryzerosugar | youtube =thedrpeppercherryzerosugar }}'''$24.50''' also known as [https://www.tiktok.com/@drpeppercherryzerosugar @drpeppercherryzerosugar] on TikTok is a silly kitty that joined [[B.A.D]] after he broke into the jar of silly juice. ==Biography== $24.50 was born in the Silly City outskirts to a poor family. He would commit crimes to feed his family. One time he was short on cash, so he broke into [[E. Scrunk|E. Scrunk's]] lab. He stole many valuable items. Including the jar of silly juice, a new invention of E. Scrunk's that could make any kitty extra silly. He ate some of it and as a result his mind would be filled with delusions. He came to the ultimate conclusion to become a terrorist. He joined B.A.D in hope of accomplishing his delusions. He tried blowing up the [[Silly Airlines]] multiple times. As a result he was sentenced to 8 years in air jail. This wasn't his first time in jail. $24.50 attempted to escape and he succeeded. He ran loose trying to cause havoc everywhere he went. Ultimately, he was captured and given the death penalty. $24.50 was nearly executed on February 23rd, 2023, but managed to survive the tannerite strapped to his chest. $24.50 went on the run and was subsequently hunted by Terrance, king of The Cat Cove. Something mysterious happened with Terrance's throne, and could no longer track $24.50. This meant that he was able to roam free without worry of being caught by Terrance and sent back to air jail. Nowadays, $24.50 resides in Level 4 Room 004 of The Cat Cove, along with Mailbox and his sister Lester. He has gained a lot of weight after getting his pussy chopped off and losing his libido. One day he will rise from the shadows and strike again, however that day is not today. == Trivia == * It is a running joke on their TikTok that $24.50 is transgender * $24.50 is terrible at mewing as stated on their TikTok. Even his training sessions did nothing to help * His owners have stated that a bomb was strapped to his chest. It was set to explode on the day of his execution, but it failed * He eatid his parents in his delusions *When he was a child he snorted milk and needed medicine afterwards. The price of the medicine became his name. *His nickname is Big. This is because when he and his sister Lester were kittens, $24.50 was bigger than her. == Silly Gallery == File:Saysgaystuff.jpg|$24.50's reaction to bro saying gay stuff File:$24.50 being dumb.jpg|$24.50 being introduced by their owner {{Top|Mythology}}

}}'''Arthur''' is a silly kitty that was born in Bonn, Germany. He became one of the world's most feared spy's in the entire SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces).

==Biography==
Arthur was a normal silly kitty. He was born in Boon, Germany in 1693. It was a time of peace at that time. He enjoyed his life in Germany. He only thought of progression for his country. His hope grew even brighter when a new politician entered the scene. His name was [[Kitler]] and his goals were just as Arthur imagined. Kitler advertised improved cardboard box bunkers and increased access to sunlit windowsills. Arthur excitedly set up a meeting with Kitler. Kitler was impressed by his determination to the cause and invited Arthur to his team. Arthur would rise up the ranks and become Kitler's right hand man. The position that Arthur was in was very dangerous. Arthur was nearly killed multiple times by rivals and haters. With this, Arthur respectfully resigned from his position and flew to Silly Country, where he hoped for a brighter future.

In Silly City, his life was great, he managed to gain his own business. He kept that business for the next twenty years until it was taken down due to new developments in the city. In order to defend himself, Arthur bought a gun and got a gun license. Arthur's life was the best it could've been. This all came crumbling down when [[The Beast|The Beast's]] forces started rampaging across Silly Country. This began the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. Arthur took a passive stance on the war, choosing to stay out of it. Until [[B.A.D]] started threatening Silly City. With this, Arthur signed up for the SCAF. He quickly climbed the ranks. Due to his prior with Kitler his skills were much greater than all of the others. Arthur was given the duty of spy. Arthur would move from village to village gathering information from B.A.D members. Arthur soon became the best spy in all of the SCAF. He leaked hundreds of pieces of information and it allowed the SCAF to get a huge head start in the war. They built bombers, attack planes, and tanks. Arthur would continue this lifestyle until the end of the war. His life returned back to normal and he continued on with his ways.

By late 2001, Arthur's life was going swell. The new developments had finished with two beautiful towers highlighting Silly City's skyline. Arthur went home and sat at the TV. He stood there horrified as leftover B.A.D members flew a plane into one of the towers. Arthur rushed over and managed to save several people from the rubble. Arthur swore revenge on the people who did it. One day, Arthur joined the SCPD (Silly City Police Department) in a raid on of the perpetrators houses. There was a violent shootout. Arthur managed to do a fatal shot to the head. The perpetrator was [[Terrorist Cat]]. Arthur stood over the body, and spat on it.

title: Baguette Dude
wikitext:
{{MOS|Below 72dpi|EtharViolo}} {{WIP}}{{Warning|Kidnapping, Mental Ilnesss and Mutalation}}{{Character|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{French}}|aliases=Silly French Car|affiliation=[[B.A.D]] (formerly)
[[The GOODings]]|occupation=Smuggling Cannabis
Selling Baguettes with Cannabis|birthPlace=Paris, France|birthDate=2 July 1945|deathDate=14 August 1993|deathPlace=Temple of the Beast|marital=Divorced|gender=Female|breed=Unknown|fur=White and Brown|height=8 sauces|weight=89 sauces|firstappears=Baguette!|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly pt. 2|image=Oui oui.png|imagecaption=He is French 🇫🇷🥖|name=Baguette Dude}} '''Baguette Dude''' was a female cat and a former member of B.A.D and The GOODings. When she wasn’t feeding [[The Beast]] baguettes with cannabis, she was smuggling and selling them. She ended up switching sides after she saw how much of a bad kitty The Beast was. a In the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], she fought for B.A.D for 5 days before changing side’s mid war and assisting The GOODings as a healer who was notable for saving [[Future Kitty]] and attempting to save 2 unnamed GOODings members and [[Maxwell]]. She was later kidnapped by a group of [[B.A.D]] members and she was beaten to death. It is presumed she was depressed and that her body was eaten by The Beast due to her body never being found. == Biography == Baguette Dude was born somewhere in Paris where she was existing like a regular car, until one time when she was still growing up, she found a garden of cannabis growing in her neighbor's backyard. She ate the cannabis and she immediately loved it, so she started smuggling it. She knew it was illegal, so she avoided the law in any way she could. Her favorite food, besides cannabis, was baguettes, so she had the perfect idea. She thought to herself, "What if I put the cannabis in the baguettes?" She thought this was genius and she loved it at first taste. She then decided to move to Silly Country so she could smuggle and share her invention with other silly kitties. She soon learned about a criminal group called B.A.D. She didn't know what they were at first, but she decided to join them because they would help her spread her cannabis-filled baguettes. She soon found herself with the task of feeding The Beast. He didn't need sustenance to survive, but he just liked overworking his minions. Baguette Dude was none the wiser to this though, so she diligently fed The Beast. She had many fights with The GOODings, especially with Bentley. She started getting bored and depressed with feeding The Beast over and over again. In her boredom, she learned healing magic and started practicing on her B.A.D comrades. They didn't appreciate her for this and they started making fun of her, saying that she could never amount to anything. She eventually got fed up with this, and when war broke out, she switched sides to The GOODings. The GOODings were much nicer to her. Since Baguette Dude had been in B.A.D, she was able to unleash many important secrets to The GOODings so that they could get the upper hand in the war. She used her newly learned healing magic to aid The GOODings if one of them was severely injured. She saved many kitties, including Future Kitty and Maxwell. She became less depressed and was content with her position in The GOODings. Baguette Dude was eeping peacefully in one of The GOODings temporary shelters, when she was suddenly kidnapped by a group of B.A.D members. These members are relatively unknown. She had made the mistake of eeping with no eyes open. She was tossed into the [[Temple of the Beast]], with the rest of the captured soldiers. Her isolation from her friends made her mental health decline. She started withdrawing herself from others and became depressed. One day, the temple doors opened. She thought it was help, but it was just another group of B.A.D members. They walked up to her. She couldn't recognize their faces. They yelled at her that she was a traitor, and that she needed to be punished. They then brutally beat her to death. A couple of months later, The GOODings defeated B.A.D. The GOODings freed the prisoners from the temple. They were horrified to see Baguette Dude's dead body. She was then commemorated in a memorial in Silly Town for her bravery and service to The GOODings. == In series == === Season 3-??? === She was one of the last characters introduced as she was introduced 17 episodes before the War of the Silly and Unsilly, where she was having her entire debut episode being an asshole by harassing Bentley and hitting Jinx for no reason. After a couple of minor appearances, she later fought in 2/3 of the parts in the War of the Silly and Unsilly. In fact, part 2’s Prologue showed her death, but it was banned in many states due to the violence. == Trivia == * Baguette Dude was once misgendered as male. She now keeps the name "Baguette Dude" as a joke * She was also set to appear as a quest in [[Silly Cats: Online]], although this was scrapped * No one knows her real name

Local street gang|occupation=Drug smuggler|marital=Single|birthDate=27 December, 1977|birthPlace=Vietnam, Hanoi|deathDate=12 February, 2014|deathPlace=Chicago|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=5 sauces|weight=14 sauces|eyes=green|appearsin=Most Episodes as a background/key character|debut=The End of Line|breed=Golden Cat|fur=Orange|firstappears=Innocent Days|lastappears=The End of Line|status={{Deceased}}|instagram=babemdaily|relatives=None|nationality={{Vietnamese}}}} {{Spoiler}} ==Biography== ===Early life === At a young age, Babem possesses an unrivaled skill in the art of staring contests, boasting an astonishing win streak. When he receives an invitation to the [[World's Champion Staring Contest]], his joy is immeasurable, he eagerly packs his belongings and prepares for the journey ahead. Little does he know that this opportunity will have a lasting impact on his life. Arriving at his destination, he felt so nervous. It was his debut in the biggest staring contest ever, with millions of feline spectators watching on his every move. As soon the match started, it was revealed that his opponent was [[Gakster]], an unpredictable soul starer. he stay calm and focus on the warm up round and at that time the biggest staring contest match has started. Babem and [[Gakster]] faced off in the highly anticipated World's Champion Staring Contest. The tension was crazy as the audience eagerly watched their intense stare down. However, [[Gakster]] used his so called "Unpredictable Mind control", This breaks Babem's concentration and caused his to blink. With his methods, Gakster was declared as the winner, leaving Babem feeling diheartened and betrayed. It a cruel twist of fate turned his life upside. The devastation was overwhelming, tears streaming down his face as he struggled to understand how everything had gone so wrong. In the depths of his despair, 79px made a fateful choice - to take matters into his own hands and seek justice through a life of crime. ===Adult life in chicago=== Babem, now an adult, found hisself immersed in the gritty underworld of Chicago. Drawn into a life of crime, he became entangled in the dangerous world of drug smuggling. he quickly rose through the ranks, specializing in the lucrative businesses of drug trafficking and smuggling. Babem became known as the mastermind behind a vast network of illicit activities, his reputation growing as he amassed power and wealth. he orchestrated clandestine deals, carefully evading law enforcement. [[File:Database.gif|thumb|Live screen recording of Local's silly department|left|400x400px]][[File:Wanted.png|thumb|Babem appearance on wanted list|right|260x260px]] But as his notoriety grew, so did the attention of the authorities. News stories and reports circulated, dubbing babem as one of the most wanted criminals in Chicago. The streets whispered his name, and everyone seemed to be on the lookout for his. The constant pressure and fear of being captured weighed heavily on his mind. Despite the risks, babem's cunning and street smarts enabled his to remain one step ahead of law enforcement. While walking in the alley, Babem unexpectedly encountered [[Gakster]]. Fueled by his past grievances, he saw an opportunity for revenge and attempted to murderer him. And he did it... Babem is satisfied and left the crime scene. [[Gakster]] was injured by babem's gun. Fortunately, [[Plimpus|Plimbus]] unexpectedly found [[Gakster]] stepping in to help [[Gakster]] ===Downfall=== Babem's empire faced a new threat when [[The Beast|Beast]], the main antagonist of the silly cats franchise, teamed up with chicago law enforcement to take his down. [[The Beast|Beast]] tracked his every move, but Babem's cunning and street smarts kept his a step ahead, frustrating the [[The Beast|Beast]]. Finally that day, [[The Beast|Beast]] closed in on Babem's hidden [https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Stronghold stronghold]. Chaos erupted as bullets flew, shattering the silence of the hideout. [[The Beast|Beast]] overwhelmed his, and so this it, this is the end for babem, thise's only one thing he can do in this situation, and that is suicide. With his demise, Babem's reign of power crumbled, as Beast emerged as the victorious hiso, but he later decided to kill everyone in chicago. ==Real Life == Babem has passed away in 2022 (June 1, 2022) and Babem's owner has disappeared since then: https://www.instagram.com/p/CeP1ZU9veIM/ ===Translated post from Babem's owner:=== "Hello everyone, although it is very painful, but I would like to inform everyone. After many days of fighting with illness, Min, or commonly known as Ba Bem, did not survive, he passed away at 2am today. Thank you to everyone who has loved him so much all this time. You are forever my angel, mommy and everyone loves you so much. Hopefully in the next life, you will still be my child. Thank you for everything. I love you" [[File:Babem Death.png|center|thumb|528x528px]] ==Trivia== People often mistake babem for El Gato. [[Category:Deceased]]

'''Baskit cat''' Aka '''Basketball cat''' is a basketball professional; he was born as a basketball player. when he was about 2 sauces long, he trained playing balls every day. until now he became a legend. Salute

This cat is known from his epic basketball gameplay. No one was expected for a kitten to score in a basketball game! Everyone was applauding for the cat and fortunately the cat won the game! People were recording it, Posted to the internet although the original poster was unknown this was the image found online. This image is also related to Ballincat46



<u>'''Upbringing and Family'''</u>

Baskit Cat was born in a small, 220sq foot studio apartment in January of 2007. Along with his two younger siblings he was was raised by his windowed mother. His family often lived beyond their means, frequently forcing them to be food insecure, because of his mother's habit of buying very expensive furniture and basketballs. He had to get three part-time jobs before the age of 2 to support his family through the 2008 financial crisis.

His predicament changed most significantly just after his 2nd birthday, when he was told that he was the 2nd cousin of esteemed American athlete [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LeBron_James Lebron James]. The news came to him initially via a delusion one sleepless night in November, in which Baskit Cat remarks seeing a man, oddly reminiscent of Lebron James, glide down from a portal in the sky and utter to him the following. "Hello Baskit Cat. I am Lebron James and are also your relative". Over the next three months Baskit Cat slaved away purusing any lead he could find, hoping to gather any info he could on any potential familial relations between Lebron James and himself. In April of 2009, Baskit Cat finally received the confirmation he needed via an email from lebronerjamesnba@gmail.com, stating that the sender of the email, Lebron James, was in fact related to Baskit Cat.

In June of 2009, after almost 3 years of being surrounded by very expensive basketballs, Baskit Cat finally put the basketball shoes on for the first time. From then it is history.

'''Belize''' was a tiny kitten used by [[The Beast]] to spy on [[The GOODings]].

Belize's distant cousin is [[Bongo]].

== Biography ==
Belize was born in [[Austern]], a small village at the foothills of Mount Silly. This village would unfortunately be invaded by The Beast's army. Belize was stolen from his home and turned into a spy for [[B.A.D|B.A.D.]] In the beginning he was a rarely seen character, barely being seen, and only in the backgrounds of certain scenes. The GOODings were originally scared of what Belize was capable of. In reality, Belize did nothing wrong and was being threatened with his families death. In the episode Belize was intercepted by [[Jinx]] and the gang. He was interrogated by The GOODings, but he leaked no information. He was released, because of young he was, they decided not to do any harm. Belize wandered about, having finally escaping The Beast's grasp.

Later in life, he would trip, and drowned in a pool of syrup. A truly disappointing death, for such an epic life.

The Beast didn't care much about the death of Belize and he just hired a new spy who is currently unknown.

title: Bat Cat
wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Bat_Cat}}{{Character |name=Bat Cat |image=Bat Cat.png |aliases=Pixel |status={{Deceased}} |relatives=Unknown |affiliation=B.A.D |occupation=Flying around in town
Scaring other cats
Drug smuggling |birthDate=10 December 2000 |birthPlace=Cave in Wisconsin |gender=Male |breed=Cornish Rex/Bat |fur=Grey |height=6 sauces |weight=44 sauces |firstappears=Cave Exploration |lastappears=Wings! |marital=Single |imagecaption=Him plotting with B.A.D.|nationality={{American}}|instagram=pixelandsophie}} '''Bat Cat''' is a minor antagonist in the silly cat franchise and a not-so-loved character. Bat Cat is a former member of [[The GOODings]] who was first seen dealing with [[B.A.D]] in secret, and later being killed by [[Glorpo]]. ==Appearances == === Silly Cats === Bat Cat appears in [[Silly Cats]] as a minor antagonist. He was a spy who previously worked with The GOODings but was secretly plotting and sending over information to B.A.D. for a large sum of mosquitoes. ===Silly Cats: Online=== Bat Cat appears in [[Silly Cats: Online]] as a minor boss, and appears multiple times after resurrections during popular events such as Medical Madness or Spooktober. == Biography== Bat Cat is the long lost uncle of [[Jinx]] from her mother's side. He lives in a cave and hunts mosquitoes for food as well as buying food from his friend [[Carlos]]' fish shop. From there, he made friends with Carlos and also with Carlos' uncountable connections and friends, including a disheveled, [[Bob|brooding wizard (Bob)]]. Bat Cat would often help get fish to support Carlos' fish shop, and on an interview with the local news station(Silly City: NOW) stated that "If it wasn't for my good friend Bat Cat, I would have been stinking wit' da fishies." There was one friend he did not take a liking to, Bob, who would mumble mysterious plots around him. Bat Cat grew very suspicious. Eventually, when he grew older, he was no longer able to fly, and so decided to settle down in the cave. Jinx would often visit him and fetch mosquitoes for him. One day, Jinx wanted more power to her organization so that she could defeat [[The Beast]] after it had been awakened, and so she asked for help from Bat Cat. Bat Cat agreed. His time in The GOODings was uneventful, and Bat Cat grew bored of this. In his boredom he decided to join a cult called The Cult of the Black Book of Silly Magic, he left though because the group was having a power struggle. Bat Cat struggled to find food, So he decided to head for B.A.D. for help. He ended up being recruited into espionage by [[Gakster]] and began working as a spy providing lots of intel for B.A.D. During the wars of silly and unsilly, Bat Cat's cover was breaking loose, and he was on thin ice. Many of The GOODings were suspicious of him. During an important battle, one of the members of B.A.D, suspected to be George accidentally greeted Bat Cat. Bat Cat grew nervous. During his decisive battle with Glorpo, Bat Cat was also fighting against a strong force, as Glorpo was supported from far away by Bob. He knew it. Bob was conspiring against him all this time. Glorpo killed him, but a rogue spell landed on them, killing them as well. This would lead Bob to become even more reclusive, sending him into a mental breakdown. ==Personality== Bat Cat is often very cunning and intelligent, yet a bit naive. He never married, and was abandoned as an orphan upon birth due to his weird looking face. Bat Cat has a tough outlook on life, but also engages in lots of trickery and misdemeanor. Deep down though, he has good intentions. ==Trivia== *Bat Cat's favorite food is mosquitoes. *Bat Cat once applied to work as a mosquito exterminator for [[E. Scrunk]] but was declined because E. Scrunk also secretly knew Bat Cat was conspiring with the villains. {{Top|Canon}}

}}'''Big Billy''' is a one of the many, iconic, Silly Cat's.  Big Billy is a professional singer worldwide, not to be confused with [[Billy]]. He claims to have a big wet willy, no one really doesn't know what that is, but people assume its just a catchphrase by him.

==Biography==
Big Billy was born in the slums of Regalus (now called "Big Billy Land" due to him being such a important figure). From a young age, he attended the public school. In there, he befriended many people who had an interest in music. From then on Big Billy would develop a love for singing, and discovering his talent. He would be chosen to sing the national anthem of Regalus at his school, and was frequently invited to talent shows. In one of his talent shows at school, some officials recognised his great capabilities, and gave him the opportunity to sign a contract with RSR(Regalus Silly Records) to make him own album, with a great budget.

Big Billy from then on would make his first album: White Roses and Beautiful Ambers. This album was composed of many different songs with oriental, folk, and classical styles, and the lyrics were based off of poems he wrote years ago. One of the most famous songs from the album, which went on to be released as a single alongside other songs from White Roses and Beautiful Ambers was the song: "The swan's voice flows through our rivers" which is colloquially known as Swan's Voice. The song speaks about the beauty of nature as a metaphor for community, and has the message of uniting despite differences.

However, Big Billy was later able to collaborate with Big Floppa, and they made many songs together, which was put into a joint album called Never Forget Love. The songs had a combination of Big Billy's beautiful voice and poetry combined with Floppa's ingenious rhymes and allegories. The instruments used combined different styles of music and utilized many offbeat instruments and synthesizers. It went on to become the most famous album in the whole wide world.

Billy continued his career and donated many of his profits to charity. The famous video of Big Billy talking about "Going clearly" and having "The biggest wet willy" is what made him go famous.

==Trivia==
*His favorite food is ramen noodles, and fried chicken.
**He also likes spicy versions of foods, including his favorite foods.

title: Ben
wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Canadian}}|imagecaption=Ben the Obese cat, staring in confusion.|name=Ben|image=Confusion of a Cat, pretty silly tho.png|aliases=*Chonkers
*Ben the Chonky cat|birthDate=2020|birthPlace=USA|gender=Male|fur=White|tiktok=benchonkycat|height=3 sauces|weight=50 sauces|affiliation=The GOODings|occupation=Being confused by everything|breed=Napoleon Minuet}}


==About==
<span style="font-size:12px;"><span style="font-family:Times New Roman;">
'''Ben''' is a rather silly cat that is confused about anything depending on what they seem like. He is a popular cat, which he was used in multiple memes as a reaction. He is a white colored obese cat with black spots on his head and with yellowish eyes. He is often known as being rewarded as the most confused cat ever. 

==Biography==
<span style="font-size:12px;"><span style="font-family:Times New Roman;">
In his lore, he was a cat that was bullied for being confused over his classes, and is told that he should be respected, while he is very confused. His brain is about as confused as the cat, and he often asks for food nicely, while he is confused. He also asks nicely for a drink.  While his time being bullied, he had to tell his mom he doesn't want to go to school anymore due to the massive bullying, known as the most brutal bullying known to cat. He is deeply frightened because of his nightmares of all the bullying. He later trained for the GOODings and became a part of them.

<span style="font-size:12px;"><span style="font-family:Times New Roman;"><span style="font-size:12px;"><span style="font-family:Times New Roman;">He had an idea to start up a city by the name of "Confuseville'. The city was successfully made with no issues and became the mayor for the city. The city has a total of 2,000 cats. The Blacksmith is called "Beston", who is Ben's brother. He is best known for making a statue of the mayor, but so far, we haven't gotten any backstory behind him, all we know is his name, being a brother of Ben, and the fact he made the statue. Beston also has made collaborations with Ben.

<span style="font-size:12px;"><span style="font-family:Times New Roman;">Ben has made several buildings, including "Airport 532' with Ben's signature labeled on each name of these buildings. His dreams are when he gets his own comedy show, which he began to think after making his own city.

==Trivia ==

*He is owned by a Tik-Toker that posts videos about their cat.
*His earliest use as a meme was in December 2022, and started as a Russian community in 2021.

He is one of the major members of [[The GOODings]] and one of Milly's friends in "The Shining Fate of The Universe" In the series: He is a member of The GOODings and a part-time employee at The Big Poo Factory, a factory that produces a special type of stone (which is just a solid and petrified dierrhea and dirt mix) which is known to give unlimited nuclear power He was popularized by the youtuber and internet funny man 'Apandah' in late 2020, and was first mention in his video "WHO IS BIG POO???. == Apperances == === Silly Cats === Big Poo is a very important character in the series, due to being a fan-favorite and a major character he got a few episodes dedicated to him such as "The Heist" in season 2 where he and his pals raided a huge pantry just for the shits and giggles and "How a single town around a factory produced a legend" which explain's Big Poo's origins === Silly Cats: Babies === Big Poo is a minor character and was flanderized and reduced to "Naughty child", this change obviously angered Big Poo stans which also contributed to the spinoff's cancellation === Silly Cats: Online === Big Poo appears in the tutorial where he teaches you how to do certain attacks and also can be summoned as a ally in boss fights == Biography == WIP

Since that. bert decided to create the popular car company called "Meowswagen" a cat-driven car company. he married a Unnamed wife and created 4 children. his company suffered 2 bankrupts. threats from kitler and his army and much, much, more. Bert retired in 1988 and given his role to a random hard working employee. in 2009, the 2009 CEO and bert decided to giveaway the CEO rank to a random winner. the winner was [[Bob]] A wizard. but due to causing economical damages by using magic on the vehicles, soon given away by the current CEO, Harry. in the current days. despite bert being 109 years old. still goes healthy and sadly has alzheimer. the doctors made a mistake, he wasn't suppost to die in 1 month. he was suppost to die in 2 years. (either dying old or alzheimer) In Revelations, bert was at his hospital bed with his youngest son, jayne. when he heard the news about the [[Meowswagen AI Scandal]], he told his son, jayne to get the wheelchair and help him out. when they arrived at the Meowswagen Headquaters. Hinkle Dinkle was there, talking to harry. bert yelled at hinkle dinkle for the betrayal in their offer, and also harry. harry defends that he didn't knew what hinkle dinkle was doing to the company and soon got into bert's side. bert asked jayne to call the cops. as jayne gets his phone, he stopped in his tracks after being gun-point by hinkle dinkle. hinkle dinkle threatens them by killing everyone on this room. bert got an one last offer to hinkle dinkle. bert's promise was to pay half of the lawsuits then dinkle pays half, bert promises he won't tell anyone who was behind the attacks of the scandal. bert accepted the offer, both of them payed half of the lawsuits and bert released a world wide apology to every loved one who died by the scandal ==Personality== Not much is known about him. but he is generally grumpy and overprotective on his company and his youngest son jayne.

Bert retired in 1988 and given his role to a random hard working employee. in 2009, the 2009 CEO and bert decided to giveaway the CEO rank to a random winner. the winner was Bob A wizard. but due to causing economical damages by using magic on the vehicles, soon given away by the current CEO, Harry. in the current days. despite bert being 109 years old. still goes healthy and sadly has alzheimer. the doctors made a mistake, he wasn't suppost to die in 1 month. he was suppost to die in 2 years. (either dying old or alzheimer) In Revelations, bert was at his hospital bed with his youngest son, jayne. when he heard the news about the Meowswagen AI Scandal , he told his son, jayne to get the wheelchair and help him out. when they arrived at the Meowswagen Headquaters. Hinkle Dinkle was there, talking to harry. bert yelled at hinkle dinkle for the betrayal in their offer, and also harry. harry defends that he didn't knew what hinkle dinkle was doing to the company and soon got into bert's side. bert asked jayne to call the cops. as jayne gets his phone, he stopped in his tracks after being gun-point by hinkle dinkle. hinkle dinkle threatens them by killing everyone on this room. bert got an one last offer to hinkle dinkle. bert's promise was to pay half of the lawsuits then dinkle pays half, bert promises he won't tell anyone who was behind the attacks of the scandal. bert accepted the offer, both of them payed half of the lawsuits and bert released a world wide apology to every loved one who died by the scandal Personality [ ] Not much is known about him. but he is generally grumpy and overprotective on his company and his youngest son jayne.

'''Bentley''' is a silly kitty born at the beginning of the universe. He is also the archrival of [[Billy]]. He was part of a group, known by [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]] as, The Esoteric Council.

== Biography ==
Bentley was born at the beginning of time, but he does not remember anything from that era. This is because he rejected The Esoteric Council by manifesting into a physical body. Bentley was bored on his existence on Silly Planet, so he founded a farming company. In it, he grew watermelons. He also grew [[Melon Cat|Melon Cat's]] as well.

One day when he was farming, a kitty named Billy walked over. Billy asked if he needed any help. Bentley was having a hard day, so he declined. Billy insisted, but Bentley didn't let up and kicked out of his barn with a crowbar. This would begin Bentley and Billy's rivalry. They fought and fought, but Bentley always succeeded because of his knowledge of silly magic. He had this knowledge through his experience on The Esoteric Council.

In one of their fights, Billy retreated down the river and into the forbidden cave. Billy accidentally knocked into a boulder and the boulder unleashed [[The Beast]] and [[The Yeast]], who had been trapped in the cave to protect civilization. Billy had caused doom among the universe. Finally, in one of their fights, Bentley defeated Billy by striking him in the knee, rendering him paralyzed. Later Billy and Bentley had sons. Bentley had [[Armoured Cat]] and Billy had [[Bubble Cat]].

Their rivalry continued into their children. Bentley tried to prevent his son from attacking Bubble Cat by locking him in his barn, but Armoured Cat escaped and was killed by Bubble Cat. Bentley is still alive to this day, tending to his watermelons. Billy on the other hand, died because of his own son.

== In real life ==
In real life, Bentley is known as [https://twitter.com/takeru0321neko/status/1459823058751922179 Takeru]. He gained notoriety because of several edits that made him look like an alien.

Soon after that, Bentley became an inside joke in the DOOM Eternal and DOOM 2016 modding communities, with various edits, mods, and memes being posted to the DOOM 2016+ Modding Discord server frequently.

The first ever post about Takeru was named "Hey! i found you" (translated to English).

== Trivia ==

* He likes staring deep into people's souls for an unknown reason
* He likes watermelons

== Other Appearances ==

* Roblox Regretevator, being named [https://regretevator.fandom.com/wiki/Jermbo Jermbo]
* [[File:The only and one, jermbo.png|left|thumb]]

}}'''Bernard''' is an evil doctor that escaped a mental hospital and became assistant to [[Dr. Silly Willy]] also known as Dr. Silly for short. Dr. Silly is known as one of the best lobotomy doctors ever known.

==Biography==
Bernard was born in the Silly City Outskirts. He was introduced to the world in a brutal fashion. His parents were robbed and killed right in front of him. He was then kidnapped and brought to the criminals hideout. Once they got there, they planned to kill him, as he was a witness to their actions. They opened the ruck sack and the first criminal was surprised when Bernard bit him on the neck. The bite left the criminal bleeding. Bernard had pierced his artery and he started bleeding out really fast. The second criminal, in shock, lifted up his gun and shot at Bernard. The criminal was stunned to realize Bernard caught the bullet between his teeth. Bernard spat the bullet back at him and the second criminal died.

Bernard left the building and was later found by the police. The police gave him into foster care after asking him about the criminals. Bernard lied and told them the criminals got away. Bernard did not do this as of fear for his arrest, he did it simply out of the fun of sending the police on a wild goose chase. Due to the shock of the incident that began his life, Bernard turned into a sadistic killer without any emotion but enjoyment to see people suffer.

Bernard continued killing people. This was until the authorities caught him and threw him into a mental hospital. Bernard still holds resentment for those cops that arrested him to this day. He made friends there with a prisoner named [[Pobis]]. Pobis helped him escape, by teaching him how to fit through the cell windows. Bernard ran from the mental hospital into Silly City. He bought a flat with some money he stole from a homeless guy.

Bernard lived in his flat, jobless, until he saw an advert in the newspaper. You can probably expect at this point that Bernard had already killed the man delivering the newspapers. Bernard applied for the ad, the only problem was that he had no medical degree. So, Bernard had two options: Give up or steal someone else's. Obviously, he chose the second option. He killed his local doctor and stole their medical degree and ID. Bernard went to the interview and succeeded. The ad was for Dr. Silly's lobotomy office. The reason why Bernard applied was so that he could kill more people.

Bernard went to the office and walked in the door. He was met with a warm welcome by Dr. Silly. He urged him to sit down and watch his operation. Dr. Silly did not trust Bernard to perform the operation. Bernard did not know why but it was because the doctor's ID he stole had never performed a lobotomy before, so this showed up as Bernard not performing a lobotomy before. Slowly, Dr. Silly began to trust Bernard. He officially designated him as his assistant. He now trusted him to a lobotomy by himself. Before, Bernard had, against his deepest urges, avoided killing his patients, as Dr. Silly was always watching him do it. Bernard knew he would get fired if he killed a patient.

Now that Bernard was alone, Bernard could do whatever he wanted. Horrifically, Bernard severely disfigured the patient. The details of such disfigurement, shall be spared from this article, as even the most strong-stomached kitties would barf upon hearing the story. Bernard dumped the body in the back dumpster and left it to rot. He lied to Dr. Silly, telling him the patient ran off in the middle of the surgery. At first, Dr. Silly believed him, but the blood-soaked operation table, made him think otherwise.

To this day, Bernard still kills people without Dr. Silly's knowledge. Although, the closeness to Dr. Silly finding out is getting thinner by the day.

== Trivia ==

* The way Bernard used to escape the hospital bars, was to not eat for a week. Bernard was cruel in his escape and just kicked Pobis back in
* His favorite part of the body to steal from his patients, is the liver
* He likes the taste of blood

title: Bb
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Bb|image=Bb.png|imagecaption=Bb at his house.|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Ukrainian}}|aliases=Bee, B|relatives=Evil Cat|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Varied|birthDate=November 25th, 1987|birthPlace=Kyiv, Ukraine|marital=Divorced|gender=Male|fur=Mostly Black, with some White|height=7 sauces|weight=10 sauces|firstappears=The Revenge of Bb|lastappears=The Revenge of Bb}}

Bb is a cat that first appeared in the feature-length film "The Revenge of Bb". He is extremely silly, and his biological brother is [[Evil Cat]], despite them being born in different places. Bb doesn't know that he's his brother, but Evil Cat does.

== The Revenge of Bb ==

=== Act 1 (upbringing) ===
The Revenge of Bb opens with Bb's birth in a hospital. He was born disabled, with his front right paw not connecting with the rest of the nervous system correctly, leading to weird movement from it. His upbringing was troubled but bearable. He did get bullied for his disability but the school was one of the most progressive in town. He got decent grades and never got in trouble, he was the definition of above average, but not perfect. After graduating high school, he went to college. There was hell for Bb. The college was riddled with corruption and bullying. Due to his disability and small size relative to everyone else, he constantly got picked on. It eventually got to him. The next day, he found the code to his father's gun safe. He loaded it, and then went to school...
[[File:Cah.png|frameless|533x533px|left]]
'''BREAKING: 2 STUDENTS OF SILLYCATE UNIVERSITY WERE SHOT BY ANOTHER STUDENT, WHO RAN AWAY SHORTLY AFTER.'''

Bb felt... satisfied in that moment. He had no regret for what he thought was killing his bullies. He ran off, with his parents on the news, they were arrested for this whole debacle. After this, major talks about bullying were initiated to improve the country. As regarding to the bullies' parents, they were arrested too, which some thought to be insensitive. As for Bb, he ran away to another city. He thought his only way of moving forward with life now was, being a criminal. He decided to join the criminal organization [[B.A.D]], ending up in one of the lowest ranks possible.

=== Act 2 (new life) ===
After killing 2 people, he realized the value of life, and also... The thrill of killing. Realizing the value of life, and that value was too little to care... He decided the way to rise up the ranks was to not only bring cash, but to bring corpses. His method was the average night alley robbery, but after he got the money, he would shoot the victim/s in the legs so they cant escape, and then drag them away to the base. He quickly earned the reputation of the most violent low rank in the B.A.D. In just 3 months of repeating the same routine, he rose enough to start participating in important missions. He was in a group with Evil Cat. They felt a brotherly bond, but they thought that they just shared their bloodlust... Little did they know. For the mission, they had to kidnap a rich [[The GOODings]]' investors daughter for ransom. They drove over to their mansion, and began stealthily killing/disarming all the guards. They reached the daughter's room but they were seen by the guard and everyone was informed. After Bb's group was aware of it, they barged in the daughter's room, but she was gone. They began running around the mansion looking for her, and eventually found her in a closet. They captured her and were about to drive away. But, Bb saw a guard crawling with his last breaths towards the car trying to save the woman. Bb was about to kill him, but he hesitated. He hesitated, and... got shot. He fainted. He woke up... in a hospital? Once he remembered what happened he asked "What Happened?" the doctors responded; "You were laying on the ground outside of the mansion of the rich cat... Sorry, you failed to protect his daughter." ... Bb instantly realized what happened. He looked over at the news, and there it was: '''BREAKING: THE BIG SPONSOR OF THE GOODINGS, GOOG'S DAUGHTER HAS BEEN KIDNAPPED, ALL THEIR GUARDS WERE KILLED BUT A FEW!''' ... He asked the doctors: "Am I ok to leave?" the doctors responded: "Yes, the bullet wound is healed." he was happy he didn't get caught, but he was confused as to why he woke up in the public hospital, but not the B.A.D's hospital. He looked over at his phone and checked the B.A.D news and members app... He was logged out, and when he tried to log in it came up "User non-existent"... He wondered. He decided to come over to the B.A.D base. When he came inside, everyone pulled out their guns and pointed them at him. '''"Huh? What's wrong?" "Get out, B." "Huh??? What do you mean?!" "YOU stole our spotlight." "HUH?" "You rose the ranks at an incredible rate, what you did in 2 months we could only do in 2 years." "What is the meaning of this?" "We reported you dead. You are no longer in the B.A.D" "..." "Jealousy, truly a cat's biggest weakness." "GET OUT!" "Kill me, if you dare. You're only a-" "''GUNSHOT''"''' ... The room went silent. Where once stood Bb, now stood... Evil Cat. Bb hesitated again, but when he realized he was frozen, he willed himself into movement and ran out the room with Evil Cat in his arms. '''"Why?" "Those morons... B.A.D isn't about the ranks, or about your status. It's about your WORTH and STRENGTH th-" "WHY DID YOU DO IT?" "...I'll be fine, brother."''' After that, Evil Cat fainted. Bb knew of Evil Cat's infeline strength and thus knew he would be fine, but this all realized the nature of B.A.D. He decided to have his vengeance. He made a small base in a junkyard where he unloaded some guns. He decided to leave Evil Cat there and go have his revenge.

=== Act 3 (seeking truth) ===
He went to the B.A.D super ultra mega secret base which houses [[Gakster]], the leader of B.A.D. He sneaked past the guards slowly, and knocking out some. He was looking for Gakster's office but then a guard spotted him, and shot him, barely missing. It alarmed every other guard so he had to hurry up. He eventually found it, he went in, right in front of Gakster and locked the door so nobody comes in. Gakster was surprised at first. "Bb, more commonly known as B, the deceased B.A.D member? thats quite a shock." "You foster an environment of jealous, untrustworthy individuals in the higher ranks. Why would you do that, don't you want strong and trustworthy felines?" "You are not a fool." "What?" "Do you truly believe that, those kind of felines will get anywhere close to me?" "..." "Of course not. I treat those kinds of people like numbers, but I still look out for them in-case they become anything truly of worth." "...Hu-" "Sorry, I misspoke. You were not a fool. By questioning my word, you just became one." "Egotistical." "For trying to break in to my mansion, you shall die." Gakster and Bb both pulled out their guns and started fighting. They were using objects in the room back and forth as shields, but eventually, one bullet grazed Gakster. "Tickles..." Gakster slid in between the tables that were protecting Bb and attempted to shoot him but he barely missed. Eventually, the guards managed to break down the door to Gakster's office and fire was opened towards the whole room. Just about there, Bb ran out of ammo so he tripped one of the guards and got an automatic gun and started shooting through Gakster's table, which while Bb was focused on that, Gakster crawled out of it, and shot Bb, hitting his front right paw. "You think that did anything?" Which then... Bb shot him in the head, which knocked out Gakster and seemingly hit him. Bb was masterfully dodging all the shots coming from the guards to quickly escape out of the window behind the main table which was left shot through. He ran to his junkyard, and the guards tried to keep up with his speed, but their heavy body armor slowed them down enough for Bb to be lost. Thankfully for the B.A.D, the bullet BARELY grazed his brain, so Gakster turned out fine after some wound-treating. After this, Bb is seen sitting near a campfire with Evil Cat, discussing their future, and in the last moments of the movie, Evil Cat is seen walking away from the campfire.

Act 3 (seeking truth) [ ] He went to the B.A.D super ultra mega secret base which houses Gakster , the leader of B.A.D. He sneaked past the guards slowly, and knocking out some. He was looking for Gakster's office but then a guard spotted him, and shot him, barely missing. It alarmed every other guard so he had to hurry up. He eventually found it, he went in, right in front of Gakster and locked the door so nobody comes in. Gakster was surprised at first. "Bb, more commonly known as B, the deceased B.A.D member? thats quite a shock." "You foster an environment of jealous, untrustworthy individuals in the higher ranks. Why would you do that, don't you want strong and trustworthy felines?" "You are not a fool." "What?" "Do you truly believe that, those kind of felines will get anywhere close to me?" "..." "Of course not. I treat those kinds of people like numbers, but I still look out for them in-case they become anything truly of worth." "...Hu-" "Sorry, I misspoke. You were not a fool. By questioning my word, you just became one." "Egotistical." "For trying to break in to my mansion, you shall die." Gakster and Bb both pulled out their guns and started fighting. They were using objects in the room back and forth as shields, but eventually, one bullet grazed Gakster. "Tickles..." Gakster slid in between the tables that were protecting Bb and attempted to shoot him but he barely missed. Eventually, the guards managed to break down the door to Gakster's office and fire was opened towards the whole room. Just about there, Bb ran out of ammo so he tripped one of the guards and got an automatic gun and started shooting through Gakster's table, which while Bb was focused on that, Gakster crawled out of it, and shot Bb, hitting his front right paw. "You think that did anything?" Which then... Bb shot him in the head, which knocked out Gakster and seemingly hit him. Bb was masterfully dodging all the shots coming from the guards to quickly escape out of the window behind the main table which was left shot through. He ran to his junkyard, and the guards tried to keep up with his speed, but their heavy body armor slowed them down enough for Bb to be lost. Thankfully for the B.A.D, the bullet BARELY grazed his brain, so Gakster turned out fine after some wound-treating. After this, Bb is seen sitting near a campfire with Evil Cat, discussing their future, and in the last moments of the movie, Evil Cat is seen walking away from the campfire.
