Status Alive Nationality American Biographical Information Date of Birth March 13th 2017 Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Male Mixed breed brown and white Height Weight 20 sauces 28,538 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance TBA freddys steakburgers idk This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! Information [ ] Big Tom is a very silly and funny cat, He is well known for he used to be the 2nd fattest cat before Buffed Kitty became the worlds fattest, and can be considered as a semi-immovable object able to withstand powerful forces, he is also extremely calm, almost never gets angry, Buffed Kitty used to bully them for being so fat but now Big Tom is able to get his own back, he has started to lose weight but still weighs a extremely large amount of sauces. It's impressive his legs can handle the weight of 28,538 sauces. Big tom also participates in The GOODings by defending people in the group against attacks that they are mostly unable to avoid, he almost died multiple times thanks to his strange luck, however soon his luck will run out.

title: Billy
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Billy|aliases=Billy Bean|relatives=Milly (Former Wife)|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Fighting with Bentley|marital=Too small|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=2 sauces|weight=2 sauces|eyes=Green|appearsin=Most episodes after billy|debut=Billy!|image=Billy.png|status={{Deceased}}|deathDate=12 January 2003|deathPlace=His own bathtub|firstappears=Bathtub Antics|lastappears=Milly's Boring Life|imagecaption=Billy taking a little bubble bath.|fur=Beige and brown|breed=American Shorthair}}
Billy is a minor villain in the [[Silly Cats]] series, appearing only in silly cats. He is the father of [[Bubble Cat]], and is the rival of [[Bentley]], the father of [[Limecat]]. He married [[Milly]], but they later broke up because Billy joined [[B.A.D]].

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
In [[Silly Cats]], Billy appears as a minor antagonist that is the archrival of Bentley, and the lover of [[Milly]].

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
In [[Silly Cats: Online]], Billy makes a minor appearance. He is found at his house's doorstep. If you walk up to him, he will shout "I hate Bentley!" Besides this, he serves no other purpose.

== Biography ==
Billy was born at the beginning of time. He doesn't remember anything from this era though. This is most likely thought to be by [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]], that Billy was a member of the Esoteric Council, but he was kicked out because he rejected the council in favor of manifesting into a physical body. All he remembers is waking up in a bathtub.

For many years, he sat in the bathtub refusing to move. Until, he heard noises outside of the house he was dwelling in. His curiosity got the best of him, and he decided to see what the noises were. When he finally got out of the bathtub, the soap suds remained on his fur. From his doorstep, he saw the noises was a lone farmer harvesting his [[Watermelon Cat]] harvest. Billy, being in the bathtub for so long, didn't really know what a Melon Cat was, but he thought the farmer needed some help. He walked up to the farmer, and he tapped on his shoulder and asked if he needed any help. The farmer declined, saying he was already having a bad day and that company was the last thing he wanted.

Billy soon learned that the farmer's name was Bentley. Billy didn't see the reasoning behind Bentley's refusal, so he kept asking. Bentley started getting annoyed and he eventually got so fed up, he kicked Billy out of his barn and locked the door with a crowbar. Billy was taken aback, as he thought that his kindness wasn't being accepted. So he thought that since he didn't want kindness, he would give him the opposite. Thus began Billy and Bentley's infamous rivalry. Their scuffles ranged from irritating pranks to full on fist-fighting. Although, Bentley always succeeded because of his advanced knowledge of silly magic. They kept fighting and fighting, but Billy started getting bored, so he would often do other things as well.

Billy, tired of the fighting for the day, decided to go to the local theme park, [[Sillyton Adventureland]]. He often liked to walk down the boardwalk, next to the artificial lake. He liked seeing the changing game stalls, and seeing who would win the biggest prizes. He had just purchased a giant cone of cotton candy from a vendor, when he bumped into Milly. Billy was petrified when his cotton candy hit the floor. Milly apologized profusely, and offered to buy him a new one. Billy with tearful eyes, accepted the kind gesture. The two started chatting and they soon found that they had a lot of similar interests. After this meeting, the soon fell in love and they started dating.

Even with these developments, Bentley and Billy's rivalry persisted. Bentley had pushed Billy into retreating after giving him some serious bruises. Billy tumbled down the river and stumbled upon the forbidden, Thistle Cave. Billy didn't know what this cave was for, which would be a costly mistake. Billy accidentally bumped a boulder out of the way and thus, he released the supreme evil of [[The Beast]] and [[The Yeast]]. Billy had released doom upon the universe. Soon, Milly and Billy got married and they couldn't be happier.

This lasted about two years, until Billy was pressurized by Bentley joining [[The GOODings]]. Bentley wanted to help defeat The Beast like the rest of The GOODings. This was a very tough decision for Billy to make, since Milly was a loyal member of The GOODings. Billy soon made the decision to join B.A.D. He did this because of his rivalry against Bentley. This would cause Milly and Billy to break up. Billy feeling lonely after the break up, decided to adopt a child. Billy adopted Bubble Cat, and he became his surrogate son.

Later on, Billy and Bentley had their final battle. Bentley struck Billy in the knee with his crowbar, which rendered Billy paralyzed. Billy had to use his bathtub as a wheelchair. Billy relied on Bubble Cat, but he started becoming annoyed of relentlessly taking care of Billy, so Bubble Cat left Billy to die. Billy and Bentley's still continued in their respective sons, Bubble Cat and Limecat.

== Trivia ==

* Billy loves soap🧼
* His second favorite food is cotton candy
* Even though he joined B.A.D, he still loved Milly deeply

Glinkert (Cousin)|affiliation=|occupation=Harborer of evil|marital=|birthDate=Near the beginning of time|birthPlace=The Void|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=2 Sauces|weight=4 Sauces|eyes=Black|appearsin=Every episode since this is bingus|debut=This is bingus|image=Bingus.png|status={{Deceased}}|imagecaption=Bingus plotting|nationality=Bingustani}} '''Bingus''' is a hairless sphinx cat that was born near the beginning of time. He was the president of a nation named Bingustan, it was quite small but possessed a strong economy and military for a state of its size. ==Biography== === In the Void=== Bingus was born near the beginning of time being one of the first silly kitties. He was created by a mysterious entity called Cwawa, which is thought to be The Esoteric Council. He was born with his brother [[Bungus]] and his cousins [[Gusic]], [[Plimpus]], [[Q The Cat|Q]], [[Glinkert]], and [[Gakster]]. Bingus in this time was jealous of how much time Gusic was spending with Bungus instead of him. Bingus plotted an attack against Bungus. He waited for the perfect time, and that's when Gakster left for a trip and Bingus lunged towards Bungus. This event would later be known as Bingus' betrayal. Little did he know that this would set the stage for all of the events that followed. His cousins were angry at this betrayal. So Bungus, Q, and Gusic teamed up against Bingus. Bingus retaliated by casting a curse on the brothers. It separated them for what he thought would be an eternity. In this time of banishment, Bingus built up an army. This army would later collect to form the military state of Bingustan though he did not use it in the battle after their escape, as it was in a time of economic surplus and he did not want to ruin it with war. Without Bingus' knowledge the brothers Q, Bungus, and Gusic all got sucked back into the Universe through trial and error. Q was excited at the prospect of getting revenge and convinced the others to defeat Bingus once and for all. They were successful but as a result, Q was tragically killed by a rebound attack. The curse was redirected into Bingus' soul, sending him to silly heck forever. But this lead to the creation of The Beast and The Yeast, the true embodiments of evil. Because of his death his nation of Bingustan collapsed sending the region into an economic turmoil. ==="Redemption" Arc=== Bingus, trying to redeem himself, created a silly kitty in his image, [[Bingus/Bingus the II|Bingus the II]]. He tasked Bingus the II to help [[The GOODings]]. Bingus the II wasn't very helpful as he was corrupted turning him into Brainus. Brainus actually tried to defeat The GOODings. Brainus was ultimately defeated. Bingus still spends his days in silly heck, trying to redeem himself. All of his attempts have been unsuccessful.{{Top|Canon}} [[Category:Stubs]]

title: BOB of Bobstein

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Bob of Bobstein|image=https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=xdYTaoftSgk|nationality=Moisturian|status=Alive and revengful|aliases=Bob Bobbinson|relatives=No one they all died|occupation=Revenging Viper Bridgeman|birthDate=18/12/1669|birthPlace=Moisture farm lane 69 Moisture farm kingdom|gender=Man|deathDate=December 24th 2021}}

Bob of Bobstein, 

One of the most feared cats in the universe. When he was young his mother was a furry and his dad was an alien. He had to make money himself so he went to the king of the moisture farm. This was Viper Bridgeman, he asked him if he could have some money but he said: "Only if you defeat the Poopplanet cats". This was such a shock for Bob because he was scared. So he left and became a garbage man. Although some time later he saw his friend and the king of another kingdom Snuggles. He told him his story and they went on a mission together to get Bob of Bobstein his money. After a whole second they arrived at the poopplanet. When they got out of their spaceship they saw some of the soldiers of the poopplanet army. They were coming at them, because they had seen Bob en Snuggles. Just as they were getting captured the brilliant Bob of Bobstein with an IQ of -1 came up with the idea of playing peek-a-boo. Because Isaac Mewton once said, if you cant see them they can't see you. Because of this they could escape and went up to the castle, where the king lived. Once they arrived there was a whole army outside, they couldn't run anymore they had to fight. Snuggles got his cannon and was shooting at the enemy. Bob helped him in his tank and together they succeeded. They went in to the castle and found the king Goobler. They tickled him and he surrendered, they had the defeated the poopplanet army. Once Bob of Bobstein got back to his own planet he immediately went to Viper Bridgeman to collect his money, but instead of giving it to him, he ate it. This was his villain story.

Later in his life he went on to tickle Viper Bridgeman for a whole minute of which Viper Bridgeman died, Bob of Bobstein is still one of the most feared cats in the whole universe and he is still taking revenge on the moisture farm kingdom.

title: Bingus/Bingus the II

infobox.name: Bingus the II
infobox.imagecaption: Bingus the II staring into the void

wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Bingus the II}} {{Subpage|title=Bingus|button=[[Bingus|Bingus]] [[Bingus/Bingus_the_II|Bingus the II]]|img=Bingus.png|speed=60}}{{Top|Canon}} {{Character|name=Bingus the II|image= Bingus the II.png|Normal Brainus.png|Brainus |imagecaption=Bingus the II staring into the void|status={{Deceased}}|nationality=Bingustani|relatives=Bingus (Father)
Bungus (Uncle)
Gakster (Uncle)
Q (Uncle)
Gusic (Uncle)
Plimpus (Uncle)
Glinkert (Uncle)|affiliation=The GOODings (Normal) B.A.D (Brainus)|occupation=Helping the GOODings and doing enough good deeds to repay for Bingus' bad deeds|birthDate=1 year after the death of Bingus|birthPlace=The Void|marital=None|gender=Male|breed=Sphinx Cat|fur=None|height=2 Sauces (Normal) 13 Sauces (Brainus)|weight=4 Sauces (Normal) 600 (Brainus)|firstappears=Return of Bingus|lastappears=The Same Fate}}'''Bingus the II''' is a hairless sphinx cat that is a identical clone of [[Bingus]]. Bingus the II was born 1 year after the death of Bingus, for a reason [[VerySilly Team]] is yet to announce. He was born specifically to help [[The GOODings]] so that Bingus could be forgiven, but in the end the curse that killed Bingus managed to infect Bingus the II and it turned him into a raging monster. ==Biography== Bingus the II was born in The Void, the same place Bingus was born, and although he had just been born, he had the knowledge of a fully grown silly cat. As he was in The Void, a voice said to him... "Hello child, I am Bingus, your creator. A curse killed me, but as it killed me, it created you. Now, I want you to help me, you will be brought to Earth SPECIFICALLY to help The GOODings defeat [[The Beast]]. So I can be forgiven, if you succeed, you can stay on Earth, but if not, you will be stuck here forever." Bingus the II agreed and was sent down to Earth, he didn't know where The GOODings were. He searched for a while but he could not find them. He gave up looking at just decided to work at a silly Burger King. But that's when [[Jinx]] and the gang showed up at the Burger King. Bingus the II, knowing who they were, instantly asked if he could help the gang, Jinx accepted him as a replacement for [[Floppa]]. Excited, Bingus the II helped The GOODings as much as possible, like Bingus said. Although Bingus had never mentioned that the curse which killed him was out there, looking for Bingus the II. On a long drive, Jinx asked Bingus the II why he instantly wanted to help them, and why he knew who they were, Bingus the II, coming up with something, said that "You guys are really famous and I just knew I wanted to help you guys defeat The Beast!", Jinx told him that she didn't know her and the gang were famous. Bingus the II is a simple side character from then on until in the episode "The Curse", Bingus the II gets corrupted by a weird glowing white sphere right in front of the gang. Bingus the II started transforming into a bigger and horrific looking hairless cat. '''Brainus''' was born, an evil Bingus with so much brains he had powers. Terrified, Jinx and the gang ran away, a 4 minute chase scene happens, the massive Brainus manages to hit a few members of the gang with their powers, but in the end they get away. From then on Bingus the II is a [[B.A.D]] character who will randomly appear like a jumpscare and start attacking the gang. In the episode "The Same Fate", Brainus is attacking the crew, Jinx, wanting to make things right, tries to get the Bingus the II inside of Brainus out. It nearly works but that's when the gang, thinking Jinx is distracting Brainus, start attacking '''Brainus'''. Jinx tries to stop the gang but it's too late, Brainus' rage makes the ground around crack and open up, revealing pools of lava. one of the gang members jump up and stabs Brainus in the head, he lets out a horrific screech and falls into one of the cracks, they seal up and everything is back to normal...(?) In the end, Bingus the II never did help The GOODings enough to repay for Bingus' bad deeds. Bingus will never have a happy ending, even if there's two of them. [[VerySilly Team]] have yet to answer the millions of questions surrounding Bingus the II that, when read, make him a confusing character.

So I can be forgiven, if you succeed, you can stay on Earth, but if not, you will be stuck here forever." Bingus the II agreed and was sent down to Earth, he didn't know where The GOODings were. He searched for a while but he could not find them. He gave up looking at just decided to work at a silly Burger King. But that's when Jinx and the gang showed up at the Burger King. Bingus the II, knowing who they were, instantly asked if he could help the gang, Jinx accepted him as a replacement for Floppa . Excited, Bingus the II helped The GOODings as much as possible, like Bingus said. Although Bingus had never mentioned that the curse which killed him was out there, looking for Bingus the II. On a long drive, Jinx asked Bingus the II why he instantly wanted to help them, and why he knew who they were, Bingus the II, coming up with something, said that "You guys are really famous and I just knew I wanted to help you guys defeat The Beast!", Jinx told him that she didn't know her and the gang were famous. Bingus the II is a simple side character from then on until in the episode "The Curse", Bingus the II gets corrupted by a weird glowing white sphere right in front of the gang. Bingus the II started transforming into a bigger and horrific looking hairless cat. Brainus was born, an evil Bingus with so much brains he had powers. Terrified, Jinx and the gang ran away, a 4 minute chase scene happens, the massive Brainus manages to hit a few members of the gang with their powers, but in the end they get away. From then on Bingus the II is a B.A.D character who will randomly appear like a jumpscare and start attacking the gang. In the episode "The Same Fate", Brainus is attacking the crew, Jinx, wanting to make things right, tries to get the Bingus the II inside of Brainus out. It nearly works but that's when the gang, thinking Jinx is distracting Brainus, start attacking Brainus . Jinx tries to stop the gang but it's too late, Brainus' rage makes the ground around crack and open up, revealing pools of lava. one of the gang members jump up and stabs Brainus in the head, he lets out a horrific screech and falls into one of the cracks, they seal up and everything is back to normal...(?) In the end, Bingus the II never did help The GOODings enough to repay for Bingus' bad deeds. Bingus will never have a happy ending, even if there's two of them. VerySilly Team have yet to answer the millions of questions surrounding Bingus the II that, when read, make him a confusing character.

title: Bleg
wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character|name=Bleg|image=bleg.jpg|imagecaption=He gib you da roze 🥺🥺🥺🥺🌹|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{German}}|aliases=MEDIC!! (German users)|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=B.A.D and The GOODings|occupation=Medic|marital=Seperated|gender=Male|height=1.5 medi-guns|weight=5 medi-guns}}Bleg is a battle-medic that helps both the [[B.A.D]] and [[The GOODings]], yet is neutral to other groups. Bleg is mostly a kind-hearted guy with an extremely short temper, who often gives roses to patients and those who have been injured, but is incredibly quick to pull out the Tommy gun and {{Spoilers|shoot you point-blank and pump you full of lead}} whenever provoked. Do not piss him off or he will tear the rose he just gave you apart and refuse to re-attach your leg. Even though he uses guns to kill, he also uses them to heal, engineering the medicine cannon that instantly shoots needed nutrients into patients. Even though he has great combat skill, he has sworn to never take step on a battle field unless to heal. His office, fittingly, lies between battlefields of the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]].

== Personality ==
As said earlier, he is loving and caring and will take care of any injured soldier on either the [[B.A.D]] or [[The GOODings]]. Even with his kindness, he is also incredibly short tempered, also stated earlier. He has a strange obsession with guns and has every healing process based on either a gun (healing guns or hurting guns, whichever appropriate) or regular procedures (boo for bonesaw), and is one of the only neutral cats that doesn't create their own mini-side of the war. He is friends with many of the warriors on each side, including [[Jinx]] and [[Evil Cat]].

title: Bleemk
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Bleemk|image=Bleemk.png|aliases=The Follower|status={{Alive}}|relatives=None|affiliation=Gnarp Gnaplians|occupation=gnarper|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Planet K.I.T.Y.|marital=Single|gender=globble mop|fur=green|height=8 sauces|weight=80 sauces|firstappears=The New Planet|lastappears=Medical Madness|imagecaption=Bleemk's physical body}}
[[Category:Stubs]]
[[Category:Ailens]]
{{Wave|B|l|e|e|m|k}} is a member of the Gnarp Gnaplians. He is the second in command to [[Geeble]], and originates from Silly Cats.

==Appearances ==

===Silly Cats===
'''Bleemk''' appears in Silly Cats after season 2, The New Planet. He is the second-in-command to his clowder, and is the main organizer of operations hatched by the Gnarp Gnaplians. He is very favored among the fans of Silly Cats.

===Silly Cats: Online===
'''Bleemk''' appears in Silly Cats: Online in minor areas as a hidden quest or fanservice addition to the game for loyal fans. He can be found in 1/9300 of trees or bushes, and when unlocked, will give you a quest to attack 4 kiwi kittys.

==Biography==
'''Bleemk''' was born in Planet K.I.T.Y. as an orphan, and was recruited early into the Gnarp Gnaplian Army at the age of 1. He was very much traumatised during many missions he was sent on, but eventually gained 4 stars for his great service to his Planet. K.I.T.Y. During his time as a soldier, he would make friends with the fellow soldiers of Sector C, but had a childish rivalry with Glorpo. '''Bleemk''' also made friends with Geeble, who would sneak into their quarters to talk a lot.

During the Rebellions against King Skeeble, '''Bleemk''' did all he can to help out his now best friend, Geeble. He was also mentioned in Geeble's First Speech when he came to power. '''Bleemk''' also organised an interplanetary postal service for the Gnarp Gnaplian planets.

After, '''Bleemk''' was given the role of second-in-command to Geeble when Geeble came in rule of the Gnarp Gnaplians, for his great work as a regent when Geeble was trekking on a mysterious planet named Planet Earth(where this photo was taken) in the name of science.

==Personality==
'''Bleemk''' is very aggressive, intelligent, but often times brooding. If you come near to him, he will tell you war stories like your grandfather. He only knows a very thick accented dialect of Gnarpleese. '''Bleemk''' also follows people. especially [[The GOODings]] creating the running gag of '''Bleemk''' everywhere hiding in a place in the episode
==Trivia==
he is the first Gnarp Gnaplian to his name starts with an different letter than g

'''Bleemk''' can be found on the game files of silly cats: online. According to VerySilly studios that hes not scrapped, but instead he can be found in 1/9300 on the bushes or trees

when the beast captures him, bleemk looked directly at the beast, the beast decided to spare him because “He traumatized me”. Which making bleemk more scarier than the beast

Bleemk is actually an edited image of [[Shark]].

{{Top|Canon}}

"I hear you of needed a go away driver, I dribe..." - Brainless, Episode 96
==Basic Information== His name is Brainless and he was born without a brain :( look how silly and goofy he is though :D Despite not having a brain, his intelligence far passes that of the normal human. His IQ score is one the highest in the whole [[TV Shows|series]], standing at a whopping 212. This allows him to drive vehicles and use weapons like normal people. It is belived that there is brain tissue in almost every other organ in his body During the Heist in episodes 96/7, he left approximately 76 dead and 12 injured in the ensuing chaos. It's all his fault, and he knows it. He caused it. He is simply a demon He enjoys telepathically consuming tacos and was even invited to Super Smash Bros in 2017. However, he declined the offer since he knew he was too powerful for all of the fighters except for Mr Game and Watch. ==Appearances== [[File:I drive.png|thumb|Brainless the cat in Episode 96 as the Gang's getaway driver.]] =====TV Show===== Brainless appears in all 3 of the official "Silly Cats" series. He especially plays a crucial role in the TV show episodes 96 and 97, in which he acts as the Good Guys' getaway driver. This proceeds in both him getting a very high K/D ratio in real life and also having his wife divorce him. He also plays a role in the Filler Episode 102, in which the Good Guys re-enters Money City and meet up with Brainless. Him and [[Big Poo]] then duel it out in an all out dance battle. He was shown in the Unaired Pilot episode as the Bus Driver, deploying the troops in the Season 0 Arc War. =====Silly Cats Babies===== Brainless appears in every episode of Silly Cats Babies. His most notable moment is when he fires a musket at his own parents, nothing else, the show was ass!! =====Silly Cats! Manga===== Brainless plays a similar role to what he did in the pilot episode. In the Manga he is seen multiple times as a Warship Captain, a Bus Driver and also a getaway driver. His main appearance is in the 1st Volume - Pitch Bible - in which he takes [[Big Poo]] to [[Floppa]]'s training facility. It is speculated that he will make a return in the next Volumes but it is currently unknown. {{Top|Canon}}

title: Bob

infobox.name: Bob
infobox.appearsin: A few episodes as a cameo

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Bob|aliases=Party Cat|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=Shadow wizard money gang|occupation=Birthdaying
Wizarding|marital=Unknown|birthDate=1780|birthPlace=His Wizard Tower|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=10 sauces|weight=70 sauces|eyes=Green and flashy|appearsin=A few episodes as a cameo|debut=The kity city (background)|image=<gallery>
Bob New.png|Normal
Catwithpartyhat2.png|With Caption
</gallery>|firstappears=The Kity City|lastappears=Somtimes appears|imagecaption=I must consult the cards...|status={{Alive}}}}'''Bob''' is a magical wizard that is barely seen. He doesn't like company.

A sad-looking cat in a holiday hat in the arms of a bearded man with glasses appeared on the Internet around 2013. The photo became popular after it was included in the justcuteanimals.com compilation with the caption "I'm fat, let's have fun".

Later the photo was repeatedly transformed with the help of captions. For example, on the site funniestmemes.com it was posted with the caption "I must consult the cards..." (It's author clearly noted the similarity of the cap with the attributes of wizards).

== Biography ==
Bob was born in his wizard tower. He was born with magic. Bob also used to study with a good friend of his the arcane arts of Silly Magic under the same Cult of The Black Book of Silly Magic(much before it was rebranded to the Cult of The Grinwatcher), that being the [[Wizard of Spells|Wizard of Spells.]] Though, when the group was taken over by the [[Grinwatcher]] and his underlings, the two friends were split. Bob, who was opposing to the Grinwatcher, left the cult. The Wizard of Spells, though, became one of the Grinwatcher's underlings. This made these former friends enemies. They had many, many fights.

Bob studied and studied in his lair, and so did the Wizard of Spells, who still worked for the Grinwatcher. Bob studied from the books of [[Edward]], and over his time became pen pals with him. One day though, before the day of the Ultimate Wizarding Showdown in the forest, Edward suggested that he reconcile with him. When the time came for the battle, they fought studiously. At the end, when the Wizard of Spells was defeated, Bob had a flashback to their history. He watched over, as the bleeding Wizard of Spells huffed with gritted teeth, clasping his bloody wound. Hesitantly, Bob reached out an arm to the Wizard of Spells as he stood above him. He solemnly said, "We used to be good friends, and it's not too late to be good friends again." The two wizards reconciled, and they had a party 2 days later.

Bob, though after this, grew a bit isolated. His lair was seized by the police, so for a period, he became homeless. The world betrayed him. One day though, he found [[Carlos]] fishing in his shack. The humble fisherman, Carlos, offered for him to stay at his place for the time being, and so Bob began living there. He was quiet and kept to himself, but as time grew, and the silly and unsilly wars began and grew more and more violent, he lost hope in the world. It is also during this time that he came to know [[Bat Cat]]. Bat Cat was his archrival from his early days in the Cult of The Black Book. Unlike with his friend Wizard of Spells, Bat Cat was still his enemy all those years later. This was because he knew Bat Cat was a scheming bastard, and also from conversations with Carlos, knew he was plotting with [[B.A.D]]. He began plotting for a day to kill him.

In the Battle of Kitty City, [[Glorpo]] came down to fight Bat Cat. Bob stayed from afar, and supported Glorpo by attacking Bat Cat. In a sequence of accidents, Glorpo killed Bat Cat, but a rogue spell from Bob killed Glorpo. This moment led Bob to go into a mental breakdown, slowly going insane and being send into the mental hospital. He spends his days there in regret.{{Top|Canon}}

Store Owner | birthDate =31 August, 2006 | birthPlace =Jungle | deathDate =None | deathPlace =None | marital =Single | gender =Male | breed =Jungle Cat | fur =Beige, brown, and white | height =14 Sauces | weight =42 Sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}[[Belize]] is his very distant cousin. ==Biography== Bongo was born to a tribe in the canopies of the Amazon Rainforest. As he was the newest member of this tribe he did not have to do much work. But once he hit the age of 6, he went through the initiation ceremony. This ceremony required him to jump from the tree to the ground and land on his feet. The drop was around 18 meters (61 feet or 10.1666666667 bananas). If he failed this ceremony he would kicked out of the tribe and left to fight for himself. Bongo, nervously, took the leap. He had succeeded. Bongo was welcomed into the tribe and put to work helping the tribe get its food. But Bongo longed for something more, he wished to explore the world. Against the wishes of his tribe, he ran off in the night, sailing off in a small boat. He eventually made it to Silly City. He later opened a wilderness store, which can be found in downtown Silly City. Today he can still be found managing the store, and he is quite friendly if you don't disrespect him.

title: Brunnincast

infobox.name: Brunnincast
infobox.imagecaption: Brunnincast imprisoned in the War of the Silly and Unsilly

wikitext:
{{Character |name= Brunnincast |image= Brunnincast.png |imagecaption= Brunnincast imprisoned in the War of the Silly and Unsilly |status= {{Deceased}} |nationality= {{British}} |aliases= Rabbit Guy |relatives= Unknown |affiliation= Rabbit empire
B.A.D |occupation=Counselor in the Rabbit Empire |birthDate= 6 December 1945 |birthPlace= Almanga Jungle |marital= Single |gender= Male |breed= The offspring of a white rabbit and an Ojos Azules |fur= White |height= 8 sauces |weight= 12 sauces |firstappears= In the Trees |lastappears= War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 3 |deathDate=12 March 1994|deathPlace=No Man's Land}}'''Brunnincast''' appears as a high position in the Rabbit Empire. He later became affiliated with [[B.A.D]] but he was later killed. ==Biography== Brunnincast was first born in the [[Almanga Jungle]]. His parents left him there, abandoning him as they did not know how to take care of him (His parents are unknown, but they are thought to be a rabbit and an Ojos Azules, an extinct cat breed. Later on, a blacksmith rabbit stumbled upon him, and confusing him for a rabbit, brought him to the Rabbit Empire. The Rabbit Empire is located somewhere north of the Arctoac Mountain range centered by [[Mount Silly]]. He was cared for by this blacksmith. From then on, Brunnincast accustomed to be more rabbit-like than cat-like. He had a rough demeanor and was often rude to people he talked to. He often had plans of world domination and to show the world what he was capable of. Brunnincast, wanting to have power, signed up for senator. He wanted to control things but his ultimate goal was to become an emperor. This wouldn't be so simple though, because the emperor position is solely reserved for their family. He did know that becoming counselor could allow him to control somewhat. Unfortunately, for Brunnincast, it was the reign of the 7th Emperor. The 7th Emperor was much stricter than any of the past emperors. He was very disliked by the people and his rivals, but since the 7th Emperor kept the government from changing any of it's positions, he was forced to stay in power. He was relentlessly bullied because of this. He started to grow a hatred for them. Later on, after the 7th Emperor was kicked out of power, and the 8th Emperor had been assassinated, the 9th Emperor was now in power. At the beginning of every Emperor's term, they had to pick a counselor. Brunnincast had little hopes for becoming counselor, but he was surprised when he was picked for counselor. He finally had power. Through this position, he slowly convinced the 9th Emperor to join in on the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], and that it was finally time for them to gain land and power throughout the regions below them. The 9th Emperor seemed like he was almost about to accept his offers until his term ended. Now, it was time for the 10th Emperor. The 10th Emperor was extremely lazy and just kept Brunnincast as his counselor. At the time, the Rabbit Empire was going through an Economic Depression. And through, the 10th Emperor's inaction, the Rabbit Empire collapsed. Riots broke out on the streets, government officials were murdered in their homes, and the royal houses were burned down to the ground. Brunnincast escaped the horror and took a train leading to Silly Country. He arrived at Silly City and was amazed at the wonders around him. Suddenly, the clay brick towers he had called home had turned into bustling streets and sturdy concrete skyscrapers. Brunnincast still had an evil bone in him though, so he joined B.A.D. He met with the rest of the clowder and they began planning on how to fight in the war. The discussion turned heated, but soon they were all interrupted by [[The Beast]]. The Beast said they should just keep terrorizing the region, which would convince The GOODings to try and stop them, and then they could destroy their enemy once and for all. The Beast said they should do it in [[No Man's Land]]. There were no trees or hills to anyone's advantage. All there was, was pure raw strength. The rest of the clowder members applaud him saying it was a fantastic idea. Brunnincast didn't think so as much, but he wasn't going to complain. Later on in the war, in the Battle of Bustein, The GOODings captured Brunnincast and interrogated him. They didn't get any information out of him, so they just left him in an empty room. He sat in this room for months, feeding on roaches and water droplets from the ceiling. Eventually, Brunnicast noticed a pocket knife conveniently next to him and he grabbed it. He cut his ropes off and made his getaway. He ran all the way into No Man's Land. He ran and ran, looking nervously behind him. He suddenly, crashed into a tall sturdy kitty. He was green, strong, and he had a gun pointed towards Brunnincast's head. His name was [[Glooble]]. With one sickening gun shot, Brunnincast was dead. ==Trivia== *It was theorized that one of the emperors was Brunnincast's mother as only the emperors could mate with others species

title: Bubble Cat
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Bubble cat|image=Bubble Cat.png|imagecaption=The Bubble One|aliases=Bobble (Real name)|status=Retired|relatives=Dry cat|affiliation=Bads (Previously)|occupation=Eviling (Previously)|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=The tub|marital=Unknown|gender=Male|breed=Tuxedo cat|fur=Black/White|height=Unknown, 2 sauces (Head)|weight=Unknown|firstappears=The attack of bubbles|lastappears=Show off}}Bubble Cat ran into a filled bathtub with soap bubbles and got this permanent formation. He attempted to use his bubbles to take over the world, but ended up failing because of [[Maxwell]]. He shall always be remembered. His kill count was only 4, but he later said before his defeat that he mourned them all. 

== Appearances ==
Bubble Cat is an exclusive appearance only to [[Silly Cats]], and unlike his archrival, never appears in any other Silly Cats IP.

== Biography ==
Bubble cat was born to his father [[Billy]], the enemy of [[Bentley]]. He walked into a bathtub at 3 years old and was engulfed in bubbles, becoming who he is now. 

As Bubble Cat grew older, he became more distanced from his disheveled father, [[Billy]]. Bubble Cat took to the streets. He tried joining the forces of [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom]], but eventually became a decoy weapon for his gang. During the Clown Uprising, Bubble Cat was put as a ploy to save all the other members from going to jail. He was sent to juvenile hall, but after a decisive battle with George, he was sent to jail.

In jail, he met is cellmate, [[Armoured Cat]]. He was very envious of [[Armoured Cat|Armoured Cat's]] helmet, and became hateful of him very slowly. He only began releasing threats to [[Armoured Cat]] and his father after he found out who his father was, which was exactly when [[Armoured Cat]] left jail with his father's bail.

After he was released, he quickly took to [[E. Scrunk|E. Scrunk's]] office to upgrade his bathtub in preparation for a battle. [[E. Scrunk]] knew what was going to happen, but did not care. He still upgraded his bathtub. From there, Bubble Cat took on a mission to find and kill Armoured Cat. He would send threats to Armoured Cat.

[[Armoured Cat]] and Bubble Cat fought many times after [[Armoured Cat]] escaped the barn. After the final battle with Armoured Cat, Bubble Cat grew malicious and took on a plan to take over the world! He began terrorizing Silly City, and the locations around the Homeless Shelter. [[Maxwell]] heard about this, and assassinated him after he was walking out of a party with a silenced pistol.

This assasination attempt failed, because his bathtub utilized Silly Magic to shield him. This was however, a very near-death experience, which changed him. Bubble Cat decided to not bring this family rivalry down to his child, and reclusively lived in Silly City, secretly donating to charities.

== Personality ==
Bubble Cat used to be extremely malicious, intelligent, and cunning. After his near death experience, however, he became a very quiet, reclusive, and kind person. He became selfless, and now donates to local charities like the S.C.F.H.

== Trivia ==

* He likes cheesecake

title: Buck

infobox.name: Buck
infobox.imagecaption: Buck passed out after drinking too much whiskey

wikitext:
{{Character | name = Buck | image = Buck.jpg | imagecaption = Buck passed out after drinking too much whiskey | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{American}} | aliases = | relatives = Unknown | affiliation = | occupation = Being drunk | birthDate = Unknown | birthPlace = Bush | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = Single | gender = Male | breed = Birman | fur = Beige and white | height = 7 sauces | weight = 15 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Buck''' was a madman until his source of money was taken away by a mysterious government organization. ==Biography== Buck was first born in the rural Silly West. He had a rough start to life since his family was broke and he was born in a thorny bush. Buck never saw the rapid progression of the Silly West for along time. The progression was due to the Silly West Gold Rush, which was kickstarted because of the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. Buck was enrolled into school by a family that found him on the side of a mountain trail. His parents had tossed him into a bush to get rid of him. His parents had zero money, so they panicked and thought the only solution was to get rid of him. His new family treated him very nicely. They gave him expensive clothes (Which at the time only consisted of the normal attire except mad with leather) and gave him whatever he wanted. Buck's life was looking up, until suddenly his house was broken into by a group of radicals. They shot all of his family except him. They left and stole all of their riches. They even stole his fancy clothes. The radicals were abundant in the rural Silly West because there were no sheriffs to manage them. This meant that they could pillage and rob as much as they wanted. Back to square one, Buck had no idea what to do with his life. He looked for jobs and took a variety of offers before eventually quitting all of them. Some of these jobs were carriage cleaning, lasso straightening, and fruit testing. He was bored and had no idea what to do. He eventually found something he wanted to try. As he was walking past a store front, he saw a poster advertising cave exploring. He decided to give it a go. To his surprise, he found that he actually really liked this activity. He would often go ahead of the group, much against the standard cave exploration rules. He loved when he found peculiarly shaped stalactites, or underground lakes. He liked to take dips in the water. His team members often hated him for this, because he was technically tainting the environment. The team came to a consensus and kicked Buck out of the team. Buck was enraged by this and he swore to get revenge on the explorers. On one clear night, Buck sneaked over to the head team member's house. He grabbed a brick and hurled it at their window. The head team member woke up and was furious. He stormed downstairs. Buck underestimated the head team member's attitude. Buck was terrified, since the leader was still following him with his shotgun. Buck eventually got away, but he made sure never to make those encounters again. Again, Buck was looking for a job. When eating his morning breakfast of Whisker-O's™, he saw an ad on his TV showing how profitable owning a store was. He purchased a plot and branded the stall as Buck's shoe shining. Buck was never actually interested in shoe shining, but he thought it would attract customers. When Buck entered the dark building, he surveyed the surroundings. The building was empty except for a mysterious hole in the ground. He noted how a chain led to the bottom. He pulled at the chain and after a bit of pulling, he found out what was at the bottom of the chain. It was a cage. To a lack of better judgement, he entered the cage. Suddenly, the cage lurched downwards and he plunged to the bottom of the hole. Once the cage had made it's landing on the ground, Buck tumbled out of the cage, feeling like was about to vomit. His nausea was soon interrupted when he saw a bright aqua glow. To his surprise, the area he had landed in was a large crystal cave. There seemed to be a series of steps leading towards the largest crystal in the room. He walked up to it and touched it. He was launched back. He watched as the crystal starting glowing brighter and brighter. Soon, he felt a zap go through his entire body. which caused him to blackout. He woke up a few hours later. Soon he realized that the crystal gave him magic powers. Suddenly, he was able to lift heavy objects and levitate. He chose to keep it to himself so that no one could steal his precious crystals. He soon went mad with the power of the crystals, he wanted more, MORE! He started becoming reckless and hurting people, which caught the attention of a peculiar government organization. His property was soon invaded and his shop was removed from his name. Buck was back at square one. He thought that this was the end. Spotting a stray bottle of whiskey, he drank it. This would cause Buck's long lasting alcoholism. Nowadays, he can always be found at the local bar, always gulping down another bottle of whiskey. Below is a confidential document. Proceed with caution. [[File:S.B.I.png|center|220px]]
This information is under protection of the S.B.I., any leakage of this information will result in your elimination. Proceed with caution.

[Information Log] A large cave has been discovered containing a large amount of crytals. These crystals seem to have a supernatural effect on the kitty body. It seems to increase your strength, intelligence, and stamina. Although, the crystals need something back, your sanity. The crystals will suck your sanity out of you like a sponge, and you will soon gain a dependency on them. This dependency has been seen to be curable by removing access to the crystals. This was seen with the test subject, named "Buck" who had discovered the cave and touched the crystals. Accessing the cave is simple, a chain and a cage lead to the bottom. It is currently unknown who created the chain and cage or who discovered it first. This anomaly has been declared contained and poses no threat to the public. It is currently covered by a large grate and is only accessible by key. The shop around it has been kept and the public have been told that it is dangerous to enter because of a gas leak.

title: Buh
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Buh|image=Buh.png|imagecaption=Buh???|status={{Unknown}}|relatives=Guh (Brother)
Cuh (Brother)|affiliation=Gloopy|occupation=Watching TV|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=American Curl|fur=Grey and white|height=4 sauces|weight=10 sauces|firstappears=The Friends|lastappears=The Friends|nationality={{American}}}}{{Stub}}
'''Buh''' is a silly kitty that is on the couch all day watching TV. He likes to boop. His ears were lost in the War of Silly. He has two brothers [[Cuh]] and [[Guh]]. 

Buh is one of three holy knights created by [[Gusic]] and [[Bungus]] to destroy the great evil, [[The Beast]] and [[The Yeast]]. They are yet to be resurrected, but The Beast's tooth holds the power of their souls. 

Like Cuh and Guh, he originates from [https://www.thedogandfriends.com/en/character/ The Dog] Website. {{Top|Canon}}

As some people believe that Buh has no ears, he actually does. it was confirmed later on the Silly Cats show.

Buh's current location is unknown. He had to flee after the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], but rumors circle that he will be making his return soon.

has someone seen my protein powder im about to hit the gym 

Buffed kitty is a kitten that was kidnapped and upgraded by [[Slorphus]]. He is an undercover spy that is in the GYM. He likes to eat big foods. He is quite small but can lift almost 10,000,000,000,000,000,000,000,000,000 sauces, aka 10 octillion sauces.

During the war of silly and unsilly Slorphus and all his demons disappeared, but not before Slorphus managed to give Buffed kitty x2 more strength and x2 more evilness, in the end Buffed kitty got absolutely destroyed by Jinx and the gang and Buffed kitty lost the x2 strength and x2 evilness so buffed kitty was no longer employed as a spy and decided to just live in the GYM. To this day he remains in the GYM and has the world record sauces lifted at once.

Has surpassed Genghs Kahn kill count..from an unknown source, Mr. Buff Kitty is taking the same Steriods as Tony the (redacted) tiger. 

On April 31st Mr.Buff Kitty will be coming onto Modern Warfare 3 as the role of Nicki Minaj's Gun. The RPR will be 2400 cp.
== Dark Ends ==
After years of being the buffest kitty in the world, Buffed kitty is missing all of that junk food he used to eat before he got buffed up. He is sad, so he decides to eat one singular cheeseburger, suddenly its turned into a box of donuts, and then all of a sudden Buffed kitty isn't so buff anymore, he eats thousands of donuts, cheeseburgers, and other junk food a week. He is the fattest kitty to ever live, what a downfall. BUT HE WILL RISE AGAIN!

God|birthDate=Near the beginning of time|birthPlace=The Void|species=Cat?|gender=Male|height=6 sauces|weight=18 sauces|eyes=Green|appearsin=Almost every episode as the narrator|debut=First episode (speaking), War of silly and unsilly (Physical appearance)|image=Bungus.png|imagecaption=Russel James Collins Jr judging you|status={{Alive}}|nationality=Canada|breed=American Shorthair|tiktok=oldboypeanut}} '''Bungus''' is the brother of [[Bingus]]. He is also the cousin of [[Gakster]], [[Plimpus]], [[Gusic]], [[Glinkert]], and [[Q The Cat|Q]]. He is notably known to appear in the countryside, helping out [[Jinx]] and her crew. He is a strong kitty from the First Generation of cats in the Silly Cats universe. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === Bungus appears in [[Silly Cats]] as a side character, being revisited every few episodes. He serves as a guiding force to Jinx, and is also friends with [[Future Kitty]]. He lives in the countryside, often times playing with Gusic. === Silly Cats: Online === Bungus appears in [[Silly Cats: Online]] as a source of quests, but is also a playable character! == Biography == Bungus was born to the entity Cwawa, thought to be by [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]] as The Esoteric Council. He was cousins with Gusic, Plimpus, Q, Glinkert, and Gakster. One day, Gakster left for a trip. Bingus suddenly lunged at Bungus. This event would be called Bingus' betrayal. During a fight, Bingus cast a curse on the cousins and brothers to separate them. Bungus was left to live outside the universe, outside of time and space for eternity, however, through trial and error, a hole in the universe pulled him back in, and broke the curse, which was redirected to Bingus' heart, creating a Slice of Bingus, the embodiment of evil. When Bungus returned, he fought with Q and Gusic against Bingus. Q died from a rebounded attack from Bingus, motivating Bungus and Gusic to kill him. They did, and so the Slice of Bingus stuck in Bingus' heart was shattered, creating The Curse, which are [[The Beast]] and [[The Yeast]], the true embodiment of evil in the world. In response, Bungus and Gusic created The Three Knights ([[Buh]], [[Cuh]], and [[Guh]]) to protect the world from the forces of evil. During The Banishing, an event leading to the creation of Silly Planet as a planet of punishment for kitties, and specifically [[Ah So Cat]], Bungus locked The Beast and The Yeast in a deep slumber in a deep cave in Silly Planet. They would centuries later be awakened by [[Billy]] in a battle against his archrival, [[Bentley]]. Today, Bungus oversees Silly Planet, and manifests as a body on said planet to guide the good against the evil. The Three Knights are yet to be resurrected to destroy evil, but the Tooth holds the power of their souls. == Trivia == * Bungus chose to be the first Silly Cat, creating the forces of Silly in the world. * the name of this actual cat is peanut (not the character)

{{Stub}}

{{Top|Canon}}Canny Cat is a brave warrior, who fought with his own brother and sacrificed himself for the greater good of the Silly Universe.

== Trivia ==

=== Early Life ===
'''Canny Cat''' is the younger brother of Canny Car, their mother wasn't very good at naming kids. '''Canny Cat''' and Canny Car became best brother friends, playing all the time, hanging out, and even becoming 'best friends forever'. They didn't need any other friends, they had each other, and it was a bond that was... well, '''nearly''' unbreakable.

=== Fame ===
As they got older, Canny Car began to realize that '''Canny Cat''' wasn't hanging out as much, and that '''Canny Cat''' was gaining fame at a quick rate. Before Canny Car knew it, '''Canny Cat''' was one of the most famous cats in the city. Canny Car was left behind, he would rarely see '''Canny Cat'''. Days, Weeks, Months and even Years went by, '''Canny Cat''' had forgotten about Canny Car and Canny Car began to grow annoyed, he was jealous and revenge on '''Canny Cat''' for leaving him behind.

=== The Lab ===
Canny Car packed his bags and went on a long journey for the 'Secret Lab' that was abandoned and, in folklore, had a secret gem that could turn you into a powerful being. Canny Car searched and searched for weeks and months, but to no luck. As Canny Car was going to give up, he saw it. The Lab. He quickly ran over to it, banged on the door, and tried sneaking inside, a few moments later he had found the gem. He grabbed it and before he knew it, he was transformed into the Uncanny Cat. Canny Car didn't have control of his body anymore, and the Uncanny Cat took data from Canny Cars mind. Since in Canny Cars mind, it is mentioned he wants 'revenge on '''Canny Cat'''<nowiki/>', that makes the Uncanny Cats soul think to DESTROY '''Canny Cat'''.

=== A Fight ===
'''Canny Cats''' fame had come from the fact that he joined the military and was a solider with 'different colored eyes'. During a war, the Uncanny Cat snuck up behind '''Canny Cat''' and began fighting him, with a powerful beast and an entire army trying to kill you, '''Canny Cat''' couldn't fight back and was badly injured. Uncanny Cat was shot multiple times, and he seemed to have died. They dragged '''Canny Cat''' away and to a hospital.

=== Universe In My Hands ===
Uncanny Cat gets stronger when he is harmed, so when he was shot multiple times, he gained power. As Uncanny Cat awakened, he started causing destruction upon the town that '''Canny Cat''' lives in, they sent some police after him, that made him stronger. The army went after Uncanny Cat, stronger stronger STRONGER! Uncanny Cat began to grow in size, he began to fly into the sky, gravity seemed to have been deleted as everyone began floating into the air, Uncanny Cat began a horrifying inky monster... '''Canny Cat''' had realized the monster was his brother, and he knew he had to do something.

=== Sacrifice ===
'''Canny Cat''' noticed that he could see Uncanny Cats heart, as the inky beasts chest opened to reveal sharp teeth. He hatched a plan, get a spear, anger Uncanny Cat, charge forward as he opened his mouth and impale his heart.

'''Canny Cat''' began to act quick, slowly trying to move while floating around in the air, he saw a long piece of wood and grabbed it, he shouted out to Uncanny Cat, who screeched at '''Canny Cat''' and began flying towards him, the chests mouth opened to reveal the heart, this is it! '''Canny Cat''' got the piece of wood in position as Uncanny Cat charged towards him, the beasts chest mouth widened and widened until...

The piece of wood went through the beasts heart, but in the process, the chest mouth closed and '''Canny Cat''' was trapped. gooey acid began to fill the beats inside, where '''Canny Cat''' was stuck. He began trying to escape, but it was no use. He burned in the acid. As the beasts stomach filled with acid, he exploded and Canny Cat was no more.

=== Aftermath ===
The only thing that remains of '''Canny Cat''' is the piece of wood he used. He will never be forgotten.

The '''I Go Meow''' cat also known as '''Cala''' in real life was an orange tabby. Cala was born in 2012. Cala gained popularity in 2024, she was originally in a video of her meowing like she is singing "I go meow" posted to TikTok on April 5, 2024, she collaborated with "The Kiffness" on April 12, 2024, a famous artist known for making songs out of cats meowing, and together they made the famous"I Go Meow" song. Cala sadly and suddenly passed away of old age on May 30, 2024, in her owners arms.OH NO:(

title: Cheeseburger
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Cheeseburger|image=Cheeseburger.png|aliases=Chemsnurger, Gurger muncher|status={{Alive}}|occupation=Creator of McDonalds|birthDate=15th April 1955|birthPlace=The First Mcdonalds|gender=Cheese|breed=Ragdoll |fur=White And Brown|height=7 sauces|weight=65,267 sauces|firstappears=Opening The First Mcdonalds|lastappears=Eeping In His Silly Cheese Bed|imagecaption=Here kitty, you can has cheeseburger.|nationality={{McDonald}}|relatives=Ah So Cat (cousin)
Gusic (creator)|marital=The First Cheeseburger Made}} == Cheeseburger == Cheeseburger is a silly Brown and white ragdoll cat that loves cheeseburgers so much, he goes MRAUGH every time he sees a cheeseburger, his favourite cheeseburger is the classical McDonald's cheeseburger, showed in the video of his appearance, this choice might be biased since he's the legal creator of McDonald's. == Career == === Creation Of McDonald's === Cheeseburger unknowingly created McDonald's the same day he was born, he was peacefully eeping in his little bed when his sheer power exploded around him, creating the restaurant, the first cheeseburger was the one he was feed in the popular video of him, creating that infamous reaction. === Business And Wealth === Cheeseburger has made a total of 786 Billion Dollars from the McDonald’s company, but after the battle of silly and unsilly, he only had 25 Billion Dollars left. Even his cousin [[Ah So Cat]] has made his own McDonald's meal called The Ah Meal that has earned an extra 30 Billion dollars but Ah So Cat got 50% of the money earned so cheeseburger gained 15 Billion dollars from the cut. == History == Cheeseburger is a survivor in The Battle Of Silly And Unsilly, He wasn't a fighter, but a civilian trapped in the middle of the war === The Battle Of Silly And Unsilly === Cheeseburger was a civilian trapped in the war, 2 years after the start of the war, his first McDonald's was bombed up by the unsilly, he barely escaped in time. Not all cheeseburgers were safe, most of the cheeseburgers were destroyed, he used to have 786 Billion dollars, but almost all of it was burnt from the explosion, luckily the McDonald's building was built up again after 55 years, the restaurant is still up and running to this day. === Myths And Legends === its been rumoured that if you wait until 15th of April at 19:55, look yourself in the mirror and say "Here Kitty, You Can Has Cheeseburger" you will hear a quiet "MREAUGH" echoing through your room, but its just a myth... == Trivia! == * The first McDonalds is his home, so when his home was bombed, he was homeless for a long time * the floor of his home is pure metal that can withstand his weight, any other floor collapses instantly * [[Ah So Cat]] visits often to check up and enjoy an Ah So Happy Meal * The most bought meal of McDonald's is the Silly Meal, making you 150% more silly for some hours (Silly McDonalds does NOT put drugs in the burgers) * He Was Introduced in the first episode of the silly cat show, showed touring the McDonald's where it all happened * Cheeseburger is actually a side character with a bit of lore * he has eated so much cheese his gender turned into cheese

Business And Wealth [ ] Cheeseburger has made a total of 786 Billion Dollars from the McDonald’s company, but after the battle of silly and unsilly, he only had 25 Billion Dollars left. Even his cousin Ah So Cat has made his own McDonald's meal called The Ah Meal that has earned an extra 30 Billion dollars but Ah So Cat got 50% of the money earned so cheeseburger gained 15 Billion dollars from the cut. History [ ] Cheeseburger is a survivor in The Battle Of Silly And Unsilly, He wasn't a fighter, but a civilian trapped in the middle of the war The Battle Of Silly And Unsilly [ ] Cheeseburger was a civilian trapped in the war, 2 years after the start of the war, his first McDonald's was bombed up by the unsilly, he barely escaped in time. Not all cheeseburgers were safe, most of the cheeseburgers were destroyed, he used to have 786 Billion dollars, but almost all of it was burnt from the explosion, luckily the McDonald's building was built up again after 55 years, the restaurant is still up and running to this day. Myths And Legends [ ] its been rumoured that if you wait until 15th of April at 19:55, look yourself in the mirror and say "Here Kitty, You Can Has Cheeseburger" you will hear a quiet "MREAUGH" echoing through your room, but its just a myth... Trivia! [ ] The first McDonalds is his home, so when his home was bombed, he was homeless for a long time the floor of his home is pure metal that can withstand his weight, any other floor collapses instantly Ah So Cat visits often to check up and enjoy an Ah So Happy Meal The most bought meal of McDonald's is the Silly Meal, making you 150% more silly for some hours (Silly McDonalds does NOT put drugs in the burgers) He Was Introduced in the first episode of the silly cat show, showed touring the McDonald's where it all happened Cheeseburger is actually a side character with a bit of lore he has eated so much cheese his gender turned into cheese

title: Cement Joe
wikitext:
{{Character|image=Cement Joe.jpg|imagecaption="My Stomach Hurts"|status=Alive|name=Cement Joe|nationality=German|relatives=Guy2 on Discord|birthDate=September 7, 2020|birthPlace=Construction Site|gender=Cement|breed=Cement|fur=Light and Dark brown|height=4.5 sauces|weight=121|firstappears=Discord|lastappears=Working at a Construction Site}}

==Biography==
Raised in the chaotic cradle of meme culture, “I Eat Cement” Cat emerged as a symbol of joyful absurdity. The earliest known image features a round-faced, content-looking feline paired with the caption: ''“He LOVED to eat cement when he was six.”'' The juxtaposition of a blissful expression with a disturbing claim struck a chord with meme enthusiasts, who quickly adopted the cat as a mascot for surreal humor.

Though the cat’s real identity remains a mystery, its image has been widely circulated across Discord servers, Reddit threads, and Twitter timelines. The meme is believed to be a playful mutation of the earlier “crying seal” meme, which bore the caption ''“He was forced to eat cement when he was six.”'' The cat version flipped the tone from tragic to gleefully deranged, sparking a wave of remixes and fan art.

Cement Cat’s legacy lies not in its origin, but in its versatility. It’s been used to express blind enthusiasm, chaotic energy, and the kind of internet nonsense that defies explanation. Whether printed on T-shirts or dropped into group chats mid-conversation, Cement Cat continues to thrive as a beloved icon of digital absurdity.

'''Carlos''' is a black cat who appears in the ''Silly Cat'' series. His main job is making dabloons, a very strong currency. As a side job, he likes catching fish. 

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Carlos appears in Silly Cats as an important secondary character. He provides the role of healing and helping Jinx and her crew. He also provides connections to his many friends and serves as a plot device.

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
Carlos appears in Silly Cats: Online as the owner of all the shops in the game. If you talk with him, he will give you advice on the game, and talk about one of his friends or say one of his famous quotes.

== Biography ==
Carlos was born in Italy as an orphan. He saw the badness of the many criminals in his town, and decided to be a good person. He learned how to swim at 7. From this, he created a business where he sells fish for his uncle's fish shop in Italy. He realises this could become a better business, and travels to Silly City to continue making more dabloons and sending them over to his uncle.

During his time in Silly City, he chatted with almost everybody. He always looked for more opportunities to make more money, and became a thriving businessman. Despite this, he kept a humble outlook on life, and was always friendly to everybody he met.

From these encounters, Carllos was known byt the citizens of Silly City as "The Silly City Compass" because he had uncountable connections. If you wanted to get a job, you would find it at Carlos's shop. He was used as a source of news for some weeks before the postal service took over and helped people send mails anonymously.

Carlos became friends with Bob, and despite his dishevelled look, decided to let him live at his place. Bob however would not look for a job. He also became friends with one of his customers, Bat Cat, who would grow to help him get more fishes to support his business. Carlos once said, "If it wasn't for Bat Cat, I would be stinkin wit' da fishies."

Quatro is Carlos's favorite word.

== Personality ==
Carlos is very rich, but yet he remains to keep a humble outlook on life, and he lives in his humble shop with Bob. He is very friendly, and loves to play poker, and also has a great poker face. Hes a bussiness man doing bussiness.

== Trivia ==

* The image taken is Carlos putting in 4 dabloons on his next move whilst playing Blackjack with Maxwell and Floppa, a good friend of his.

'''Cokey Cola''' is the youngest cat in the advertising quartet. Appearing to sell cola, they are an itsy-bitsy tabby cat with a red hat, ginger fur, white highlights, and super long white whiskers. Very furry and silly.

=== Cokey quest ===
The Cokey quest was a set of challenges young Cokey Cola had to complete such as eating 3 family size kfc chicken buckets, 89 sauces of chocolate ice cream, 12, eggs (sunny side up), and eating a 2008 Nissan Marano. 

==History==
They sold their first cola in (UNKNOWN) and sold it to someone named [[Jesus Cat]] for a single peso and some catnip.

When meeting [[Fanter]], the CEO of Fanta, during 2012 Minecon, Fanter accidentally bumped into okey. As Fanter was going to apologize, he saw... no, heard, a phrase that would scar him and start this never ending rivalry. "Cokey Cola!" As they locked their eyes, a deep rooted rivalry began, both trying to outbid the other and both trying to sell the most of their specific product.

This rivalry eventually lead into the [[War of Silly]] where on the brink of bankruptcy, Fanter and Cokey pulled their remaining funds together to fund the [[Goodies]]. Very silly Cat. 

After the war, Cokey was heavily injured. Fanter was kind enough to preform a life-saving surgery which consisted of fusing both Cola and Fanta to make essentially the fountain of youth to perfectly heal Cokey of all injury and exhaustion.

And later, they learned to accept their differences. They are no longer rivals that hate one another, instead now are friendly rivals who will help one another when the time is right.

And for the concoction that was the fountain of youth? Well, they hid the recipe in Chicago to be forgotten in time.

==Traits==
Cokey cola is:
*Friendly
*Simple minded
*Business cat
*Awesome
*Rich
*Cokey cola!!!
*Silly

Corruptor is a extremely dangerous entity that resembles a cat, this cat has one single task, to rule the entire world along with the other members of the [[B.A.D]]. He is able to corrupt people or create corrupted copies of people, if they resist being corrupted, Corruptor then try to kill them. They have killed more than 5,000 people, he is far from reaching this goal, but he will never give up until he either dies and fails, or succeeds and makes everyone fall for his corruption. However because [[The GOODings]] exist, he is at risk of failure.

After escaping he hid, he cried and he stopped. He realised that he needs to take his life in his paws, vowing to take revenge on big poo, however this revenge only caused him to become a criminal as he was never able to kill big poo but his 10 other wifes 

He was never able to kill big poo as after the war of silly he realised after his many near death experiences that he should just live his life in new York

title: Cowboy Cat
wikitext:
{{Top|Mythology}}
{{Character|name=Cowboy Cat|image=CowboyCat.png|status={{Deceased}}|relatives=Unknown|birthDate=14/6/1970|deathDate=23/11/2010|birthPlace=Texas, America|gender=Male|breed=Bombay Cat|fur=Brown|height=7 sauses|weight=11 sauses|firstappears=[[Places|Silly Country]]|nationality={{american}}|imagecaption=A clear shot of Cowboy Cat|aliases=The Mystery Man, Loafy|occupation=Cowboy|marital=Single|lastappears=[[places|Silly City]]}}
{{Stub}}
'''Cowboy Cat''' is a side character, easily discover-able by his cowboy getup. He has a [[Silly Shooter]] and a lasso, and he uses the two to attack houses and civilians. He lives out in [[Bustein]] in one of the few remaining houses, alone. Cowboy Cat has a horse, and likes to ride into [[Places|Silly City]] to loot and pillage innocents and houses. He was shot and killed by [[Sheriff Paw]] in 2010.
==Appearances==
===Silly Cats===
In the show, he appeared riding a horse in the background in some shots at the start of the show, and in episode 12, Cowboy Cat attacks the group, tying up [[Jinx]] and tries shooting at [[Milly]]. But the gang frees Jinx, and attacks back, making Cowboy Cat runaway on his horse. He is shown multiple times in a subplot trying to find the gang in episode 13, but to no avail. It hasn't shown him since.
===Silly Cats: Online===
Cowboy Cat appears as a small boss fight, only appearing in the Spooktober event, and never appearing again. He is located near the ruins of Bustein. Accepting the boss fight will start the battle. He will chuck a lasso at you to tie you up, and also sometimes shoots his Silly Shooter, but he mostly slashes at you. Winning will give you a hefty gold reward.
==Biography==
It is said that Cowboy Cat actually had a good upbringing. Born on the 14 June 1970, Cowboy Cat was raised in [[Silly Town]] with his Mother, Father and his brother. He was well kept after by his parents, and was a nice strong cat. near the early stages of his life, his father had gave him a lasso, handed down from the generations of the fathers family. This amazed Cowboy Cat, and he started to train with the lasso. Within month, he could easily trap people with his lasso, whip things and his parents were a little worried. He also then found a young horse, and took it in, nursin git to health and size. Then, when he was older still, he bought his first Silly Shooter, a six round fast firing handgun. From there, he got obsessed with cowboys and the wild west.

He grew more and more fascinated, soon wearing a cowboy getup, then a yellow scarf, then eventually the cowboy hat. He'd wear this outfit for most of his life with his family, and even with their begs to stop, he didn't. He practiced his marksmanship and became a loud and proud cowboy. Soon, his parents took his lasso, and told him to stop at once. This only enraged Cowboy Cat, and he didided to take back his lasso, grab his horse and ride off into the sunset. He soon found the ruins of Bustein, and decided to settle there. He found a still standing house, broke in and slept there for the night. When dawn struck, he got up, got on his horse again and rode around, exploring, till he found Silly City.

When he got there, cats all around saw him, and pointed and laughed at him. Nearly all cats here were mocking his outfit, and that he wasn't a real cowboy. Cowboy Cat, after the city people kept laughing and pointing, like his parents, he had enough, and got his lasso and lashed out at the cats. He then smashed into a shop to steal food and rode his horse back to the house he found. He decided, that he was going to prove that he was a real cowboy, and so every week, he rode to Silly City to whip people, tie them up and rob stores for loot.

After many, many years of doing this, the bounty on his head grew and grew until finally, 4:34 PM on November 2010, he was shot in the leg while pillaging another store. The shot was by Sherrif Paw, and as Cowboy Cat was dying, Sherrif Paw stood over him in victory. Silly City could finally recover again from the wrath of Cowboy Cat.
==Trivia==
*Cowboy Cat's horses name is Jerald, and he was chased away from the town in 2010 when Cowboy Cat died.
