== Biography ==

=== Early life ===
Desky's origins were shrouded in mystery, with her birth shrouded in the enigma of an unknown mother who sadly passed away before they could ever meet. Left to navigate the world alone, Desky's journey began in solitude, driven by an inexplicable urge to seek sustenance and thrive despite the absence of parental guidance. Time passed swiftly, and Desky found herself rapidly maturing, reaching the milestone of her first birthday before she could comprehend the concept of self-awareness. With a newfound sense of purpose, Desky sought solace in a humble abode that she secured, embarking on a series of exhilarating escapades that celebrated her deep-rooted connection to the natural world.

As a precocious one-year-old, Desky reveled in the simple joys of exploring her surroundings, eagerly immersing herself in the wonders of the eccentric planet she called home. Every footstep she took resonated with contentment, each encounter with a new creature or landscape adding to the tapestry of experiences that shaped her evolving perspective. Her passion for the vibrant tapestry of life was evident in every breath she took, infusing her existence with a sense of wonder that transcended the mundane and embraced the extraordinary.

Desky's unwavering curiosity led her down meandering paths and across untamed landscapes, each step a testament to her resolute spirit and unquenchable thirst for adventure. She embraced the challenges that came her way with an indomitable spirit, her youthful exuberance fueling her determination to seek out the hidden truths of the world around her. With boundless enthusiasm and a heart full of dreams, Desky embarked on a journey of self-discovery that would forever alter the course of her destiny.

In the tapestry of Desky's life, each thread was woven with care and purpose, creating a vivid mosaic of experiences that would shape her into the fearless explorer she was destined to become. As she ventured forth into the unknown, her spirit soared high, guided by an inner compass that steered her towards the untold wonders that awaited her. Through every trial and triumph, Desky's indomitable will shone bright, a beacon of hope and inspiration to all who crossed her path.

With every passing moment, Desky's bond with the natural world grew stronger, her heart forever entwined with the rhythm of the earth beneath her feet. As she gazed upon the vast expanse of the world before her, a sense of peace settled within her soul, anchoring her to a reality that was both harsh and beautiful in its complexity. In the tapestry of Desky's life, every chapter written was a testament to her resilience, her courage, and her unyielding love for the wonders of the world around her. Now, as a 2 year old woman. She met a gang called "[[The GOODings]]" while strolling along the street, coming across a peculiar flower cat that piqued her interest. Much to her surprise, [[The GOODings]], a lively and welcoming bunch, noticed her presence and struck up a pleasant conversation with her. Feeling a sense of ease and acceptance in their company, Desky gradually opened up about herself, sharing more personal details with the gang. As the conversation flowed, Desky revealed her exceptional skill in catjutsu, a martial art that impressed [[The GOODings]] immensely. Overjoyed by her talent and charismatic personality, the gang eagerly extended an invitation to Desky, warmly embracing her into their tight-knit circle. Embracing this newfound sense of belonging and camaraderie, Desky felt a deep connection with [[The GOODings]], recognizing that she had found a group of kindred spirits who appreciated and valued her unique abilities. The bond that formed that day between Desky and [[The GOODings]] marked the beginning of a new and exciting chapter in her life, filled with adventures, friendship, and the shared joy of mastering the art of catjutsu alongside her newfound companions.

== What she does in her free time ==
She will normally settle comfortably on the couch, surrounded by the gentle ambiance of the living room, where she indulges in watching amusing videos of cat fails. Her love for these lighthearted moments compels her to seek out laughter and joy. Occasionally, he also ventures outside to tend to her blooming plants, finding solace in the peaceful melody of the rustling leaves and the whispering breeze, a pleasing respite for her soul. A nature enthusiast at heart, she revels in the tranquility of the outdoors and cherishes the serene sounds that envelop her. Exploring the outside world brings her immense delight as she strolls through the picturesque streets of the charming town, always on the lookout for new experiences and encounters. It is in these moments of leisurely walks that she often forms connections with others who share her affinity for the beauty of nature and the simple joys found outdoors.

== Real Life ==
Deksy, in real life, is a charming 10-year-old British Shorthair cat who has captured the hearts of many as an influencer through her unique barks. Denis, her devoted owner, discovered a delightful way to communicate with Deksy by recording videos of her playful barks. He found that by increasing the speed of the recordings to 2x, it enhanced the impact of her barking, even though her original barks were already quite expressive. This clever strategy not only amused Denis but also intrigued viewers, leading to Deksy's rise to stardom on various social media platforms.

Initially gaining popularity on YouTube, where Denis first shared Deksy's endearing barks, the cat quickly captivated audiences with her distinct vocalizations. People were delighted and surprised by her charming communication style, and the videos of Deksy barking went viral, catapulting her to online fame. Within a few short months, Deksy's audience grew exponentially, and she became an influential figure in the world of social media pets.

Now, with over 3.8 million devoted fans on TikTok and an impressive 1.4 million subscribers on YouTube, Deksy has solidified her place as a beloved figure in the online community. Through her charming personality and unique communication style, Deksy continues to captivate audiences worldwide, spreading joy and entertainment with each bark and video shared. She has truly become a sensation among pet influencers, leaving a pawprint on the hearts of her followers and cementing her status as a cherished feline celebrity.

== Her participation on the War of silly and unsilly ==

=== The Meeting. (this focuses only on her meeting from the gang.) ===
The unexpected encounter that transpired between Desky and [[The GOODings]] unfolded in a relatively straightforward manner that held an air of serendipity. It was a crisp afternoon when Desky, immersed in the gentle stroll towards her cozy residence, found her serene reverie interrupted by an unusual sight - a gathering of feline creatures meandering towards her on the street. Among this whiskered entourage were the familiar faces of Jinx, Milly, and a handful of other feline companions known in the neighborhood for their playful antics and friendly demeanor.

As Desky's curious gaze lingered on the scene, she couldn't help but notice [[The GOODings]] engrossed in a lively exchange with Flower Cat a little ways down the road. Intrigued by this unexpected congregation, Desky found herself momentarily captivated by the dynamics at play. The moment their awareness intersected, an unspoken understanding seemed to spark between them, paving the way for an amicable exchange to unfold.

The initial moments of interaction were marked by a palpable sense of mutual curiosity and intrigue. Both Desky and [[The GOODings]], recognizing a shared affinity for the mysteries of catjutsu and the nuances of feline communication, quickly forged a connection that transcended mere pleasantries. As anecdotes from Desky's life gradually unfurled, painting vivid portraits of her mastery in the ancient art of catjutsu, [[The GOODings]] couldn't help but be awed by the depth of her skills and the authenticity of her personality.

It was in this moment of shared admiration and camaraderie that [[The GOODings]] extended a spontaneous invitation for Desky to become an integral part of their eclectic gang. Overwhelmed with joy and gratitude, Desky embraced this unforeseen opportunity with open arms, ready to embark on a new chapter of companionship and adventure alongside her newfound legion of like-minded spirits. With a heart brimming with excitement and a resolve strengthened by the bonds of friendship, Desky took her first steps towards an uncertain yet promising future, guided by the laughter and camaraderie of her beloved companions - [[The GOODings]].

=== War of Silly and Unsilly. ===
Desky, renowned for her exceptional valor and unwavering commitment, stood resolute as she navigated the perilous landscapes of the [[No Man's Land]] during the turbulent period of the War of the Silly and Unsilly. Tasked with the critical mission of thwarting the cunning strategies and relentless ambushes devised by the treacherous [[B.A.D]] forces, Desky's unwavering vigilance and tactical acumen became the cornerstone of [[The GOODings]]' defense. Despite the daunting challenges that beset her, Desky's unyielding dedication ensured that the members of her group remained shielded from the brunt of the enemy assaults. Engaging the adversaries with a blend of sharpshooting precision using her trusted revolver, coupled with the elusive combat techniques of catjutsu that she mastered, Desky emerged as a formidable force on the battlefield.

Each encounter saw Desky adeptly neutralizing threats, safeguarding the territory she held dear, and demonstrating a prowess that swiftly became legendary among allies and adversaries alike. One hundred eighty-three hostile individuals met their end at the hands of Desky, underscoring her unwavering resolve and the efficacy of her defense strategies. As the conflict persisted, Desky's consistent displays of courage and resourcefulness etched her name in the annals of heroism as a resolute guardian and a dependable shield for [[The GOODings]] and the community they fiercely protected. The harmonious intersection of bravery, skill, and unwavering dedication in Desky's actions not only repelled the recurrent onslaughts but also served as a beacon of hope for those who sought refuge under her steadfast watch.

(this focuses only on her meeting from the gang.) 4.2 War of Silly and Unsilly. 5 Trivia Biography [ ] Early life [ ] Desky's origins were shrouded in mystery, with her birth shrouded in the enigma of an unknown mother who sadly passed away before they could ever meet. Left to navigate the world alone, Desky's journey began in solitude, driven by an inexplicable urge to seek sustenance and thrive despite the absence of parental guidance. Time passed swiftly, and Desky found herself rapidly maturing, reaching the milestone of her first birthday before she could comprehend the concept of self-awareness. With a newfound sense of purpose, Desky sought solace in a humble abode that she secured, embarking on a series of exhilarating escapades that celebrated her deep-rooted connection to the natural world. As a precocious one-year-old, Desky reveled in the simple joys of exploring her surroundings, eagerly immersing herself in the wonders of the eccentric planet she called home. Every footstep she took resonated with contentment, each encounter with a new creature or landscape adding to the tapestry of experiences that shaped her evolving perspective. Her passion for the vibrant tapestry of life was evident in every breath she took, infusing her existence with a sense of wonder that transcended the mundane and embraced the extraordinary. Desky's unwavering curiosity led her down meandering paths and across untamed landscapes, each step a testament to her resolute spirit and unquenchable thirst for adventure. She embraced the challenges that came her way with an indomitable spirit, her youthful exuberance fueling her determination to seek out the hidden truths of the world around her. With boundless enthusiasm and a heart full of dreams, Desky embarked on a journey of self-discovery that would forever alter the course of her destiny. In the tapestry of Desky's life, each thread was woven with care and purpose, creating a vivid mosaic of experiences that would shape her into the fearless explorer she was destined to become. As she ventured forth into the unknown, her spirit soared high, guided by an inner compass that steered her towards the untold wonders that awaited her. Through every trial and triumph, Desky's indomitable will shone bright, a beacon of hope and inspiration to all who crossed her path. With every passing moment, Desky's bond with the natural world grew stronger, her heart forever entwined with the rhythm of the earth beneath her feet. As she gazed upon the vast expanse of the world before her, a sense of peace settled within her soul, anchoring her to a reality that was both harsh and beautiful in its complexity. In the tapestry of Desky's life, every chapter written was a testament to her resilience, her courage, and her unyielding love for the wonders of the world around her. Now, as a 2 year old woman. She met a gang called " The GOODings " while strolling along the street, coming across a peculiar flower cat that piqued her interest. Much to her surprise, The GOODings , a lively and welcoming bunch, noticed her presence and struck up a pleasant conversation with her. Feeling a sense of ease and acceptance in their company, Desky gradually opened up about herself, sharing more personal details with the gang. As the conversation flowed, Desky revealed her exceptional skill in catjutsu, a martial art that impressed The GOODings immensely. Overjoyed by her talent and charismatic personality, the gang eagerly extended an invitation to Desky, warmly embracing her into their tight-knit circle. Embracing this newfound sense of belonging and camaraderie, Desky felt a deep connection with The GOODings , recognizing that she had found a group of kindred spirits who appreciated and valued her unique abilities. The bond that formed that day between Desky and The GOODings marked the beginning of a new and exciting chapter in her life, filled with adventures, friendship, and the shared joy of mastering the art of catjutsu alongside her newfound companions. What she does in her free time [ ] She will normally settle comfortably on the couch, surrounded by the gentle ambiance of the living room, where she indulges in watching amusing videos of cat fails. Her love for these lighthearted moments compels her to seek out laughter and joy. Occasionally, he also ventures outside to tend to her blooming plants, finding solace in the peaceful melody of the rustling leaves and the whispering breeze, a pleasing respite for her soul. A nature enthusiast at heart, she revels in the tranquility of the outdoors and cherishes the serene sounds that envelop her. Exploring the outside world brings her immense delight as she strolls through the picturesque streets of the charming town, always on the lookout for new experiences and encounters. It is in these moments of leisurely walks that she often forms connections with others who share her affinity for the beauty of nature and the simple joys found outdoors. Real Life [ ] Deksy, in real life, is a charming 10-year-old British Shorthair cat who has captured the hearts of many as an influencer through her unique barks. Denis, her devoted owner, discovered a delightful way to communicate with Deksy by recording videos of her playful barks. He found that by increasing the speed of the recordings to 2x, it enhanced the impact of her barking, even though her original barks were already quite expressive. This clever strategy not only amused Denis but also intrigued viewers, leading to Deksy's rise to stardom on various social media platforms. Initially gaining popularity on YouTube, where Denis first shared Deksy's endearing barks, the cat quickly captivated audiences with her distinct vocalizations. People were delighted and surprised by her charming communication style, and the videos of Deksy barking went viral, catapulting her to online fame. Within a few short months, Deksy's audience grew exponentially, and she became an influential figure in the world of social media pets. Now, with over 3.8 million devoted fans on TikTok and an impressive 1.4 million subscribers on YouTube, Deksy has solidified her place as a beloved figure in the online community. Through her charming personality and unique communication style, Deksy continues to captivate audiences worldwide, spreading joy and entertainment with each bark and video shared. She has truly become a sensation among pet influencers, leaving a pawprint on the hearts of her followers and cementing her status as a cherished feline celebrity. Her participation on the War of silly and unsilly [ ] The Meeting. (this focuses only on her meeting from the gang.) [ ] The unexpected encounter that transpired between Desky and The GOODings unfolded in a relatively straightforward manner that held an air of serendipity. It was a crisp afternoon when Desky, immersed in the gentle stroll towards her cozy residence, found her serene reverie interrupted by an unusual sight - a gathering of feline creatures meandering towards her on the street. Among this whiskered entourage were the familiar faces of Jinx, Milly, and a handful of other feline companions known in the neighborhood for their playful antics and friendly demeanor. As Desky's curious gaze lingered on the scene, she couldn't help but notice The GOODings engrossed in a lively exchange with Flower Cat a little ways down the road. Intrigued by this unexpected congregation, Desky found herself momentarily captivated by the dynamics at play. The moment their awareness intersected, an unspoken understanding seemed to spark between them, paving the way for an amicable exchange to unfold. The initial moments of interaction were marked by a palpable sense of mutual curiosity and intrigue. Both Desky and The GOODings , recognizing a shared affinity for the mysteries of catjutsu and the nuances of feline communication, quickly forged a connection that transcended mere pleasantries. As anecdotes from Desky's life gradually unfurled, painting vivid portraits of her mastery in the ancient art of catjutsu, The GOODings couldn't help but be awed by the depth of her skills and the authenticity of her personality. It was in this moment of shared admiration and camaraderie that The GOODings extended a spontaneous invitation for Desky to become an integral part of their eclectic gang. Overwhelmed with joy and gratitude, Desky embraced this unforeseen opportunity with open arms, ready to embark on a new chapter of companionship and adventure alongside her newfound legion of like-minded spirits. With a heart brimming with excitement and a resolve strengthened by the bonds of friendship, Desky took her first steps towards an uncertain yet promising future, guided by the laughter and camaraderie of her beloved companions - The GOODings . War of Silly and Unsilly. [ ] Desky, renowned for her exceptional valor and unwavering commitment, stood resolute as she navigated the perilous landscapes of the No Man's Land during the turbulent period of the War of the Silly and Unsilly. Tasked with the critical mission of thwarting the cunning strategies and relentless ambushes devised by the treacherous B.A.D forces, Desky's unwavering vigilance and tactical acumen became the cornerstone of The GOODings ' defense. Despite the daunting challenges that beset her, Desky's unyielding dedication ensured that the members of her group remained shielded from the brunt of the enemy assaults. Engaging the adversaries with a blend of sharpshooting precision using her trusted revolver, coupled with the elusive combat techniques of catjutsu that she mastered, Desky emerged as a formidable force on the battlefield. Each encounter saw Desky adeptly neutralizing threats, safeguarding the territory she held dear, and demonstrating a prowess that swiftly became legendary among allies and adversaries alike. One hundred eighty-three hostile individuals met their end at the hands of Desky, underscoring her unwavering resolve and the efficacy of her defense strategies. As the conflict persisted, Desky's consistent displays of courage and resourcefulness etched her name in the annals of heroism as a resolute guardian and a dependable shield for The GOODings and the community they fiercely protected. The harmonious intersection of bravery, skill, and unwavering dedication in Desky's actions not only repelled the recurrent onslaughts but also served as a beacon of hope for those who sought refuge under her steadfast watch. title: Demetrus P. Dinklebottom

infobox.appearsin: Few episodes and has a facebook account

Dinklebottom (Brother)|marital=Single|birthDate=11 September 1929|birthPlace=Silly City Hospital|gender=Male|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Crime Boss|deathDate=29 August 1998|deathPlace=A mysterious building|species=Cat|appearsin=Few episodes and has a facebook account|height=5 sauces|weight=6 sauces|eyes=Green|debut=War of silly and unsilly|breed=Mangle|fur=White|firstappears=Stolen Beauty|lastappears=Brother's Revenge|imagecaption=So handsome!|status={{Deceased}}|nationality=}}'''Demetrus P. Dinklebottom''' was a crime boss that was responsible for the [[Clown Uprising]]. He met his fate to his own brother.

== Biography ==
Demetrus P. Dinklebottom, or just Demetrus, was born in Silly City during a prosperous time. His brother, [[Dietzen D. Dinklebottom]], was one of the handsomest kitties in the city and Demetrus grew very jealous of this. In order to steal Dietzen's beauty, Demetrus started researching the dark arts. He captured Dietzen, and experimented on him. Demetrus succeeded in making him hideous but Demetrus did not get any prettier like he wanted.

With Dietzen's repuation ruined, Demetrus could focus on other things. Demetrus continued researching the dark arts and started researching persuasion spells. He got the spells from copies of [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]] that were created by [[Future Kitty]]. When [[The GOODings]] weren't looking he stole one of the copies. Demeturs practiced these spells. He eventually mastered them. In his free time, Demetrus had grown a huge interest in clowns. Demetrus used his interest to influence people into joining him and to become a clown. He would raid city after city. These events became known collectively as the Clown Uprising. The military fought against it but they were futile.

Demetrus and his forces soon came to Silly Country to cause havoc. This event was one of the catalysts for the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. Demetrus stared at the destruction he caused and laughed with glee. His power and influence were everywhere. Around this time, cracks started growing in his gang he had formed with the closest clowns to him. People started weaseling gang members out, Soon after that, a raid on their base happened at Plymouth Factory. The SCPD (Silly City Police Department) busted in and threw in smoke bombs. Many members were killed but Demetrus was able to escape unscathed.

Later on in the war, Demetrus was confronted by Dietzen in an alley. Dietzen reprimanded him yelling at him that he had lost everything. Demetrus chuckled. In a display of mercy, Dietzen tased Demetrus and turned him into the SCPD. The rest of his gang members were imprisoned and killed around this time. Demetrus was interrogated brutally and he leaked the locations of [[Zingus]] and [[$24.50]], two well known criminals in the area. Both of them were imprisoned. Demetrus was imprisoned as well.

He woke up exhausted in his cell. His cell mate was none other than Zingus. Zingus forgave him saying that he had no choice anyways. Zingus was kind to him and invited him to his lessons of how to slither through the bars. It was quite simple, dislocate your spine, and break both of your legs. Demetrus trained for it and eventually escaped. He healed his legs with a healing spell he had remembered from his time in the dark arts. Demetrus confronted Dietzen. Dietzen pulled out his gun. Demetrus and Zingus, who was also with him, backed away in surprise. Demetrus could see the doubt in Dietzen's eyes. Then all of a sudden, Dietzen shot Demetrus. Zingus ran. Demetrus bled out on the floor watching Dietzen stare at him with a blank expression.

Demetrus' destruction can still be felt centuries after. With his death, his criminal empire was finally over.

==Biography==
Demon Cat is a cat from The Hell and it's the Devil's Cat. (He can't die of age/he is immortal)

He fighted in the Vietnam War and was a Vietnamese. He seen a lot of his friends die in that war, it was really traumatizing event for him. (Even that he is Devil's Cat)

He was birth in The Silly Hell but was sent to the earth (Specifically, Vietnam and then he went to Silly City)

He likes eating Chips and Doritos when playing Video Games. He REALLY likes water, He was a friend of Babem until his death. (He went too sad about it because they were friends since he was 3 years old)

==Silly Hell Life==

Short one. He was 10 years on The Silly Hell and then he come to Vietnam in 1933.

==Vietnam Life==
His life in what we call now Vietnam was really short only 5 years (1933-1938) and then he went to Silly City in 1938.

==Silly City Life== 
He went to Silly City in 1938 and lived a life full of crimes like traficking Catnip with other unknown Kittys.

He was a Police of SCPD (Silly City Police Department) in 1941 and in that time he knowed how the crime works and he decided to join to the bad side in 1945.

==New Vietnam Life==
He went back to Vietnam in 1951 and lived 2 years being a chef and then he was hired for the Vietnamese Army in 1953 and was 2 years in Military Service and a bad thing occurred in his life.

==Vietnam War==
He was in the Vietnam War and went to a lot of battles. his best friend Robert Rebert was in that war, and unfortunately he died in the Rolling Thunder Operation. The Rolling Thunder Operation was an operation of the USA to attack Vietnam and unfortunately his friend didn't get to the bunker in time. He went too sad after that but keep fighting for his friend. Two times it get hurt too bad in the battlefield and get attended by medics. It was a bad hell to him until it ended in 30/04/1975. he went to his home and lived 3 years in Vietnam until he goes to Chicago.

==Chicago Life==
He went again a life of crimes from 1977 to 1984. In 1989 he gets assaulted by Babem, until Babem recognized it and hug him, they talked a lot about they lifes before going to home.

==Silly City==
From 2000 to the present he lives in Silly City. He has a rich life and a family of 5 kittys (Mickey Rech, Taco Rech, Silly Tamy Robinson, Sameael Robinson and Satan Rech) and his women Katty Robinson. And they have a company called "SillyStation". One of the most popular company in the world, they make consoles.

'''Demonic Little Grey Cat''' was a wizard created by the Wizard of Spells originally but then became a wizard of his own. 

== Biography ==
Demonic Little Grey Cat was created using dark magic. It was originally created as a scout for the [[Wizard of Spells]], but he was useless as he was constantly distracted by the lights created by the Wizard of Spell's spells. And so Demonic Little Grey Cat was kicked out of his abode. It wandered around looking for wizards that could use its help. It didn't find any, but [[Slorphus]] intercepted them. Slorphus told them that they could use their help. Slorphus convinced them to join a cult with them called The Cult of the Black Book of Silly Magic. Demonic Little Grey Cat learned a lot but Slorphus did not and forced Demonic Little Grey Cat to leave with him. Slorphus they learned a lot so he directed Demonic Little Grey Cat to shoot spells at [[The GOODings]]. It kept working with Slorphus until one certain day.

The GOODings were annoyed and so one day they came prepared. [[Jinx]] was carrying a mirror, and so when Demonic Little Grey Cat tried casting a spell upon them again, it got reflected back to him. The spell turned him into a mosquito. Unfortunately, [[Bat Cat]] was nearby and when Bat Cat sees a mosquito he can't restrain himself. And so Demonic Little Grey Cat was devoured.

His last words were: "Why do I hear boss music?"

Dinklebottom (Brother)|affiliation=|occupation=Revenge|birthDate=11 September 1929|birthPlace=Silly City Hospital|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Tabby, Mad Scientist(?)|fur=Silver(?)|height=4 sauces|weight=13 sauces|firstappears=Stolen Beauty|lastappears=Brother's Revenge|imagecaption=Dietzen D. Dinklebottom staring at something horrific}}'''Dietzen P. Dinklebottom''' is a cat that was disfigured by his twin brother's experiments. He swore revenge and eventually got it.

== Biography ==
Dietzen D. Dinklebottomwas born with his twin brother, [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom]], in Silly City while it was in a prosperous time. Dietzen was one of the most handsomest kitties in the city. His brother eventually grew jealous of this. Demetrus plotted. In this time of jealousy, Demetrus got into the studies of the dark acts. Demetrus tested on his brother. His tests led to Dietzen becoming hideous. He lost everyone's respect and fell into poverty.

For the next period of his life, he had to dumpster dive to stay alive. He saw that Demetrus had become famous and was spreading his influence. Dietzen knew he was up to no good, but he could do nothing to stop it. Dietzen managed to get enough money from selling busted couches that he was able to buy a cramped flat and a small TV. He grabbed a sofa from the alley by his flat and a half-eaten bucket of popcorn he found in a dumpster, and sat down. He turned on the TV and watched in horror as Demetrus pulled his first [[Clown Uprising]] in Australia. Dietzen clenched his fist and swore revenge on Demetrus.

With this, Dietzen signed up for the military in Silly City. The current effort by the crumbling military was to help fight against the Clown Uprising and save the locals. This effort went on until something happened. The Clown Uprising led to more militaries fighting against it. The burning of the Silly City Circus and the mysterious death of The Yeast led to the culmination of the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. Dietzen wasted no time in helping with the war effort. He helped with the raid on the Plymouth Factory and managed to kill 5 of Demetrus' gang members.

Later on in the war, in the Battle of Silly City, Dietzen found Demetrus in a dark alley. The two brother turned mortal enemies stared at each other. Dietzen yelled "You took everything from me!" Demetrus stayed quiet and only let out a small chuckle. In a show of mercy Dietzen tased Demetrus and brought him to the SCPD (Silly City Police Department). He was brutally interrogated and with it, two criminal's locations were leaked. The two criminals were captured. Demetrus was reduced to nothing.

Dietzen though it was finally over. That was until, Demetrus managed to escape prison with the help of [[Zingus]], one of the criminals he had revealed. The two cornered Dietzen. Dietzen pulled out his gun and the two backed up in surprise. Dietzen thought to himself what would hasppen if he pulled the trigger. Dietzen let out a sigh and shot Demetrus. Zingus escaped but Demetrus was left fatally wounded. He bled out on the floor while Dietzen watched with a blank expression. It was finally over.

title: Dimden

infobox.name: Tudou
infobox.imagecaption: Tudou in shock after the knee of his mech is destroyed

wikitext:
{{Top|Canon}} {{Character | name = Tudou | image = Dimden.png | imagecaption = Tudou in shock after the knee of his mech is destroyed | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{Chinese}} | aliases = Dimden
Potato | relatives = Unknown | affiliation = The GOODings | occupation = Artist/Digital artist | birthDate = 16 January 1974 | birthPlace = The Tudou Residence | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = None | gender = Male | breed = Munchkin | fur = White and gray | height = 7 sauces | weight = 10 sauces | firstappears = Art rocks! | lastappears = War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 2 | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }} '''Tudou''' (土豆, Tǔdòu), also named '''Dimden''', is the careful artistic cat who has the power of a magical notebook he found in a cave. ==Biography== Tudou was born in an artistic middle-class family. When he was 5 he began to draw things perfectly to the point where the art teacher banned him from her classes due to her jealousy of Tudou's art. when he was 9, he was hiking with his family when he suddenly found a cave. He tumbled and fell down the cave but stood up like a champion. Tudou saw a notebook on a pillar. Tudou, who was passionate about art, grabbed the notebook and climbed back up from the cave like nothing happened. His mother asked what happened. He said, "I found this interesting looking book, 'Ma,". As Tudou entered his bedroom and began to draw, his art appeared in front of him. He somehow had found a magical notebook that could spawn anything he drew. Tudou wasn't ready to become rich, so he used the notebook whenever he was bored. He later wanted to fight evil in the world, so he joined [[The GOODings]]. At the start of the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], Tudou thought of an idea of how to combat [[B.A.D]], who were rapidly approaching Silly City. So he used 7 pages of his magical notebook to create a mech out of his own house (with no head needed). He went around the town to warn and get silly refugees to stay in his house. Some of his neighbors and some local storeowners went to his house to take shelter. In total, there were 5 of them, including Tudou. Each of them would control a limb of the mech. The mech was able to grab [[The Beast]], but he just wriggled out of it's fist and destroyed the mech's knee. The mech was rendered immobilized. They were all kept prisoner in the Temple of the Beast until the end of the war. In the epilogue, Tudou was now drawing money to pay to repair his destroyed house and sell the scrap of the mech, making thousands of dollars. Soon after, he decided to make a gallery so everyone could see his art. ==Trivia== * Tudou does not have a confirmed nationality. According to [[Big Poo]], he said "Wait, is that the Japanese cat who drew the art from that website?" implying he may canonically be Japanese. Although, his name is Chinese for potato, hinting at him being Chinese. * The creator of his magical notebook is unknown, but is thought that it was created with intervention by the divine.

His kill count is unknown, but it is known that he fought in the "Battle of Silly and Unsilly". He survived the battle but many of his friends were killed so he became a shut-in due to mourning his friend's death. After the battle he became very scared of loud noises and other cats that is why he stays inside to avoid the other cats no matter who they're affiliated with. There was one time during the war went off, and he went ballistic he may be a minor character but he was a staple to win the war. "That kitten was too young to fight, but begged to fight in that war, I bet his father would have been proud…" Said his Sergeant.

title: Dmitri
wikitext:
{{Parents/DF}}{{Character|name=Dmitri|image=Dmitri.png|imagecaption=Dmitri taking a lookout|status={{Alive}}|aliases=Dmitri Diechmen|relatives=Vampirius (Brother)
Ramses (Brother)
Skeletus (Brother)|occupation=Building Experimenting|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Coffin|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Sphynx|height=7 sauces|weight=17 sauces}}'''Dmitri''' is an expert scientist and builder. He has three brothers. Their names are [[Vampirius]], [[Ramses]], and [[Skeletus]]. His family all carry the trait of being spooky in nature. == Biography == Despite his looks, Dmitri is actually undead. He was born in a coffin through unknown means. The coffin he was born in is located in the graveyard in front of the large castle him and his brothers call home. He awakened in the grave and clawed his way out. The other brothers noticed a deathly paw bursting its way out of the ground. So, Skeletus and Vampirius, the only two brothers born at the time, pulled him out of the ground. Dmitri appreciated their help and gave them coins he had in his pockets. Dmitri wandered the castle in awe at it's gothic architecture. Dmitri was inspired by these formations. The part of the castle he loved the most though, was a secret lab in the basement of the castle. The basement was also nicknamed the dungeon since it was a prison for those that defied the original king if the Halloween Dimension, which is the dimension they live. The king was tyrannical and had a reign similar to a communist regime. This king also happened to be the brothers great great grandfather. The king had lots of riches and it all got inherited to them. Dmitri was captivated by the lab and he started tinkering with all the gadgets hidden within. He eventually found a tesla coil hidden between stacks of books and a pile of unused flasks. He was fascinated by it, and lugged it to the center table. He found that it had a plug on the back. He found an outlet (The outlet was part of a renovation 200 years prior), and plugged it in. Before he started messing with the coil, Dmitri had a moment of clarity, and realized he need a coat. He couldn't find any traditional coats but he found a dusty old closet and found a vibrant green and blue sweater. He donned the sweater using as an unconventional lab coat. He had doubt of it at first but it worked when he tested it. Dmitri was ecstatic to test the tesla coil. He touched the tesla coil and was startled by an electric shock that zapped throughout his entire body. As a zombie, his muscles and bones were atrophied but when the shock went through his body, it rejuvenated his lost vigor. The zap also gave him his signature spunky hairdo. Now Dmitri was fit for the mad scientist persona he was meant to be. He started experimenting and discovered lots of new recipes for chemicals. He kept his logs in the almost untouched books that were scattered throughout the lab. He also became a master builder through his experiments. One day when Dmitri was in the lab, Vampirius ran to him and told him a burglar had just run in and took their money. The money was in a large vault underneath the castle. By this time, the last brother Ramses was born from his sarcophagus, so he was there to help too. The brothers all met together, knowing that more where to come. They knew this because, Skeletus saw them with his spyglass while he was stargazing. He said they were running over the hills toward the castle. They planned and planed but they were too slow to action and the thieves stole lots of their money. They though enough was enough, and Dmitri and Vampirius designed an elaborate series of contraptions to stop people trying to steal from them. Vampirius came up the idea by watching ''Home Alone''. He permanently stained the sofa with vomit after seeing a Christmas tree though. After days of building and designing, it was finally finished. They waited at the basement door until a thief stood at the door. They watched as the criminal got caught in their traps. Dmitri even snickered a little. They ran to the bottom of the steps and confronted the criminal they had caught in a net. The criminal said that he was only trying to feed his family. Vampirius felt pity for the thief and gave him a couple hundred gold coins. They let the thief go. This doesn't mean they stopped catching criminals though, as they caught many more. Dmitri still lives with his brothers in their castle, experimenting in the lab.

raw_text: Dr. Pebba "Floppa enjoying his Dr Pebba prior to his crime on April 12, 2013" Status Alive Nationality American Aliases Relatives Floppa, Pebba Dr Peppy (brother) Affiliation Occupation FACT Delivery Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth 19 January, 2012 Dr Pepper Manufactory Marital Status Single Physical Description Gender Male Height Weight 5 sauces 26 sauces This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! 2013 Miami 7-Eleven Robbery [ ] On April 12, 2013, Dr. Pebba walked into a 7-Eleven in Miami, Florida demanding money whilst pointing a S&W Model 63 at the cashier, Harold . After Harold agreed to give Dr. Pebba the money, he immediately called the police, who apprehended Dr. Pebba while he was fleeing the scene in a 2009 Honda Civic. Dr. Pebba was sentenced to a year in prison. He was released on May 2, 2014. After and before this, he was kicked from F.A.C.T Silly Cats Online Quests [ ] In Silly Cats: Online , Dr. Pebba will offer you to help him break into and explode a convenience store for refusing to promote the Dr. Pepper brand. Do this, and he will then give you a quest to destroy the Coca-Cola factory, Complete this task, and he rewards you with 2500 Silly Bucks.

==The Life of Drefis==
Drefis was born with 2 siblings, one white like him and one black. Nobody knows who are his biological parents, but a big old stray cat adopted him when he was little.

He was given away to a superior entity called Mossyboo, and he now resides in his cottage in the woods along with queen Jago, his adventure pal and best friend.
[[File:Queen_Jago.png|left|frameless|Queen Jago sitting on her royal sofa.|241x241px]][[File:Drefis & Jago.png|frameless]]

Drefis spends his days looking after queen Jago and his guardian Mossyboo, he plays in his homemade cat tree and he explores the vast woods around the cottage.

Altho very calm and polite, he can be quite emotional when disturbed during moments of weekness. This became one of his main traits around Mossyboo's friend circle.

When he tries to meow, he emits a mix between a purr and a meow, wich is very cute.

== The Origin Of The Photo :0 ==

title: Dr. Silly Willy

wikitext:

'''Silly Willy Kitty''', also known as '''Dr. Silly Willy''', He worked as a doctor in the 1800s to today he was known to give out the fastest and the best lobotomies around. Dr. Silly was one of the first to advertise lobotomies to the public, his advertisement campaign is still one of the most successful ever.

He had a very special way to give a lobotomy, which consisted of folding people in half to get them in position, and still does to this day. With more than 2,894 lobotomies under his belt, he's had his share of misfortune during his operation with twenty-four failed operations to be exact.

Right now he is in the process to make his own LoBoToMy Center™, which will hopefully go well for him.

==Biography==
Note from Orangutanbestmonke63: Gonna fill this later once I get TECHNOCOW's opinion.

===Skills===
Even if he is mostly known for his lobotomy skills, that's not his only trick! he is also a cat-folding expert and sometimes volunteers at his local hospital to turn sick kids into burritos. He gave himself hundreds of lobotomies in his career, giving him a lot of useful abilities like: growing his mustaches faster, increased eyesight, increased IQ, immunity to cancer, and even more.

=== Failed Operations=== 
*Once he tried to give a "surprise brain attack" to [[Brainless]], but he failed miserably killing four people in the process. He was later excused for the reason, "He's just a silly fellow".
* He also tried to give [[🐱]] a lobotomy. But with his usual bad luck, it failed losing the equivalent of 0.3 sauces of brain matter.
* One of his failed lobotomy was actually on himself, while trying to give himself the ability to grow his mustaches faster he forgot that in a mirror, the left and right are reversed. He is now permanently blind from his left-most mustache (He is absolutely sure he could see from it before).
* Unfortunately, most of his failed attempts where made on  purpose. He called them sabotages. He would only do it for people he hated, like [[E. Scrunk]] (He was jealous of his medical prowess, as shown with his previous work on [[Future Kitty]]).

The guilt from failing to do his most prized skill and sometimes doing irreparable damage to his patients brain really took its toll on Dr. Silly Willy. He often has eepyless nights thinking about how he could have done better, how he could have done so much more damage and how he will do better next time. He grows from these experiences but its still hard for him to deal with. He makes to sure to repay the people he affected with a generous donation of Silly Bucks.

==Appearances==
His first appearance was in the (very short) episode <nowiki>''Ad break'' where we can see Dr. Silly'</nowiki>s infamous ad campaign, in the next episodes we learned more about the LoBoToMy Center. A few episodes later we encountered the Goober Guys in <nowiki>''</nowiki>Goober Guys<nowiki>''</nowiki> and that what the last time we saw of him and his Sister, But fans are still demanding a return so we might see him again in the no-so-far future.

==Trivia==
*He wanted to become a gardener, but an encounter with a brainless worm that he cured with a lobotomy changed his life.
*He refers to himself as "Dr. Silly Willy"
*Flies are his favorite thing with him going on a rant saying "Flies, flies, flies, I love flies. They are yummy and tiny and funny and mini and tasty and silly and salty and..." He went on on this rant for more than 3 hours.
*He trusts no one else to do lobotomies except himself and his partner, [[Bernard]].
*He has gone after other lobotomy doctors before. The reason why you don't hear about other lobotomy doctors is because he covered them up with his enormous advertisement campaign.
*His full name is Dr. Silly Willy Kitty but what people don<nowiki>'t know is that ''Dr''</nowiki> was given to him since birth, his parents knew he would grow up to do great things.

title: Doudou(Oye)
wikitext:
Doudou(oye), ah yes, The very funky and wonky cat, But what is her story?

== Oye ==
Doudou(oye) is a cat, owned by user "[https://www.instagram.com/sansanmaoer/?hl=en sansanmaoer]" on Instagram. On January 1st, The user had posted their first video, Although the important video is their second. The second video on the account had a video of [https://www.instagram.com/p/C1kAVYJJ7eK/ Doudou standing], with the caption as “Oye”, Later on, that video got popular in the cat community and recently started to become somewhat popular, and then more people started posting " Oye " 

== Who is Doudou? ==
Doudou is a silly rescued  orange tabby, who cant control her facial expressions! But why is this? Well, ''Supposedly'' she has something called [https://www.ufaw.org.uk/cats/manx-manx-syndrome "manx syndrome"], She has a cut tail, 1 missing tooth, and a shorter spine;Which leads to nerve problems. Although, This may not be the case of her silly facial expressions. She does have some missing whiskers, so, That might also be the case of the faces. Doudou is a normal cat, No, her ears aren't missing, although sometimes it might look like she has no ears, Somehow, she just puts them back by command. Doudou has other cats who live with her, and surprisingly they all have a great bond, Moral of the story is that Doudou may not be able to control herself sometimes, but that doesn't affect her life, shes still the happy cat she was always meant to be.  

== Extras ==

I had A LOT of fun finding information about this cute wonky cat, I didn't have much to put here this time, but the next cat I do I will try to put a little bit more! 

(also, I recommend watching this [https://www.instagram.com/p/DDI-WhZJ2d0/ cute video of dou], well, I thought it was cute, lol.)

-butter

'''Drazy cat''' is a rare species of cat that is very lazy but also smart at the same time, the family tree we're not yet discovered as '''Drazy cat''' suddenly disappear and vet was not prepared for his disappearance. No one was prepared even the owner but fortunately the owner saw him lastly on the table of his kitchen before completely disappearing. No one known where he went but vet and other unknown team are going to look for him as he also leave some kind of signal to be followed, the team and the group of vet connection disconnected and leave nothing behind.

title: El Gato
wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/El_Gato}} {{Character|name=El Gato|image=El Gato.png|aliases=Gato|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=None|occupation=Civil Rights Activist
Pensparcian President|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Pensparcian Hospital|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=4 sauces|weight=8 sauces|eyes=Brown|appearsin=Candyland Disasters|debut=Candyland Disasters|status={{Deceased}}|breed=Domestic Shorthair|nationality=|imagecaption=El Gato getting ready for a speech|deathDate=30 June 2008|deathPlace=His home}}'''El Gato''' was a civil rights activist that changed Pensparcian lives forever. == Real Life == El Gato refers to a not misheard sound on TikTok from a clip in season three of the anime [https://kimetsu-no-yaiba.fandom.com/wiki/Demon_Slayer Demon Slayer] the character Suma thanks Tengen Uzui and says "arigatou" (thank you), leading people to think it said "el gato." As the sound spread in March 2022 on TikTok, it became associated with a trend featuring a paper cutout of a cat known as "munchkin cat papercraft," as well as other videos showing people's cats. On March 1st, 2022, TikToker [https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&ved=2ahUKEwjm76_-wauAAxWsEFkFHZ7ACekQFnoECA8QAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tiktok.com%2Fdiscover%2Fkirigiritereamo%3Flang%3Den&usg=AOvVaw23RdtCSifOK46zOqvzk1zT&opi=89978449 kirigiritereamo] a clip from [https://kimetsu-no-yaiba.fandom.com/wiki/Demon_Slayer Demon Slayer] of the character [https://kimetsu-no-yaiba.fandom.com/wiki/Suma Suma] thanking [https://kimetsu-no-yaiba.fandom.com/wiki/Tengen_Uzui Tengen Uzui], saying through her cries, "arigatou," or Japanese for "thank you". In the video, they caption the cry of "arigatou" as "el gato," which is Spanish for "the cat." On April 4th, 2022, TikToker [https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&ved=2ahUKEwiA6b3Vw6uAAxU4FlkFHT85BxkQFnoECA4QAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tiktok.com%2F%40spacecadetval%3Flang%3Den&usg=AOvVaw0B2Rgn1GElb3kRpxAFJXBM&opi=89978449 spacecadetval][2] posted a video using the sound showing the construction of a paper cutout of a cat, gaining over 1.4 million likes in one week. == Biography == El Gato was born in the swampy region of Pensparce. Pensparce borders the [[Almanga Jungle]] to the northwest, a lake to the west, and the Silly West to the north. Kitties in the region were often mistreated by people from other regions. They weren't given equal rights and people called them insults like "Mole Men" and "Swamp Goblins." El Gato had limited access to education and he didn't know a lot growing up. Most of the time, he would get distracted from his desk and look out the window. Of course, the mud that covered the outside was already pooling to the windows. It was a rather tough wet season and crops were smothered. This caused a mild depression in the region. The leaders of Pensparce were corrupt and would take bribes. The higher-ups in Silly City and the Silly West wanted the residents of Pensparce to stay in their decaying villages because they thought that they would poison their citizens. As El Gato was growing up, he started to see this discrimination. He was starting to get fed up with the way other people treated them. El Gato studied public speaking in school and he found that he had a natural talent. He impressed his classmates and graduated top of his class. El Gato's life couldn't be better. That wouldn't last when he was ambushed by a group of city boys that wanted to show Pensparcians who was boss. El Gato was mugged and left with no money. But, he realized that he couldn't give up and that giving up would block the road to justice. El Gato then created the Pensparcian Equal Right Society (PERS), which sought to give Pensparcians equal rights and the ability to migrate to other regions. He faced major discrimination for this, but he kept on. He publically advertised his movement and regularly held motivational speeches. He also revealed the brutality officials were placing on them and their cause. This caused many kitties to open their eyes to the wider civil issue that was going on. Soon, more people joined his protests and the Silly City officials had to make a decision. They then arranged a meeting in between [[Sneezy Cat]] and El Gato. The two would discuss about civil rights and their ability to travel. At the end of the meeting, Sneezy Cat and El Gato shook hands. This was momentous as Sneezy Cat had become the first kitty from Silly Country to touch a Pensparcian in 300 years. Soon after, more laws were dropped and more progress was made. There was still an issue though, the Pensparcian leaders were still trying to stop the movement. El Gato realized that the way to stop them was trhough their money. El Gato met with several government officials in Silly Country to stop funding them. Many declined, but some excepted because it was the way the media was pointing towards. El Gato then held protests at their houses and they were forced to accept. The Pensparcian leaders were running out of money so they caved when El Gato pressed them. They admitted to election fraud and money laundering. They were sentenced to life in prison. The question soon came to mind though, who would be the next president of Pensparce. El Gato realized that running for office could help bring attention to the cause. He joined the ballots and he won by a landslide. He immediately improved civil laws and allowed better mobility throughout the region, although the region still stays relatively unexplored to this day. He then pressed the Silly Country to allow them to move there and after many months of pressure, they caved. El Gato had achieved his goal and he kept his presidency until his death. He died from a heart attack on June 30th, 2008. He had lived a very successful life and he is remembered as a civil rights activist that changed Pensparcian lives forever. == Trivia == * He likes martial arts * He was friends with [[Sam]] once * He learned to stand on his hind legs at the age of three

In the video, they caption the cry of "arigatou" as "el gato," which is Spanish for "the cat." On April 4th, 2022, TikToker spacecadetval [2] posted a video using the sound showing the construction of a paper cutout of a cat, gaining over 1.4 million likes in one week. Biography [ ] El Gato was born in the swampy region of Pensparce. Pensparce borders the Almanga Jungle to the northwest, a lake to the west, and the Silly West to the north. Kitties in the region were often mistreated by people from other regions. They weren't given equal rights and people called them insults like "Mole Men" and "Swamp Goblins." El Gato had limited access to education and he didn't know a lot growing up. Most of the time, he would get distracted from his desk and look out the window. Of course, the mud that covered the outside was already pooling to the windows. It was a rather tough wet season and crops were smothered. This caused a mild depression in the region. The leaders of Pensparce were corrupt and would take bribes. The higher-ups in Silly City and the Silly West wanted the residents of Pensparce to stay in their decaying villages because they thought that they would poison their citizens. As El Gato was growing up, he started to see this discrimination. He was starting to get fed up with the way other people treated them. El Gato studied public speaking in school and he found that he had a natural talent. He impressed his classmates and graduated top of his class. El Gato's life couldn't be better. That wouldn't last when he was ambushed by a group of city boys that wanted to show Pensparcians who was boss. El Gato was mugged and left with no money. But, he realized that he couldn't give up and that giving up would block the road to justice. El Gato then created the Pensparcian Equal Right Society (PERS), which sought to give Pensparcians equal rights and the ability to migrate to other regions. He faced major discrimination for this, but he kept on. He publically advertised his movement and regularly held motivational speeches. He also revealed the brutality officials were placing on them and their cause. This caused many kitties to open their eyes to the wider civil issue that was going on. Soon, more people joined his protests and the Silly City officials had to make a decision. They then arranged a meeting in between Sneezy Cat and El Gato. The two would discuss about civil rights and their ability to travel. At the end of the meeting, Sneezy Cat and El Gato shook hands. This was momentous as Sneezy Cat had become the first kitty from Silly Country to touch a Pensparcian in 300 years. Soon after, more laws were dropped and more progress was made. There was still an issue though, the Pensparcian leaders were still trying to stop the movement. El Gato realized that the way to stop them was trhough their money. El Gato met with several government officials in Silly Country to stop funding them. Many declined, but some excepted because it was the way the media was pointing towards. El Gato then held protests at their houses and they were forced to accept. The Pensparcian leaders were running out of money so they caved when El Gato pressed them. They admitted to election fraud and money laundering. They were sentenced to life in prison. The question soon came to mind though, who would be the next president of Pensparce. El Gato realized that running for office could help bring attention to the cause. He joined the ballots and he won by a landslide. He immediately improved civil laws and allowed better mobility throughout the region, although the region still stays relatively unexplored to this day. He then pressed the Silly Country to allow them to move there and after many months of pressure, they caved. El Gato had achieved his goal and he kept his presidency until his death. He died from a heart attack on June 30th, 2008. He had lived a very successful life and he is remembered as a civil rights activist that changed Pensparcian lives forever. Trivia [ ] He likes martial arts He was friends with Sam once He learned to stand on his hind legs at the age of three

title: E. Scrunk

infobox.name: E. Scrunk
infobox.imagecaption: E. Scrunk delicately balancing his egg on his head

wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/E._Scrunk}}
{{Character|name=E. Scrunk|aliases=Electrophysicist Scrunk|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=|occupation=Scientist|marital=Science|birthDate=Around 200 AD|birthPlace=China|species=Science Cat|gender=Male|height=3.1415926535 sauces|weight=24 sauces|eyes=Unknown|appearsin=The kitty city 2|debut=The kitty city 2|image=E. Scrunk.png|deathDate=|deathPlace=|fur=Orange & White|imagecaption=E. Scrunk delicately balancing his egg on his head|nationality={{Chinese}}|status={{Alive}}}}'''E. Scrunk''' (The E is shot for electrophysicist) is a master at physics and helps the crew with his wacky gadgets.

== Biography ==
E. Scrunk was born in China around 200 AD. He quickly became one of the smartest kitties in his class. All the other kitties were jealous of him so he was often bullied. He grew past this and started practicing his wacky inventions on his bullies. Miraculously, none of the kitties died, but they did leave with immeasurable trauma. After this, E. Scrunk studied physics and he gained a PHD. When he was walking from one class to another, he stumbled upon an egg. He carried the egg on his head and he can still be found with the egg on his head to this day.

Later on in his life, he moved to Silly City for chances at a better life. He got his better life and soon became a big landmark within the community. When he heard about [[B.A.D]], he knew he had to something about it. He didn't join [[The GOODings]] though because he thought it was too dangerous of a position. So instead, he worked from the sidelines, secretly giving technological weapons to The GOODings to defeat B.A.D. He continued to this for a long time.

One day, when E. Scrunk came back from helping The GOODings, he found his lab ransacked. He found that his precious jar of silly juice had been stolen. This invention had the power to give any kitty extra silliness. He found out the perpetrator was [[$24.50]]. He never caught him though. He recovered the lab and got his money back.

Later on, when he was exploring, looking for ingredients for his next project, he stumbled upon [[Future Kitty]] struggling on the floor. He had been in a fight with the [[Grinwatcher]] who had mutilated him. E. Scrunk hurriedly took Future Kitty in his arms and brought him to his lab. Over a series of days, E. Scrunk successfully engineered cyborg parts for him. Future Kitty took some adjusting but he soon became on of the most successful members of The GOODings.

During the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], he played a pivotal role in the Battle of Bustein. He gave fancy gadgets that helped The GOODings drive B.A.D out of the village. After this, E. Scrunk's life was pretty uneventful, and to this day, you can still meet E. Scrunk at his home in Silly City. He will happily help you with any task you ask him.

== Trivia ==

* E. Scrunk has a deadly fear of atomic bombs
* E. Scrunk picked up his treasured egg on December 3rd, 1755

title: Edward
wikitext:
{{Top|Canon}} {{Character| name=Edward| image= Edward.png| imagecaption =How wonderful!| status={{Alive}} | nationality=| aliases=J.L. Lockhart| relatives=| affiliation=The G.O.O.D.ings| occupation=Teacher
Inventor
Writer
Poet| birthDate=Unknown| birthPlace=Unknown| marital=Divorced| gender=Male| breed=Thai Cat| fur=White, with grey colorpoints| height=16 sauces| weight=8 sauces| firstappears=The Literaries| lastappears=The myth of The Tooth}} '''Edward''' is a minor character in the Silly Cats series that serves an important role in the role. He is the technical predecessor, and teacher of [[E. Scrunk|E.Scrunk.]] He also helps [[Jinx]] and [[The GOODings|The G.O.O.D.ings]] to understanding the beginning of the universe, and the motives and origins of many things, allowing him to help them find [[Plimpus]] and get the tooth. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === Edward appears in the Silly Cats show as a side character that assists The G.O.O.D.ings and is the lifelong friend and teacher of E. Scrunk despite their age differences. === Silly Cats: ONLINE === Edward appears as a character you can call in the game, who you can also talk to. == Biography == Edward was born as the single son of Buh, the oldest of the Three Knights. Due to this, he can be considered an Inception Era cat, or First Generation. Edward was later in his life separated from his parent in The Banishing unto Silly Planet. On Silly Planet, Edward spent his time studying the world around him. He became a great scientist and published many academic books on his discoveries, which were used by many countries to advance many things. He became known as a world famous teacher later on. He also lived for centuries, being able to study far more. During this time, he invested much of his studies into abstract mathematics and obscure pseudosciences from scientists before him. This led him to follow into a cult called the Cult of The Black Book of Silly Magic(later reformed as the Cult of The Grinwatcher, much after Edward left). In this cult, he studied the origins of the Inception Era times by reading and summarizing the important sections that covered historical and mythical events from The Black Book of Silly Magic, in which he create da secret scroll left over. He left the group when they began following the words of The Grinwatcher, as he knew that it would turn into a criminal group later. The group knew Edward as somebody who had lots of knowledge and incriminating information on them, so they decided to hunt him down(an initial reason for the forming of B.A.D.). Edward went into hiding during this time, and wrote novels and poems under his pen name, J.L. Lockhart. He also tried to marry in this time, but his wife, unknown, divorced him 3 days after. E. Scrunk, whilst looking for the scientist he had been learning from, found Edward on a rainy night. Edward reluctantly agreed, but over time they became great friends as student and teacher. Edward saw E. Scrunk's knack for inventing, so he decided to help him. They made many inventions together. E. Scrunk soon became knowledgeable enough to continue his studies on his own. Years later, when Jinx was on her journey to stop the beast, her and her group went to Edward for an understanding of the motives behind it, what can kill the beast, and other knowledge. Edward also gave them a place to go to to get Plimpus' contacts, since he's an introvert. == Personality == Edward is closed off, rambly, but crystal clear, and very strict. He has a victorian accent.

title: Eepeer (Endless Eeps)

infobox.name: Eepeer
infobox.aliases: The Eepy Scammer, The Eeper (Mistaken for), The Meeper (Mistaken for)

wikitext:
{{Character|image=Eepeer.png|name=Eepeer|aliases=The Eepy Scammer, The Eeper (Mistaken for), The Meeper (Mistaken for)|status={{Alive}}|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=|occupation=Prison
Scamming|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Silly City Outskirts|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Domestic short hair|fur=Gray|height=1 sauce|weight=13 sauces|firstappears=Cameo|lastappears=Cameo|nationality={{Unknown}}|imagecaption=Eepeer pulling his scam}}'''Eepeer''', despite his name does not actually like to eep. He tricks people that he does like eeping to get free money. Do not be fooled by his appearance, this silly kitty is not a member of [[Eeperia]]. == Biography == Eepeer was born at a disadvantage. He was born in the Silly City outskirts. His family was poor. They couldn't afford for him to go to a hospital, so he was born at home. He grew up in a bad neighborhood, and the silly kitties there would bully him because he was poor. This abuse led him to look like he was eepy. When he was older he realized he could use his unique look to trick people into thinking he was eepy. That's when he heard about the recent rise of [[The Meeper]], and his musical talents. Eepeer would use this to his benefit. He would trick people into thinking he was a member of Eeperia. But he was not actually related to them at all. People would give him money thinking he was related to a millionaire. He tells them if they give him money, he could give them connections to The Meeper. In reality, he earned thousands from this scam, and he kept it all to himself. The Silly City Police Department (SCPD) would later catch on to this, and they would capture him on May 7th, 2017. He now currently spends his time in jail. His sentence is 7 years, with bail. This means that if a silly kitty pays enough money, he could be released. How curious...{{Top|Mythology}}

Part 2|height=not very tall( a few sauces)|weight=maybe a little chubby (some sauces)|relatives=Good cat}}
'''Evil Cat''' is a cat that is '''evil.''' His lust for blood and unimaginable malice and hatred know no bounds in the kitty realm.
==Activity==
Evil Cat has killed countless others, and he will '''never stop'''. He enjoys nothing but his work, which is being evil and killing. Evil Cat desires nothing but pain to all lifeforms on planet Earth and beyond. Although due to that he is easily lead off his track, because anytime he is introduced to some other thought, he is lost in it. Mayhaps once educated, he will graduate and stop his ways.

In episode 42, Evil Cat attacks Jinx and the gang, trapping them in a cage and sending them down a massive waterfall, luckily [[Future Kitty]] did NOT get trapped, as the crew began falling down the waterfall, Future kitty and Evil Cat began to fight. It was a intense battle and Evil Cat managed to scratch Future kittys cyborg eye, damaging his vision for a while. In the end Future kitty managed to charge up a Super Doom Beam through his cyborg eye and send it straight at Evil Cat, making his head disappear. Evil Cats body was left there as Future kitty flew down to the crew and managed to save them just in time before they hit the bottom of the waterfall.

In the final episode, [[The Beast]] uses some of Evil Cats powers, making Evil Cat to weak to defeat Glombie, and die himself, leaving many to theorize that The Beast ate Evil Cats dead body, growing his power even more.
==Powers==
*Infeline strength.
*Expertise with steel and fire arms.
*Really sharp teeth and claws.

== Trivia ==

* In real life, his name is Macaroni

title: Ernesto

infobox.name: Ernesto
infobox.imagecaption: Ernesto preparing to make a deal

wikitext:
{{Character | name = Ernesto | image = Ernesto.png | imagecaption = Ernesto preparing to make a deal | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{Mexican}} | aliases = | relatives = Unknown | affiliation = | occupation = Making deals
Potato carving | birthDate = Unknown | birthPlace = Train | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = Single | gender = Male | breed = Bombay | fur = Black | height = 6 sauces | weight = 14 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Ernesto''' is a deal maker that specializes in explosives. He is also a master potato carver. ==Biography== Ernesto was first born in a speeding train. The train was full of kitties who snuck on the train in anticipation for the Silly West Gold Rush. He was born with no ears, much to the surprise of the people on the train. He stayed in the cramped train in his mother's arms for the rest of the journey. He was dropped off in a makeshift hospital somewhere along the tracks. There he was cared for. Unfortunately, Ernesto's mother never came back for him. He was taken into foster care where he would familiarize himself with a future ally. He laid down in his bunk and wondered with hope that his mother would come back for him. By now, he had forgotten her face and he missed it dearly. Ernesto fell asleep, being exhausted from his previous day of work lugging heavy packages off of the trains coming through the small town that the foster care place was in. Ernesto slept for hours before he was suddenly awoken by the loud sound of a cowbell. The lady running the place called "Dinner!" Ernesto had no idea how much time had passed. He ate his dinner swiftly and went back to bed. He was about to drift asleep again before a kid a few years older than him knocked on the edge of the bunk and told him the day wasn't nearly over. He introduced himself as [[Wild Pete|Pete]] and held out a hand. Ernesto had a moment of doubt, but grabbed his hand, responding "Mine's Ernesto." Pete took him outside and informed him about the nighttime activities they do. He said the activities were for the older kids and they only did them at night because they were too dangerous for the younger kids. Ernesto watched in awe as some of the kids did opera, juggling, and even fire breathing. Ernesto wanted to try these activities but the other kids were rude to him because he was newer. They told him that he only got to use a potato sack. The other kids laughed at him. The only thing Pete could do was shrug. Ernesto took a deep breath and took the potatoes out of the sack. He was already full from dinner so he couldn't eat them. He thought what he could do with the potatoes, then it came to him. He had a little practice of carving with bell peppers he found on trains as he was getting carried around the Silly West. He grabbed a loose fragment of tumbleweed he found on the ground, and got to work carving the potatoes. The other kids were surprised as he made a cactus out of the potatoes. The other kids just gave up and left him alone from then on. Eventually, Pete and Ernesto were taken from foster care and went their separate ways. Ernesto was bored with his life and knew that Ernesto carving wasn't going to get him anywhere. He walked up to a market stall. He opened his pockets and all there were inside were one silly buck, a paperclip, and the loose piece of tumbleweed he picked up previously. He looked around the stall, uninterested, that was until something caught his eye. It was a pair of plastic hands. He knew they served no purpose, but something about them just felt right to him. He asked "How much for those?" The shop owner said ten silly bucks. He begged and the shop owner caved and gave him the hands. Ernesto was strapped for cash, and he started looking for jobs. He eventually found one. Using the hands, he somehow persuaded the interviewer to get him the job. The job was about negotiation, and the interviewer found him very appealing. Eventually, Ernesto made his own store. He started making deals and connections. Ernesto soon learned a lot about explosives and got a license to handle them. He made hundreds of deals after that. He later watched as the a cat named Pete gained control over the Silly West. He thought the name sounded familiar. He later met up with him and the two immediately recognized each other and they hugged, Pete invited him to join him but Ernesto declined, saying he had already found his passion. Ernesto continues to operate in the Silly West and makes millions.

Pete took him outside and informed him about the nighttime activities they do. He said the activities were for the older kids and they only did them at night because they were too dangerous for the younger kids. Ernesto watched in awe as some of the kids did opera, juggling, and even fire breathing. Ernesto wanted to try these activities but the other kids were rude to him because he was newer. They told him that he only got to use a potato sack. The other kids laughed at him. The only thing Pete could do was shrug. Ernesto took a deep breath and took the potatoes out of the sack. He was already full from dinner so he couldn't eat them. He thought what he could do with the potatoes, then it came to him. He had a little practice of carving with bell peppers he found on trains as he was getting carried around the Silly West. He grabbed a loose fragment of tumbleweed he found on the ground, and got to work carving the potatoes. The other kids were surprised as he made a cactus out of the potatoes. The other kids just gave up and left him alone from then on. Eventually, Pete and Ernesto were taken from foster care and went their separate ways. Ernesto was bored with his life and knew that Ernesto carving wasn't going to get him anywhere. He walked up to a market stall. He opened his pockets and all there were inside were one silly buck, a paperclip, and the loose piece of tumbleweed he picked up previously. He looked around the stall, uninterested, that was until something caught his eye. It was a pair of plastic hands. He knew they served no purpose, but something about them just felt right to him. He asked "How much for those?" The shop owner said ten silly bucks. He begged and the shop owner caved and gave him the hands. Ernesto was strapped for cash, and he started looking for jobs. He eventually found one. Using the hands, he somehow persuaded the interviewer to get him the job. The job was about negotiation, and the interviewer found him very appealing. Eventually, Ernesto made his own store. He started making deals and connections. Ernesto soon learned a lot about explosives and got a license to handle them. He made hundreds of deals after that. He later watched as the a cat named Pete gained control over the Silly West. He thought the name sounded familiar. He later met up with him and the two immediately recognized each other and they hugged, Pete invited him to join him but Ernesto declined, saying he had already found his passion. Ernesto continues to operate in the Silly West and makes millions.

==Biography==
Ethel the Cat is a female 13 year old cat from The Cat Welfare Association. Ethel is a cat with dwarfism who was born blind, she needed her bum wiped and she loves to spin around in circles at meal time. No one wanted to adopt Ethel until a woman named Donna saw Ethel and wanted her. Donna said "It was love at first-sight". Ethel lived a normal life being a blind house cat, until one day her Dad uploaded a picture of Ethel on to a Facebook group. The picture blew up making multiple memes of Ethel, The most famous one being the oiia oiia meme, which showed a picture of Ethel then a model of Ethel spinning around (isn't that ironic how Ethel loves to spin in circles as well). That is the silly cat Ethel. [[File:Ethel the oiia cat.jpg|thumb|feewfdsewd]]
