infobox.occupation: Delivering Fanta to everyone in the neighborhood
infobox.imagecaption: Fanter discussing His beverage of choice

wikitext:
{{Character |name=Fanter |aliases=Fanta |relatives=[[Floppa]] (cousin)
[[Elder Floppa]] (granduncle) |affiliation=FACT |occupation=Delivering Fanta to everyone in the neighborhood |marital=Single |birthDate=Unknown |birthPlace=Germany (unknown city) |species=''Caracal caracal'' subsp. ''fanter'' (subspecies of cat) |gender=Male |height=40 sauces |weight=167.983 sauces |eyes=Black |appearsin=All episodes post-[[Candy Chaos]] |debut=[[Candy Chaos]] |image=Fanter.png |portrayedby=Billie Eilish |imagecaption=Fanter discussing His beverage of choice |nationality={{German}}}} {{stub}} '''Fanter''' is the main Fanta deliverycat & [[Floppa]]'s cousin. First meeting [[Cokey Cola]], they bonded. Soon, more cats joined [[FACT]] and had formed a successful delivery group. ==Story == From a young age, Fanter loved the taste of orange juice. He would drink it with his cousin which inspired him to get an orange juice stand. He couldn't pronounce "orange juice" very well, so he just shouted out "Orage jumce!". This caused him to get a quick buck or two. But as he grew older, his love for orange juice faded. One day, he found a bottle of Fanta and something clicked in his mind. He bought boxes of Fanta, and sold them, shouting out "Fanter!" to attract customers. He then encountered a small cat, named [[Cokey Cola]]. This is when everything changed for Fanter. Cokey Cola met Fanter at 15:19 on the 24th of November, 2012. They met while they were both attending that year's Minecon event. The day had gone very well for Fanter, as he was a very big fan of Minecraft up until that point. As he was doing his usual yelling of "Fanter! Fanter!" he bumped into another person attending the event. As Fanter was turning around, about to apologize for bumping into them, he first heard the phrase which would haunt him for the rest of his life. "Cokey cola!" Fanter's expression quickly went from plain ol' happy to a deep anger. His face turned to a bright red. Steam erupted from his ears. He stared down his opponent, eyes focused onto the target. He opened his mouth and violently yelled, "FANTER!". Cokey Cola stopped in his tracks and turned towards Fanter. Face coloured with an expression of pure anger and hatred. Their rivalry had begun. Fanter would continue his business of selling tasty, orange flavoured carbonated drinks while keeping his hatred for Cokey Cola fresh in his mind. Fanter had now become quite successful, but Cokey Cola would start to rival him in sales. Their rivalry had now entered into the thing they both loved most; the business of carbonated beverages. After years of continued success and monetary gain for both Fanter and Cokey Cola, the Silly War began. This would start to hit both businesses hard, as they had to keep supplying money for weapons, which ended up with near bankrupcy for both. They knew something had to be done. So Fanter and Cokey Cola put aside their differences and pooled their money to fund the Goodies. At the end of the war, Cokey Cola was dealt a fatal blow. In a last ditch effort to save Cokey Cola, Fanter would do something unprecedented; mix both drinks. This mix would then result in the creation of the Fountain of Youth, saving Cokey Cola's life. They then decided to become business partners, and they hid the Fountain of Youth recipe in Chicago. {{Top|Canon}}

 | weight       = 14 sauces

 | tiktok       =
 | youtube      =
}}'''Ferret''' was a rather unknown member of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. He hated talking to other kitties. He ended up killing an entire team of kitties after going mad. He was killed on the same mission.

==Biography==
Ferret was born on a spaceship orbiting [[Planet K.I.T.Y]]. He was immediately filed into the Section B Legion. He was antisocial and refused to come out of his room. When someone tried pulling him out, Ferret bit their arm and ran back in, locking the door. He eventually was kicked back to Planet K.I.T.Y. He was left alone on the surface. He didn't go mad though. Eventually the commander of Section B invited him back and told him that there was a mission for him.

The mission was simple yet dangerous. There was a new planet under the Gnarp Gnaplians radar. They had already named it Planet Tule. Tule had dangerous lifeforms down below. Like beasts that could swallow you whole and plants that spit acid. All Ferret and his team had to do was gather resources and examples of tissue from the planet. They were armed with a ray gun and a tranquilizer stick. They were also given food. The team landed on the planet, and immediately they were met with danger. One team member killed the beast that was charging toward them. The team leader was [[Glooble]], a highly respected military gunmen. Glooble gave the orders and sent Ferret to collect some of the natural berries. Ferret headed over to some bushes and picked them. He was actually given the easiest task. The others had to collect samples of beast hide and collect some of the plant acid. They all met in the center having collected all their resources.

Then something happened. Ferret, in a state of idiocy, took off his helmet. One whiff of the air made him mad. He started killing the other members of his team brutally. He even ate one of them. The others hid for hours, avoiding Ferret. Eventually, Glooble had had enough and tried to tackle Ferret but he escaped and managed to kill two more people. Almost all of the members had been killed. The only ones standing were an unknown member and Glooble. Glooble stared at Ferret with his ray gun aimed right at his head. He stopped for a second before pulling the trigger. Ferret was dead. Glooble carried the lifeless bodies of his compatriots into the spaceship. Glooble left Ferret's body to get eaten by the beasts that roamed the planet.

The Ferret Incident led to the rule not to take off your helmet when going to other planets unless confirmed safe. The tragedy would be remembered by all of the friends and family of the lost.

== Appearences ==

=== Silly Cats ===
'''Eyebrow''' appears for a minute or two in "Raising eyebrows", the episode is all about confusing the audience with strange noises, wacky moving lines like your drunk, and even some horror elements. As [[Jinx]] and the crew were walking down a long hallway, which as they walked, it got smaller, '''Eyebrow''' appears for a second as a loud, scary noise plays. This jumpscares the crew and '''Eyebrow''' starts jumpscaring them from everywhere, the crew run to the end of the hallway as '''Eyebrow''' stops jumpscaring and starts chasing. The crew slam the door shut and '''Eyebrow''' is locked in the hallway.

At the end of this episode, it is found out is was just a dream. '''Eyebrow''' isn't actually a bad guy.

== Trivia ==
Eyebrow looks like a ordinary cat at first, but he actually has black lines as eyebrows. They look drawn on. Nobody knows why he has them, not even Eyebrow himself.

His wife, Raise, also has these eyebrows.

In real life Floppa's real name is Gregory Alexandrovich Karacal. == Biography == Floppa's life began when he was in a butter embryo with [[Photosynthesizing]]. Floppa grew slowly merging with the butter and soon he grew into the Floppa we know today. On the other hand, Photosynthesizing grew a dependency on water. As soon as Floppa was born he knew he wanted to be a rapper. But Floppa knew he had to start off small. He looked all around Silly City for jobs, but no one hired him. That is until he found two caracals like him named [[Dr Peppy|Dr. Peppy]] and [[Dr Pebba|Dr. Pebba]]. They said they worked for the [[FACT|Friendly Advertising Cat Team]]. Floppa was delighted. Floppa attended the interview the following day, but unfortunately Floppa messed up by saying that Cokey Cola was a better drink than Dr. Pebba. He went back to his life on the streets. Floppa was upset that he messed up the interview. He thought he couldn't achieve his dream. But then, as he was walking down the street, he saw a Safeway. He had an idea. He went inside and stole a microphone, speakers, and a boom box. That's how he started his rapping career. Floppa's career started off small, but he grew a following. Floppa finally got fame during one of his concerts on February 17th, 2014. His rapping was so good that day that all the audience could was look in awe. The moment was so amazing that is now celebrated as the national silly holiday called Floppa-Fest. His rapping career was very prosperous, making him rich. But then it hit Floppa, he decided that making music wasn't important and the bigger task at hand was defeating the great evil, [[The Beast]]. His fanbase was enraged, and so he hid. Luckily for him, a friendly group of cats, led by a cat named [[Jinx]], had heard about his cause and invited him to join them. Floppa agreed, delighted. Now Floppa can be seen fighting evil alongside [[The GOODings]]. To this day he does not regret his decision. {{Top|Canon}} == Silly Gallery == File:Floppa rap.png|Floppa Rapping File:Floppa birth.png|Floppa's Birth

}}Ethan is a siamese cat who entered the world on a sunny day in silly town, he's presently a builder as he has an awesome knowledge over stuff, because he has worked hard for his knowledge.[[File:Ethan.png|alt=sillyness overloads >:3|thumb|Ethan but older]]

==Biography==

Ethan, a remarkable siamese cat, entered the world on a sunny day in Silly Town on the 5th of April, 1984. Born into a world where survival was a daily struggle, Ethan relied on his keen instincts to help scavenge for food alongside his devoted mother. They navigated the challenges of their environment, focusing on each meal to sustain themselves and evade the looming threat of starvation. Despite their hardships, Ethan harbored a deep-seated desire for knowledge, a trait that set him apart from his peers. At just four months old, he displayed an eagerness to learn, dedicating his time to absorbing every bit of information he could lay his paws on.

As he delved into the world of literature, Ethan saw a glimmer of hope in the vast expanse of knowledge that surrounded him. His passion for reading ignited a fire within him, fueling his ambition to become a feline of intellect and wisdom. However, fate had other plans in store as tragedy struck one fateful day. While out scavenging for food, Ethan's beloved mother vanished without a trace, leaving a void in his heart that could never be filled.

Despite the overwhelming sense of loss, Ethan pushed forward, determined to honor his mother's memory through his accomplishments. With each passing day, his skills sharpened, and his thirst for knowledge grew stronger. By the time he reached his first birthday, Ethan had evolved into a budding engineer, armed with the tools to bring his imaginative creations to life. His journey was one of resilience and perseverance, a testament to the unwavering spirit that resided within him.

Through dedication and hard work, Ethan mastered the art of construction, utilizing his intelligence to craft a myriad of inventions that showcased his ingenuity. His creations ranged from intricate contraptions to innovative gadgets, each one a testament to his unwavering determination and resourcefulness. As he honed his skills, Ethan's reputation as a skilled engineer spread far and wide, earning him recognition as a visionary in the world of feline innovation.

With his vast knowledge and unparalleled expertise, Ethan continued to push the boundaries of what was thought possible, inspiring awe and admiration in all who beheld his creations. His legacy endured as a beacon of hope for future generations of cats, a symbol of what could be achieved through hard work, dedication, and a thirst for knowledge. Ethan's story was a testament to the power of resilience and determination, a tale of triumph in the face of adversity that would be remembered for generations to come. He then became 2 years old, reaching a pivotal moment in his journey where he was now ready to face new challenges and conquer them with determination. With a drive to secure his future, he decided to take matters into his own hands by constructing a sturdy house that would serve as his refuge, ensuring his well-being and survival. Upon venturing out to a nearby restaurant to purchase some food, he unexpectedly encountered a group known as [[The GOODings]]. Curiosity piqued, he approached them and greeted the members, uncertain of what the interaction would entail.

As conversations unfolded with [[The GOODings]], it became evident that there was an opportunity for Ethan to become a part of their team. Excited at the prospect of joining forces with them, Ethan readily accepted the offer, eager to embark on new adventures and experiences. However, the tranquility of the moment was disrupted when spies infiltrated the restaurant, launching a sudden attack. Displaying quick thinking and resilience, Ethan bravely defended himself by eliminating several of the assailants.

In the aftermath of the chaos, Ethan parted ways with [[The GOODings]], his bond with them strengthened by the shared adversity they faced. As he continued on his path, the echoes of the encounter with the spies lingered, serving as a reminder of the unpredictable nature of his journey and the resilience needed to navigate its twists and turns.

== Personality ==
Ethan is typically known for his relaxed demeanor, exuding a sense of calm and collectedness in most situations. However, there are moments when a more somber and serious side of his personality emerges, hinting at deeper layers beneath his usual easygoing facade. Rather than being one to stroll around in a perpetual state of joviality, Ethan tends to carry himself with an air of stoicism, giving off an aura of someone who is not easily swayed by external influences.

Furthermore, it is worth noting that Ethan can sometimes come across as arrogant to those who are not familiar with him or who do not see past his initial demeanor. This perceived arrogance might be a defense mechanism, a way for him to shield his vulnerabilities or uncertainties from those who might misinterpret his actions. However, once you get to know Ethan on a more personal level, you will discover a different side to him—a side that is kind and caring, especially towards his close friends and individuals who are unassuming and peaceful in nature. Ethan values genuine connections and is quick to show his softer, more compassionate side to those who earn his trust and demonstrate a genuine interest in understanding him beyond the surface.

== Participation on WoSaU (war of silly and unsilly) ==

=== Duty ===
Amidst the ever-looming threat posed by the nefarious [[B.A.D]], Ethan willingly shouldered the crucial duty of safeguarding their stronghold. Imbued with a resolute determination and an adeptness that bordered on brilliance, he threw himself into the arduous task of erecting an impregnable defense against the encroaching menace. Delving deeply into the intricate craft of constructing sentries and engineering defensive mechanisms, Ethan displayed a penchant for meticulous detail coupled with an astute perception that set him apart. With a steely resolve that belied the constant pressure surrounding him, Ethan not only honed his existing skills but fearlessly delved into the realm of hacking, seeking to fortify their defenses through unconventional means. Each line of code he meticulously crafted and every circuit he methodically configured served as a testament to his unwavering dedication to ensuring the safety of their sanctuary. As the dire situation escalated, Ethan's resourcefulness and ingenuity came to the fore, illuminating his path forward with a brilliance that outshone the encroaching darkness. Through his tireless efforts and relentless pursuit of perfection in defense strategy, Ethan emerged as a stalwart beacon of innovation and expertise, leading the charge in devising the most effective countermeasures against the relentless advance of the [[B.A.D]] forces. In this unending battle for survival, Ethan epitomized resilience and brilliance, laying the groundwork for a defense system that not only withstood the test of time but also served as a testament to his unmatched prowess and unwavering resolve in the face of overwhelming odds.

{{Stub}}

== Biography ==
'''Florbi''' is a orange tabby cat, they don't have a known birthdate.

Florbi runs rampant in the illegal catnip production industry, owning one of the largest factories known to silly kind. Florbi does not have any co-workers in his factory, as he thinks they'll just hinder his business scheme. Florbi owns 2 Illegal Catnip warehouses. And he has no plans of stopping anytime soon.

↵Florbi's Networth is that of $14,943,876,468 USD. Half of which he "borrowed" from another Illegal Catnip producer, presumably which Florbi killed off. Florbi does not tolerate competition and wants to rule over the illegal catnip industry until the silly verse (presumably) ends.



↵If Florbi isn't producing illegal catnip, he usually sits around and stares blankly until he decides to do something. Most of the time being either producing illegal catnip, or looking for competitor catnip factories for him to take over.
== Home Planet ==
'''Florbi''' Inhabits [[Planet K.I.T.Y]], but he has visited Catio on rare occasions. Most of his factories are on K.I.T.Y, but he has 4 known factories on Catio, however most of his warehouses are on Catio. Even he thinks it's inconvenient that he need to go to Catio just to stow illegal catnip away. This is mostly due to the fact Florbi refuses to build warehouses on K.I.T.Y for some reason.

Florbi owns 1 rocket to travel between K.I.T.Y and Catio, however, he spends most of his money on fuel for it instead of things he actually wants, like warehouses on K.I.T.Y.
== Resurfacing ==
Eventually, '''Florbi''' would disappear entirely, after coming into contact with the [[B.A.D]] member [[Babem]]. It had been speculated that Babem had killed Florbi in a conflict, but nobody knew for sure.

Some people say Florbi has had missing posters put up on his home planet K.I.T.Y, but nobody there has seen him ever. Not even his friends.

People on Catio have tried finding Florbi too, but they couldn't find him. Some people said Florbi fled underground, others say Babem killed Florbi. Nobody knew for sure.


But then, Florbi had resurfaced, eventually speaking to [[George]], in order to make his way into B.A.D, which he had done so successfully. After making his way into B.A.D, Florbi immediately began production on illegal catnip again, specifically for B.A.D members to use.

For the longest time Florbi enjoyed being in B.A.D, he had all he could need in order to make a living, and assist his new friends to spread chaos and dispense across the sillyverse.

{{Character|name=Future Kitty|aliases=Darius|relatives=Orphan|affiliation=The GOODings, 3KHURA|occupation=Time Traveling
Silly Balance|marital=Single (could not marry)|birthDate=19 May 2075|birthPlace=Unknown|species=Cyborg cat|gender=Male|height=10 sauces|weight=12 sauces (With Upgrades)
5 sauces (Without Upgrades)|eyes=Orange / Blue|appearsin=Most time travel episodes, some other episodes|debut=Past tense nightmare|image= Future Kitty.png|With Upgrades Future.png|Without Upgrades |firstappears=The Shining Fate of the Universe|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 3|deathDate=14 March 1994|deathPlace=No Man's Land|imagecaption=We are ending the war before it even begins.|status={{Deceased}}|fur=Gray|nationality={{Unknown}}|breed=Russian Blue}} '''Darius''', otherwise known as '''Future Kitty''', is a side character within the Silly Cats franchise that that accompanies Jinx and Maxwell in their journey to stop [[The Beast]]. He is a grey time-travelling cat from the True Timeline, who has cybernetic replacements such as an optical replacement, and an infused C.I.C (computer intelligence chip). Future Kitty died in the Battle of No Man's Land that saw the defeat of [[B.A.D]]. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === In the [[Silly Cats]] series, Future Kitty acts as a kitty that defends the timeline and keeps it in balance. He was later killed in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. === Silly Cats: Online === In [[Silly Cats: Online]], Future Kitty makes a short cameo wandering around a small opening in the woods. If you talk to him, he says, Future Kitty.exe updating." He serves no other purpose besides this and cannot give you quests. == Biography == ''This part of the biography takes place within the True timeline, preceding the Second timeline.'' === Early life === Future Kitty was an orphan grey cat born during the First war of Silly and Unsilly. He grew up very lonely, but eventually he found a friend in the orphanage, his friend, Moriah, who was a couple of years older than him. Him and Moriah would become lifelong friends. This all would change when Future Kitty was employed in the ARQ army. === Fighting in the ARQ === For the rest of his life from when he became 15, Future Kitty would fight in the ARQ army against DUCE (an evolution of B.A.D from the True Timeline). He became a high-ranking soldier, and was therefore moved to the 8th legion. That is when he reunited with Moriah. They would work together to fight in the will of the ARQ against DUCE, and their friendship was rekindled. They even wanted to marry each other when the war was finished. ==== Landmine incident ==== One day, after a week-long siege on the Requier Fortress by DUCE on ARQ's 8th legion, ARQ emerged victorious in a battle that seemed hopeless. DUCE had planted landmines around the fortress to prevent the legion from leaving the fortress, so the general sent out all the soldiers to disarm landmines. Future Kitty and Moriah worked together and chatted whilst they disarmed landmines until a landmine blew in Future Kitty's face. From then on, his cybernetic eye transplant was installed, and a month later his C.I.C. ==== The Death of Moriah ==== In a battle in the plateaus, Darius watched as Moriah was killed by a rogue soldier. Darius held Moriah in his arms as she bled to death. Before this, he believed that him and Moriah were the prophesied ones, but it wasn't true. So Future Kitty went back in time to find the true prophesized ones. He realized that the war was hopeless, and that he couldn't win. === Accompanying Jinx and Maxwell === ''The following takes place within the Second Timeline, after the True Timeline.'' Future Kitty collected his few belongings, including several hidden copies of [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]], and travelled back in time. When he travelled back in time, he found himself besides the crater, when he found [[Jinx]] and [[Maxwell]]. That's when he realized they were the prophesized ones. So he told them about their destiny, and that's when the adventure began. === Fighting B.A.D === They began their adventure first by travelling to Silly City, and fighting B.A.D. ==== Drum Accelerator retrieval ==== Their first mission involved retrieving [[E. Scrunk|E. Scrunk's]] drum accelerator project from an agent of B.A.D, [[Babem]]. The drum accelerator was stolen by an agent of B.A.D earlier. B.A.D planned to use the drum accelerator as part of the Project Beastenator to create a weapon to harness The Beast's energy, specifically to fund a part for the Beastenator 200. Jinx would refer to [[Carlos]], who said it would be transferred at the harbor nearby his shop at night to avoid any attention. They would spy in on the mission. [[Bat Cat]], another agent of B.A.D, gave the drum accelerator to Babem. After the espionage, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty were able to beat up Babem in a fight, and retrieve the drum accelerator as well as take Babem to E. Scrunk's office. Babem would later agree to stop working for B.A.D, wherein for the rest of the story he would disassociate from his previous life. On their way back on the subway, they would meet [[Floppa]], and subsequently be chased through the train by [[Evil Cat]], who was sent immediately to assassinate them. This assassination attempt would fail, and Jinx and Maxwell were able to become friends with Floppa on the mission to the subway. ==== Incident at Ristle Cave ==== The day after the event, Future Kitty invited Jinx and Maxwell to head to Ristle Cave. Earlier that morning, in a battle between [[Billy]] and [[Bentley]], Billy accidentally released The Beast and [[The Yeast]] from their sleep in Ristle Cave, and they ran out. B.A.D agents were sent to collect information there. When they headed there, after their cover was blown, Future Kitty killed both of the B.A.D agents in cold blood. He sustained a shoulder injury that would give him a steel shoulder cap that was given to him by [[Edward]] later that day. ==== Stopping an attack on Axleland ==== Jinx and Maxwell went to Axleland some days after. They met Floppa and [[Milly]], where Jinx reunited with Milly and they headed to get some fish wraps from [[Bongo|Bongo's]] shop. The second attack on Silly City's Axleland would happen subsequently after [[Ah So Cat]] and[[Insam]] set fire to the Silly City circus. Jinx and her friends would hide in the garden, until which Future Kitty came to the amusement park, and gave them weapons, which they used to fight off the clowns in a rapid gunfight. They were not able to stop the leader of the revolt, [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom]], but they stopped a good amount of the bloodshed. === War of the Silly and Unsilly === Future Kitty would help [[The GOODings]] spot any locations of interest, or update them on whatever locations B.A.D were at. This would help them stop battles and insurrections. He would also work alongside Edward in creating a secret communication method with other allies and parts of 3KHURA to synchronize their plans. This would help the GOODings massively. Future Kitty would play a direct role in the final battle of the war. He was unfortunately killed when The Beast lunged at him and sliced him in half. His cybernetic parts were beyond repair. In his final moments, he reflected on his life. The positive thoughts and the negative thoughts, but he ultimately dreamed of being united with Moriah. His last words were, "Future Kitty.exe uninstalling." {{Top|Canon}}

Jinx and her friends would hide in the garden, until which Future Kitty came to the amusement park, and gave them weapons, which they used to fight off the clowns in a rapid gunfight. They were not able to stop the leader of the revolt, Demetrus P. Dinklebottom , but they stopped a good amount of the bloodshed. War of the Silly and Unsilly [ ] Future Kitty would help The GOODings spot any locations of interest, or update them on whatever locations B.A.D were at. This would help them stop battles and insurrections. He would also work alongside Edward in creating a secret communication method with other allies and parts of 3KHURA to synchronize their plans. This would help the GOODings massively. Future Kitty would play a direct role in the final battle of the war. He was unfortunately killed when The Beast lunged at him and sliced him in half. His cybernetic parts were beyond repair. In his final moments, he reflected on his life. The positive thoughts and the negative thoughts, but he ultimately dreamed of being united with Moriah. His last words were, "Future Kitty.exe uninstalling."

title: Gentleman

infobox.imagecaption: Gentleman staring up at a customer

wikitext:

Mafia Boss|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|marital=Unknown|gender=Male|height=3 Sauces (On all fours)
7 Sauces (Standing)|weight=48 Sauces|firstappears=A Fine Waitress|lastappears=Mafia in Disguise}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Gentleman}}{{Top|Canon}}
Gentleman is a extremely evil mafia boss who disguised himself as a caring waiter in a silly restaurant.

== Information ==
'''Gentleman''' first appears in a episode titled 'A Fine Waitress', presumably being a nice and caring waitress who will do anything to make your visit to the silly restaurant the best as can be. He becomes slight friends with [[Jinx]] and the gang, talking with them a lot, he then says that he, if allowed, could join [[Jinx]] and the gang on their adventure to defeat [[The Beast]]. The gang, happy that they found a new friend to help them, says yes. He tells them to meet him behind the restaurant after his job ends. That's the last we see of him in the episode but next episode, named "Mafia in Disguise", '''Gentleman's''' job is over, he is standing there behind the restaurant, with [[Jinx]] and the gang. but before they can go on with their adventure, '''Gentleman''' puts a cloth over their face and kidnaps every single one with ease, putting them in a van and driving off with them. The gang, scared, they try escaping the van, but it's no use, their tied up. Gentleman stops the van and a bunch of mysterious mafia looking cats pick the gang up and start taking them... somewhere. The gang are tied to a chair and '''Gentleman''' is standing in front of them, he takes the tape off their mouths and starts asking them strange questions, like "Where is [[Beastenator|The Beastenator]]", confused, Jinx tells '''Gentleman''' that he's got the wrong guys and [[Beastenator|The Beastenator]] belongs to [[The Beast]]. '''Gentleman''', thinking the gang is lying, tells the mafia looking cats to '''"MAKE THEM TELL ME"'''. Jinx starts trying desperately trying to get out of the rope tying her to the chair, the chair starts 'shaking' and she accidentally hits both of the mafia bosses in the face, knocking them out. '''Gentleman''', enraged, runs towards [[Jinx]], scared, [[Jinx]] starts furiously shaking the chair, trying to get out of the rope tying her to the chair. The chair hits '''Gentleman''' right in the forehead and he is sent flying into a wall, the room shakes and a bunch of bricks from above come crashing down on him. In the end, [[Jinx]] and the gang get out of the chairs and escape the... building. We don't know if '''Gentleman''' is dead or not, many fans are saying that "for a character like that, he will HAVE to make a return! He got barely any screen time and is probably one of the best characters!".

title: Geeble

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Geeble|aliases=Alien dog|relatives=|affiliation=Gnarp Gnaplians|occupation=Being an alien doing alien things.|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Planet K.I.T.Y|species=Dog|gender=Male|height=1 sauce|weight=3 sauce|eyes=Black|portrayedby=Various people working for the show but with an alien filter|appearsin=All silly dogs episodes|debut=Multiverse of mayhem|image=Geeble.png|status={{Alive}}|imagecaption=the villainous creature turned funny side charector}}What the gnarp?! Geeble is the Leader of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]] an former enemy of [[Glombie]], originating from Planet K.I.T.Y. He appears in the [[Silly Cats]] and [[Silly Dogs]] series, originating mostly from Silly Dogs, but is now a beloved side character by fans of the Silly Cats series
==Appearances==

=== Silly Dogs ===
Geeble first appears in the silly dogs series as the main villian. He also was one of the two only Gnarp Gnaplians on the cast for Silly Dogs, and the first ever Gnarp Gnaplian to be depicted in the Silly Cats franchise. He would fight the silly dogs group, and was reported to be one of the scariest villains of the Silly Dogs series in Silly Dogs fan circles.

===Silly Cats===
Geeble appears in Silly Cats as the leader of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. He is as much of a worthwhile appearance in [[Silly Cats]] as he was in [[Silly Dogs]]. He is a very strong leader.

==Biography==
Geeble originated from Planet K.I.T.Y.(commonly referred to as Planet Gnarp, because it was the origin of the Gnarp Gnaplians). He is thought to be the direct descendent of the first ever Gnarp Gnaplian to live in the Silly Cats Universe.

When Geeble was at the age for it, he was sent to the Gnarp Army. After grueling training, he was an esteemed member of the crew, he was sent to join the gnarp army ,but he did not favour many member of his section, section B. He would sneak into the Section C ships to chat with his fellow soldiers: [[Gnapy]](who was the medic of Sector C), [[Bleemk]](A strong soldier fellow), [[Glorpo]](who would often be sick or injured), and [[Glombie]](who is a gnarp from Sector A)

After the Rebellions Against [[Skeeble Beeble|King Skeeble]](outdated king), Planet K.I.T.Y. Geeble, with his charismatic ways, and famous speeches, which have yet to be translated from Gnarpleese, fell into the place of leading. He led Planet K.I.T.Y., the HQ of all the Gnarp Gnaplian planets, and soon fell into power of all the Gnarp Gnaplians. He preferred to bring the 3 other cats who believed in him during all this time, and were closest to him, Gnapy, Bleemk, and Glorpo.

Geeble now sends his central clowder of Gnarp Gnaplians, with his major focus being on Planet Silly, the home planet of the rest of the Silly Cats.

==Personality==
Geeble is very charismatic, and wins the favour of many people. He keeps his cool, but when you find out about him, he is very very manipulative and double crossing. He has the least amount of power amongst his clowder, yet manages to keep control of them.

==Trivia==

*Geeble's catchphrase is "Geeble Glurp Gnarp Galp Goople."

title: Gakster
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Gakster|relatives=Gusic (Brother)
Plimpus (Brother)
Q (Brother)
Glinkert (Brother)
Bungus (Cousin)
Bingus (Cousin)
Bingus the II (Nephew)|affiliation=B.A.D (founder and leader)|occupation=Former Bad guy|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=Unknown|weight=Unknown|eyes=Hazel|image=Gakster.png|firstappears=Innocent Days|lastappears=Breaking B.A.D|status={{Unknown}}|nationality={{British}}|imagecaption=Gakster slowly going insane}} {{Spoiler}} '''Gakster''' is [[Gusic|Gusic's]] younger brother, as well as the brother of [[Plimpus]], [[Glinkert]], and [[Q The Cat|Q]]. He also has two cousins, [[Bungus]] and [[Bingus]]. He is a major villain in the Silly Cats series, with an appearance lasting from the series pilot all the way up to Silly Dogs. Gakster is also notable for living pretty long for a First Generation silly cat as well as being the head of operations for [[B.A.D]]. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === Gakster appears in [[Silly Cats]] as a major villain of the series, hosting a collective group of operations and terrorist revolts alongside other well-known criminals as well as cult leaders! He is later killed by one of his first victims, [[Glumbus]]. === Silly Cats: Online === Gakster appears in [[Silly Cats: Online]] as a major boss for parties to defeat! He gives an achievement called "Breaking B.A.D Apart" == Biography == Gakster was born to Cwawa, thought to be The Esoteric Council. He played lots with Bungus and Gusic, before going on a trip for no reason whatsoever. For the first half of his trip, he invited Plimpus to join him, though soon, he betrayed him by deserting him, solidifying the evil in the world and in himself and eliminate all empathy in his body. Plimpus also began his hate for his brother here. When the time came for [[The Beast]] to shed its teeth and grow new, an event now known as The Shedding, one of its teeth flew into the hands of Gakster, though [[Buh]] of the Three Knights decided to give it to the newly hatched kitty from a butter stick embryo, Glumbus, who began wearing it as a chain. Gakster was jealous of Glumbus for wearing The Beast's tooth, and trapped him in a sock for 3 centuries as well as stole the tooth from him. Gakster used the power of the tooth to organise a gang of his own on Silly Planet. Plimpus heard of this, and stole The Tooth, keeping it locked away in a cache on Silly Planet, which he would later give to [[Jinx]] to defeat the final stretch of B.A.D. Gakster was also banished to Silly Planet forever, which is where he focused on his criminal shenanigans. First, he enlisted in the [[World's Champion Staring Contest|World's Champion Staring Competition]], and won by using an illegal mind control move on his final opponent, [[Babem]]. He used the prize money to invest in growing his gang. After the success following the Clown uprising from [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom]], Gakster decided to enlist Demetrus' gang into his to combine. Together, they created the Gakster and Dinklebottom gang. During this time, the Cult of The Black book of Silly Magic was falling under the hands of the [[Grinwatcher]], who slowly but surely gained complete knowledge of The Beast, [[The Yeast]], and [[Slorphus|Slorphus']] whereabouts. Gakster saw this as a great opportunity to gain more power in the criminal underworld, and hired the Grinwatcher and his forces. From these grown forces, Gakster created the group now known as B.A.D. Gakster led the group of BAD, and advocated for the development of a mass destruction weapon that used the harvest of the Beast's energy. This would begin in BAD as the Project Beastenator. The beginning of this pact was a deal in the making between BAD and Regalus, who desired to begin investing in something that would return profits for their growing arms weapons industry. BAD bribed Bingustan into joining, and a secret pact was made between Regalus, Bingustan, and BAD to begin funding and development for the Project Beastenator. Gakster was part of the council that led BAD, and some members of the council believed he was leading the group irresponsibly, as rumours had arisen that he had affairs with a Regalusian kitty, or Regalus bribed him into this, but Gakster had suspiciously began redirecting funding for the Project Beastenator into the Regalus control bases for the second unit of the Project Beastenator, DEKE 400(formally known as Beastenator 400). Gakster also began adopting the dressing etiquette of Regalus, with inspirations from Bingus' long cloak and split-skirt. This eventually resulted in Gakster's excommunication by The Grinwatcher during the heights of the war of Silly and Unsilly. Gakster then erased all government records of himself, and assumed the identity of a disappeared kitty long lost that looked like him. He submitted himself to the police as the disappeared kitty, and began living his life travelling around the world and renting apartments. One day, Gakster was killed in his apartment in Regalus by Glumbus, with 7 shots straight to his head. ==Trivia== Gakster is: *Unpredictable *Reclusive *Often Hostile *Determined *Smart *Untrustworthy *Silly Gakster has made multiple appearances on the [https://twitter.com/literallymecats @literallymecats Twitter Page] usually with captions to visualize the mind The Insane. "I MUST BE SCHIZOPHRENIC, THE WAY IM ALWAYS REALEST IN THE ROOM" "I'm starting to think that maybe I am not as handsome as my grandma said I was" "I don't ignore the voices, I value their opinions." {{Top|Canon}}

title: George
wikitext:
{{Top|Mythology}}{{Character|name=George|image=George.jpg|imagecaption=george's newest stolen body|status={{alive}}|aliases=there are hundreds based on his previous bodies, the solemn one|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=B.A.D Senior operative|height=4 sauces|weight=2 sauces|firstappears=George the first|lastappears=The AfterMath}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/George}}{{Stub}} 

george is a powerful [[B.A.D]] operative with the ability to take another cats body once he has defeated them. He is the arch-rival of [[Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deity]] and the two have been feuding ever since sillykind has discovered space travel. he has also trained himself to be devoid of all silliness over the years making him known as the solemn one. 

His ability to take over a cat that he has defeated body and use it as his own means that he has been alive for hundreds of years though his birth date cannot be precisely discovered. 

once he takes over a cat he instantly purges it of all silliness and makes it bear a slight resemblance to his first body. though he can be easily recognised by his pure solemn stare

It is speculated one of the reasons he is devoid of all silliness is that he gazed [[Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deity|Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deit]]<nowiki/>y in the face and managed to comprehend him for a brief second (making [[Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deity|Quetzkol]] very angry) and try to attack him

George is very devoted to being a spy and a combat agent for [[B.A.D]] and also once tried to buy silly airlines

George is a very good friend of [[Gakster]] and is said to be one of the only ones who can get a message to him while he is in a particularly strong bout of madness. due to this when [[glumbus]] (probably) killed [[gakster]] he dedicated his life to hunting [[Glumbus]] and trying to find a way to bring [[gakster]] back from the dead which we aren't sure whether he succeeded or not. 

During the wars of silly and unsilly he was nearly killed by [[Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deity]] but somehow survived unbeknownst to [[Quetzkol The Incomprehensible Deity|quetzkol]]

After B.A.D was destroyed after the war of silly and unsilly, he formed an organisation called Georges cohort, recruiting Numerous former members of B.A.D. and other organisations to form an evil council dedecated to being the next B.A.D and also trying to hunt down Glumbus and Reviving Gakster. This organisation is planned to be the villain for a spinoff series that is claimed to be "in an early phase of creation" called silly cats "epilouge".

wikitext:

Bungus (Cousin)
Bingus (Cousin)
Bingus the II (Nephew) | affiliation =The Cult of The Black Book of Silly Magic(dissolved group now part of B.A.D.) | occupation =Time traveller | birthDate =Beginning of Silly Cats Universe | birthPlace =The Void | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital =Single | gender =Male | breed =American Curl | fur =Orange | height =12 Sauces | weight =64 Sauces | firstappears =Time Travelling | lastappears =The Black Book | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Glinkert''' is the brother of [[Gusic]], [[Plimpus]], [[Q The Cat|Q]], [[Gakster]]. He also has two cousins named [[Bingus]] and [[Bungus]]. He is a lore character in the Silly Cats Universe, though he does appear in some flashback episodes in the show around season 3 when the show gets lore heavy. == Appearances == Glinkert appears in the Silly Cats show as the leader of the Cult of The Black Book of Silly Magic which he regains from his future self. He is later on taken over by the egotistical [[Grinwatcher]], who rebranded the cult as the Cult of The Grinwatcher. He later on disappears for unknown reasons, though fans theorize its to cover the time travel plothole. == Biography == Glinkert was born as the older sibling of Plimpus and Gakster, with an age that matches that of Gusic. He isn't a god though, despite his heritage. During the Banishing, the event that created Silly Planet, Glinkert was banished there purely because he was useless. This makes him an Inception Era (Or First Generation) cat. In his early days on Silly Planet, he gets a mysterious black book from his future self who time travelled there. His future self tells him to educate people about the book, and to give this to his past self. Later on in his life, he forms a cult built around studying the mysterious book. He decided to call it [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]]. The first few members were amongst [[Edward]], [[Bob]], [[Wizard of Spells]], Grinwatcher, and many others. They were all good, studying the arts of silly magic, before they faced backlash from [[Future Kitty]]. Apparently, Future kitty knows Glinkert's future self, and knows his future self creates what he described as, "An abomination of forbidden curses." Despite constantly having to fight Future Kitty during cult meetings, Glinkert enjoyed his time as a cult leader, and helped people find their hobby in wizarding. He lied and told them that Future Kitty was not out to get them. As Glinkert grew older, a power struggle fell upon the growing cult. The Grinwatcher decided to take advantage of this, and kicked out Glinkert with the help of the ancient spirit, [[Demonic Little Grey Cat]] and [[Slorphus]]. Glinkert went into hiding, whilst The Grinwatcher took over the cult, and rebranded it as a terrorist organization by the name of "The Cult of The Grinwatcher." This organization would later combine with Gakster and [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom|Demetrus P. Dinklebottom's]] gang to create what we now know as [[B.A.D]]. Glinkert from then on, went into hiding. He realized later that his cult became an evil entity, and lost hope. He lived the latter half of his life fighting Future Kitty. One day though, when he was alone in his wooden cabin, and nearing the end of the silly and unsilly wars, he remembered what his future self said. He teleported into the Wizard of Spells' cave and took the book back to his past self. He informed his past self to educate people not to use the book and to protect it from evildoers. His past self did not heed his warnings and did the opposite. Thus beginning of an endless cycle of evil and regret.

title: Glombie
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Glombie|image=Glombie.png|imagecaption=Him seeing Geeble|status={{Deceased}}|aliases=None|relatives=Geeble(:0)|affiliation=Gnarp Gnaplians|occupation=Gnarper|birthDate=2-45-101|birthPlace=Planet K.I.T.Y Sector A|deathDate=23 March 1994|deathPlace=No Man's Land|marital=Single|gender=Goppy Shoboo|breed=Gnarp|fur=Green|height=23 sauces|weight=45 sauces|firstappears=The Vigilantes|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly}}'''Glombie''' was a [[Gnarp Gnaplians|Gnarp Gnaplian]] that made a deal with the [[Grinwatcher]] to grow more powerful. He fought in a war but was later killed.

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
In Silly Cats, Glombie is seen as [[Geeble|Geeble's]] enemy for no active reason, but theorists believe that after silly dogs Glombie did something unforgivable,  in silly Cats to hate him. Glombie is part of the gang called "The Vigilantes" who are, well vigilantes.

=== Silly Dogs ===
In Silly Dogs, he was a major antagonist and Geeble's right hand man, what do you want me to say? it was only one season long, he didn't have much screen time in Silly Dogs.

== Biography ==
After the "Incident" Glombie and his gang came to earth,  and met up with a cat named the Grinwatcher (They didn't know he was evil) and made a deal with Grinwatcher to be stronger, for the upcoming war, it was in small effect at this time, but they were to weak, causing a deal to be made.  Glombie came back to [[Planet K.I.T.Y]] to try to make amends with  Geeble. after getting injured in Sector C, he gets sent to the medics tent, meeting [[Gnapy]] and becoming friends quickly.  Later [[Glorpo]] is needing a life-saving surgery, after Gnapy saved him, the three talked for what felt like hours, then, the last one came...  Geeble.   They fought and they fought , blah blah, wholesome stuff, they make up, they are friends again!

Glombie was ordered by the other Gnarp Gnaplians to join the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. He fought furiously managing to wound [[Criminal Cat]], permanently crippling him. Unfortunately, he was fatally wounded by a bomber in the Battle of No Man's Land and he bled out on the battlefield.

== Trivia ==

* He has a cool scar on his leg from the injury he got in Sector C

==Biography==
'''Fouet''' may look like a normal cat at first but his long whiskers make him a unique addition to the [[Silly Cats|Silly Cat]] franchise. He is a weird character, giving the audience clues and making the audience think that he might be a twist villain of some sort, In the episode "Long Whiskers" [[Jinx]] and the gang find him in a alleyway and they have a talk, '''Fouet''' asks [[Jinx]] if he can join her and the gang on their adventure to defeat [[The Beast]], stating "I want to be forgiven". [[Jinx]] allows him too and in one of the episodes [[Jinx]] and the gang discover he was previously a [[B.A.D]] member who had killed THOUSANDS of innocent cats, horrified, [[Jinx]] and the gang kick him out of the gang and run off, leaving him in the hands of a horrible cat. The next episode, [[Silly Cats|"War of Silly and Unsilly pt. 1"]], '''Fouet''' suddenly appears and saves [[Jinx]] from a sneak attack, getting hit in the process., but that doesn't stop him from continuing to fight with [[Jinx]] and the gang. He helps them severely and [[Jinx]] allows him to stay with the gang, forgiving him.

== Trivia ==
Fouet means "Whisk" in French.

His name is pronounced "Fwey".

<gallery>
File:Working gloobernapsworth.png|'''Gloober mid-fix,''' Don't ever touch his tools, ''EVER.''
</gallery>

==Biography==

=== Adult life and introduction ===
Gloober is a quiet, no-nonsense cat who lives in Silly City and works as a local maintenance guy, fixing things like flickering lights, squeaky vents, and coffee machines that spill too much milk. He’s not big on jokes or silly stuff—but he’s got a soft spot, whether he admits it or not.

One rainy day, he found a sleepy kitten ([[Gloobert]]) curled up in a laundry basket outside the laundromat. At first, he just walked past. Then he walked back. Then he sighed and picked him up. From that moment on, Gloober became  [[Gloobert]]'s adoptive dad — not because he was looking for a kid, but because “no one else was gonna do it right.”

He raised [[Gloobert]] the best way he knew how: warm meals, quiet talks, and an early bedtime (though Gloobert didn’t need much help with that). Gloober never really understood his son’s dream of opening a nap café, but he eventually supported it — even helped fix up the building and made sure the plumbing didn’t burst during milk rush hour.

Though he hides it under a serious face and a lot of sighs, Gloober cares deeply. He doesn’t always say it, but he shows it in small ways — like making sure [[Gloobert]] gets home safe, or leaving an extra blanket out when it’s cold.

These days, Gloober still works around Silly City, dropping by the '''Nap Café''' now and then — not to nap, of course. Just to check if the milk machine’s still leaking.

=== Early life ===
Not much is known about Gloober’s early life, mostly because he never talks about it — and when someone asks, he usually just grumbles and changes the subject. What is known is that he grew up somewhere on the '''quiet edge of Silly City''', in a tiny apartment above a repair shop run by an old, no-nonsense cat named '''Uncle Blint''' (whether he was actually Gloober’s uncle is unclear).

From a young age, Gloober was more interested in '''fixing things''' than playing. While other kittens were chasing yarn, he was tightening screws and poking around with tiny wrenches. He learned how to fix toasters, leaky faucets, and even once made a radio out of spoons and chewing gum (it only played one song, but still).

He never really liked crowds or noise, so he stayed in the background — the quiet kid who always had a screwdriver in his tail fluff.

== Personality ==
Gloober is known for being '''quiet''', '''gruff''', and '''a little tired of everyone’s nonsense'''. He’s the type of cat who sighs before he speaks and rolls his eyes when he agrees with something. He doesn’t smile much, but when he does, it usually means a lot. Despite how serious he seems, he’s deeply loyal and always looks out for the people he cares about, especially [[Gloobert]], even if he pretends not to.

He likes things '''organized''', '''predictable''', and '''on time''', and he gets visibly uncomfortable around overly silly behavior (which makes living in Silly City a challenge). He doesn’t like loud noises, unwashed dishes, or people who talk during naps. But he ''does'' enjoy warm toast, fixing things with his toolset, and sitting on rooftops where no one bothers him.

Though he won’t admit it out loud, he’s '''proud''' of [[Gloobert]] and his dream café — he just expresses it by tightening bolts on the nap chairs and adjusting the thermostat when no one’s looking.

=== Appereance ===
Gloober is a '''slim''', '''tallish cat''' with a short coat of '''gray fur''' and a big white patch that runs from his face down to his belly. His ears are pointy and always tilted slightly back, like he’s permanently unimpressed. He has tired-looking eyes with dark circles, giving the impression he hasn’t slept properly since the early 2000s.

He often wears a '''tool belt''', '''an old scarf''', or sometimes just walks around with a wrench in his paw, “just in case something breaks.” His fur is usually a little messy, and he always smells faintly like metal, tea, and dryer sheets.

== TRIVIA WOOHOO!! ==

* Gloober once fixed the same broken vending machine '''seven times''' in one week because a pigeon kept kicking it.
* He’s never actually napped at '''Nap Café''' — claims “it’s too soft in there, it’s suspicious.”
* He wears the same scarf every day. No one knows where he got it. Some say it just ''appeared'' one morning and he never questioned it.
* He once threatened to “disassemble the moon” because it kept shining through his window at night.
* Gloober is surprisingly good at knitting but tells everyone it’s “for insulation testing purposes.”
* His favorite sound is a working radiator. His least favorite sound is [[Gloobert]] sleep-talking.
* While fixing a leaky pipe under the café, he found an old spoon. He still carries it. No reason. Just likes the spoon.
* He pretends to hate hugs, but he didn’t move for a whole minute when  [[Gloobert]] hugged him once.

* Gloober has '''never blinked on camera'''. Ever.

Early life [ ] Not much is known about Gloober’s early life, mostly because he never talks about it — and when someone asks, he usually just grumbles and changes the subject. What is known is that he grew up somewhere on the quiet edge of Silly City , in a tiny apartment above a repair shop run by an old, no-nonsense cat named Uncle Blint (whether he was actually Gloober’s uncle is unclear). From a young age, Gloober was more interested in fixing things than playing. While other kittens were chasing yarn, he was tightening screws and poking around with tiny wrenches. He learned how to fix toasters, leaky faucets, and even once made a radio out of spoons and chewing gum (it only played one song, but still). He never really liked crowds or noise, so he stayed in the background — the quiet kid who always had a screwdriver in his tail fluff. Personality [ ] Gloober is known for being quiet , gruff , and a little tired of everyone’s nonsense . He’s the type of cat who sighs before he speaks and rolls his eyes when he agrees with something. He doesn’t smile much, but when he does, it usually means a lot. Despite how serious he seems, he’s deeply loyal and always looks out for the people he cares about, especially Gloobert , even if he pretends not to. He likes things organized , predictable , and on time , and he gets visibly uncomfortable around overly silly behavior (which makes living in Silly City a challenge). He doesn’t like loud noises, unwashed dishes, or people who talk during naps. But he does enjoy warm toast, fixing things with his toolset, and sitting on rooftops where no one bothers him. Though he won’t admit it out loud, he’s proud of Gloobert and his dream café — he just expresses it by tightening bolts on the nap chairs and adjusting the thermostat when no one’s looking. Appereance [ ] Gloober is a slim , tallish cat with a short coat of gray fur and a big white patch that runs from his face down to his belly. His ears are pointy and always tilted slightly back, like he’s permanently unimpressed. He has tired-looking eyes with dark circles, giving the impression he hasn’t slept properly since the early 2000s. He often wears a tool belt , an old scarf , or sometimes just walks around with a wrench in his paw, “just in case something breaks.” His fur is usually a little messy, and he always smells faintly like metal, tea, and dryer sheets. TRIVIA WOOHOO!! [ ] Gloober once fixed the same broken vending machine seven times in one week because a pigeon kept kicking it. He’s never actually napped at Nap Café — claims “it’s too soft in there, it’s suspicious.” He wears the same scarf every day. No one knows where he got it. Some say it just appeared one morning and he never questioned it. He once threatened to “disassemble the moon” because it kept shining through his window at night. Gloober is surprisingly good at knitting but tells everyone it’s “for insulation testing purposes.” His favorite sound is a working radiator. His least favorite sound is Gloobert sleep-talking. While fixing a leaky pipe under the café, he found an old spoon. He still carries it. No reason. Just likes the spoon. He pretends to hate hugs, but he didn’t move for a whole minute when Gloobert hugged him once. Gloober has never blinked on camera . Ever.

title: Glungus

infobox.name: Glungus
infobox.deathplace: Glitch world, the location of where the tv cat resides

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Glungus|image=Glungus (1).png|imagecaption=Glungus.|status=Deceased|nationality=Glungusland|aliases=Glungus (the other cars)|deathPlace=Glitch world, the location of where the tv cat resides|gender=Male|breed=Car!!}}

Glungus is simply the best character.

=== <big>LORE</big> ===
Glungus once went to carjutsu classes at 5, he then started to learn new tricks, like karate, parrying, and soon enough, he went to scavenge the Lazer Gem (the one who created it had dislexia), which he then learned to shoot lasers from his eyes. 


Glungus is truly a hardworking goober who strives to support his teamates from the GOODlings, by using his lasers to fight with the others to end B.A.D.

=== <big>ATTACKS</big> ===
Red laser: a burning laser shot

Blue laser: a burst laser shot, while weaker, still effective, has to be charged

Green laser: a rocket that explodes on impact

Purple laser: an auto destruct when he's about to be defeated, uses all of the energy on his body and explodes on impact, can instakill anyone, at the cost of glungus' life

=== <big>DEATH</big> ===
While the heroes were fighting the tv cat, one of the lasers hit Glungus, which he was then knocked out, the tv cat consumed his corpse, but glungus was alive, sacrificing himself with his purple attack, killing the tv cat, but still dying, his final words were "at the end, we were all silly cats... please, put my death on tv...", obviously a reference to how the series is the Silly Cat Tv series!!

title: Glorpo
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Glorpo|image=Glorpo.png|imagecaption=The only image of him|aliases=None|status={{Deceased}}|relatives=None|affiliation=Gnarp Gnaplians|occupation=Gnarper|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Planet K.I.T.Y., Sector C|gender=Globble Mop|height=13 Sauce|weight=67 Sauce|lastappears=Medical Madness|firstappears=The New Planet|deathDate=2 October 1993|deathPlace=Silly City}}{{Wave|G|l|o|r|p|o}} is a Gnarp Gnaplian in the Silly Cats Universe. He is known amongst fans as one of the most mysterious characters in the Silly Cats Universe. He appears as a hidden character but is in fact a very integral part of his clowder.

==Appearances==

=== Silly Cats ===
Glorpo appears only in the Silly Cats series, and even in that in minor and hidden ways that only vigilant viewers would see. For example, he appears in the computer logs of the Gnarp Gnaplian shared Clowder glomputer network giving comments on various images and chatting with other members. On another note, Glorpo cannot be seen much, and only appears once in the entire series, but he can be heard. 

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
He was scrapped from [[Silly Cats: Online]] for being deemed too creepy for players by the [[VerySilly Team|VerySilly]] team. He was planned to be heard around caves and in space.

== Biography ==
Born in Planet K.I.T.Y., Sector C, Glorpo was a hell-bent national, and joined the Gnarp Gnaplian army quite early. He was not very popular in his legion, but made friends with enough people that he would be chosen to join the Gnarp Gnaplian clowder alongside Gnapy.

From here, a big shift happens in time, Glorpo mysteriously disappears, and can only be seen through message logs on the glomputer network.

During the wars of silly and unsilly, all members of the gnarp gnaplian clowder were called to Planet Silly, including Glorpo. When Glorpo arrived in Silly City, he found Bat Cat, and killed him out of malice, which has theorists believing that Glorpo knew about the wars of silly and unsilly before they even happened, because Bat Cat was secretly rendezvousing with B.A.D. In episode 4 of season 3, Glorpo is killed by a rogue spell from a mysterious wizard.

==Trivia==
He would often fake sick to get sent to the medic's tent to see [[Gnapy]] (Info from head [[Gnarp Gnaplians|Gnarp Gnaplian]] character designer)

He does not have a heart, it was replaced with a Slice Of Gusic in a life saving surgery

==Miscellaneous==
Glorpo is little known about, so this article so far only covers the knowledge known about Glorpo so far. He is a very little known about character.{{Top|Canon}}

title: Gnapy
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Gnapy|image=Gnapy.png|aliases=Gnap|relatives=None|affiliation=Gnarp Gnaplians|occupation=Gnapping|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Planet K.I.T.Y|species=Male|gender=Zweeble dop|height=1 sauce|weight=28 sauces|eyes=Black|appearsin=Planet K.I.T.Y|debut=Visiting Earth|imagecaption=gnarp gnarp gnarpy}}
Gnapy is the medic and gardener of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. He is an important addition to both his clowder, and the Silly Cats Universe.

== Appearances ==
Gnapy's appearances are exclusive to the Silly Cats series, with absolutely zero mentions in any other silly cats franchise entries. He acts as the medic of the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]] clowder, and is a skilled gardener. He wants to help his clowder in any way he can.

== Biography ==
Gnapy was hatched in a lost furnace on Planet K.I.T.Y., and at the age of 0 he was recruited into the Gnarp Army. He was the medic for Section C' s legion, and often enjoyed planting plants and herbs around the quarters of the Section C legion. He found out this power from a Green Emerald of Silly Magic given to him by [[Halo]].

Gnapy's birth in a burning furnace heavily debilitated him and his motor functions, which is why Gnapy only has the scrawny physique and motor skills of a kitten(Or the gnarp gnaplian equivalent of a kitten). Despite this, his sector was very supportive of him, and valued his skills in medicine and gardening.

Gnapy's first ever medical job was planting a rare Slice Of Gusic in the place of the heart of his fellow soldier, [[Glorpo]]. This would form a great friendship between Gnapy and [[Glorpo]], and they would stay in contact even after Glorpo's Era of Disappearance. In various episodes, on the message logs of the glomputer network of their clowder, [[Glorpo]] and Gnapy can be seen chatting about their favorite games and discussing various things they share interest in.

In the wars of Silly and Unsilly, Gnapy uses his medicine and gardening powers to build a wall of vines around [[Jinx]] whilst she was being attacked by [[The Yeast]], and managed to successfully heal her to try and defeat [[The Yeast]] in time. Gnapy also helped strengthen the souvenir helmet of [[Armoured Cat]] when he first met him, and is in general a very friendly gnarp.

== Personality ==
Gnapy is very kind and mature, and extremely altruistic, because of his several encounters with hardship which he does not want to happen to anybody he knows. Gnapy is also very intelligent, as he has learned the language of the Silly Cats, and is now bilingual in both Gnarpleese and Sillyish.

== Trivia ==

* Gnapy has read various books and novels from the mysterious Planet Earth, and translated them into Gnarpleese.
* Gnapy loves to eat sushi
* Gnapy's favorite hobby besides gardening is singing to his plants.
* Gnapy love to Gnarp

{{Stub}}

Glumbus is a cat held in a sock. He was put there by [[Gakster]] himself, many years ago. He was eternally condemned to be inside this sock for the rest of eternity. Glumbus awaits freedom, and when he is freed, he will seek vengeance on [[Gakster]].

Glumbus one day came across a very powerful tooth. He kept it on a chain around his neck. One day, [[Gakster]] attacked Glumbus tried to steal the tooth, resulting in a battle between the two. Gakster got the tooth in the end and trapped Glumbus in a sock. He is currently trying to escape the sock using his minions, the [[Glumbler|Glumblers]] but they are too stupid to get him out.

The Sock of Glumbus is thought to hold magical powers. It is highly sought after by the [[Gnarp Gnaplians|Gnarp Gnapliens]].

I don't have arms but it's not necessary, just a headbutt and that's enough for me.

Glumbus was also once a powerful being, but then was condemned to a sock and lost his abilities quicker than a duck loses its boots.

}}'''Glooble''' is a respectable member of the Gnarp Army. He participated in deadly missions and fought hordes of enemies.

==Biography==
Glooble was born very differently from other [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. He was grown in a pot. Once he grew to maturity and lost his sprouts, he joined the Gnarp Army, determined he could make a difference. He climbed the ranks quickly. His quickdraw for a ray gun was unparalleled. Glooble was a bit of a jerk in the Sector C legion. He would often bully lower ranking members of his legion. His favorite one to pick on was [[Glorpo]]. Even with his rude antics, he prevailed and graduated training.

Soon after, Glooble got assigned his first mission which was lead a group of Gnarp Gnaplians to training. It was a simple task but would prove his worth. He succeeded easily. After that, he was sent on planetary exploratory missions and military exercises. By this point, he had matured. He went to Glorpo's sector to make things right. He personally apologized and the two made up. They became friends but would soon be separated by a mission that he was called to attend.

The mission was simple, to gather samples from a new planet they had discovered, called Planet Tule. This time, it was different than a normal mission. There was a new member that Glooble was suspicious of from the start. His name was [[Ferret]] and he immediately went away from the main group. Glooble was assigned leader of the exploratory team. He was given a set of things to do. He ordered everyone to pick a task. Glooble gave Ferret the easiest one because he didn't want him to cause any trouble. Glooble took the hardest task, to collect beast hide. He stabbed the beast with the tranquilizer stick and the beast fell down unconscious. They all met in the center with their materials. Glooble watched in horror as Ferret took off his helmet in a state of idiocy. Ferret turned mad and started killing and eating the team members. Glooble gathered everyone to hide. Glooble attempted to capture Ferret but was unsuccessful. Ferret ran off and killed more people. Glooble stared at Ferret with his ray gun aimed at his head. He stopped for a second before pulling the trigger. Glooble gathered the dead bodies of his team members and put on the ship. He left Ferret's body on the ground to get eaten by the beasts that roamed the planet. Glooble was given a medal of honor for his heroism.

Later on, Glooble got more involved in military projects. This is when he learned of a war on Silly Planet that they were analyzing. The war was called the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. The Gnarp Gnaplians had bases on the Silly Planet so they wanted to defend them. The main leaders came to a consensus and sent a team of Gnarp Gnaplians to Silly Planet in order to fight in the war. Glooble was sent along that team with the other Gnarp Gnaplians. Some of the people with him were Glorpo, [[Glombie]], and [[Gnapy]]. Glooble fought furiously in the war killing hundreds of SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces) members and other members of [[B.A.D]]. He also with Glombie managed to drive out a flank of the Insane Army in the Battle of No Man's Land. Unfortunately, Glombie was struck fatally by a bomber plane. Glooble returned to [[Planet K.I.T.Y]] with only a few injuries. He was saddened when he learned about Glorpo's passing in Silly City.

To this day, Glooble can still be found fighting for the Gnarp Army. He has earned several medals of honor and is now acknowledged as one of the most successful and respectable members of the Gnarp Army to date.

Town Guide|birthDate=18 March 1878|birthPlace=Childhood House|deathDate=|deathPlace=|marital=Single|gender=Male|fur=White & Black|height=6 sauces|weight=4 sauces|firstappears=The Adventure Begins! (Cameo)|lastappears=No more Mr. Evil Guy}}'''Goga Cat''' is a silly kitty who was very popular among his peers. He gained control of an army but abandoned it. He later redeemed himself though and continues to live in his hometown. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === In [[Silly Cats]], Goga Cat first appears as a minor background cameo in "The Adventure Begins!" In season 1. He is first mainly shown as a minor character in "War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 1" and is shown to go into hiding in "War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 2." He is later seen in a four episode long redemption arc. === Silly Cats: Online === Goga Cat appears in [[Silly Cats: Online]] as an Easter egg for anyone willing to find it. If a player digs a hole in a certain spot on the border between No Man's Land, a hatch will appear showing Goga Cat. He is not interactable, but the player will be rewarded a badge for finding him. == Biography == Upon his birth, Goga cat was very popular among other silly kitties because of his charming looks and charismatic personality. Unfortunately, he let the attention get to his head, and he started to become a selfish jerk. Albeit his spicy personality, many kitties joined in seek of his approval. Goga Cat knew this and would manipulate other silly kitties into getting what he wanted. On the other hand, there were kitties that hated him. The people that supported outnumbered the haters though and Goga Cat gained a small army. Unexpectedly, the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] broke out and Goga Cat was stuck in the middle. He was in the middle of making his makeshift settlement of Gogaville full of his supporters. The settlement aoon became a shelter for him and his supporters. In his soul, Goga Cat was a coward and in the middle of the night, Goga Cat escaped and ran off. He left his army to get destroyed by the SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces) and the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. Goga Cat hid in a cave and didn't come out until after the war. While Goga Cat was hiding underground he pondered over his ego and decided he wanted to make change. [[The GOODings]] uncovered him in his cave and Goga Cat launched into his redemption arc. Split into four episodes, Goga Cat slowly redeemed himself. The first episode in the arc was "Don't Hide!" This is the episode where Goga Cat is found. The second episode in the arc was called "I'm Baaaaaaack!" In this epsiode, he returns to his hometown. He finds that he is a popular face for posters. In the third episode, called "24 Hours or Never!", it is revealed that these posters were wanted posters and Goga Cat is captured and put on trial. He is given 24 hours to rectify his actions or else. He struggles with being nice at first but he starts warming up to the idea. The last episode in the arc, called "No More Mr. Evil Guy", showcases the end of his redemption arc. He is allowed to roam free, as a changed kitty. He also became friends with [[Milly]] afterward. Goga Cat lives out the rest of his life in his hometown working as it's unofficial town guide. == Trivia == * Goga Cat used to call himself "más tonto," which means "silliest" in Spanish * His nickname is "G Cat" because local silly governments banned his name from being said for his actions * "Goga" is actually a Hausawi word that translates to "brush" or "rub." This is because his massive ego was known to rub off on others * Goga Cat loves to play [[Meowcraft]] * Milly often jokes about Goga Cat's former days, and they always make him laugh because of how much of a jerk he was{{Top|Canon}}

==Biography==

 "Why yell when you can nap?" - gloobert napsworth

=== Early Life ===


'''Gloobert''' is mostly a sleepy little guy who was born in Silly City. He was born into the world by unknown relatives that he never got the chance to meet, but he somehow knew their names. Even though he didn’t know where they were, he didn’t mind too much. He lived a happy life with the help of his adoptive dad, [[Gloober]], who took care of him and gave him lots of soft places to nap.

Gloobert was always known for his '''slow blinking''', quiet voice, and sleepy face. Ever since he was a little kitten, he kept thinking about one special idea: '''making a place where peace and calm were real''' — not just in your head, but all around you. A place where no one had to rush or worry.

He often thought, ''"Maybe I could make a café... because cafés are pretty chill and quiet."'' That idea stuck with him. He didn’t want to be something fancy or loud. He just wanted to make a soft, quiet space for others — a place that felt like a warm hug.

But his dad, [[Gloober]] wanted him to do something else. Something more serious. He told Gloobert to stop daydreaming and start thinking about getting a “real job.”, even tho he actually supported his idea. Gloobert tried, but '''he just couldn’t stop thinking about his café idea'''.

In school, Gloobert didn’t do too well. He would fall asleep in almost every class. Sometimes right at his desk, sometimes while standing up. Teachers would try to wake him, but he was always too deep in a nap or thinking about how to make his peaceful place real. He failed a lot of tests, and it seemed like school just didn’t fit the way he saw the world.

Even after school, his dad still told him to forget the idea. But Gloobert didn’t listen. He quietly kept working on his plan, little by little.

=== Start of his Café (Adult life) ===
One day, he finally started building it. He called it '''“The Nap Café.”''' It was a soft, warm place where cats and critters could come in and rest. They could '''take naps without feeling bad''', share cozy blankets, and drink lukewarm milk together. The lights were always low, and there was no loud talking allowed. Just quiet, soft meows and the sound of gentle purring in the background.

Gloobert smiled more than ever after he opened it. His dream was finally real. And for once, everyone around him slowed down... just a little bit.

When he made the Café, he didn't gain much people, mostly 20 people a day, wich was already a good come up for such an idea, so he kept on going with his place, and he kept getting even more people, he hired employees, cashiers, and even more. His business kept on getting more and more popular, until his business was blowing, there was now 120 people coming in daily, his business was very successful, and that's how he changed his life, even his dad came to pass by his Café

== Personality ==
He is a quiet and peaceful cat. He doesn’t talk much, but when he does, his words are soft and slow. Most of the time, he just blinks slowly and makes tiny purring sounds. He loves calm places and doesn’t like loud noises or busy crowds. Even when things are crazy, Gloobert stays calm — or he just falls asleep in the middle of it.

He is very kind and always wants others to feel relaxed and happy. He believes that naps can fix most problems. He doesn’t like fighting or arguing, and sometimes helps other cats calm down just by being near them. Some say he gives off “couch energy,” and that’s exactly what he wants.

Even though he failed a lot in school, Gloobert is actually really thoughtful. He just thinks better when lying down with a warm drink and a pillow nearby.

=== Appearance ===
Gloobert is a small, round British Shorthair with soft gray fur that looks like a fluffy cloud. His cheeks are extra big and squishy, and his eyes are almost always halfway closed, giving him a forever-sleepy look. His ears are a bit rounded, and his nose is tiny and pink.

He’s always seen with a peaceful smile on his face, as if he’s daydreaming about something gentle. Sometimes, he wears a tiny scarf or blanket around his neck, especially during nap time (which is most of the day).

When he walks, it’s slow and careful like he’s trying not to wake the floor. And when he sits, he looks like a perfect little loaf of bread.

== Trivia ==

* Gloobert has never been seen running. Not even once.
* He once blinked so slowly during a conversation that the other cat forgot what they were talking about.
* His record for longest nap is 43 hours straight, he only woke up because someone opened a can of tuna.
* The first blanket ever used in the Nap Café is still there and named “Sir Napalot.”
* Gloobert once slept through an earthquake. Twice.
* His favorite drink is warm oat milk with a tiny dash of honey (but he calls it “cloud juice”).
* If you try to wake him too fast, he just blinks, rolls over, and sleeps harder.
* Gloober (his dad) once stepped on one of Gloobert’s blankets, and Gloobert didn’t speak to him for two naps.
* There’s a tiny sign in the Nap Café that reads: “If you are loud, you are out.”

{{Top|Canon}}

Goober the Eighth is the most stupid of all the Goobers, He doesn't even know what the Goober Gang is. He got sent a letter a long time ago telling him that he is supposed to be Goober the First and there was an error, But he doesn't know how to read so the name change is still pending. This is one more reason why nobody likes Goober the First.

==Intelligence==
Growing up, Goober the Eighth was always the most dumb Guy in the Goober Guys, He has the least IQ in the entire series, We don<nowiki>'t even know what his IQ is since he can't read to take the test. He joined the Goober Gang when Goober the Tenth asked him ''do you want to help us kill the other Goobers and get lots of money?'' he only eared ''Help'' and ''Money'' so he accepted and now he tries to help as much as he can. Even if he doesn'</nowiki>t even know what the Goober Gang is or what they do.

He always wants to try to help but he often mess things up, And he knows that. sometimes he wish he was more smart to be more helpful, He is often over shadowed by [[So Silly]] or other dumb characters because there is nothing special about him that makes him stupid, its not some trauma when he was younger or that he sniffs glue all the time, He is just stupid and nothing else. 

Even if he isn't really helpful, The rest of the Goobers still likes him. They think he deserves the title of Goober the First even if he thinks he doesn't.
