Goober the fifth was meant to be a good kitty, but she chose otherwise. he wanted blood but nowadays she took on a more peaceful life and is on a quest to repay herself to everybody she has wronged.
==Criminal life==
Goober the fifth used to be a good kid, got good notes, had a lot of friends. But something changed one day... She was jumping on a bed... and bumped her head... ever since she became a BAD KITTY (not a B.A.D). She did a wide variety of crimes but she was most known for building wooden and stone contraption to hurt her victims. But no one took her seriously since her traps has a strange resemblance to the ones from looney tunes...To similar. just a few days after she made any of her contraptions they where fund in a looney tunes episode. It was kind of like a game to find from what episode they where in and to guess what she would do next. Some cats even bet large some of money in these bets. and anyway her <nowiki>''deadly traps'' weren'</nowiki>t so deadly after all, they where more amusing then anything. She became some kind of celebrity from these gags, Making a lot of friendships along the way, Her best friend was called [[So silly]]. since no one took any of them seriously They were meant for each other and they got soon after married :3 

== Forgiveness ==
Nowadays she tries to give back to the community by volunteering with So silly to build infrastructure for the city. This if what gave So silly the idea to start working as a builder full time. Now they live a comfortable life in a big house together.

Goober the fifth is constantly trying to track down the people she hurt to pay them back and get forgiveness for her actions.

== Family ==
The raison why she is called Goober the fifth is because she is the fifth silliest cat of her family of 10. And she likes being at the middle, no responsibility or worries that someone might take her place but nobody looks down on her ether. She is happy like that.

title: Goober the Ninth

infobox.name: Goober the Ninth
infobox.imagecaption: Goober the Ninth inside one of his mech

wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character
|name=Goober the Ninth
|image=Goober the Ninth.png
|imagecaption=Goober the Ninth inside one of his mech
|status={{Alive}}
|aliases=
|affiliation=The Goober Guys
|occupation=Making mechs
|fur=White, grey and black
|height=12 sauces
|weight=14 sauces
|gender=Male|relatives=|marital=Single|firstappears=Goober Guys|lastappears=Goober Guys}}Goober the Ninth was always fascinated by robots, He loves wood, Metal, Copper, Stone and to make robots with them.
==Mechs==
He used to love making little robots when he was a kid, He used to make them to help him with little task like cleaning his room or doing to dishes. Now, With years of experience under his belt, He makes giant metal megastructure he calls <nowiki>''Mechs''</nowiki> and has even made some mechs for some members of the team (Goober the Sixth and Goober the Fourth). But getting all the materials is expensive and to make money he also needs to make mechs and sell them to people, He cries when he sees one of his creations going away never to be seen again.

Some of his biggest mechs he has <nowiki>''Just in case''</nowiki> can go up to  11 meters in height, Nobody knows exactly why he needs mechs this big but he as hinted that its the same reason why [[Goober the Third]] wants to get so big. They do look alike and they are really good friends, Maybe they are related in some way?

But battle mechs aren<nowiki>'t the only things this guy makes. He also makes cars, boats, planes, etc. But most of these are sold to cover their high expenses. He only keeps one ore two of those ''Mobile mechs''</nowiki> for traveling or to give rides to the other Goobers.

== The Goober Gang ==
Goober the Ninth got tricked by [[Goober the Tenth]] to be able to use all his currant mechs for one year, Since he didn't have that many mechs at the time he thought this was a great deal but he forgot the existence of his battle mechs. Now everyone thinks he is part of the Goober Gang and that he builds mechs for them but that is false. He is trying to take down the mechs he build by distance by hacking them but he made the mechs way to hard to hack or control by distance and since all the Other Goobers think he is evil they wont help him to take them down.

The only option Goober the Ninth has left is to make an even bigger and better mechs to destroy his old ones, But without any money or mechs left to sell, And with no one on his side this will be an impossible task. He hopes he can make the other Goober change his mind about him before its to late. For that he needs to join the Great Goober Guardians Guild but they wont accept him, They think he is trying to infilter their base.

Now he is trying to convince [[So Silly]] to help him make a bigger mechs and get the trust of the Great Goober Guardians Guild.

== Trivia ==

* Goober the Ninth tries his hardest not to sell mechs to bad cats but every now and then he gets scammed and sold a mech to one anyway, For example (insert an evil cat that might need a mech)
* his favorite alloy is called <nowiki>''</nowiki>the sandia alloy<nowiki>''</nowiki>, it is made of 10% gold and 90% platinum. It is his favorite material to use because it is the most wear-resistant alloy and the world.

title: Goofus
wikitext:
{{MOS|Below 72 ppi|EtharViolo}}
{{WIP}}{{Character|image=Better Goofus.png|imagecaption=Goofus’s signature death stare|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Italian}}|affiliation=[[The GOODings]]|occupation=Exposing discord group chats for fun|marital=Married|gender=Male|breed=American Curl|fur=Orange|height=18 sauces|weight=80 sauces|firstappears=B.A.D’s group chat|lastappears=The war of the Silly and Unsilly (Pt.3)|name=Goofus|birthPlace=Venice,Italy|birthDate=Unknown}}'''Goofus''' is a minor character and a member of The GOODings, He is known for leaking B.A.D’s group chat for The GOODings which exposed A couple of cats in B.A.D He was A major contributor in [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] by fighting alongside his comrades most especially [[Fouet]] and [[Dimden]] against B.A.D

He also is one of the few cats according to [[A VerySilly Interview]] to have been associated with [[Cuh]],[[Buh]] and [[Guh]] before the episode, The Friends due to him researching on their impact on silly cat history

== Apperances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Goofus would appear in mid season 2 and would do his iconic leak against B.A.D, changing modern history and also was a major side character for some episodes in season 2 however he was still a minor chacter for most of the series until The War of the Silly and Unsilly (pt 1-3) came around were he almost died helping Edward, Dimdem and Fouet in part 1 and fought regularly in the other parts

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
Goofus would appear as a quest, his quest was actually a little mini game on the serie's trivia and the player would try to guess 7-10 of all 10 questions, if suceeded. Goofus would give you a sword as a award

== Biography ==
Goofus was born in Venice,Italy. Over there he would often listen to gossip and drama and try to expose some cats just for the shits and giggles. Even from when he was young he would still expose bad cats for fun but often for sake of justice. This trait would later come for use

Goofus then moved to Silly Country due to hearing about how many gossips,cats in need of exposing and history was in the country so he went to visit and heard about The GOODings where he went to their base that if they needed help and since at the time they needed to have a cat who would how to expose cats by infiltrating on Discord. He agreed and put his paws to work as the GOODings IT guy

Goofus then exposed several cats who planned to bomb a building incluiding [[Baguette Dude]] (who at the time was unknown), [[George]] and [[Study Cat]] and several other of B.A.D's secrets in which he leaked to the GOODings which caused B.A.D's discord to shut down to avoid confrontacion from the GOOdings

Later he decided to go into The GOODings as the group's exposer and then he met [[Mrs. Pringleton]] who he fell in love with and possibly even married! He would technically be unimportant just doing his own thing in his own time until the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] came around and thats when he started doing his "Saving cats speedrun"

Goofus encountered several twists such as Baguette Dude's redemption and Maxwell's death however his true moment was when Edward, Dimdem and Fouet and himself were stuck in a single trench where several B.A.D members attempted to kill them after Dimdem's mech failed and he decided to almost sacrifice himself so they could leave and after that moment he went to being just another GOODings cat getting the good old shellshock, making his ears go back slightly more.

After the war, Goofus decided to work near Silly Town where everyone could hire him to check on what their friends were doing and thats how his story ends.

title: Goober the Third
wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character |name=Goober the Third |image=Goober the Third.png |imagecaption=Goober the Third... watching |status={{Alive}} |aliases=Edgy Boy, Sigma Male |affiliation=None |occupation=Philosopher
Bodybuilder |fur=White, beige, grey and black |height=70 sauces |weight=120 sauces |gender=Male}} If Goober the Third isn't the strongest one in terms of magic, he is definitely the strongest one in physical strength. He is so big that we weren't even able to get a picture of his entire body. == Biography == Goober the Third was the third silliest cat in his family (this is kind of obvious by his name). At first, he did not want to become strong like we know about him today. He was distinguished and loved to Tango dance. Everything seemed normal until, something changed in his eyes. They were filled with determination and darkness (note that this doesn't mean he's evil). Suddenly, he grabbed a weight next to him and started curling it nonstop. The other kitties around him didn't know what to do, so they just let him do it. No one know what he saw to become this way, but many think we '''shouldn't''' know. Soon, he moved on to other exercises like bench presses and running on the treadmill. His muscles were starting to grow. He trained and trained to become the strongest kitty alive. His archrival was [[Buffed Kitty]], who was buffer than him. He wanted to show him who was boss. So he moved on to even harder exercises like deadlifting. Now, he could lift a vending machine with one hand. Then, on one fateful day, Goober the Third challenged Buffed Kitty to an arm wrestle. Around this time, the rest of the Goober family was isolating from Goober the Third. They reportedly said his personality was dull. Goober the Third and Buffed Kitty sat across from each other at the GYM. They stared each other in the eye. Goober the Third just gave him an empty stare, which gave Buffed Kitty a shiver down his spine. The two locked hands. At first, it looked like Buffed Kitty was going to win and Goober the Third was about to win, but the the match lasted as a stalemate for a whopping 42 hours. It stayed even the entire time, neither one of them shedding a bead of sweat. Buffed Kitty wanted to win, but he didn't know how far he could push himself. Goober the Third on the other hand, was not willing to lose. He needed to prove that he was the strongest kitty. Finally, at 2:00am the next day, Buffed Kitty forfeited, crowning Goober the Third the winner. Goober the Third headed back to his home. He had become the strongest kitty in the world, but he didn't know if he was strong enough or not to fight what he saw that day. So he just sat there, thinking. Now, he had become strong enough to carry an eighteen-wheeler with his pinkie toe. He sat for days in thought. That's how he became a philosopher. He now had tons of ideas instead of bigger muscles. Besides this, nothing much has happened to Goober the Third since then. That was until he had an idea, what if he could use magic to become stronger? He wanted to become even bigger so he asked Goober the Second for help but he told him that it would be too dangerous because he still didn't know much about magic yet. So, Goober the Third would go on a month long quest to find someone who could help him. He asked [[Dr. Silly Willy]], [[Bob]] and even the [[Wizard of Spells]] but they all couldn't help because either his skull was too thick or he just couldn't reach them. But one day he found exactly who could help him, [[Goober the Fourth]]. Goober the Fourth is always on the lookout for more ideas so in exchange for his philosophy knowledge, Goober the Fourth would make a pill to make him even bigger and Goober the Fourth agreed. He is currently working on it as you read this. He doesn't know much people well but he is a friend with Goober the Second and Goober the Fourth because Goober the Third helps Goober the Fourth against monsters, which he finds fun and sometimes challenging. Goober the Third says that Goober the Second's magical abilities go well with his strength. But his best friend is [[Goober the Ninth]], that day they saw the same thing that made him get this strong, that and also the fact that they look really similar made some people think the are related in some way. == Trivia == * It is unknown what caused him to be so determined, although it is thought that it is anything but good * Some make fun of him for ''being on the grind'' or ''being edgy'' but Goober the Third knows that if they saw what he saw, they would do the same

title: Goober the Fourth

infobox.imagecaption: Goober the Fourth being grabbed by an unknown creature

wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character
|name=Goober the Fourth
|image=Goober the Fourth.png
|imagecaption=Goober the Fourth being grabbed by an unknown creature
|status={{Alive}}
|aliases=Wet cat, Scaredy cat
|affiliation=None
|occupation=Worrying, Book writer
|fur=White, Grey and black
|height=4 sauces
|weight=5 sauces
|gender=Male|relatives=Goober the Sixth (twin)|marital=Single|firstappears=Goober Guys|lastappears=Goober Guys}}
Goober the Fourth is the first mastermind of the Goober Guys, With his higher than average intellect he makes plans and calculations for any of the goober projects. But being so small and defenseless makes him a target for criminals and creatures alike, That's why he needs the help from [[Goober the Second]] and especially [[Goober the Third]] to save him.

== Description ==
Goober the Forth is only less then 2 years old and the youngest Goober in the family, The second youngest being [[Goober the Sixth]], His twin by only 2min.

He is friends with Goober the Second and Goober the Third for saving him on multiple occasions. He keeps getting kidnapped by criminals because they want to exploit his intelligence and by creatures and monsters because he is defenseless. He is overall in good relation with all the other Goobers, Except for Goober the First but nobody likes him anyway. But his best friend and twin is Goober the sixth. He is also a smart guy and they always talk about the theory of cat activity, moewton's miaw's of thermocatnips or e=mc² (eepyness= meow X cat²) together.

If anyone needs anything to do with intelligence he is the to-go guy for that task, He is always happy to help the other Goober Guy in their projects. ha has done things like:

* Helping [[Goober the Fifth]] make traps.
* Making bigger weights for Goober the Third.
* Helping Goober the Sixth create a perpetual motion machine
* created an entire map of all the planets in the 5 closest galaxies with a precision of 3mm (he asked where the north was)
* Helping Goober the Fifth gain forgiveness
* etc.

=== Job ===
Goober the Fourth works as a book writer, He writes books about science and theories. At the start he just did it as a hobby but it quickly turned into a full time job. sometimes he just wishes he could spend more time thinking and doing math but its to late to tourn back now...  His latest project is trying to invent time travel, He knows its possible even if everyone thinks its not. His twin believes in him so it '''must''' be possible.

All the stress from getting kidnapped all the time gave him constant-shaky-legs syndrome, Goober the Fifth offered to pay for a lobotomy to fix him but he doesn't believe in lobotomies medicinal properties. That is the only thing him and his twin disagree on.

title: Goober the Second
wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character
|name=Goober the Second
|image=Goober_the_Second.png
|imagecaption=Goober the Second flying around
|status={{Alive}}
|aliases=cloud guy
|affiliation=None
|occupation=peace maker
|fur=white and beige
|height=12 sauces
|weight=0.8 sauces
|gender=Male}}
Everyone know that the names of the Goobers are a ranking of how silly they are but being the silliest doesn't always mean being the best.
Goober the Second is still recognized to be the best of the Goober Guys as everyone hates Goober the First.

== Job ==
Goober The Second acts a judge or a peacemaker of the Goobers, trying to keep them together for a still unknown reason but it is rumored that the Goober Guys will one day save the world from an unknown, evil force.
But soon Goober The Second will face the hardest challenge he has faced yet... With the Goober Gang growing stronger and with the help of [[Bernard]] it might be the end for the Goober Guys...
Will he beat them with the help of the LoBoToBy Central? or will they perish?

== Pass times ==
Goober The Second loves flying around with his light weight. But that doesn't mean he is defenseless! He is often regarded as the strongest of the Goober Guy with his magical powers and abilities.
He likes to fly around acting like a cloud and look down at the various cities, seas and mountains without a care in the world. Just being happy.
Sometimes he likes to play ball games like basketball or volleyball but instead of playing with the ball he likes being the ball and bouncing around, And the players don't mind playing with his fluffy fur.
Everyone that meet him said good things about him. That he is kind, Soft, Passionate, Selfless And overall a lovable Guy.

== Magic ==
From all the Goobers he is the only one with magic abilities. Most of his magic is around the theme of fire and  air (attack and movement respectively) from his flying and bouncing around to turning into a ball of fire, He his quite the magician.

He discovered his magical abilities when he was attacked by cat archers when they thought he was an alien, instinctively he turned into a fireball and '''smashed''' himself in the ground, making a shockwave and nocking them unconscious. He soon started experimented with his new-found powers, Like brewing tea with fire or making his kite fly by making wind. Goober the Second still has a lot to learn about magic, Maybe he has even more abilities then he thinks? Only time will tell.

Goober the Sixth is the second mastermind of the Goober Guys, With his higher than average intellect he makes trick and mislead any cat. He also took on a acting career making him the richest of the Goober Guys making him the most independent Goober.
==Description==
Goober the Sixth is only less then 2 years old and the second youngest Goober in the family, The first youngest being [[Goober the Fourth]], His twin by only 2min.
He is isn't friends with anybody but he is overall in good relation with all the other Goobers, Except for Goober the First but nobody likes him anyway. His only friend and twin is Goober the Fourth. He is also a smart guy and they always talk about the theory of cat activity, moewton's miaw's of thermocatnips or e=mc² (eepyness= meow X cat²) together. If anyone needs anything to do with strategy and manipulation he is the to-go guy for that task, He is always happy to help mess with the head of bad cats. he has done things like:
*Trick [[Dr. Silly Willy|Dr. Silly]] in giving him a lifetime Lobotomy pass
*Trick [[Kyky]] into making an appearances in her show
*Made [[Baskit Cat]] give him an autograph from LeBron James
*Got free cola from [[Cokey Cola]]
*Got free fanta from [[Fanter]]
*etc.

=== Job ===
Goober the Sixth is an actor at least he tries to be one. He still didn't act for anything except the Kyky TV show. But he won't give up his dream. Sometimes he wounders if he should be more like his twin and write books but he knows he can do it one day and become a star, Even if it takes all his life.

Since his twin keeps getting kidnapped he got constant-shaky-legs syndrome. Goober the Sixth offered to pay for a lobotomy to fix him but his twin doesn't believe lobotomies medicinal properties. That is the only thing him and his twin disagree on. In Breaking Bad, where he is 10, he uses his acting skills to distract Gaskter, and Jinx manages to severely injure Gakster.

}}'''Goober the Tenth''' used to be one of the members of the Goober Guys, but through years of abuse and neglect he formed the Goober Gang to kill the other goobers in revenge.

==Biography==
Goober the Tenth was first born in the Silly City Hospital. His parents were disgusted when they saw his garish appearance. His nose was elongated and he was overweight even though he had eaten nothing. His parents dumped him off at an orphanage the same day. The orphanage workers were less than pleased when a watermelon sized baby arrived at their doorstep. They often looked away when they fed him, as they couldn't even look at him. Many of the workers even refused to take care of him because he was so ugly. He also smelled of garlic and a week-old carton of milk.

When he hit the age of six, the orphanage workers happily kicked him out. They had to carry him out with a wheelbarrow because he was too heavy to be carried. Goober the Tenth sat in a heap on the pavement. He sat there for hours. Hours turned into days and days turned into weeks. In this time span, he only lost 0.3 pounds (Note that he did not eat a single particulate of food). The reason why he didn't move was because he couldn't move himself. He also suffered from a neurological disorder, known as Small Brain Syndrome (SBS for short). This meant that he could only conjure one thought in the span of three days. Eventually, one of the workers noticed him, and brought him somewhere. They took him into a shelter. The "shelter" was a glorified cardboard box on the side of a highway.

It took him another five years to finally gain the ability to think. He had also lost a total of 43 pounds. This made him able to walk. His SBS still affected him pretty bad though. This caused him to zone out a lot. Goober the Tenth still new somewhat that he needed to get a job. It was very hard for him though because every kitty he went to rejected him because of his looks and unsilliness. Goober the Tenth felt hopeless. That's when he heard about a group called the Goober Guys, really the Goober Guys heard about him. The Goober Guys found out using a complex series of satellites and heat trackers, they found him. Members of the Goober Guys are born members.

When Goober the Tenth heard the news that the goobers were coming to him to bring him to their headquarters, he was ecstatic. He was excited to finally live in a place with air conditioning as his cardboard box wasn't any good. Plus, he had weighed a dent into the bottom of the box, causing the box to be half submerged in dirt. He did not have any shelter from the rain, so his box was also soaking wet and the hole he had punched through the front of the box from getting angry at his favorite team losing a tennis match wasn't doing him any favors (He watched the game from a truck that was playing it on their dashboard). So, Goober the Tenth waited for them to get there. The goobers weren't expecting a bowling ball sized cat with a face that made him look run over to be there, so many of the goobers in the car had to hold in their disgust upon smelling his stench.

When they got to the headquarters, many of the goobers hurriedly got out of the car and threw up. Still, he was happy to be there. [[Goober the Third]] was given the task of carrying him inside, since none of the others could lift him, nor could he walk to the door himself. When he entered, he was greeted by [[Goober the Fourth]], who welcomed him in. Goober the Fourth said the night is when they would decide his number. Goober the Tenth did not know what this meant but he just went into his room. Later, in the number deciding, they came to a unanimous vote and numbered him as number 10, which is where his name comes from. He lived content at their headquarters for about half a year and during this time, his brain started to rapidly grow. He soon learned how to count to 10 and that he was indeed a cat. Unfortunately, he also started to notice how the other goobers liked to insult him and bully him. One time, he noticed how Goober the Third spilled gravy on him. He said he was sorry, but later he caught him laughing about it, calling Goober the Tenth a loser.

Goober the Tenth then fell into a depression. He longed to be treated like a normal person. He started to grow a resentment for the rest of the goobers. He dreamed of getting his revenge. This dream led him to start training to lose all of his excess weight. He ran for miles, bench pressed, and even beat a pro-wrestler in a thumb war. His courage was unstoppable. By now, he had lost a staggering 233 sauces. Now that his weight was out of the way, he had to plan on how he was going to get his revenge. He thought for hours, but then it came to him. He would recruit two other goobers that were bullied and convince them to join him on his conquest. So, he began his plan. He met up with Goober the Ninth and told him that the other goobers constantly his construction work. This made the Goober the Ninth furious, so he excepted Goober the Tenth's offer. Then, Goober the Tenth met up with [[Goober the Eighth]] and convinced him to join him (This was very easy because of Goober the Eighth's overwhelming stupidity).

Goober the Tenth now had his team that he called the Goober Gang. He marched over to Goober the Sixth's house to enact their plan. Goober the Ninth brought a wheelbarrow of bricks and they got to work, sealing the door and window with bricks. Goober the Sixth was always eeping, so he would never wake up. By sealing all of the entrances, they prevented him from getting his favorite coffee (Without Caffeine). This would cause irreparable damage to Goober the Sixth's psyche. Goober the Sixth woke up weeks later and because Goober the Eighth messed up the brick walls he could escape. But now, with a systematic fear of the Goober gang he wanted nothing to do with them and consistently refused to work with the Great Goober Guardians Guild (GGGG). Their next target was Goober the Seventh. They spied on him through his window and saw he was making dinner. They knew they had to make it silent, so they retreated to the roof to plan. Then, Goober the Tenth had an idea. He opened the window a crack and farted right into the gap. This may seem like a minor annoyance, but Goober the Tenth's farts are extremely deadly. With one whiff, Goober the Seventh both suffocated to death and incinerated. The only thing left was a pile of ash.

To be continued...

== Trivia ==

* His elongated face is due to a rare strain of Norovirus that is only present in his blood stream. It kills anything it touches within minutes
* His foul odor is due to a specialized organ that is present near his stomach. It constantly produces flammable toxins that smell mysteriously like garlic and spoiled milk
* The reason why his farts are so deadly is because the flammable toxins in his special organ, sometimes leak out. They react violently with chemicals present in the kitty body.

title: Grinwatcher/Underling

infobox.name: Underling
infobox.imagecaption: One of the thousands of Underlings AKA Underling #25923

wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Underling}}
{{Character|name=Underling|image=Underling.png|imagecaption=One of the thousands of Underlings AKA Underling #25923|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Unknown}}|aliases=The Underling of the Underworld
A Demon|relatives=Grinwatcher Right Hand Smiles|affiliation=Heck|occupation=Working for the Grinwatcher|birthDate=9/9/666 AD|birthPlace=Heck|marital=Single, too evil|gender=Pure Evil (All Underlings)|breed=Demonic|height=50 Sauces|weight=0 Sauces|firstappears=Grinwatcher Army|lastappears=Grinwatcher Army|fur=Black and white}}'''Underlings''' are akin to a smaller version of the [[Grinwatcher]], only with a smaller evil grin. Underlings are like the demons of silly heck. There are about thousands, maybe even millions of Underlings, all working for the Grinwatcher. [[Grinwatcher/Right Hand Smiles|Right Hand Smiles]] usually gets orders from the Grinwatcher in which the orders are to tell the Underlings what they have to do. Underlings are to be avoided at all costs, being highly deadly. They are quite vicious, even attacking other Underlings. Around every second, a new Underling is born. They help the Grinwatcher with evil stuff and Underlings are even sometimes sacrificed to keep the Grinwatcher's evilness powerful. == Life Cycle == Underlings are hatched from eggs that are born from the heck fires. A young Underling hatches at temperatures of 2,000 degrees Fahrenheit. If it is too cold the Underling dies. A young Underling hatches with a new found blood lust. Underlings will immediately start chasing after live prey. They will continue this phase of their life for the next 120 years (In terms of Underlings, this isn't very long). Only after this time period will the Underling start taking orders. The Grinwatcher usually directs them to kill people. But sometimes he orders them to do other things. An Underling shouldn't be seeing any life-threatening signs until around 980 or 1,980 years of age. At this age, the Underling will start to die, slowly losing its life force. When an Underling dies, three things could happen, their evil energy could transfer to [[The Beast]] to make him stronger or the Underling could become food for young Underling, or, very rarely, the Underling will be reborn on Earth. As of the death of The Beast the evil energy has been instead been filtered into the Grinwatcher itself. There is another way an Underling's life can end. Occasionally if the Grinwatcher's evil powers are seen to be growing dim, an Underling will be sacrificed to the Grinwatcher. == Trivia == * Underling are hatched almost every second * Underling sacrifices are a rare occurrence, but they do happen * Underling are known to eat other Underling without hesitation * Underling are sometimes seen hunting in packs * Underling are sometimes heard making a cackle sound, not dissimilar to that of a hyena's * Underling are the number one enemy of the [[Wet]]. Both fight each other savagely * Underling were also seen picking fights with the [[Baby Kiwi Kitten]] when it wasn't endangered * If an Underling egg is bathed in lava, it will grow quicker, skipping its young life stage * Underlings have assigned numbers. The first Underling to ever exist would be called 'Underling #1', the second underling to ever exist would be called 'Underling #2, and so on

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Grinwatcher|aliases=Grinwatcher the Demon Lord of the Underworld
The Devil|relatives=All heck cats
Right Hand Smiles Boingus|affiliation=Heck|occupation=Eviling|marital=None, too evil|birthDate=6/6/999 AD|birthPlace=Heck|deathDate=|deathPlace=|species=EVIL|gender=pure evil|height=100 Sauces|weight=0 Sauces|eyes=Green|appearsin=A few episodes|debut=A deal with the grin watcher|image=Grinwatcher.png|imagecaption=Grinwatcher, the demon lord.|breed=Satanic|fur=Orange and yellow|firstappears=A Deal with the Grinwatcher|lastappears=A few episodes|status={{Deceased}}}} '''Grinwatcher, the Demon Lord of the Underworld''' is a cat that is the devil in the ''Silly Cats'' universe. He causes pain and chaos and his grin reflects pure evil. He watches over nightmares and changes them to the Cats' deepest fear. In the episode "A Deal with the Grinwatcher", [[The Beast]] summons him and makes a deal. The Beast makes a deal to gain power over the kitty universe, this however backfires with a war. The Beast gains mystical powers from the Grinwatcher, giving him a strong punch and minor flight, along with speed and jump boost. A bunch of grinning ghostly cats were floating and disappearing around The Beast during this period. raw_text: Grinwatcher "Grinwatcher, the demon lord." He feeds Jinx and the gang whenever they're hungry. He is married to Tana Meowsay, who is only brought up in the [[Silly Cats]] series once. Gordon Meowsay used to be a head judge in the famous TV show, MasterCook, before the network cancelled it. After that he decided to go work at a famous restaurant in which Jinx and the gang went too and from then on Gordon was part of the gang to stop [[The Beast]]. Gordon Meowsay isn't very good at fighting, so when Jinx and the gang need to fight someone, Gordon usually just hides away from the fighting. Gordon has reportedly taste-tested almost every single dish he serves to make sure its the best it can be. Current Residence: 21 Cunningham St Taringa == trivia == * Gordon has a license to serve fugu, a Japanese dish where the chef has to carefully remove the tetrodotoxin from pufferfish meat do make it serveable

'''Grumpy Cat''' is a powerful god in the Silly Cats series. She used to be mortal but she ascended to the afterlife after [[The Beast]] was defeated. Grumpy Cat also makes a cameo in [[Silly Cats: The Movie]], guiding the crew to work together to defeat [[Study Cat]].

== Real Life ==
Grumpy Cat, known as the [https://twitter.com/RealGrumpyCat?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor RealGrumpyCat] on Twitter, was a calico cat with a grumpy face. She was born on April 4th, 2012 and her real name was Tardar Sauce. Grumpy Cat's face appeared grumpy because the feline had a form of dwarfism, she died at the age of 7 in the real world. Grumpy Cat was mostly known for her appearance in top text bottom text memes, where they would usually have a negative personality.  
==Biography==
Grumpy Cat awoke in the void. She was created by the ultimate god, thought to be [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]], called Cwawa. Cwawa had created many things before, but they went wrong and started fighting. They're fighting led to the imbalance of good and evil in the world. Cwawa tasked Grumpy Cat with bringing balance to the world. Suddenly, Grumpy Cat felt a surge of energy and they were catapulted into the universe. Grumpy Cat was given a bunch of knowledge by Cwawa to learn the world around her.

Grumpy Cat fell unconscious. They woke up sometime after in a river. They wandered around, looking at the beauty of Planet Silly around her. She remembered that her creator told her there was a force of evil rampaging across the world causing havoc. Grumpy Cat knew this force needed to be stopped. But first, she needed to meet with the cause stopping evil. Grumpy Cat soon knocked on the door of [[Jinx|Jinx's]] house. Grumpy Cat told them they had a mission to stop evil and they wanted to join Jinx. Grumpy Cat knew it would be dangerous so she chose not to fight directly and instead fight under the group of Gloopy.

Grumpy Cat waited and she found her chance. She cornered The Beast and tried to stop him, but The Beast captured her and threw her in his prison. The prison she was thrown into was called the [[Temple of the Beast]]. It had been created by Beast worshippers a long time ago. Grumpy Cat was stuck in this prison until the end of the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], which was the conflict that was happening at the time, unbeknownst to Grumpy Cat. That's when Jinx opened the large stone doors to the temple and released all the prisoners of the temple.

Grumpy Cat's task had been fulfilled, so they ascended to the silly heavens. Grumpy Cat stays as an angel watching over Planet Silly. {{Top|Canon}}
[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Deceased]]

== About ==
'''Happy Happy Happy Cat''' refers to a viral video of a cat jumping behind a glass door. First appearing in 2015, versions of the clip have appeared on [https://www.TikTok.com TikTok] and [https://www.youtube.com YouTube], where it has been paired with the Happy Happy Happy sound effect and used in various edits, often paired with other cats.

== Origin ==
On November 11th, 2015, [https://imgur.com Imgur] [https://imgur.com/user/Datsun280zxt user Datsun280zxt] uploaded a [http://web.archive.org/web/20151113023152/https://imgur.com/gallery/BALT0No video] of a kitten excitedly jumping behind a glass door when its owner arrived home. The video received more than 23,500 points and 5.5 million views in the two days after it was uploaded; however, the video was later deleted. On November 13th, 2015, [https://youtube.com Youtube] [https://www.youtube.com/@thepettreehouse7842 user The Pet Tree House] reposted the [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFnef-X4BBY video] and received 74,000 views in eight years

== Spread ==
On March 19th, 2022, [https://youtube.com YouTube] [https://www.youtube.com/@thecolorcake user Thecolorcake] [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f_e3NbtwKAo uploaded an edit of the clip] and received more than 267,000 views in one year. On February 5th, 2023, [https://youtube.com YouTube] [https://www.youtube.com/@Michi15834 user Michi] [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gnm3hIcjiCQ uploaded an edit of the cat jumping without the background], which received more than 2.1 million views in two months

'''Right Hand Smiles''' is the right hand man of the [[Grinwatcher]] pulling a portion of the Grinwatcher's deeds. He is highly dangerous, if you see them, it's already too late.

==Biography==
Right Hand Smiles originated as a normal looking Underling egg. But there was something different about the egg, the egg was much warmer than all of the other eggs. The egg grew especially fast, hatching within two weeks. Upon his birth, he didn't look anything like the other Underlings. He had orange instead of black markers. He also exhibited much more violent behaviors, killing hundreds of other Underlings without any mercy. The Grinwatcher observed his growth, intrigued. As Right Hand Smiles grew up, Grinwatcher finally walked up to him and offered him an opportunity, to become his right hand man. He agreed, becoming his partner in crime. He killed thousands of innocent kitties under the instruction of the Grinwatcher. In fact, he even saw the fight between Future Kitty and the Grinwatcher play out. Now, the Grinwatcher has switched his duties over to overseeing the Underlings and controlling their numbers. To this day, Right Hand Smiles is the controlling force behind the Underling army. This means that if were to be killed, the Underling army would fall. How curious...

== Trivia ==

* Right Hand Smiles' kill count is 6,450
* Right Hand Smiles would have 3,120 years in jail if he were to be captured today
* Right Hand Smiles' archrival is [[Kiw]], whom he has been fighting for the past 5 centuries

Ugly?|debut=E3S8:
Ugly?|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{American}}}}{{stub}} Halo is a mythical angelic guardian often seen in the legends of a popular mythical text originating in a book named [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]], believed by archaeologists to be lost, but on multiple occasions has been referenced to by Future Kitty, who gifted multiple copies to many cats. == Appearances == Or lack there of. Halo does not appear in the Silly Cats universe, but is a canonical entry of a character. They only appear in Silly Cats: Online in the unlocked item named "the Black Book of Silly Magic," which is the actual book and also where we get information about Halo. This "Black Book of Silly Magic" is the only place where Halo's information is sourced from. he is a mythical figure after all. == Biography == Halo is said to have descended from the 4th dimension to enter The Esoteric Council (the first clowder, mythical and unseen of). he took the form of a cat and began the first cat in the Silly Cats universe. he joined The Esoteric Council, and was the one in control of the crop growth on Silly Planet. During the disbanding event of the Esoteric Council - known in the Black Book of Silly Magic as "The Spiritual Ultimatum" - all the members faded into a powder spread about the universe. These powders are responsible for the existence of Silly Magic in the Silly Cats Universe, and without the granulated form of The Esoteric Council's spirits, magic would not exist. Fans theorize that Ganpy's line is to be taken to heart, and that Halo somehow gave a Green Emerald of Silly Magic to Gnapy such that he can plant plants and herbs. This is believed because the Black Book of Silly Magic states that even in their granulated spirit forms, the esoteric council spirits can exist as bodies for a limited time. == Element in Silly Magic == Halo's element in silly magic is "Vegetation."

Literallly God|status={{Alive}}|fur=Orange & White|nationality={{Unknown}}|breed=Tabby}}'''Gusic''' is an important character in the [[Silly Cats]] universe, being one of the first ever cats and/or silly cats to be born and also a god of the Silly Cats universe. He is the brother of [[Gakster]], [[Plimpus]], [[Q The Cat|Q]], and [[Glinkert]]. Gusic is also the cousin of [[Bungus]] and [[Bingus]] and the creator of [[Ah So Cat]] and [[Cheeseburger]]. == Appearances == === Silly Cats === Gusic appears in the Silly Cats series as a fading light in the night sky in the first few episodes, but he does exist, just that he does not manifest in the series much. We know of his existence because of personal testimony from 1st generation and 2nd generation cats recalling him. === Silly Cats: Online === Gusic is the god of the Silly Cats: Online universe. He guides you on your way to missions and teaches you many skills throughout the game. == Biography == Gusic was born from the unknown entity, Cwawa, thought to be the Esoteric Council, during the beginning of the Silly Cats universe, before the creation of Silly Planet. He was born alongside his brothers and cousins, which could also be considered brothers considering they all come from Cwawa. He was very friendly and loved to play with Bungus and Bingus. When Bingus betrayed Bungus, and tried to attack him, Bungus and Q united with Gusic to destroy Bingus, the great evil. Bingus fought them in a decisive battle, and in the end separated the two cousins from each other for what he thought to be an eternal curse. During this time, Gusic was very sad, which is why he created Ah So Cat as the embodiment of joy to fill his immortal life(Important to note this is also the time when the Butter embryo hatched [[Floppa]] and [[Photosynthesizing]]). Soon enough though, through trial and error, the curse was redirected into the heart of Bingus' soul, creating a Slice of Bingus. This freed them from the curse, and so Gusic and Bungus were reunited. Q, who was very excited, egged them on to kill Bingus once and for all for his wrongdoings, by which they did. They killed Bingus eventually, battling him truly. Q died in this battle from a rebounded attack from Bingus, leaving only Bungus and Gusic to kill him. They eventually did, which set free the cursed Slice of Bingus. This began the creation of [[The Beast]] and [[The Yeast]], the embodiments of evil in the world. In response, Gusic created the 3 Knights. [[Buh]], [[Cuh]], and [[Guh]] to protect the universe from the forces of evil. Later on in time, Ah So Cat and Floppa (An at-the-time yet to be grown embryo in a stick of butter) had a conflict over who was better. Gusic became enraged at this, and decided to begin an event known as The Banishing, in which many cats were banished to a newly created Silly Planet, starting the 2nd generation of Silly Cats, born around or before The Banishing. Today Gusic is thought to be a mythical character, but is real. He spends time with Bungus, and often times brings the odds in [[Jinx|Jinx's]] favor during decisive battles. This is why he is an ally with [[The GOODings|The GOODings.]] == Trivia == * Gusic secretly enjoys egg salad sandwiches * He likes playing [[Meowcraft]] * He beat [[Elden Bing]] twice * Gusic is one of the best gamers on the planet, his only rival is [[Gamer Kitten]] * Gusic is very courageous and hotheaded, though intelligent when he needs to be. He used to be young and naive, but now he knows all {{Top|Canon}}
raw_text: Gusic "His first selfie (cwawa helped gusic)" Status Alive Nationality Unknown Aliases Relatives Gaming God Literallly God Gakster (Brother) Plimpus (Brother) Q (Brother) Glinkert (Brother) Bungus (Cousin) Bingus (Cousin) Bingus the II (Nephew) Ah So Cat (Creation) Cheeseburger (Creation) Affiliation Occupation None God Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth Near the beginning of time The Void Marital Status Unknown Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Male Tabby Orange & White Height Weight 2 sauces 9 sauces Gusic is an important character in the Silly Cats universe, being one of the first ever cats and/or silly cats to be born and also a god of the Silly Cats universe. He is the brother of Gakster , Plimpus , Q , and Glinkert . Gusic is also the cousin of Bungus and Bingus and the creator of Ah So Cat and Cheeseburger . Contents 1 Appearances 1.1 Silly Cats 1.2 Silly Cats: Online 2 Biography 3 Trivia Appearances [ ] Silly Cats [ ] Gusic appears in the Silly Cats series as a fading light in the night sky in the first few episodes, but he does exist, just that he does not manifest in the series much. We know of his existence because of personal testimony from 1st generation and 2nd generation cats recalling him. Silly Cats: Online [ ] Gusic is the god of the Silly Cats: Online universe. He guides you on your way to missions and teaches you many skills throughout the game. Biography [ ] Gusic was born from the unknown entity, Cwawa, thought to be the Esoteric Council, during the beginning of the Silly Cats universe, before the creation of Silly Planet. He was born alongside his brothers and cousins, which could also be considered brothers considering they all come from Cwawa. He was very friendly and loved to play with Bungus and Bingus. When Bingus betrayed Bungus, and tried to attack him, Bungus and Q united with Gusic to destroy Bingus, the great evil. Bingus fought them in a decisive battle, and in the end separated the two cousins from each other for what he thought to be an eternal curse. During this time, Gusic was very sad, which is why he created Ah So Cat as the embodiment of joy to fill his immortal life(Important to note this is also the time when the Butter embryo hatched Floppa and Photosynthesizing ). Soon enough though, through trial and error, the curse was redirected into the heart of Bingus' soul, creating a Slice of Bingus. This freed them from the curse, and so Gusic and Bungus were reunited. Q, who was very excited, egged them on to kill Bingus once and for all for his wrongdoings, by which they did. They killed Bingus eventually, battling him truly. Q died in this battle from a rebounded attack from Bingus, leaving only Bungus and Gusic to kill him. They eventually did, which set free the cursed Slice of Bingus. This began the creation of The Beast and The Yeast , the embodiments of evil in the world. In response, Gusic created the 3 Knights. Buh , Cuh , and Guh to protect the universe from the forces of evil. Later on in time, Ah So Cat and Floppa (An at-the-time yet to be grown embryo in a stick of butter) had a conflict over who was better. Gusic became enraged at this, and decided to begin an event known as The Banishing, in which many cats were banished to a newly created Silly Planet, starting the 2nd generation of Silly Cats, born around or before The Banishing. Today Gusic is thought to be a mythical character, but is real. He spends time with Bungus, and often times brings the odds in Jinx's favor during decisive battles. This is why he is an ally with The GOODings. Trivia [ ] Gusic secretly enjoys egg salad sandwiches He likes playing Meowcraft He beat Elden Bing twice Gusic is one of the best gamers on the planet, his only rival is Gamer Kitten Gusic is very courageous and hotheaded, though intelligent when he needs to be. He used to be young and naive, but now he knows all

title: Herbert
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Herbert|status={{Alive}}|aliases=|relatives=Juniper (Sister)|affiliation=|occupation=Skinning people|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|deathDate=|deathPlace=|gender=Male|breed=Domestic shorthair|fur=Cream and white|height=2 sauces|weight=3 sauces|imagecaption=He responds to his name|image=Herbert.jpg|nationality={{American}}|tiktok=hiherbertcat}}
==Real life==
The '''Herbert''' meme was first seen on the 6th of May, 2020 by [https://www.reddit.com/r/Catswhoyell/comments/gews3q/herbert_wants_attention/ reddit user mingledacorn13] on r/catswhoyell with the title being "Herbert wants attention!!", where his owner said "Hi Herbert" in a happy tone, then Herbert responded by a high-pitch meow that sounded more like a squeak than a meow. Then the video was reposted to [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4O9vrKXUv-g YouTube] on the 14th of may, 2020 by YouTuber GrilledFritos. Soon, lots of remixes of Herbert where made, with YouTubers like [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gkz8hld_HWU Da Noodle] being the first. Nowadays the owner still posts videos recreating the meme on [https://www.tiktok.com/@hiherbertcat TikTok].

== Biography ==
When Herbert was younger his family got brutally murdered by '''Unknown person'''. When Herbert was young he was a good boy and he would never disobey his parents, he would do what he was told but now... now he is evil. and he never listens or responds to anything, except his name. (by "respond" we mean a high-pitch squeaking sound)

Like all good cats know "never go to art school when you are not totally, mentally sane" but Herbert was felling a bit silly and thought "What's the worst that could happen?" When he started, he was a good student and got good grades. He drew as a way to vent the loss of his family and to start a new chapter in his life. well the later definitely did happen, especially when he met a familiar face. It was Unknown person himself! Herbert went crazy, "IT'S HIM!" he meant to says "MEEEEEEEE!" he really said. Unknown turned around to see why the [fuzzy cat] was someone screaming this loud, then he immediately realized who he was. Unknown told Herbert "looks like i can finely finish the job", Herbert immediately thought "this sentence was cringe af" then he was filled with rage. he needed to get revenge, get revenge for his owner, get revenge for his sister. he jumped on Unknown before he could even realize what was going on, and with his claws out scratched him. Unknown screamed in pain but Herbert realized something, he had attackted the wrong Unknown! realizing what he just did, he ran out of the window. after hours of running, running back to his old home, running from a past he couldn't escape from. HE VOWED TO TRAIN, TO TRAIN TO GET REVANGE ON THIS WORLD, THIS WORLD THAT DARED MESS WITH HERBERT HIMSELF "MEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE" HE SCREAMED AT THIS WORLD! but the world didn't scream back. the world would never scream back. the world will never give him back what he took, what he deserved to have, what he lost, what he loved,

== criminal life ==
He became a pro at skinning people and got many years of experience from training. He was hired by “skinning co” when he was 16. He has been working there for 5 years and has skinned 5 people. He is wanted in 420 counties and has been to jail and escaped 389 times. He is wanted in most counties for skinning more than half the population but he is wanted in 2 counties for tax fraud. In some counties he is an urban legend and his story is told to children to scare them. He has been claimed by some to be a "God" among others with Magical Powers that can't be rivaled. (hearing the name Herbert from anywhere on earth)
Nowadays He works alone...in this present age, with no need for the aid of Skinning Co, for his skills hath surpassed their meager offerings. With naught but his own rage and guilt, he embarks on a quest for vengeance against the one that dared to cross the path of he who bears the name of Herbert. TL;DR he is angy, ever since he started his quest for revenge he started sometimes hearing a faint "Herbert" in the distance, maybe the spirits of his victims are haunting him? to prevent him from retching his goals? or is it his long dead mother trying to speak to him? or perhaps he is just going co-co crazy. probably the last
one. or not...{{Shake|d|r|a|m|a|t|i|c| |s|q|u|e|a|k|i|n|g| |n|o|i|s|e|s}}

=== Trivia ===
* he works alone and want's to get revenge by himself
* his favorite food is oreille de crisse (ears of Christ) a popular traditional Quebec dish. because it reminds him of skin
* he is actually very smart for a cat, one of the smartest around (to bad he will probably never use that brain of his)

== note ==
only edit if you: correct spelling mistakes (English isn't my first language), punctuation, add links, correct real life information

or just [[Message Wall:TECHNOC0W|massage me]] if you have an idea for Herbert.

'''Hu Cat''' is a cat which is wanted among every other of its race.

== Backstory ==
A Cat pushed a cup of a desk, unafortunely that cup somehow attached to him and got broken with the cup, after this the pieces were glued back together and now he seeks revenge because every cat hates him.

== Transformations ==
This cat has various forms, being the most known one as his normal state, he sometimes changes his hue to different colors while the rest of his body is pitch black, those being red, white and blue for now, there is also a glitchy red version which is only seen who those that are about to die, thats why he is a serial killer, he is the one who takes people's lifes. There are also statues of him scattered around dungeons, aswell as an Anti-Hu which is just  a rumored entity.

== Kills ==
This cat only murders those who are agaisnt him, so if anyone betrays him or tries to kill him he will do aswell

== Death? ==
One day, he was found in a forest, vanishing in his regular form, this occurance is unknown wether it was his death or if he just teleported from one place to the other

wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Jocelin}} {{Character|name=Jocelin||relatives=Cap’n Crunch|affiliation=Seal team six|occupation=Burger King employee (Very wise)|(very wise) marital=|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|species=|gender=Female (Probably)|height=6 sauces|weight="about 8"|eyes=|firstappears=Season 2 Episode 6
"Wisdom of Borgers and Onon Ring"|image=Jocelin.png|imagecaption=Do you want fries with that?|aliases=That guy from Burger King|marital=Single|fur=Black|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Swiss}}}}'''Jocelin''' is a black cat that appears in the Silly Cats series, who is first encountered at a Burger King by [[Jinx]]. Jocelin is a wise cat that supplies wisdom to the main characters in times of need. No one knows why Jocelin is working at a Burger King with all of their wisdom. == In show == Jocelin appears as a mentor for Jinx and the crew, providing words of encouragement in times of need. Jocelin first appears in Season 2, Episode 6 "Wisdom of Borgers and Onon Ring", where they give advice about dealing with the past to Jinx. They also sell burgers and fries. Jocelin then takes a day of leave and joins the main cast for an adventure. [[B.A.D]] then encounters Jocelin in the fourth episode of Season 3 "B.A.D. vs Burger King." In the episode Jocelin sells onion rings to [[The Sitter]], against the orders of the rest of the villains. == Personality == They are wise, but (mostly) takes no sides. == Trivia == * Jocelin was originally supposed to appear in the final episode of Season 3, but that version was scrapped. * Jocelin made an appearance in [[Silly Cats: Babies]], outside of a Burger King in Season 1, Episode 2. * In [[Silly Dogs]] a canine version of Jocelin was supposed to appear, but it was scrapped. * Jocelin weighing "about 8" was a joke made by one of the animators for [[Silly Cats: Babies]] (She requested adding Jocelin) when asked about their weight. This is the only reference to Jocelin's weight known.

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Jinx|aliases=BigFootJinx
The Fourth Knight|relatives=Maxwell (Brother) Zoom zinger (uncle) Luna (aunt) bat cat (uncle)|affiliation=The GOODings|occupation=Military chief of the GOODings & 3KHURA|marital=Single|birthDate=unknown|birthPlace=Silly Country|deathDate=|deathPlace=|species=|Gender=|height=5 Sauces|weight=12 Sauces|EyeColor=|portrayedby=|appearsin=|debut=|gender=Female|eyes=|image=jinx.png|twitter=bigfootjinx|instagram=bigfootjinx|tiktok=bigfootjinx|youtube=bigfootjinx3182|firstappears=The Adventure Begins!|breed=Domestic Short Hair|fur=Black|lastappears=the showdown Pt2|imagecaption=My name's Jinx, bucko. If you think I'll surrender, then you're dead wrong.|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{American}}}} '''Jinx''' is the main character of '''Silly Cats.''' She's a black cat with characteristic large, bulging pale-green eyes and ballerina feet. Jinx is the sister of [[Maxwell]], the nephew of Bat Cat, Zoom Zinger, and Aunt Luna. She is also the leader of The G.O.O.Dings and 3KHURA, a small rebel army that specializes in tactical guerilla warfare, and operated within the wars of Silly and Unsilly. == Personality == Jinx has a very rowdy and upfront personality, and can have very strong mood swings. She is determined in everything despite it. == Biography == ''This takes place within the Second timeline, which happens after the True timeline.'' === Early and later life === Jinx was born into wealth and the youngest of 92 cats and kitty’s she was her parents least favorite, and due to her parents not wanting her she was abandoned alongside her brother Maxwell. one day jinx and Maxwell went their separate ways after an argument about their parents jinx went back to silly town only to find her parents had moved away jinx alone and scared wandered silly town until meeting milly and her friends === Amends === jinx later met up with her brother Maxwell to make amends and teamed up to beat the beast === Fighting B.A.D. === One day, when Maxwell visited Jinx's home, Jinx invited him to sleep in her bedroom. She woke him up in the middle of the night to play outside as they used to as children. They quickly discovered smoke billowing from up in the woods behind the house. When climbing it, they met Future Kitty, sitting fancily ion a branch,who told them about their mission. From this point on, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty would work together to stop different criminals in Silly City. They were able to travel to Silly City thanks to Brainless, who would later become their getaway driver on multiple occasions, despite not associating with the G.O.O.Dings or the later formed 3KHURA army. ==== Drum Accelerator retrieval ==== Their first mission involved retrieving E. Scrunk's drum accelerator project from an agent of B.A.D, Babem. The drum accelerator was stolen by an agent of B.A.D earlier. B.A.D planned to use the drum accelerator as part of the Project Beastenator to create a weapon to harness The Beast's energy, specifically to fund a part for the Beastenator 200. Jinx would refer to Carlos, who said it would be transferred at the harbour nearby his shop at night to avoid any attention. They would spy in on the mission. Bat Cat transferred at the harbour the drum accelerator to Babem. After the espionage, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty were able to beat up Babem in a fight, and retrieve the drum accelerator as well as Babem to E. Scrunk's offices. Babem would later agree to stop working for B.A.D, wherein for the rest of the story he would disassociate from his previous life. On their way back on the subway, they would meet Floppa, and subsequently be chased through the train by Evil Cat, who was sent immediately to assasinate them. This assasination attempt would fail, and Jinx and Maxwell were able to become friends with Floppa on the mission to the subway. ==== Incident at Ristle Cave ==== The day after the event, Future Kitty invited Jinx and Maxwell to head to Ristle Cave. Earlier that morning, in a battle between Billy and Bentley, Billy released the Beast and The Yeast from their sleep in Ristle Cave, and they ran out. B.A.D agents were sent to collect information there. When they headed there, after their cover was blown, Future Kitty killed both of the B.A.D agents in cold blood. He sustained a shoulder injury that would give him a steel shoulder cap that was given to him by Edward later that day. === Prophecy === Jinx was told both by Future Kitty and by Edward that she was dictated by The Prophecy that she will save the world from Unsilly. Edward gave her the Amulet of Luck, and gave Maxwell the Black Book of Silly Magic. This amulet is thought to be why she succeeded so much during her battles and was able to do the impossible things she did. ==== Stopping an attack on Axleland ==== Jinx and Maxwell went to Axleland some days after. They met Floppa and Milly, where Jinx reunited with Milly and they headed to get some fish wraps from Bongo's shop. The second attack on Silly City's Axleland would happen subsequently after Ah So Cat or Insam set fire to the Silly City circus. Jinx and her friends would hide in the garden, until which Future Kitty came to the amusement park, and gave them weapons, which they used to fight off the clowns in a rapid gunfight. They were not able to stop the leaders of the revolt, Demetrius P. Dinklebottom, Pobis, or Kiw, but they stopped a good amount of the bloodshed. === Participation in the wars of Silly and Unsilly === After her fighting against B.A.D, Jinx organized her friends Edward, E. Scrunk, Maxwell, Floppa, and Milly to create The G.O.O.Dings. They began relocating to different warehouse, such as Bentley's barn. There, Jinx created the 3 Knights Honorary United Rebel Army, (3KHURA), an army made to fight against B.A.D's support from the Bingustan army. This army would include kitties like Zoom Zinger, her uncle, and Doo Doo Fart, a great soldier and weapons expert. For the entirety of the war, Jinx became the military chief of 3KHURA, leading directions and strategies in the army. She led the G.O.O.Dings in battles against both the temporary threat of the Gnarp Gnaplians, as well as their permanent enemy, Gakster. She was also able to establish alliances with the Gnarp Gnaplians and Eeperija. During the final part of the war, Jinx relocated near Plimpus' cabin in Eeperija. Plimpus would forge the Tooth into a sword, and handed it to Jinx. She would train with this sword, until they were ambushed by B.A.D forces. In the final battle against B.A.D, Jinx mounted Plimpus' horse, and used the sword forged from the Beast's tooth given to her by Plimpus to swoop in and kill The Beast, and she saved the world from evil. == Silly Gallery == File:Jinx.png File:Jinx confrentation.jpg|jinx in the silly cats movie File:Tot and jinx argue.jpg|jinx in the silly cats movie [[Category:Characters]]

She's a black cat with characteristic large, bulging pale-green eyes and ballerina feet. Jinx is the sister of Maxwell , the nephew of Bat Cat, Zoom Zinger, and Aunt Luna. She is also the leader of The G.O.O.Dings and 3KHURA, a small rebel army that specializes in tactical guerilla warfare, and operated within the wars of Silly and Unsilly. She is determined in everything despite it. Biography [ ] This takes place within the Second timeline, which happens after the True timeline. Early and later life [ ] Jinx was born into wealth and the youngest of 92 cats and kitty’s she was her parents least favorite, and due to her parents not wanting her she was abandoned alongside her brother Maxwell. one day jinx and Maxwell went their separate ways after an argument about their parents jinx went back to silly town only to find her parents had moved away jinx alone and scared wandered silly town until meeting milly and her friends Amends [ ] jinx later met up with her brother Maxwell to make amends and teamed up to beat the beast Fighting B.A.D. [ ] One day, when Maxwell visited Jinx's home, Jinx invited him to sleep in her bedroom. She woke him up in the middle of the night to play outside as they used to as children. They quickly discovered smoke billowing from up in the woods behind the house. When climbing it, they met Future Kitty, sitting fancily ion a branch,who told them about their mission. From this point on, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty would work together to stop different criminals in Silly City. OFC’s Best Supporter|affiliation=[[SlyTV]]|occupation=News report|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=London, Great Britain|marital=Divorced|gender=Male|breed=Domestic Shorthair|fur=Black and white|height=8 sauces|weight=89 sauces|firstappears=Curious For Information|lastappears=Always wanted to know more first}} '''Johntavion''' is one the most infamous yappers in the Silly Cats universe, He works for SlyTV as a news reporter covering global events like war and was one of the cats responsible for the ofc scandal; After said scandal he was sent to jail and was divorced by his unknown wife He is known to be alive however after “Always wanting to know more first”, He never appeared again in the series causing theories surrounding him == Appearances == === Silly Cats === He appeared in 2 SlyTV related episodes where he yapped about a terrorist attack in ‘Curious for Information’ and later invited the GOODings to check out the studios. In ‘Always wanted to know more first’ he was partly responsible for the OFC scandal with his defense in court being “I read the scrips of the company you moron” which got him arrested along with other members of SlyTV == Biography == WIP

title: Jose

infobox.imagecaption: The shot of when he tells them about the gem

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Jose|image=Jose.png|imagecaption=The shot of when he tells them about the gem|aliases=None|status={{Deceased}}|relatives=Timmy (son)|affiliation=The GOODings|occupation=Bartender|birthDate=1-15-2004|birthPlace=Chihuahua, Mexico|deathDate=Unknown|deathPlace=The bar he works at|marital=None|gender=Male|breed=Tabby|fur=Orange|height=9 Sauces|weight=63 Sauces|firstappears=A Little Break|lastappears=Investigation INC.|nationality={{Mexican}}}}{{Stub}}

Jose is a major character in the "Time To Rest.." arc.

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Jose is a major character in the "Time To Rest..." arc, joining the goodings after a time-skip, and gets murdered (womp womp).

=== Silly Cats: Babies ===
Jose was supposed to act as a caretaker to the main cast, as you can see in all the scripts, beta episodes, and early meetings.

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
Jose is an early mission, only asking for 5 Silly Bucks because he forgot his wallet.

=== Call of Kitty: Silly Ops ===
Jose is part of [[The GOODings|The Goodings]] in the war, with him being a healer mostly.

== Biography ==
Jose was born in Chihuahua, Mexico, or as he was told the "Heart of Mexico".  He moved to the USA with his dream of opening a bar, he didn't realize how much work it would take, and ended up almost going bankrupt from the competition, so later, he moved to Silly City.  He bought a used food van and gave it make-over to fit the theme.  He travelled all over, until deciding a spot. he took out a loan and bought out a building, naming it "Taste of Mexico".  After an amazing 5 years, he sees the main cast come in, they order drinks, and sit down.  They all get along well, and Jose decides to stick around.  After a time skip [[Maxwell]] asks jose to join [[The GOODings]], which he accepts.  He later left his bar to his son, Timmy,  Since he needed some money he took a part-time job to clean a train, not realizing that it was the train that was the [[The Meowtic Express|Meowtic Express]] train, since he didnt go.  after a few seconds of cleaning, he is killed off-screen by a hooded figure.

== Trivia ==
Jose is an alcoholic

title: Insam
wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Insam}}
{{Character|name=Insam|aliases=Insane Sam, Sam|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=|occupation=Archrival|marital=None|birthDate=30 April 1921|birthPlace=Somewhere in Silly City|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=5 sauces|weight=6 sauces|eyes=White|appearsin=Some episodes|debut=The prison|image=Insam.gif|status={{Alive}}|imagecaption=Insam struggling to keep his eyes open|breed=Tabby|fur=Orange and white|firstappears=Archrivals|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 3}}
'''Insam''' serves as a minor antagonist in the [[Silly Cats]] TV series. He was partly responsible for the [[Silly City Circus Burning]]. He has been declared medically insane. He is also the archrival of [[Ah So Cat]].

== Biography ==
Insam was first born in Silly City during the middle of an economic boom. [[Uncle|Uncle's]] new casino chain had brought Silly City tons of fortune. Insam was not a quick learner. It took him three years to open his eyes, and he struggles with this to this day. Insam was a favorite among his peers because he would always have snacks for the hungriest of his schoolmates. This caused him to leave school with an inflated ego. Insam then tried becoming a lawyer but he failed across the board by the time the first year ended. He dropped out and was left jobless.

Insam was bored, sitting on a park bench. He wanted money so he could buy a cool motorcycle he saw in a shop window. When he saw it, he knew he had to have it. The robust engine, the comfy cushion for a seat, and the gold finishes. He drooled at the thought of it. In the meantime, he needed to find a job to fulfill this dream. He looked for jobs all throughout Silly City, but the only job he could land was a job at MeowDonald's. The job was minimum wage but he was poorly versed in money, so he did not care. He worked at the establishment for three years. Nothing significant happened during this time, although he had seen a [[The Fry Stealer|tiny white kitten]] try to steal food out of the garbage. He was still did not have enough money to pay for the motorcycle, so he had to resort to more desperate options.

Insam approached the decrepit warehouse. It was damp and smelled like mold. The ceiling tiles littered the floor as the support beams holding them up had been eroded by the rain. He wandered to the back of the mansion and opened a hatch leading to the basement. The basement was in stark contrast to the decaying warehouse. It was well-lit and the smell of warm pasta wafted its way down the corridor that Insam was walking through. He entered the main room and it resembled an Italian restaurant. Insam sat at the opposite side of a table of a peculiar kitty. He wore a silky suit and wore a neat bowtie. The kitty, who was a bit heavy-set, introduced himself as [[Gentleman]]. He asked Insam what brought him here on such short notice. Insam explained that he needed cash. Gentleman obliged but said it was gonna cost him.

Insam, unaware of the consequences of his actions, excitedly ran to the motorbike store. He was left speechless as the deed to the motorcycle was handed to another kitty. The kitty's name was Ah So Cat. This would start Insam and Ah So Cat's infamous rivalry. Insam was outraged. He picked up a stone and threw it through the display window. They then proceeded to engage in a fist fight. Ah So Cat expertly dodged Insam's strikes and returned a punch to Insam's face. Insam was knocked out cold. Ah So Cat then made his getaway. Months later, Insam heard a knock of the door of his apartment. When he opened the door, he was met with three burly cats. Insam asked them what they were doing there. Suddenly, he was ambushed and kidnapped. He was brought back to Gentleman's lair. Gentleman asked him where his money was, and Insam replied by throwing a pipe bomb at him. In there pranks on each other, Insam and Ah So Cat had made regular trips to stores with explosives. The explosion killed three of the guards. Insam then ran and left Gentleman in a daze. At that moment, Gentleman called off the hit, saying it was too dangerous to go after him.

Insam and Ah So Cat continued to violently prank each other from then on. Sometimes, they got a little risky, but most of the time, the didn't harm the public. This wouldn't last for long though. Insam had received a letter from a kitty he knew very little, [[Axle the Kitty]]. It said that Ah So Cat was going to be at [[Sillyton Adventureland]], at the circus celebration. Insam thought that he had just found gold, so he went over to the park and prepared to attack Ah So Cat. It turned out that Ah So Cat had also received a similar letter telling him to be there. They began their normal pranks, which consisted of throwing tomatoes and pie at each other. Their pranks soon began to become more dangerous. They even started tying a bunch of balloons to each other and watching them float in the sky. Luckily, both of them brought lighters, so they burn the balloons and fall back down. Their fighting soon winded up in the circus tent in the back. They were next to a bunch of fireworks. Unfortunately, Insam had brought a pipe bomb and he chucked it at Ah So Cat. This caused the fireworks to ignite and explode. The tent caught fire and it soon became known as the Silly City Circus Burning.

The fire went on for hours. Insam and Ah So Cat went into hiding. They were eventually questioned, but they avoided all the questions. They were released but the burning still caused other problems. Two sides formed, one supporting Ah So Cat and the other supporting Insam. The ones who supported Ah So Cat called themselves the Sorrowers and the side that supported Insam called themselves the Insane Army. They started fighting and it soon became the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], which also included many other armies. Insam and Ah So Cat wanted no part in the fighting, so they hid inside an abandoned military bunker that was initially owned by the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. They had picked the same bunker which they were less than happy with. Although, there was enough food in the bunker to last them a few years. For now, they had to live with their situation.

At first, they refused to talk to each other. But then, they finally decided to settle their differences. Ah So Cat apologized for ruining Insam's dream and Insam apologized for being so violent. They made up and they became friends. They were later discovered by SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces) troops and captured. They were put under arrest. They waited to be persecuted. The Treaty of Silly City stated that Insam and Ah So Cat be persecuted in federal court instead of civilian court, since they were partly responsible for starting the war. They were both sentenced to life in prison. They spend their days in the same cell to this day.

== Trivia ==

* Insam is a combination in between "Insane" and "Sam", which is his real name (Not to be confused with the the other [[Sam]]).
* He hates tuna
* He likes Solitaire
* He is one of the world's top experts on how a pipe bomb works{{Top|Canon}}

Trivia [ ] Insam is a combination in between "Insane" and "Sam", which is his real name (Not to be confused with the the other Sam ). He hates tuna He likes Solitaire He is one of the world's top experts on how a pipe bomb works
