title: Hinkle Dinkle
wikitext:
{{Top|Canon}} {{Character|name=Hinkle Dinkle|image= idek.png|Original HinkleDinkle.png|Clear Image ||status=Missing, presumed alive|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=The B.A.D|birthDate=?/?/1982|birthPlace=Unknown|gender=Male|breed=Tabby|fur=Brown|height=11 sauses|weight=15 sauses|firstappears=Silly City|nationality={{Australian}}|imagecaption=Close up of Hinkle Dinkle, in loaf form|aliases=The Mystery Man, Loafy|occupation=(presumed) High member of B.A.D|marital=Unknown|lastappears=A robbery in 2012, never seen again}} {{Stub}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Hinkle_Dinkle}}
'''A moment of silence for the end of this wiki'''
'''Hinkle Dinkle''' is a side character, known for his very tall figure. He turned to evil and decided to join [[B.A.D]] later on. Most of his motives, robberies, wherabouts and involvement in B.A.D is very speculated, as he seemed to be very secretive and most of the things about him are only theorised. It is said he was a supporting figure in the bombing of [[World's Champion Staring Contest|The World's Champion Staring Contest]], but this is unknown. He liked to steal and has a small bounty before he disappeared around 2012. He had a bounty of S฿350,000. ==Appearances== ===Silly Cats=== In the show, he appeared first as a side character in [[Silly Town]], selling produce. Later on in the show, it repeatedly hints on Hinkle Dinkle turning evil, even showing him in the background of Season 3, which also shows that he might have been a part of the bombing at The Worlds Champion Staring Contest, but it's only a theory. It also showed him robbing some stores in the background, and showed him on a bounty board, before he disappeared all together. He hasn't been seen in the show since. ===Silly Cats: Online=== He appeared as a NPC at the start of the game, near the middle of Silly Town. He gae you the option to start a side-quest to find all his missing produce around town as fast as possible. If completed in under a minute, you would be awarded with 4000 Silly Bucks. If you didn't find all the produce in time, he wouldn't give you anything. The quest is repeatable if you failed. Surprisingly, he never showed up later on in the game as a theif, or was mentioned again. In the forest, you can find a non accessible hut that is called "Hinkle Hut", which shows that Hinkle Dinkle might live there in the forest. ==Biography== Warning!! Biography was pieced together by mostly theories and speculation, eg his birth and early life, dates and times, involvement with B.A.D, but it is as close as possible to the truth. Born at a unknown time and place in 1982, Hinkle Dinkle's parents were killed by an unknown cause, early in his life. He started growing up as an orphan, around the age of 9. He lived on the streets until he found a pile of produce, where he decided to start selling yummy fruits and veggies at a stall. Here, he seemed to be a functioning citizen of Silly Town. He also was known as a very big cat, being 11 sauces tall. But, after some strange side effects of his customers, it was discovered that his stall products were illegally sourced and contained illegal substances. He was doing this so the produce tasted super good so he had no competition and could make a monopoly off of his products, and he clearly gained a lot of money off doing this. He was also found evading taxes, which also increased his monopoly income. As the citizens of Silly Town found out about this, and before he could get caught, he seemingly disappeared off the streets at 1999, never showing up to sell produce again. He from there, armed with a lot of money, joined B.A.D somewhere around 2000, and according to a B.A.D cat, bribed a little money to join also. He moved from Silly Town to [[Places|Silly City]] at this time. From there, he was involved with armed robberies, vandalism, gang fights and more crimes also for the next year. As he became less and less spotted by citizens, his role at B.A.D seemed to increase, as he was seemingly involved with bigger crimes, such as the bombing of The World Champion Staring Contest, and maybe even the [[11/2 Attack]] (heavily speculated). He was also in involvement with the [[Meowswagen AI Scandal]] in 2005, which was confirmed. Then, in 2007, he was found guilty of the [[Methane Mine Explosion]] in Russia, where he released large amounts of methane into the mine, triggering an explosion and killing 110 innocent cats. Here was when his bounty was increased to a mass total of S฿350,000. Then, soon after, Hinkle Dinkle made a strange choice and bought stocks and shares of the failing company "Silly Drinks Co", reviving it somehow. With his shares in the company, he helped set up a shop for the company in Silly City, where the shop sold "[[Silly Fizz]]" He became one of the main investors in the company, and with the success of the company, gained a undisclosed (but high) amount of cash back. He most likely did this so he could get profit from the success of the business. After a few more years of crime, Hinkle Dinkle dissapeared from the streets and all crimes suddenly in 2012, and wasn't seen again, and wasn't mentioned by B.A.D again either. In the end, Hinkle Dinkle was too silly for there own good leading them to become B.A.D. The Silly Drinks company still runs today, despite Hinkles dissapearance, and is under new managment. It is shown by the mysterious wooden hut in the forest, that Hinkle Dinkle might be hiding away in the forest, as the hut is suspiciously named "Hinkle Hut". So far, no investigations have been started, possibly due to Hinkle being dangerous A piece of graffiti appeared on a wall of a building in Silly City. It simply read: "the end is near, we must say goodbye". Paw Prints that match Hinkle Dinkle's were identified on the same wall. I wonder what it means? ==Trivia== *Hinkle Dinkle once stole exactly 100 cabbages, and only six were found again. *Hinkle Dinkle has the power to turn into a very believable loaf form. *A rift has formed, I wonder where it leads. [[File:Cuh Portal.png|left|100px|link=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Hinkle_Dinkle]]

==Biography==
When '''Juice Cat''' was just a child, an unknown cat came up to him and gave him a skateboard and a bottle of juice. The unknown cat remarked that Juice cat was destined for greatness and left. Years later, Juice cat, now a master at skating, has been recognised by all of the Silly Cat Universe for helping make Silly City a better place and being able to keep the juice on the board as he skates.

In 2010, Juice Cat founded the line of skating products, [[SillySkating Co.]] to help [[The GOODings]] fight for good and to spread his love for skating

Juice Cat's Juice is his most prized possession and to this day, he is still searching for the unknown cat that gave them the juice. Upon finding them, Juice cat will reward the unknown cat with their greatest thanks.

Juice Cat is one of the first cats to contact the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]]. He contacted them in the episode 'Alien Skaters' where he negotiated a trade deal with them to introduce skating to their planet. Juice Cat sometimes goes to [[Planet K.I.T.Y]] (in a space suit) because he is the embassador to Silly earth.

title: Kitler

{{Warning|Nazi Party}}{{Parody|[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adolf_Hitler Adolf Hitler], [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_II World War II]}} {{Top|Canon}}[[Kattlof Kitler]] {{Character|name=Kattlof Kitler|image=Kitler.png|imagecaption=Official potrait, 1938|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{Austrian}}|aliases=Meow Furrer|affiliation=Nationalsozialistische Deutsche Katzenpartei (NDKP)
Cat Workers' Party (CWP)|occupation=Making Pawrope better, and doing awesome backflips!|birthDate=20 April 1901|firstappears=Prologue|lastappears=Prologue|birthPlace=Austria-Hunger|deathDate=30 April 1984|deathPlace=Furrerbunker, Germany|marital=Single|gender=Male|fur=White & Black|breed=Khao Manee|height=6 sauces|weight=14 sauce}}{{Stub}} '''Kattlof Kitler''', originally known as '''Kitten von Whiskerpaw''', was an '''Austrian-born German silly politician''' who became the '''de facto leader''' in the Silly Cat Universe from 1969 until his death in 1984. As the supreme ruler, Kattlof Kitler was known for his distinctive mustache, charismatic purring, and a penchant for napping in sunlit windows. ==Political Career== As a charismatic advocate for feline rights, Kattlof Kitler played a pivotal role in the formation of the Cat German Workers' Party (CGWP). His causes ranged from equal access to sunbeams to improved cardboard box bunker, and the unrestricted distribution of catnip. In 1933, Kattlof Kitler, de facto leadership of the CGWP, adopting the title "Furrer. Under his rule, the CGWP focused on enhancing the well-being of all cats, emphasizing play, relaxation, and the pursuit of feathered prey. Kattlof Kitler's leadership style, characterized by a whimsical demeanor, resonated with a significant portion of the feline population, showcasing a unique blend of silliness and deeper narrative elements. ==Silly War== ===Meowswagen Deal=== In the 1970s, Kattlof Kitler became intrigued by Meowswagen, a cat-driven car company founded by Bert when he was just 16. Bert's journey from a steam engine prototype, destroyed by his cousin, to a revolutionary design captured Kattlof Kitler's attention. In an attempt to make a deal, Kattlof Kitler approached the CEO of Meowswagen, proposing a partnership. However, facing resistance, Kattlof Kitler, known for his impulsive nature, threatened the CEO with sending the feline army to destroy and bomb all existing dealerships and factories if the contract was not accepted. Faced with this ultimatum, the CEO had no choice but to agree to Kattlof Kitler's terms. The ensuing contract led to a period of collaboration between Kattlof Kitler and Meowswagen. Meowswagen started to build tanks and heavy vehicles to support the NDKP takeover. Kattlof Kitler's CGWP played a central role in these antics, attempting to establish a feline empire across the continent. ==Death== Kattlof Kitler's life took a tragic turn during a public speech when he attempted suicide. Knowing he would lose to the Soviet Union demeanor, Kattlof Kitler's suicide went how it was intended to wrong leading to death. The attempt, meant to showcase that he lost. Despite immediate medical attention from skilled silly healthcare professionals, Kattlof Kitler succumbed to his injuries, leading to death. The untimely demise shocked the world, marking the end of an era characterized by Kattlof Kitler's distinctive leadership style and the intriguing blend of silliness and darker themes. Adolf Kattlof Kitler is the cat behind the todger slapping as he sent many cats to catsentration camps to watch their food being slapped with a todger everyday. He is truly the most evil cat to ever exist.

==Appearances==
KFC Bucket Cat is a White [[Silly Cats|Silly Cat]] with brown spots. He has a charismatic posture and a typical cat size. He is neither fat or too skinny thanks to his diet based on tenders with BBQ sauce in his bucket. He maintains a royal and divine position. He continuously works on his abs.

==Biography==
KFC Bucket Cat is a cosmic cat that was created during the Big Bang. He was the voice that gave Colonel Sanders the idea for KFC. Thanks to him, millions of people around the world can enjoy KFC. With his bucket throne, he gains unimaginable powers and is capable of generating tenders infinitely.

==Trivia==
KFC Bucket Cat is :

*Charismatic
*Genius
*Unstoppable
*Secret Creator of KFC
*Silly

}}'''KittyOh''' is a gigantic cat, recently discovered by a group of silyentists (silly+scientists). she is about 2.1 universes heavy.
==Biography==
KittyOh was created in the multiverse, it is unknown who created her, but all we know that she is created by by an unknown anomaly, after a few months the anomaly who created her left to do a task, so KittyOh waited, and waited, and waited, and waited. It seems to be that they left her forever, days turned into weeks, weeks turned into months. She couldn't wait much longer so she also left. KittyOh was dying of starvation, she explored the multiverse until he found something, a glowy egg-shaped multicolored thing. She thought it was an actual egg, so she took a bite. A portion of the "egg" was bitten, "Why does it taste so static-like?" said KittyOh, but her hunger couldn't resist, she took another bite, but right after she took another bite, something grabbed her, KittyOh turned around to find '''Him.''' KittyOh was scared, the thing that grabbed her pulled her closer to his face. she closed his eyes to accept her fate, until... The strange thing petted him, KittyOh thought she was in danger, but in reality she was saved. he took KittyOh to a place looking like the universe he took a bite before, but a lot bigger, He placed KittyOh in the big universe and saw what looks like a replica of a regular house. KittyOh explored the place a bit, until she found a glowing sign that said "CaseOh". She realized that the guy who grabbed him was named CaseOh, "Are you hungry little fella?" said CaseOh, KittyOh pulled out a thumbs up, so CaseOh gave her a bowl of food, KittyOh Took a bite. she loved it. To this day, KittyOh still lives in this person's home.

==Trivia==

*It is theorized that the strange anomaly who created her was [[Glinkert]], but this is still unconfirmed.
*KittyOh loves food.
*Her real name is Jinx. This is not to be confused with the other [[Jinx]].

title: Kiw

infobox.name: Kiw
infobox.appearsin: Many episodes after whos this, War of silly and unsilly
infobox.imagecaption: Kiw after he eated the lemons

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Kiw|aliases=Lemon Eatid|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Evildoer
Beast Worshipper|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Silly Town|deathDate=|deathPlace=The battleground|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=5 Sauces|weight=6 Sauces|eyes=Black|appearsin=Many episodes after whos this, War of silly and unsilly|debut=Whos this?|image=Kiw.png|imagecaption=Kiw after he eated the lemons|status={{Deceased}}|fur=White|firstappears=Who's This?|lastappears=The War of Silly and Unsilly|breed=American shorthair (probably)}} Kiw is a white cat who was an evil cat before being killed by [[Maxwell]]. == Biography == Kiw was born a normal kitten. Being born in the quiet suburbs of Silly Town. Kiw was a happy and jolly kitten at first. He would donate to charities and participate in food drives at his local school. That is he would make a big mistake. He saw a lemon, unprotected, on a table. Kiw took a bite. This is when Kiw's life turned sour. The lemon was so sour,it changed him, he turned evil. Kiw would start to worship [[The Beast]] and his evil after eating the lemon. That's when Kiw decided to join The Beast in his rampage. Kiw would kill thousands of innocent kitties on his rampage. Later, Kiw found an innovative way to kill more people. He discovered the [[Baby Kiwi Kitten]]. During testing, he noted that the kittens would devour everything in their path, and that they would lay eggs rapidly in large batches. Kiw made an army and unleashed it upon the world. [[The GOODings]] were enraged by Kiw's evil. And during The War of the Silly and Unsilly, he was killed ( in a very silly way )with a party popper by Maxwell. Kiw was defeated, but the path of destruction he left behind can still be seen today. Kiw currently resides in Heck, overseen by the [[Grinwatcher]]. There is potential that he could escape. So be wary and lock your doors, because it's possible Kiw could come for you...{{Top|Canon}} == Trivia == * He can throw a lemon farther than any other * He hates lemons * His kill count is exactly 5,323, no more, no less * His archrival is [[Grinwatcher/Right Hand Smiles|Right Hand Smiles]], whom he has been fighting for the past 5 centuries [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deceased]]

'''Kyky''' is the younger sister of [[Dr. Silly Willy]] and his number 2 user of lobotomies, (with the number 1 being Dr. Silly himself).
she is very fat as she doesn't stop eating, but that has actually helped her as now she is even cuter :3
she works as a model in the advertisement industry and has helped Dr. Silly before for his ad campaigns against other lobotomers.
with the numerus lobotomies she's had She can still have an healthy live even wile being a '''THICK''' boi.

==growing up==
WIP
Her modeling career started when she was only 2 months old, She was one of the cutest little kitty around, And she loved it. Kyky always lived in a pretty luxurious lifestyle but never forgot about the less fortunate than her, Like her brother, She would often volunteer in shelters or at the LoBoToMy Center, Where she would also often find her brother, Dr. Silly Willy, Working there.

Her modeling career (As previously stated) Started when she was just a little kitty. Her parents thought she was the cutest little cat in the world, And the internet agreed! Her post on sillytok would always get millions of likes like it was nothing. She would grow up to always be the popular kid even though it had its ups and downs, she was happy with that life. With he being so popular, of course she would get a lot of silly bucks for all her partnership with clothing brands and even her own TV show. She gave a lot of than money to the rest of her family. and with that said money, Dr. Silly Willy would make his own company
[[LoBoToMy Central]].
==Lobotomies==
A lot of these lobotomies were made for her to stay heathy even wile being such a '''thick''' boi, But like everybody she also goes to lobotomies for health problems like brain damage, internal bleeding or death. All those lobotomies made her even more popular by making her fur more soft and dense and made publicity for LoBoToMy Central™. In all her lifetime she only had one failed lobotomy were she wanted to have longer Whiskers but instead lost one.

==Appearances==
Her first appearance was in the episode <nowiki>''Ad break'' where we can see her brother'</nowiki>s (Dr. Silly)  famous ad campaign, With her as the main character. In the next episodes we learned more about the LoBoToMy Center. A few episodes later we encountered the Goober Guys in <nowiki>''</nowiki>Goober Guys<nowiki>''</nowiki> and that what the last time we saw of her in the series at least. Her own show is still going strong.
==Trivia==

* Her favorite game to play with her brother was "Find the catnip" on the New Game Wii Xbox PS5 series X U 3ds oled XL colour & watch™.
* She writes the dots on the <nowiki>''i''</nowiki> with a heart.
* She likes rolling down hills as fast as she can, She even made an official race for it. But no one ever comes, Maybe one day.Note

Status Alive Nationality Nazi German Aliases Cat Occupation Swimming Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth 7 September 1941 In a bunker in Berlin Marital Status Single Physical Description Gender Breed Male Pantherette Height Weight 4 sauces 11 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance Is It a Fish? Mother Sea This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! Ludwig was born in the 2nd world war. he signed to the navy when he was very, very young. He survived the sinking of countless ships and destroyed countless ships aswell. When he destroyed his 5000th ship, he won the Iron cross in 1942. But after that, Ludwig started to have sight problems. In order to win the war, Kitler himself assigned the best doctors in all of Germany to heal Ludwig. However, the allied powers captured him and the doctors. They held them hostage for several months until finally Ludwig escaped! He swam and swam all the way to kitty city and now he resides near the lake. In the war of silly and unsilly he decided to try and fight for the beast in an attempt to gain power, however he was personally killed by Pusha with a pew-pewSH smg in the early days of the war. After his passing, Kitler revived him by “german science”

==Biography==
Levi Caterman, known as "kittenanity's strongest soldier" was not always this way. Levi Caterman started as a homeless kitten, fighting for his life in the underground. At birth, his mother died from poor health, leaving him underground struggling to survive. Eventually, a relative of his, Kenny Caterman took him in, without telling Levi he was his mother's brother. The thing is, Kenny Caterman was a mass murderer, and had killed hundreds of Interior Cat Police (ICP) officers. Kenny, being a mass murderer, immediatly taught Levi to use a knife properly, sparking his eventual military career.

Levi grew up to be an adult, and was in a kind-of gang, in which he was given the job to defeat Meowin Smith, leader of the Survey Cats. When Levi lost to Meowin, he was enraged, but Meowin congratulated him on his skill and offered him to join the Survey Cats, which Levi obliged. After many years of being in the Survey Cats, Levi was recognized as "kittenanity's strongest soldier," being, the strongest in the cats' fight against the humans outside the walls. Levi had taken down many titans without ever sustaining a major injury.

While this happened, a colossal human and armored human broke through Shiganshina district and into Wall Rose, evacuating everybody inside, many died. 

Many years after, the Scats (name for Survey Cats members) had lost all reputation. But then, a few catets from 104 joined the Survey Cats, this changed the course of Levi's life forever. The catets that joined were as followed; Mikasa Caterman, Eren Meowger, Armin Meowlert, Catmir, Reiner Meown, Berthold Meowwver,  Jean Meowschtein, Conny Meower, and Sasha Meows.

Apparently, catet Eren Meowger had the ability to turn into an intelligent human, and would help defend the cats from the humans.

Everything was fine, and all the catets were amazing soldiers, but then, an intelligent human attacked. Unlike the colossal and armored, this one was swift and able. It took out many soldiers in minutes, needing a retreat. Levi's squad, the most powerful squad, was wiped out, except for Eren Meowger and Levi. Eren Meowger took his human form to challenge the intelligent human, getting destroyed, but saved by Mikasa Caterman and Levi.

A couple days after, Armin Meowlert (Eren's best friend) figured that catet Annie Kittenheart was the intelligent human Eren fought (dubbed "female human"). 

The three best friend catets (Eren Meowger, Armin Meowlert, and Mikasa Caterman) were to be the ones to lure Annie Kittenheart into a tunnel, trapping her so they could defeat her. Annie realized their plan, though, and did not go into the tunnel. Annie activated her human powers and had to fight Eren. Eren ended up destroying Annie, but Annie's crystal defense mechanism made her impossible to kill, as she was permanently stuck in a crystal.

Nothing really happened for a while, except for Catmir's reveal as an intelligent human, Catmir ended up dying. Also with the reveal of Reiner Meown as the armored human, and Bertholdt Meowwver as the colossal human (there's also a monkey human!!!!!!!). Finally, the cats discovered their walls were made up of still colossal humans.*woahhhhhhhh*

God|status={{Alive}}|relatives=TallCat|affiliation=Unknown|occupation=Longing|birthDate=The Beginning of Time|birthPlace=The Void|marital=Could he really be able to?|gender=Male|breed=Unknown|fur=White|height=50 Sauces|weight=75 Sauces|firstappears=The story of long cat|lastappears=War of silly and unsilly Part 3 (in the credits)|nationality={{Italian}}}}

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
In Silly Cats Longcat acts as a protector of the universe, or God pretty much

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
In Silly Cats: Online Longcat is a final boss, having around 150,000,000hp.

=== Call of Kitty: Silly Ops ===
In Silly Ops Longcat can be seen out of bounds as a hacker detterent, blasting them with a BAN

== Biography ==
At the start of time, a blinding light engulfed the universe, forming Longcat.  Longcat was made before anything, so he was god in some sorts, even over [REDACTED].  He was the one to see [[Floppa]] and [[Photosynthesizing]] be created, along with all the planets.  Though he could not talk to them, he kept them safe, and that was enough. He was the one to everything and [[Characters|everyone]] get created by [REDACTED], but did not interfere, he was doing.. ''okay''.  Circa 1632, Catalileo discovered Longcat in space, but was said to be a myth.  People kept trying to believe it though, for some weird reason they ''needed'' it to be.  You remember that black hole image from the 2010s?  That's Longcats EYE, just his eye!  We still don't know when it will, but an event called "The Great Meow" will happen from Longcat meowing, ending the universe as we know it.

== Trivia ==
It is said that if he breathed on earth, it would get turned to dust. That's why he'll never visit it. it was confrimed in one of the final episodes is Silly Cats.

{{Character|name=Limecat|image=Armoured Cat.png|aliases="That one who died to bubbles" By floppa|status={{Deceased}}|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=The GOODings|occupation=Protecting the city|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|deathDate=2020|deathPlace=In bubble cats paws|marital=His wife is a widow|gender=Male|breed=Guard|fur=Orange|height=2 sauces|weight=3 sauces|firstappears=The battle|lastappears=Bubble cat attack|nationality={{American}}|imagecaption=Limecat is not pleased.}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Limecat}}

Limecat is a side character in silly cats. He is the son of [[Bentley]] and archrival of [[Bubble Cat]].

== Appearances ==
=== Silly Cats ===
Limecat appears in the [[Silly Cats]] universe as a side character but ally of [[The GOODings]]. He only appears for a short time, with his death occurring in season 3 during the height of the wars of silly and unsilly.

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
In [[Silly Cats: Online]], he will give you a quest to slay 30 Bubble Monsters for 500 Silly Bucks.

== Biography ==
Limecat was born to his father Bentley, and his mother was deceased upon birth. He grew up enamored with the legends of the angel guardian, [[Halo]]. Limecat however doesn't have any friends and would only play himself. His father, Bentley, was a farmer who grew watermelons on the farm which he owns.

One day, Limecat decided to use the shell of the lime to create a legendary helmet that he would use to defeat any foes with ease. He created it himself, but it would fall apart every 2 days. So he headed to [[E. Scrunk|E. Scrunk's]] office, of which he knew via the knowledge of the local fish farmer, [[Carlos]] (Carlos knows almost everybody and almost everything). At E. Scrunk's office, Limecat got his helmet repaired and upgraded, using a gelatinous adhesive form of catnip, which meant that it would survive all types of impacts whilst keeping his head intact.

Limecat searched in the heart of the city, boasting to everybody he saw about his new helmet. Eventually, he was pulled into jail for jaywalking, where he would meet Bubble Cat. Limecat was shortly bailed by his father to live back with him. Bubble Cat was very evil and decided to chase down Limecat. He would send letters to his address warning him of his 'wrath.' When Bentley heard about this, he locked Limecat in the barn. This was because [[Billy|Bubble Cat's father (Billy)]] was the long time archrival of Bentley, this followed even in their heritages.

Limecat escaped the barn and began searching for Bubble Cat. He would fight him multiple times, and they became archrivals, but in their last battle in the middle of the amusement park, Bubble Cat killed Limecat with a rebound blow of his bubbled up paws, causing him to die. [[Floppa]] saw this and decided to make a rap song attributed to Limecat's death.

== Personality ==
Limecat is very courageous and powerful, but often times extremely naive. He is hotheaded and not very intelligent. This led to his demise eventually.

== Trivia ==

* "His Armor came from the greatest armoury in the Silly Cats Universe, and costed 100,000 silly bucks. It's a shame all that money went to waste." -Floppa, in 'R.I.P. Limecat'

==Biography==

Juju was born in Awosia (Now known as the Juju Republic). He was and still is very good at math,chemistry and physics. He studied the war of silly and unsilly and heard about silly city and always wanted to go there. He saved all of his money just to go there. After he landed he met some famous cats and stayed in a hoted. Few days later he was kidnapped by a mysterious cat and got teleported to 1989, one year before the war. After a year Juju fought against B.A.D and after the war he bought sodas from diffrent cats and got kidnapped again back to when he was kidnapped. He thought about what happend and came back home.

== In real life ==
'''Luna''' is a cat who became a viral meme because she tends to make loud and crunchy sounds whenever she's eating dry food. 

She lives with four other cats: Elisa (2nd in charge, her bestie), Steffi (mom of Chico and Pablo), Chico (professional slapper) and Pablo (old man, great jawline). 

== In series ==
'''Luna''' also known as MonkeyCatLuna is a remarkable cat who faces the challenge of pica, an eating disorder where she consumes non-edible objects.

she also really likes eating uranium

she loves blepping

Luna is the best mukbanger, eating the moon in one of her videos.

Luna ate plutonium, because it has a candy-like taste. 

Luna is known for working with multiple silly cats to make their dream a crunchy reality.

Luna was once a playful and energetic kitten, full of curiosity and charm.

She lived in a cozy home with a loving family who adored her and showered her with affection.

However, tragedy struck one fateful night when a fire engulfed their house while the family was asleep.

Luna managed to escape the flames, but she lost her family in the blaze, leaving her traumatized and alone.

Scared and disoriented, Luna wandered the streets for days, searching for her family and a place to call home.

Hunger and exhaustion took their toll on Luna as she struggled to survive in the harsh world outside.

Eventually, Luna was taken in by a kind stranger who nursed her back to health, but the emotional scars remained.

Despite the newfound safety and care, Luna still carries the pain of her past, haunted by memories of the fire and the loss of her family.

Now, Luna is a timid and reserved cat, wary of forming attachments and always on edge, afraid of losing another home and family.

She would never ever be the same going down a dark path taking enough crunchium to put down the entire of Costa Rica and she still managed to survive.

That is how she got into organised crime and started helping silly cats making their crispy dreams a reality.

However, tragedy struck one fateful night when a fire engulfed their house while the family was asleep. Luna managed to escape the flames, but she lost her family in the blaze, leaving her traumatized and alone. Scared and disoriented, Luna wandered the streets for days, searching for her family and a place to call home. ==Biography==
Leonard was born in the Silly City Hospital. He was born to a rich family. When he was 3, his parents took him on a trip to Hawaii. He fell in love. He got a shirt from the trip and continues to wear it to this day. As Leonard grew, he knew more and more that he wanted to own a travel agency. When he was older, he finally got the opportunity and bought a plot in downtown Silly City. Leonard's business didn't get much visitors at first, but slowly, his business gained notoriety. Leonard would make bank from his business, and with his money, he would fund [[The GOODings]] in the War of Silly and Unsilly. He would also use a portion of the money to remodel his business. The new remodeled business allowed Leonard to make even more money. Leonard can still be found managing his travel agency today and he helps to book tickets to Hawaii and other destinations.

== Trivia ==

* His favorite place in the world is Hawaii. (Duh)
* He visits Hawaii once per year.
* Every time he visits he collects another Hawaiian shirt. He's currently at 15.

title: Mimsie
wikitext:
{{Top|Mythology}}{{Stub}}{{Character|name=Mimsie|image=Mimsie.png|imagecaption=The Legend, Mimsie|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{American}}|birthDate=January 1, 1968 (Presumed)|birthPlace=Unnamed Animal Shelter|breed=Tabby|height=6 sauces|weight=14 sauces|fur=Orange|gender=Female|deathPlace=Unknown|deathDate=c. June 1988}}

Mimsie was an Orange tabby cat that was seen on the MTM Enterprises logo from 1968-1988. She was known for her TV broadcasts and talk shows. She was also known for her news broadcasts on B.A.D. and The GOODings making fun of their rivalry, even mocking some members. Mimsie became world famous and won a Golden Yarn Ball award at Hillandsburg in 1976 and Released multiple films in her heyday. She was seen as a guest on a currently lost talk show from July 1978. On June 1988, She died from cancer.

title: Maxwell

infobox.name: Maxwell
infobox.relatives: Jinx(cousin), Bat cat(uncle), Aunt Luna(mother), Zoom Zinger(uncle)
infobox.occupation: Fighting B.A.D and leading executive directions for The G.O.O.Dings

wikitext:
{{Dead|Cause=intestinal issue that turned out to be cancer|Time=around early 2020|Source=https://imgur.com/gallery/h17IWnx}} == {{Top|Canon}}Rest in peace Maxwell == {{Character|name=Maxwell|aliases=*Jess (real name) *Phoenix Warrior |relatives=Jinx(cousin), Bat cat(uncle), Aunt Luna(mother), Zoom Zinger(uncle)|affiliation=The GOODings, 3KHURA|occupation=Fighting B.A.D and leading executive directions for The G.O.O.Dings|marital=Single|birthDate=2011|birthPlace=Unknown|deathDate=Early 2020|deathPlace=Melodia Cemetery|species=Tuxedo Cat|gender=Male|height=8 sauces|weight=12 sauces|eyes=Green|appearsin=|debut=|portrayedby=Eduardo Franco|image=Maxwell.png|fur=Bicolor|tiktok=bigoldbuns|firstappears=Wow, A New Member!|lastappears=War Of The Silly|Instagram=|status={{Deceased}}|breed=Tuxedo cat|imagecaption=One day, when all of this is over, I promise I'll make it up to you|nationality={{American}}}} '''Maxwell''' is the brother [[Jinx]], the nephew of Zoom Zinger, and Aunt Luna. He is a secondary character who helps Jinx and saves her when she cannot save herself. He is a cat with a black beard, and white belly, which is why he his thought to be part of The Prophecy, which dictated that the two cats must save the world from unsilly. He is the co-founder and secondary leader of The G.O.O.Dings. == Personality == Maxwell is very timid and sarcastic during the beginning of the series, but he begins to take control of his life and his fate alongside his sister, Jinx. == Biography == === Early life === Maxwell was born to Aunt Luna and her husband(who she later divorced) in a day during the second generation. He was raised in kindergarten, and attended a very prestigious school. Maxwell would often visit Jinx until Jinx's father died. He would later excell in his academics, and became a member of the honor roll in high school, and he would also find a scholarship to a very prestigious university. === Fighting B.A.D alongside Jinx === One day, when Maxwell visited Jinx, they slept in her bedroom. Jinx then woke him up to play outside. They found that a ball of smoke much like a crater came from the woods behind the house, and went to see it. That's when they found Future Kitty. Future Kitty told them they were part of The Prophecy, which states that they are the two kitties to save the world from unsilly. From then on, Maxwell and Jinx would go on to fight B.A.D in different operations. ==== Drum Accelerator retrieval ==== Their first mission involved retrieving E. Scrunk's drum accelerator project from an agent of B.A.D, Babem. The drum accelerator was stolen by an agent of B.A.D earlier. B.A.D planned to use the drum accelerator as part of the Project Beastenator to create a weapon to harness The Beast's energy, specifically to fund a part for the Beastenator 200. Jinx would refer to Carlos, who said it would be transferred at the harbour nearby his shop at night to avoid any attention. They would spy in on the mission. Bat Cat transferred at the harbour the drum accelerator to Babem. After the espionage, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty were able to beat up Babem in a fight, and retrieve the drum accelerator as well as Babem to E. Scrunk's offices. Babem would later agree to stop working for B.A.D, wherein for the rest of the story he would disassociate from his previous life. On their way back on the subway, they would meet Floppa, and subsequently be chased through the train by Evil Cat, who was sent immediately to assasinate them. This assasination attempt would fail, and Jinx and Maxwell were able to become friends with Floppa on the mission to the subway. ==== Incident at Ristle Cave ==== The day after the event, Future Kitty invited Jinx and Maxwell to head to Ristle Cave. Earlier that morning, in a battle between Billy and Bentley, Billy released the Beast and The Yeast from their sleep in Ristle Cave, and they ran out. B.A.D agents were sent to collect information there. When they headed there, after their cover was blown, Future Kitty killed both of the B.A.D agents in cold blood. He sustained a shoulder injury that would give him a steel shoulder cap that was given to him by Edward later that day. === Prophecy === After fixing up Future Kitty's shoulder, Edward explained the complete prophecy to Maxwell and Jinx. He gave them two gifts that would help them in their future battles. He gave Maxwell a copy of The Black Book of Silly Magic, and gave his cousin Jinx the Amulet of Luck. Maxwell used this book to his advantage, and began learning silly magic and using it in his battles. ==== Stopping an attack on Axleland ==== Jinx and Maxwell went to Axleland some days after. They met Floppa and Milly, where Jinx reunited with Milly and they headed to get some fish wraps from Bongo's shop. The second attack on Silly City's Axleland would happen subsequently after Ah So Cat or Insam set fire to the Silly City circus. Jinx and her friends would hide in the garden, until which Future Kitty came to the amusement park, and gave them weapons, which they used to fight off the clowns in a rapid gunfight. They were not able to stop the leaders of the revolt, Demetrius P. Dinklebottom, Pobis, or Kiw, but they stopped a good amount of the bloodshed. === Participation in the wars of Silly and Unsilly === Maxwell would become a great soldier of 3KHURA, and fought in numerous battles. He was an integral part of the G.O.O.Dings when it was formed, and helped form alliances with Eeperija and the Gnarp Gnaplians. Maxwell also won the G.O.O.Dings several battles, even some like the battle in Kitty City, and the Forest Standoff, where he was able to defeat their advanced technology. Maxwell was also able to lead the Eeperijan army during the final battle, and stopped The Grinwatcher's attacks. He gave plenty of support, and led a majority of the cavalry for Jinx to swoop in and kill The Beast. vv SPOILERS vv {{Spoilers|Text=During the "battle of silly and unsilly", Maxwell sadly passed from none other then the beast himself (aka intestinal cancer). After Maxwell had snatched the tooth from Jinx while on top of The Yeast's Mountain, a tall thin mountain with a flat top and rocky stairs that go around the mountain and up to the top, as Maxwell placed the tooth onto the large tooth holder at the top, the beast growled and attacked Maxwell from behind, the attack was the final blow. Maxwell flew through the air and landed at the edge of the tall mountain, as The Beast was dissolving from the tooth being placed on the tooth holder, he grabbed it, stopping the dissolving and returning him back to his normal, strong self. The beast walked over to Maxwell who was dead, lying on the edge of the mountain and PUSHED him off, Maxwells body fell through the air and hit the ground hard, cracking most of his bones and even destroying some. Maxwell was 100% dead after this.}} == In Real-life== Maxwell’s real name is Jess. She sadly passed away from an intestinal issue that turned out to be cancer in early 2020. Here’s what Voidhawk42 posted:
''I don’t know what to do. I am just totally devastated. Sitting here crying. She's only nine years old. My fiance got her just after a suicide attempt, and she's been the rock of her mental health ever since. I have no idea what to tell her when she gets home from work.''
The history of this meme goes back to 2017. Then in November, Imgur user Voidhawk42 posted a photo of a black and white cat sitting on a piece of paper. In 2020, the picture went viral, it was published by various entertainment communities and so on. On October 12, 2022, a 3D model of that same cat was published in the Steam Workshop. The author named the animal Dingus, mistakenly mistaking it for a pet from the TikTok account @BigOldBuns. But the meme cat has another name (also not real) - this is Maxwell. This nickname was given to him by another Steam user who created a new 3D model on October 21. On this model, the cat was sitting in the arms. In 2020, the pet’s owner, the same Voidhawk42, published a new post. He wrote that his cat, who was 9 years old at the time, became seriously ill. She was diagnosed with a bowel obstruction and the operation cost £1,500. There have been no further updates on Jess's fate. Probably the owner did not collect the money, and the cat died. == Silly Gallery == File:S P I N N Y spin Spin.gif|Maxwell spinning [[Category:Characters]]
raw_text: Farewell, Maxwell Unfortunately Maxwell has passed away in real life due to intestinal issue that turned out to be cancer at around early 2020 . May Maxwell rest in peace. [ Source ] == Rest in peace Maxwell == Maxwell "One day, when all of this is over, I promise I'll make it up to you" Status Deceased Nationality American Aliases Relatives Jess (real name) Phoenix Warrior Jinx(cousin), Bat cat(uncle), Aunt Luna(mother), Zoom Zinger(uncle) Affiliation Occupation The GOODings, 3KHURA Fighting B.A.D and leading executive directions for The G.O.O.Dings Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth 2011 Unknown Date of Death Place of Death Early 2020 Melodia Cemetery Marital Status Single Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Male Tuxedo cat Bicolor Height Weight 8 sauces 12 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance Wow, A New Member! War Of The Silly TikTok bigoldbuns Maxwell is the brother Jinx , the nephew of Zoom Zinger, and Aunt Luna. He is a secondary character who helps Jinx and saves her when she cannot save herself. He is a cat with a black beard, and white belly, which is why he his thought to be part of The Prophecy, which dictated that the two cats must save the world from unsilly. He is the co-founder and secondary leader of The G.O.O.Dings. Contents 1 Personality 2 Biography 2.1 Early life 2.2 Fighting B.A.D alongside Jinx 2.2.1 Drum Accelerator retrieval 2.2.2 Incident at Ristle Cave 2.3 Prophecy 2.3.1 Stopping an attack on Axleland 2.4 Participation in the wars of Silly and Unsilly 3 In Real-life 4 Silly Gallery Personality [ ] Maxwell is very timid and sarcastic during the beginning of the series, but he begins to take control of his life and his fate alongside his sister, Jinx. Biography [ ] Early life [ ] Maxwell was born to Aunt Luna and her husband(who she later divorced) in a day during the second generation. He was raised in kindergarten, and attended a very prestigious school. Maxwell would often visit Jinx until Jinx's father died. He would later excell in his academics, and became a member of the honor roll in high school, and he would also find a scholarship to a very prestigious university. Fighting B.A.D alongside Jinx [ ] One day, when Maxwell visited Jinx, they slept in her bedroom. Jinx then woke him up to play outside. They found that a ball of smoke much like a crater came from the woods behind the house, and went to see it. That's when they found Future Kitty. Future Kitty told them they were part of The Prophecy, which states that they are the two kitties to save the world from unsilly. From then on, Maxwell and Jinx would go on to fight B.A.D in different operations. Drum Accelerator retrieval [ ] Their first mission involved retrieving E. Scrunk's drum accelerator project from an agent of B.A.D, Babem. The drum accelerator was stolen by an agent of B.A.D earlier. B.A.D planned to use the drum accelerator as part of the Project Beastenator to create a weapon to harness The Beast's energy, specifically to fund a part for the Beastenator 200. Jinx would refer to Carlos, who said it would be transferred at the harbour nearby his shop at night to avoid any attention. They would spy in on the mission. Bat Cat transferred at the harbour the drum accelerator to Babem. After the espionage, Jinx, Maxwell, and Future Kitty were able to beat up Babem in a fight, and retrieve the drum accelerator as well as Babem to E. Scrunk's offices. Babem would later agree to stop working for B.A.D, wherein for the rest of the story he would disassociate from his previous life. On their way back on the subway, they would meet Floppa, and subsequently be chased through the train by Evil Cat, who was sent immediately to assasinate them. This assasination attempt would fail, and Jinx and Maxwell were able to become friends with Floppa on the mission to the subway. Incident at Ristle Cave [ ] The day after the event, Future Kitty invited Jinx and Maxwell to head to Ristle Cave. Earlier that morning, in a battle between Billy and Bentley, Billy released the Beast and The Yeast from their sleep in Ristle Cave, and they ran out. B.A.D agents were sent to collect information there. When they headed there, after their cover was blown, Future Kitty killed both of the B.A.D agents in cold blood. He sustained a shoulder injury that would give him a steel shoulder cap that was given to him by Edward later that day. Prophecy [ ] After fixing up Future Kitty's shoulder, Edward explained the complete prophecy to Maxwell and Jinx. He gave them two gifts that would help them in their future battles. He gave Maxwell a copy of The Black Book of Silly Magic, and gave his cousin Jinx the Amulet of Luck. Maxwell used this book to his advantage, and began learning silly magic and using it in his battles. Stopping an attack on Axleland [ ] Jinx and Maxwell went to Axleland some days after. They met Floppa and Milly, where Jinx reunited with Milly and they headed to get some fish wraps from Bongo's shop. The second attack on Silly City's Axleland would happen subsequently after Ah So Cat or Insam set fire to the Silly City circus. Jinx and her friends would hide in the garden, until which Future Kitty came to the amusement park, and gave them weapons, which they used to fight off the clowns in a rapid gunfight. They were not able to stop the leaders of the revolt, Demetrius P. Dinklebottom, Pobis, or Kiw, but they stopped a good amount of the bloodshed. He was an integral part of the G.O.O.Dings when it was formed, and helped form alliances with Eeperija and the Gnarp Gnaplians. Maxwell also won the G.O.O.Dings several battles, even some like the battle in Kitty City, and the Forest Standoff, where he was able to defeat their advanced technology. Maxwell was also able to lead the Eeperijan army during the final battle, and stopped The Grinwatcher's attacks. He gave plenty of support, and led a majority of the cavalry for Jinx to swoop in and kill The Beast. vv SPOILERS vv In Real-life [ ] Maxwell’s real name is Jess. She's only nine years old. My fiance got her just after a suicide attempt, and she's been the rock of her mental health ever since. I have no idea what to tell her when she gets home from work. title: Monsert
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Monsert|image=Monsert.png|imagecaption=Monsert being shy|aliases=-|relatives=roober (brother)|affiliation=FACT, insane army|occupation=Delivery|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Unknown|gender=Male|height=2 sauces|weight=10 sauces|eyes=Brown|appearsin=Soda Addict|debut=Sugar Rush|status={{alive}}}}{{Stub}} === Biography === Monsert Is a senior member of [[FACT]] he is in charge of deliveries & advertising of monster energy drinks. He is known to often be incredibly temperamental often lashing out at others. while sometimes acting very timid as a facade. he is suspect in several crimes and has been punished by more senior members of FACT numerous times. however due to incredible job performance he manages to maintain his employment out of the companies. this is likely due to his high consumption of his drink keeping his energy levels extremely high. He hasn't slept in 10 years allowing him do twice the work of any other employee. Monserts origin story is shrouded in mystery but is is often rumoured around FACT employees that he once was incredibly tired and decided to purchase one can of monster energy. The drink changed him forever turning him into the evil but skilled and powerful cat we know today he also fought in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly|war of silly & unsilly]] but not for the [[The GOODings]] like most of FACT but for the Insane army before he went rouge and ran away and killed an entire SCAF (silly City armed forces) platoon. before returning to FACT after the war === Trivia === Monsert has committed various crimes such as
Murder Tax Evasion Fraud
He was also complicit in most of the insane armies atrocities He is incredibly Detested By [[Spirte]] and [[Cokey Cola]] which is one of the major reasons of The split of FACT into FACT and OFC It is theorised he may have had something to do with the disappearance of [[Johntavion]] {{Top|Canon}}

title: Mr. Fresh
wikitext:
{{ExistingWiki|The [https://hellostreetcat.com/ Street Cat]|[https://streetcat.wiki/index.php/Main_Page streetcat.wiki]}} {{Top|Mythology}}{{Parents/HSC}}{{Character | name = Mr. Fresh | image = [[File:Mr. Fresh.png]] | imagecaption = Mr. Fresh looking fresh | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{Chinese}} | aliases = Brother Fresh (Chinese users) | relatives = Unknown | affiliation = - | occupation =Side eying the camera | birthDate =Unknown | birthPlace =China | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = | gender =Male | breed =Shorthair Cat | fur =White and Orange | height =5 sauces | weight =14 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}{{Stub}} '''Mr. Fresh,''' also known as the "'''Streamer Cat"''' and "'''Side Eye Cat,"''' is a stray cat from Hello Street Cat/cat houses. He can be seen from the Chinese app called Hello Street Cat, a 24/7 livestream where you can donate money to feed stray cats in "cat houses". His name comes from his tendency to prefer fresh food from the automatic dispenser, which is linked to livestream donations. He didn't always have this trait; he developed it after eating a piece of kibble that had bird feces on it. After this incident, he began attempting to catch his food from the dispenser. At this time he was known as Mr. Intercept. Over time, he stopped intercepting his food, and began simply having a preference for freshly dispensed food, thus being affectionately dubbed "Mr. Fresh" by the onlooking livestream community. As of late, a bounty has been put on Mr. Fresh's life by a literal mafia of animal abusers. This group posted about paying money to have Mr. Fresh assassinated, with a bonus payment if his dead body was put in front of the cameras of any of the "cat houses". They have not been caught yet. Thankfully, on February 20th, Mr. Fresh was found by some good samaritans and treated at the vet for an eye infection he had prior to the bounty. Mr. Fresh is currently adopted and in good hands, away from the cat abusers. ==Trivia== *Mr. Fresh is actually a fanslation, originally known in China as "Fresh Bro", or "Brother Fresh". *Due to threats from an animal abuse group, Mr. Fresh has been captured for veterinary treatment of his eye infection. Additionally, his situation has caught the attention of a Douyin (Chinese version of TikTok) celebrity, offering a potential chance for adoption. He has now been adopted and has his own feeding camera so his fans can still see him. *The famous Mr fresh when side eyeing the camera was doing that because someone slapped their todger on his food, on this point on, he never eats old food, only eating fresh ones, dubbing the name Mr fresh

'''Mr. Fear''' is a presumed male white kitten who garnered his name from having a frightened expression on his face as kibble was being dispensed from the feeder. Despite having only one known clip of him to exist, he is a fairly popular cat in the EN community. It was once theorized that Mr. Fear is actually [[The Gluttonous Beast]], but this is untrue, as they have clearly differing fur patterns. His feeder is currently unknown.

== Behavior ==
There is not enough available footage to determine his behavior in full, but Mr. Fear seems to be easily frightened as a kitten.

== Appearance ==
Mr. Fear is an almost entirely white kitten with the top of his head being orange. The back tips of his ears being white, as well as a stripe of white between his eyes. He has seemingly very dark brown, almost black eyes, and possibly a mustache under his nose. Due to the image quality,  it is hard to tell but there may also be a spot of orange on his back.

== Sightings ==
Currently, only one sighting of Mr. Fear has surfaced, being recorded no later than '''January 2024'''.

== Gallery ==

</gallery>

Origin and Background: The Mr. Despair cat meme originated from a real-life cat named Mr. Despair, also known as the Streamer Cat, who was a stray cat from Hello Street Cat/Cat houses. The cat gained popularity through a Chinese app called Hello Street Cat, which featured a 24/7 livestream where viewers could donate money to feed stray cats in “cat houses.” Mr. Despair stood out due to his sad appearance, characterized by crumpled-looking ears, wide cheeks, weepy eyes, and a forlorn expression.

Appearance and Characteristics: Mr. Despair’s distinctive features included his crumpled ears, wide cheeks, weepy eyes, and an overall sad expression. His appearance led to the perception of him being a melancholic or sorrowful feline. The shape of his ears resembled those of cats affected by frostbite or scarring, adding to his unique look.

Popularity and Spread as a Meme: The image or video of Mr. Despair likely gained traction on social media platforms and meme communities due to the inherent appeal of cute or unusual animal content. People may have found humor or relatability in the juxtaposition of Mr. Despair’s sad appearance with humorous or ironic captions, creating a meme format that resonated with online audiences.

Cultural Impact: As a meme, Mr. Despair may have been shared widely across various online platforms, generating engagement and reactions from users who appreciated the humor or emotional connection evoked by the image or video. The meme likely contributed to the broader internet culture surrounding cat memes and animal-related content that often garners significant attention and participation from users.

This iconic face is the result of a cat getting their kibble slapped by a todger for the 1000th time.

Noopy is a small cat who is silly and small and silly however he uses this to commit crimes

{{Character|name=Noopy|aliases=Little guy, Mafia boss, crime boss, smal, noops|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=The mafia, Drippy Cats|occupation=Crime boss|marital=Married to zoinky|birthDate=October 4, 1950|birthPlace=italy|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=2 Sauces|weight=1.2 Sauces|eyes=Greenish blue|appearsin=|debut=|deathDate=February 13, 2000|deathPlace=Unknown|image=noopy.png|breed=Small|fur=White|firstappears=Glaggle land (Background) Season 3 : Mafia (Speaking role)|lastappears=A few episodes, war of silly and unsilly as a major character|nationality={{Italian}}}}

Noopy is married to his wife Zoinky, A fellow crime boss.

He is a lgbtqia+ icon, Apparently he's "Double trans". but then one day as noopy was eating some pasta zoinky came to noopy and said that he is not the right mafia kitten and left noopy with a few cheese shreds.


==Crimes and charges==

*5 cases of assault in downtown Italy (18 years)
*Arson in Dogeland (24,566,000 silly bucks)
*Attempted Murder of 24 crime bosses, murder of 8 (43 years)
*Stealing the holy cat food (Returned) (350,000,000 Silly bucks)
*Committing in the doge massacre (1 life sentence)
*3 cases of drinking gallons of sewage water and then framing a pigeon for it (Public beheading)
*Robbing 17 banks and two Police stations (Forced into a pure white room where a rock and his buddies insult Noopy)
*46 cases of pooping in other cats litter boxes (3.2 years)
*3 cases of kidnapping foreign monarchs (1 returned) 2 and a half life sentences)
*2 cases of pointing a laser at his enemies, they were mauled beyond recognition by cats in the street (70 days without a litter box, 25,006 Silly bucks)
*3498 cases of murder to mere mortals  (humans) the cat government took off 16 years from his sentence as cats are humans mortal enemies.
*Trying to fix a phone using a toddler as a wrench
*Eeping (200 years in jail)
*Selling 2 tons of black tar heroin on the BCM and transferring them using play doh.(black cat market)
*Stole a chicken nugget for revenge (a stern talking to)
*6 cases of vehicular manslaughter (24 years)
*cut the nose off of a chicken (10 years)


264.2 years in prison, three and a half life sentence, a public beheading, 70 days deprived of a litter box, a strongly worded telling off, a form of torture and 374,591,006 silly bucks in damage

Noopy has a bounty of 416,258,000 silly bucks on his head. The Italian police forces are still looking for him. if you see him do not tell them where he is, they want to rid the world of his brilliance.

His bounty has been rising lately after 15 deaths and 122,000,350 silly bucks in damage from a missile strike in downtown rickrolland.

==Pride==
[[File:Pridenoopy.png|thumb|Noopy holding a pride flag]]
Noopy is a icon of the lgbtqia+ community (Even tho he isnt gay, being double trans means you kinda go boy -> girl -> boy or girl -> boy -> girl, perhaps its a way to spread a more positive image of him)

He is loved by many and spreads positivity and happiness. But don’t let this trick you from the other 57,098 other crimes he has committed. which he is still running from.

==Drippy Cats==
Noopy is apparently the leader of a secret cat society named drippy cats, he is an icon and very loved in this society there is even talk of a cult being started in his honour.  This society is full of other famous cats as well like [[Gakster]] who has a bounty of 135,908,123 silly bucks on his head, however this is just a rumor. This society is extremely secret and likely has it's home base in rural Canada with ties to Italy. Although Noopy is pronounced dead in 2000, his body was never found, and the rumors of this organization leave many to believe he is still alive. Furthermore, several Australian's believe they saw Noopy in the 2020s. If we ever find out if Noopy is still alive, it may be too late... 

== Youth ==
{{Top|Canon}}Tragically, Noopy was born into a bad home. He worked very hard to get a fulfilling life, but thought it wasn't silly enough so he started doing crime. In his teen years he worked at a now defunct fast food chain, always putting 11 nuggets in the 10 piece, but he burnt the CEO and he passed away. His childhood played a major part in his silliness and noopyness.

Description of the Mr. Shocked Cat Meme

Appearance and Behavior: Mr. Shock, also known as Brother Shock, is a stray cat from the Hello Street Cat community. He is an orange tabby cat with white spotting on his chest, legs, and face. Known for his iconic shocked expression when food is dispensed, Mr. Shock has large facial cheeks and typically wears a confused expression. Despite not understanding technology and being shocked by the concept of cloud feeding, he gained fame for his viral clip resembling a livestreamer reading chat messages.

Popularity and Viral Clip: Mr. Shock became widely recognized due to a viral video where he displayed extreme shock at the sight of food being dispensed in a feeder. This clip garnered significant attention on platforms like TikTok, where it was often paired with the “Titan Speakerman” audio. Despite only appearing once in videos for months, leading to speculation about his well-being or adoption, Mr. Shock reappeared at the same feeder in January 2024, confirming his continued presence.

Hello Street Cat Livestream and Community: Mr. Shock’s fame stems from the Hello Street Cat app, which features a 24/7 livestream allowing users to donate money to feed stray cats in “cat houses.” While Mr. Shock is rarely seen apart from his viral clip, he managed to secure a spot as the 5th most favorite cat in community polls despite not featuring in subsequent feeds after his initial video.

This Reason why Mr Shock is shocked is because he witnessed in real time as his food was being dispensed someone slapped their todger on his kibble.

}}'''Neeble''' was a cat that was very easily scared by everything.

==Biography==
Neeble was born at the back of an insane asylum in the bad part of Silly City. Neeble was a scaredy cat at birth. He was so afraid he was scared of his own shadow. Neeble wandered the Silly City streets looking for opportunities. That's when he came across an advertisement for a cleaning service. He signed up for the job. Little did he know, the house that he would be cleaning was filled with roaches. Neeble was terrified of roaches. When Neeble and his coworker went to the house, they were overrun by roaches. Neeble's coworker had to take drastic action, hitting the roaches with a broom. Neeble didn't help, as he was trying to escape through the door. Unfortunately he dropped the keys outside and he was locked in. Neeble was fired the next day, as he did not help. Neeble tried joining [[FACT]] but he failed the interview. Nothing happened much to Neeble from that point, until one day, when Neeble was walking around, he fell into a wormhole that took him to the Halloween dimension. [[Scaredy Cat]] guided him around but they were confronted by the giant skeleton cat. Upon the sight of the cat, Neeble was so scared, he died of fear.

Biography [ ] Neeble was born at the back of an insane asylum in the bad part of Silly City. Neeble was a scaredy cat at birth. He was so afraid he was scared of his own shadow. Neeble wandered the Silly City streets looking for opportunities. That's when he came across an advertisement for a cleaning service. He signed up for the job. Little did he know, the house that he would be cleaning was filled with roaches. Neeble was terrified of roaches. When Neeble and his coworker went to the house, they were overrun by roaches. Neeble's coworker had to take drastic action, hitting the roaches with a broom. Neeble didn't help, as he was trying to escape through the door. Unfortunately he dropped the keys outside and he was locked in. Neeble was fired the next day, as he did not help. Neeble tried joining FACT but he failed the interview. Nothing happened much to Neeble from that point, until one day, when Neeble was walking around, he fell into a wormhole that took him to the Halloween dimension. Scaredy Cat guided him around but they were confronted by the giant skeleton cat. Upon the sight of the cat, Neeble was so scared, he died of fear.

title: Panko

infobox.name: Panko
infobox.imagecaption: Panko, with her well-known cross-eyed glare.

raw_text: This article has moved to another wiki. This article has moved to a new wiki . Description [ ] Panko "Panko, with her well-known cross-eyed glare." Status Alive Nationality American Aliases Relatives fatfatpankocat Milly Affiliation Occupation The Forsaken Territories Governing all silliness within this known universe Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Female Forsaken Calico Panko, best described, is not quite a material nor energetic being. Panko is a constant consciousness, always seeing, observing, and watching. Never directly revealing her form, yet always present. She is a member of the Forsaken Territories - a "council" of sorts that governs and oversees all activity of the cats; silly, bad, or otherwise skrunkly all take part in this. Panko's role of the Forsaken Territories is to oversee the "Silly" sector. In fact, Panko's own immortal paws formed the concept of silliness itself. Upon the birth of time as we know it, Panko formed Milly to be a greater, more conceptualizable figure to be known by the cats, as a demigod is to a god. Milly was formed using 4 essential ingredients, that being uranium, magic 8-ball fluid, opium, and chocolate. Milly was then sent into the universe in the birthplace known as the Ping Pong Table. Milly's sole job was to direct the silly cats out of bad's grasp, allowing them to grow to the most silly they could be. This revolutionized the concept of silliness as it is known today.

He also appeared in the background of The Shining Fate of The Universe where he was sleeping on the grass. It was confirmed by former employee, Flo Peacock that he died of Stomach cancer shortly after the episode == Biography == WIP

title: Pepsie
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Pepsie|image=Pepsie.png|imagecaption=Pepsie advertising his product.|aliases=|relatives=Yoinky (Brother)|affiliation=F.A.C.T.|occupation=Delivery|marital=Single|birthDate=18 March, 2007|birthPlace=Silly Countryside|gender=Male|height=3 Sauces|weight=14 Sauces|eyes=|appearsin=On Time Delivery|debut=Sugar Rush|status={{Alive}}|fur=Beige and white}}
{{Stub}}
Pepsie is one of the members of FACT. He is a cat that delivers Pepsi.

== Biography ==
Pepsie's life began simple. He was born on a cot along with his brother, [[Yoinky]], in the silly countryside. Pepsie when he was born did not know what to do with his life. He worked on the farms for the beginning of his life. That's when [[Yoinky]] left for Silly City to start his rapping career. Pepsie wondered what it would be like to be in Silly City. "Infinite Possibilities." He thought.

So Pepsie headed off on his journey, but he had no money. Pepsie looked for jobs around Silly City. He got a small job stocking a cabbage stand, but he didn't enjoy it. Pepsie once he was with his shift, started wondering around the market. He stopped at a market stall reading "Pepsie". Pepsie was intrigued. He took one of the bottles and took a sip. His eyes lit up, he now knew what he wanted to do with his life.

But he did not know how to achieve this dream. As he wandered the Silly City streets, he saw a flyer on a lamp post. It read "[[FACT|Friendly Advertising Cat Team]] hiring". Pepsie was interested, so the next day he went to apply. Pepsie was hired. And now he gets to do his favorite thing, advertise Pepsie.

== Trivia ==

* Pro-tip: Never say Cokey Cola is better than Pepsie near him, he will be enraged.
* Pepsie is his favorite drink. (Obviously)

Moisturized. Happy. In his lane. Focused. '''Photosynthesizing'''. This cat has never killed anyone, he is very peaceful. His nickname is Planty. == Biography == Photosynthesizng's life began in the same butter embryo as [[Floppa]]. Floppa grew up to be a healthy kitty. But unfortunately, Photosynthesizing wasn't so lucky. He grew a dependency for water and now spends all of his time in a bathtub. If he is removed he will die, so it is imperative he is not removed from the water. A benefit of this restrictive lifestyle is that Photosynthesizing through relaxation is very wise knowing the answers to most but not all questions. As a result of his constant contact with water, plants started growing on his back at a very young age. It also changed his fur turning it into a green hue. It got darker as he got older. Now, you can still find Photosynthesizing where he's always been, in the bathtub he was placed. You can stop and ask a question for a small price.{{Top|Canon}}

title: Pobis
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Pobis|image=Pobis.png|imagecaption=Pobis plotting his escape|status={{Alive}}|aliases=None|relatives=None|affiliation=B.A.D (Formerly)|occupation=Convict
Psychopath|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Silly Town|deathDate=None|deathPlace=None|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Tabby|fur=Cream|height=12 sauces|weight=23 sauces|firstappears=Convict For Life|lastappears=Pobis' Escape|nationality={{Unknown}}}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Pobis}} '''Pobis''' is a highly destructive and psychopathic cat known for his numerous amount of kills and decisive evil. == Biography == Pobis was born to a poor family in Silly Town. He looked to be a healthy kitty, but on the inside he was growing into a psychopathic killer. His teachers started to notice because he broke another kitties leg and didn't even feel sorry, he just laughed. His first kill was one his teachers. This was one of the first of hundreds. Pobis soon became a member of a new cult called The Cult of the Black Book of Silly Magic. He did not wish to learn wizarding but he wanted to practice the evil side. Some of his experiments were successful, but most failed. When the group was taken over by the Grinwatcher, The Black of Silly Magic ended up in Glinkert's hands. After that, the book, in a weird operation ended up in Pobis' hands. The Grinwatcher later stole the book from Pobis and gave it to [[Grinwatcher/Right Hand Smiles|Right Hand Smiles]]. Right Hand Smiles was later ambushed and the book was confiscated in their catalogs. Pobis left the group after that, and he continued to do more atrocities. [[The GOODings]] eventually caught onto his schemes, but he was too smart. He ended up killing a few of them off. Pobis continued to do evil, until The GOODings surprise attacked him, and he was shipped off to a mental institution. He's already killed many prisoners there. He stays very quiet and only talks a little. The only times he talks is when he's ordering fudge brownies off the lunch menu. It's his favorite food. The guards beside his cell have said that they can hear a small chuckle that grows louder and more manic each day. He plans his escape thoroughly, but the guards know what he's up to because he etched it into his cell wall. The last words anyone's heard him say, besides ordering fudge brownies, was "Soon so soon." while twiddling his paws. Pobis seems to have a weird connection with the entity known as [["832"]], because he is seen outside of the asylum that Pobis stays in. Confidential document. Proceed with caution. [[File:S.B.I.png|center|220px]]
This information is under protection of the S.B.I., any leakage of this information will result in your elimination. Proceed with caution.

On the evening of the 13th of December, 2023 Pobis was restrained and interrogated in his mental institution. Below is the transcript of the interrogation.
POBIS: I don't want to talk right now, leave me alone!
INTERROGATOR: You don't have a choice. If you don't comply we will have to remove the fudge brownies from the lunch menu.
POBIS: Alright fine, I'll do what you ask, just don't remove the brownies.
INTERROGATOR: Where were you on the night of the 11th of March, 2007?
POBIS: I was in my cell.
INTERROGATOR: Your cellmates reported seeing you smuggle ketchup bottles and candles into your cell.
POBIS: What does that tell you?

This article has moved to a new wiki . Pobis is a highly destructive and psychopathic cat known for his numerous amount of kills and decisive evil. Biography [ ] Pobis was born to a poor family in Silly Town. He looked to be a healthy kitty, but on the inside he was growing into a psychopathic killer. His teachers started to notice because he broke another kitties leg and didn't even feel sorry, he just laughed. His first kill was one his teachers. This was one of the first of hundreds. Pobis soon became a member of a new cult called The Cult of the Black Book of Silly Magic. He did not wish to learn wizarding but he wanted to practice the evil side. Some of his experiments were successful, but most failed. When the group was taken over by the Grinwatcher, The Black of Silly Magic ended up in Glinkert's hands. After that, the book, in a weird operation ended up in Pobis' hands. The Grinwatcher later stole the book from Pobis and gave it to Right Hand Smiles . Right Hand Smiles was later ambushed and the book was confiscated in their catalogs. Pobis left the group after that, and he continued to do more atrocities. The GOODings eventually caught onto his schemes, but he was too smart. He ended up killing a few of them off. Pobis continued to do evil, until The GOODings surprise attacked him, and he was shipped off to a mental institution. He's already killed many prisoners there. He stays very quiet and only talks a little. The only times he talks is when he's ordering fudge brownies off the lunch menu. It's his favorite food. The guards beside his cell have said that they can hear a small chuckle that grows louder and more manic each day. He plans his escape thoroughly, but the guards know what he's up to because he etched it into his cell wall. The last words anyone's heard him say, besides ordering fudge brownies, was "Soon so soon." while twiddling his paws. Pobis seems to have a weird connection with the entity known as "832" , because he is seen outside of the asylum that Pobis stays in. Confidential document. Proceed with caution. This information is under protection of the S.B.I., any leakage of this information will result in your elimination. Proceed with caution. On the evening of the 13th of December, 2023 Pobis was restrained and interrogated in his mental institution. Below is the transcript of the interrogation. POBIS: I don't want to talk right now, leave me alone! INTERROGATOR: You don't have a choice. If you don't comply we will have to remove the fudge brownies from the lunch menu. POBIS: Alright fine, I'll do what you ask, just don't remove the brownies. INTERROGATOR: Where were you on the night of the 11th of March, 2007? POBIS: I was in my cell. INTERROGATOR: Your cellmates reported seeing you smuggle ketchup bottles and candles into your cell. POBIS: What does that tell you? INTERROGATOR: I ask the questions here. POBIS: Whatever. INTERROGATOR: What did you mean by "Soon so soon"? POBIS: You'll see, they'll all see. INTERROGATOR: Be compliant, or you'll know what we'll do. POBIS: Fine, I was summoning demons to harm those that had denied my power. POBIS: It's in The Black Book of Silly Magic, its name is the ketchup demon, also called by the number of underling, "832". He loves ketchup. POBIS: He's very powerful, and he's planning to destroy this very world with a supercharged blast. They'll all die, what a delight. Mwahahaha. INTERROGATOR: Where is this book? POBIS: Why should I tell you? INTERROGATOR: Be compliant. POBIS: If you really want to know then, the Grinwatcher stole the book and he gave it to his right hand man, Right Hand Smiles. Go ahead and try, you totally won't get devoured. INTERROGATOR: I've asked all the questions that I was required to ask, this interview is over. POBIS: I'll be seeing you in the afterlife, doctor.

'''Poncky''' is a cat that delivers and advertises Pocky for [[FACT]]. He also worked delivering supplies during the [[War of Silly]] and Unsilly. Ponky has a scar around his nose due to unnamed injuries during the war.

He is a major character in episode 112, "Under Siege", where he sneaks past [[B.A.D]] lines to deliver supplies to the first [[Bingustan]] counter-revolutionary army under siege from [[Prince bingulius]]'s forces

}}Potato is an earless cat from China. He had his ears removed due to tumors. He now lives healthily with his best friend Horlick and his new owners.

== Real Life ==
In real life, Potato roamed the streets as a stray cat after his original feeder died. He was always with another kitty named Horlick. They were picked up by a shelter in 2016 and cared for. They were then fostered by a couple by the names of Carl and Sarah Leong. They alter found tumors on Potato's ears and treated it in 2017.

Potato stayed relatively healthy until 2019, where his tumors got worse. He went through a three hour long surgery to remove the tumors. His ears were removed during the surgery. Now, Potato lives completely healthy and enjoys his life in the care of his parents, who officially adopted him after the surgery. Despite what you may think, Potato can still actually hear. Potato and Horlick can be found on their Instagram, [https://www.instagram.com/no_ear_meow_potato/?hl=en No Ear Meow Potato]

title: Prince bingulius
wikitext:
{{Top|Mythology}}
{{Character|name=Prince Bingulius|image=Bingulius fr not brainus.png|imagecaption=Bingulius planning an ambush|status={{Deceased}}|nationality=Bingustani|aliases=The Rebel Prince|relatives=Bingus (alleged)|affiliation=Bingustani Rebels, B.A.D|occupation=Rebel Leader, Prince|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Bingustan|gender=Male|breed=Sphinx cat (Bingus variety)|fur=N/A|height=8 sauces|weight=17 sauces|firstappears=The Ambush|lastappears=War Of Silly And Unsilly Part 3|deathPlace=(no mans land)|deathDate=Unknown|marital=Single}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Prince_Bingulius}}

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Bingulius Is a minor Villain in the later seasons of the series. Serving as a supporter of The Beast and member of [[B.A.D]]

==== Silly Cats: Online ====
Bingulius serves as a raid/defence boss in the games third raid "Bingustan Brawl"

== Biography ==
Prince Bingulius Was Born In A small village in bingustan. A direct Descendant of [[Bingus]] the first he always staunchly believed that bingus's betrayal was a good thing. He wished to return to the old militaristic Days Of bingustan Long Long Ago by any means necessary. He lived in relative obscurity as a warlord and arms dealer for a long part of his life. However when [[The Beast|the beast]] returned to power he saw opportunity. He decided to try to make an alliance with the [[Gakster]] & B.A.D so when the B.A.D started an all out war with [[The GOODings]] (and most of the silly world) he would rise up and attack bingustan taking the B.A.Ds side, he also had the idea to trick other kingdoms into breaking alliances with bingustan by posing as bingustani diplomats and committing crimes (a tactic that was ineffective in the long run other than breaking the alliance with [[Eeperia]]) He spent the coming years gathering strength and followers and is suspected to have made a deal with [[Grinwatcher]] to obtain some "negative silly energy" making him very powerful. When the war came Bingulius began a brutal civil war in bingustan and began defeating prime minister Bing Bingo's army after a long campaign. During this time he also orchestrated the ambush on wacky street, an event where several members of SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces) high command were killed in an ambush. eventually Bingulius grew impatient and decided to assist B.A.D on the front lines where he was killed in a skirmish in no mans land by [[Spirte]] with an AWPew Sniper Rifle while commanding his troops against [[FACT|F.A.C.T]] troops. After his death the rebel group he started fell apart and peace was restored to bingustan after the war was over (despite [[Pusha]]'s Attempts to install an authoritarian communist government)
