'''Pusha''' is a cat that ruled the soviet union form 1941 to its dissolution in 1991
she however after the dissolution remained a powerful warlord and retained a private army, hoping to make all countries communist but not with force

She assisted [[The GOODings]] in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] with military support.

Pusha in history (reining over the soviet union) was the person who took the place of iosif stalin after overthronwing him in a coup using silly powers and ruled with an iron paw 

During the war of silly and unsilly she lended huge amounts of support in the form of weapons and troops and especially assisted the armies of bingustan under the command of bingus the second (the president of bingustan at the time) and even fought on the battlefield herself for a time in which she managed to kill  [[ludwig]]

She also has a bitter rivalry with [[FACT]]  as she thinks that they are too greedy and promoting capitalism

Pusha was briefly a member of the gloopy before being kicked out by the wishes of [[Wire Cat]] among several others

Q's albums were often related to sadness, flaws, and more, but he often threw in an upbeat song. Q's songs would pump up his friends and boost them. Q would often cry if his songs didn't sound good at first. He sadly passed away during the battle between [[Bingus]] and [[Gusic]], when [[Bingus]] killed him in a rebound attack. == Biography == Q was born alongside his brothers [[Gakster]], [[Plimpus]], [[Glinkert]], and Gusic, near the beginning of the Sillyverse. Also born with him were his cousins [[Bungus]] and Bingus. Q in his own time developed a love for music, he started to improve slowly and he grew a following. After Bingus betrayed Bungus, Q and his brothers sought to destroy Bingus, the great evil. After a decisive battle Bingus separated the brothers. Bingus thought this would be eternal, but through trial and error, the brothers succeeded, redirecting the curse into Bingus' soul, causing a piece of Bingus' soul to be sliced off. This broke the curse, reuniting the brothers. Q was excited and convinced Gusic and Bungus to kill Bingus once and for all. They decided to battle him. Though they were successful in defeating Bingus, Q was tragically killed by Bingus in a rebound attack. ==Q's Playlist== * Meatball parade, a song that Q plays often at clubs. * Monkeys spinning monkeys, this song represents our society and the flaws with it by highlighting the good and bad. *

raw_text: Radio cat "a picture of the news broadcast where radio cat commentated on the silly war (its quite pixelated because it was streamed from very far places)" Status Alive Nationality Canadian Aliases Relatives None Unknown Affiliation Occupation multiple radio stations across the silly verse Singing on radio broadcasts Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth 7 August, 2000 Family Farm Date of Death Place of Death None None Marital Status Single Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Male Tabby Gray with black lines Height Weight 6 Sauces 7 Sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance Road Trip International Broadcast Radio Cat is one of the only cats who is broadcasted on radio stations and is usually heard singing music using his delightful voice. Radio Cat first appears in "Road Trip" where one of his most popular songs plays in the background while the gang talks together. Biography [ ] Radio Cat was born on a family farm and always loved music. He eventually moved out and became an aspiring singer. He contacted various radio stations and eventually made it onto a few different stations in which he became incredibly popular. He even managed to earn his own station called "Meowsynth" which is an incredibly popular radio station. He is last seen on "International Broadcast" in which he commentates on the silly war even fighting in it himself by helping hurt cats recover during battle. He still sings but lives a peaceful life in a small peaceful neighborhood.

title: Ramses
wikitext:
{{Parents/DF}} {{Character|name=Ramses|image=Ramses.jpg|imagecaption=Ramses looking at something|status={{Alive}}|aliases=Ramses Diechmen|relatives=Dmitri (Brother) Vampirius (Brother) Skeletus (Brother)|occupation=Hording gold
TPing houses|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Sarcophagus|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Mummy|fur=Beige & Caramel|height=4 sauces|weight=12 sauces}} '''Ramses''' is the youngest brother of his three brothers [[Dmitri]], [[Vampirius]], and [[Skeletus]]. The brothers all share the trait of being spooky. == Biography == Ramses was the youngest of his brothers. He startled his brothers one day when the lid of a sarcophagus they originally though to be empty, fell over. Ramses climbed out of the sarcophagus and introduced himself. He did not look mummified as he had just been created. Ramses immediately started being mischievous, but was obedient to his brothers as he did not want to make any fuss. He would often sneak off in the dark of the night to cause havoc to their neighbors. Ramses was firm believer in the art of Trick or' Treat, which was a practice discontinued by the residents of the Halloween Dimension, which is the dimension he calls home. The practice was discontinued due to people constantly trying to steal the candy of younger silly kitties. Ramses was particularly a believer in the trick part of Trick or' Treat. He would knock on the doors of people and ask them "Trick or' Treat." After being offended, they would slam the door in his face. This gave Ramses the thought that they had to pay. So he would TP their house every time. He did this so much he would later be known by loclas as the TP Menace. He was later caught by neighborhood police and he would be lectured by them to not do it again. Even with this, he repeatedly did it. Finally, the police had had enough and they sent him back home to the castle he called home. His brothers were sat at the door with disappointment in their faces. They sentenced him to time out in the basement. He sat in the basement, bored out of his mind. That's when he saw an iron glint that caught his eye. He noticed it was the handle to the secret vault. His brothers had talked about it in conversations before that weren't meant for him, but he never knew it was for real. The vault was home to the enormous amount of riches their great great grandfather had. Their great great grandfather was the original king of the Halloween Dimension. He was a tyrant and enslaved people to build the castle Ramses stood in. He was eventually overthrown and the castle was abandoned. That was until Skeletus was reawakened by a mysterious entity. After that, the brothers were slowly reawakened one by one. Ramses stood at the vault door, thinking to himself if this was right. He threw away the thought and opened the vault. He was blinded by the gold shimmer that blasted in his face. It was marvelous piles of gold and anything else shiny. He jumped in, basking in the spectacular brightness they seemed to exude. He stuffed bars pf gold into his pockets and left the vault. After he left, he was met with brothers who told him that people were trying to steal from them. Ramses did not care but pretended to, to make his brothers happy. He watched as his brothers, Vampirius and Dmitri worked together to create an elaborate series of traps to capture any burglars. They successfully captured many with this method. Occasionally, there would be one that they felt pity for . They often gave some gold to them. To this day, Ramses lives with his brothers in the castle. He continues to TP houses and steal gold from the castle vault.

title: Sandwich

infobox.name: Sandiwch
infobox.aliases: The Claw, Shredderfang, Deathchaser, Yee-hawrk, YARN

wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Sandwich}}
'''Sandwich''' was originally a member of the [[B.A.D]] organization,  helping significantly in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. However, when the organization was dismantled, Sandwich took refuge in a hideout near the [[Almanga Jungle]], seeking safe haven. Soon after, though, the emojicats raided his home and stole all of his belongings. He was forced even deeper into the jungle to evade them. In his solitude, he slowly began to go more insane and monstrous every day until emerging from his exile into the world as a serial killer. He invaded homes, much like the emojicats, and consumed the residents
{{Character|name=Sandiwch|image=Download (2).jpg|imagecaption=Sandwich in Almanga Jungle|status=On the run|nationality=Albanian|aliases=The Claw, Shredderfang, Deathchaser, Yee-hawrk, YARN|relatives=Ye (father) and Yer (mother)|affiliation=ex-B.A.D member|occupation=serial killer|birthDate=1850, May 30|birthPlace=Albania|gender=Male|breed=Tabby-Calico|fur=black, orange, faint white}}
== '''Description''' ==
Sandwich is a tabby with orange-and-black fur, along with hints of white. He had a skinny appearance and deranged, bloodshot eyes. His snout was usually matted with blood, and he had a scar running from his left ear to his collar bone. His claws are unusually long (about three-quarters of a foot) and have a crust of flesh on them. He had a faint Albanian accent.

== '''Personality''' ==
Sandwich was thoroughly deranged and enjoyed killing. Witnesses have often reported him laughing at the deaths of his victims. He had a strange way of consuming his victims before actually killing them, presumably due to the pain inflicted upon them. He, too, enjoyed inflicting pain upon himself. He was unhinged and unpredictable, as well as prone to random outbursts of violence or heavy emotion (rarely sadness, usually glee or extreme anger). He was often reported to yell, "Yee-hawrk!" as a sort of killing-cry. The origins of this phrase are unknown.

== '''Early Life''' ==
Sandwich was born in Albania in the year 1850, May 30. He was born to kind, loving parents (Yer and Ye) who soon lost everything to B.A.D. The gang unearthed some false reports about his parents stealing from a renowned unnamed bank. He was forced to work for them to save his parents. To tie off loose ends, the gang killed them unbeknownst to Sandwich. He continued to work for the organization and supported it in the war until it was dismantled. He then sought refuge near the Almanga Jungle, soon attacked by the remnants of the emojicats. He was then driven deeper into the jungle where he went insane and emerged as a killer.

== '''Detainment Attempt of Silly City''' ==
In 1999, Sandwich was found outside of a home covered in blood yelling his familiar cry, "Yee-hawrk!" A witness then called the police, who showed up just in time. Sandwich attempted to escape, but was tackled by an officer. He shredded the officer with his claws and killed nearly all other cops. He continued to laugh and yell "Yee-hawrk!" before disappearing into the night. This massacre was known as the Detainment Attempt of Silly City.

== '''Personal Information''' ==
Before he went insane, Sandwich was very kind and had many friends in his home country. He was particularly interested by quantum physics and set out to study it. His parents supported his decision and helped him on his quest wherever they could. He despised the criminal world and was faintly captivated by criminal justice as well. He disapproved of any form of stealing or killing. He even reported a B.A.D agent in his school, his catgebra teacher, which may have led to the gang's cruel treatment towards him. When he joined, he was constantly shunned and pushed around, even when he made multiple wins for their side in the war. He never wanted their approval anyways, and he despised of it.

== Known Victims ==

* Kershaur
* Yactwan
* Hawth
* Wraight
* Kosher
* Duh-Duh-Duh
* Paulie
* Yakke
* Hoor
* Rawrkoe
* Yakin
* Howalli
* Yoie
* Dudio
* Almano
* Dentistry
* Uonder

== '''Interview of an Anonymous Silly City Cop''' ==
Q: So, what was it like, in the Detainment Attempt? How did you feel coming face-to-face with such a ruthless Unsilly?

A: Well [sigh], it was horrible. I thought I would die, I thought I'd be shred just like the cat who tackled him. I wanted to run away so bad, but I knew it was my duty to capture him, so I didn't.

Q: Since then, have you been tracking him?

A: I am ashamed to say 'no.' I'm too afraid. I don't ever want to be mixed up with him again.

Q: But, he did kill a close friend of yours.

A: Yes, Almano was-he was, um, [sniff], my best friend. We met in a Silly party before I joined the force. He-I-, um. Well, I know I should be tracking Sandwich to avenge him, but I'm not. I'm too scared.

Q: Do you miss him?

A: I-yes. Can I please go now? I-I can't relive this.

==Biography==
'''Richer Motion''' is a highly intelligent A.I robot with very humanoid feeling and features. He is programmed to wander around at night and go up to peoples front doors, baiting people to come outside, when they do the A.I kidnaps them and takes them to a unknown evil creature. '''Richer Motion''' appears in one singular episode for 20 minutes when [[Jinx]] and the gang are staying over at a abandoned house to keep shelter, it is quite a scary 20 minutes for both the gang and the audience, the doorbell ringing over and over as '''Richer Motion''' waits outside, banging on the door louder and louder and louder, eventually '''Richer Motion''' leaves.

==Real Life==
In real life, '''Richer Motion''' is named [https://www.tiktok.com/@zaza_official9 Zazu] (sometimes Zaza). He is a goofy cat.

|status=Alive|nationality={{Japanese}}
|occupation=Samurai
|gender=Male
|fur=White
|height=6.2 sauces
|weight=14 sauces
}}
==Biography==
'''Samurai Cat''' was born  in [[Catio]], where he was raised in a hidden village in Japan. He wanted to be a Samurai at the age of 5, and he was bullied by his classmates. Every day,  Samurai Cat would smack a tree with a wooden stick. Until, at the age of 10, he found a poster on a wall that could enlist young boys into the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]].  

Tomorrow, he went to that  location, and he found his military instructor, Sensei Bob. Sensei Bob taught many war tactics. However, after 5 days of doing this, the Unsilly attacked the Silly, and took heavy losses. But Samurai Cat pursued. He trained every day with Sensei Bob, until he was skilled enough.. He had a major role in the War of the Silly and Unsilly, as he murdered 1,592 Unsilly.  After defeating many Unsilly, Sensei Bob gave him the sacred [[Planet K.I.T.Y|Gnarpium]] Catana, which could slash at the speed of light. He was then wanted by the Unsilly at a bounty of [[Silly Bucks|S฿]]1,000,000,000,000. Samurai Cat was never found. 

Samurai Cat then formed a clan known as the Pluh Clan (The [[Pluh|Pluh Cat]] is not related). The Pluh Clan's goal was to kill the [[B.A.D]]. The Pluh Clan had very strong samurais, all with S฿1,000,000 or greater. The Pluh Clan then had a major role in the Cats vs. D.O.G.S.R. The D.O.G.S.R stand for Deadly Ominous Giant Scary Robots that were created by [[Gakster]] and his evil crime gang. Gakster noticed that the Pluh Clan was destroying too many D.O.G.S.R and decided to build the M.D.O.G.S.R to defeat Samurai Cat and his friends. The M.D.O.G.S.R stands for the Mega Deadly Ominous Giant Scary Robots;  they were invented by [[Hinkle Dinkle]], [[Unknown]], and The Beast. The M.D.O.G.S.Rs killed 3 Pluh Clan members.  

Samurai Cat was very angry, so then he trained for many years and got his friend, who was a blacksmith, to make him a catana stronger than the Gnarpium Catana, which he dubbed the Pluhtana. The Pluhtana could slash at the speed of pluh. Which is roughly 452,972,919 megasauces per millisecond, according to [[Edward]]. He then got another friend to fuse the Pluhtana and Gnarpium Catana together, making the Pluhium Catana. The B.A.D got very angy and bombed Samurai Cat's hideout.

Tomorrow, he went to that location, and he found his military instructor, Sensei Bob. Sensei Bob taught many war tactics. title: Scaredy Cat
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Scaredy Cat|aliases=Witch Cat|status={{Deceased}}|relatives=None|affiliation=Halloween|occupation=Spooky|birthDate=31 October 2020|birthPlace=Halloween World|deathDate=12 December 2022|deathPlace=Battle of the silly and unsilly|marital=Too Young|gender=Male|breed=Domestic shorthair|fur=Black|height=3 Sauces|weight=6 Sauces|firstappears=Silly Spooky Special!|lastappears=The Final Battle|image=Scaredy Cat.png|imagecaption=The scene where they find him|nationality={{American}}}}Scaredy Cat is a supporting cast in the hour long Halloween Special. The episode was a fan favorite.

Ironically, Scaredy Cat, living in the Halloween dimension is scared very easily.

== Biography ==
In the Halloween Special of the Silly Cats series, [[The GOODings]] fell in a wormhole, bringing them to the Halloween world. As they were exploring this realm they stumbled upon a pumpkin. The spooky energies around them suddenly condensed into the pumpkin, and a small kitten popped out. This kitten was Scaredy Cat. Scaredy Cat acted as the tour guide to [[The GOODings]], showing them around the Halloween World. In the same epsiode he helped [[Maxwell]] confront the Giant Skeleton Cat, saving Halloween. Besides this epsiode, he wasn't seen often. Until in The War of Silly and Unsilly he was killed by [[The Beast]] in the background as he was trying to save [[The GOODings]].{{Top|Canon}}
[[Category:Deceased]]

infobox.appearsin: Most episodes after sam attacks to the war of silly and unsilly
infobox.imagecaption: Sam with his signature headpiece and katana

wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Sam}}{{Character|name=Samuel|image=[[File:Sam.png]]|aliases=Samuel
The Butcher|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=SCAF|occupation=Mercenary
Explorer|marital=None|birthDate=15 September 1801|birthPlace=Amazon Rainforest|deathDate=1 June 1992|deathPlace=Military Bunker|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=1.5 sauces|weight=4 sauces|eyes=Blue|appearsin=Most episodes after sam attacks to the war of silly and unsilly|debut=Sam attacks|imagecaption=Sam with his signature headpiece and katana|nationality={{Brazilian}}|status={{Deceased}}}}'''Sam''', full name '''Samuel''', was an old Brazilian mercenary that worked for many people, under the name "Desparado". After this time in his life, he worked as an explorer helping to discover the secrets of the [[Temple of the Beast]]. == Biography == Sam was born in the thickets of the Amazon Rainforest. He awoke on a stretcher made out of leaves. He was being taken to the local hospital. At the hospital, he was taken care of. He was given back to his parents and he accustomed to life in the jungle. Of course, his parents had to help him with many mistakes he made. Over time, Sam developed a knack for exploring the more dense parts of the surrounding jungle. This was especially dangerous as many knew that these dense patches of foliage were infested with creepy crawlies. These included centipedes, snakes, and beetles. Still, Sam liked to don homemade armor and jump into these patches. He often jumped out triumphantly, carrying the head of a snake or the body of a centipede. Sam loved his life in the jungle. As he grew up, he moved to more modern areas. He moved to a small village a few kilometers south of the jungle he lived in. He was broke and looking for money, so he searched for a job. He soon found one, which was to pick [[Watermelon Cat|Watermelon Cats]]. He didn't know much on how to do it, but he learned quickly. All he had to do was climb a tall tree and pick the Watermelon Cats off the vines growing from the top. This job was easy but didn't pay well. He soon found himself unable to pay his bills, so he searched for another better paying job. He didn't have much luck doing this and he was reset to square one. Sam sat on the edge of a sidewalk, defeated. He didn't know what to do. Suddenly, a stranger lunged from the darkness wielding a knife. The stranger ordered Sam to give him everything he had on him. Instead, Sam punched the stranger in the gut and swiped the knife out of his hands. Sam then proceeded to stab the stranger until he was convinced they were dead. Sam stood there shocked for a moment. Then, something snapped him out of his shock. A slow clap began from the same dark alleyway. The kitty wore pink sunglasses that reflected the dim streetlight. The kitty introduced himself as [[Uncle]]. He said, "Mighty fine arm you got there. What do you think of working for me?" Sam replied, "How much does it pay?" Uncle then said, "Around 3,000 silly bucks." Sam excitedly took the offer. He really needed the money to pay his overwhelming debt. Sam didn't fully know what job he had taken, but he had taken a job for Uncle's Brazilian branch of his mafia. Sam then began his time in the mafia. He killed nearly hundreds of people the mafia had ties to. He soon became one of the top mercenaries in the entirety of the Brazilian mafia. He operated under the name, "Desperado." Rival mafias often called him "The Butcher", as he often killed many of them in the same night. Even though Sam was racking in mountains of cash, he thought that what he was doing was wrong. So, one day, he walked up to Uncle and told him that he didn't want to be in the mafia anymore. Uncle was taken aback, no one had told him that before. Uncle in a confused state, answered, "Ok?" Sam was surprised this worked, so he booked a flight to Silly Country to pursue a new life. He arrived in Silly Country and took residence in [[Silly Town]]. Many of the citizens liked him because he often gave a lot to the community. By now, he had already obtained his trademark headpiece and katana. He was very content with his life in Silly Country. Soon, something else consumed his interest. He had heard from his neighbors and other residents about the nearby jungle. It was called the [[Almanga Jungle]] and he heard the stories about everyone who went in never came out. Sam wanted to test these claims, so he decided to go on an adventure into the jungle to find a mysterious temple that only legends had foretold about. He told the rest of the citizens of Silly Town that he was going to go into the Almanga Jungle. Many didn't believe him, but the next day he gathered his equipment and set off. He wondered the jungle for days. His map was starting to look like it was useless as Sam was completely lost. He searched for days but he soon stumbled into a clearing. He was amazed by the sight before him. It was the legendary Temple of the Beast. He observed how it had been completely overgrown by the jungle around it. He nervously entered the temple. Nothing surprised him, it just looked like a normal old temple to him. It was even equipped with booby traps. Some were more dangerous than others. One was snakes dropping on his head and another was a spike floor. Even with the dangers, he still ventured deeper into the temple. He started to second guess himself, thinking it was a bad idea to enter this temple. Suddenly, the floor collapsed underneath him, plunging down a smooth tunnel. He fell to the bottom with a thud. He took a few moments to regain his composure, but what he saw left him in shock. The room was hexagonal and the walls were adorned with murals. He grabbed his magnifying glass, and inspected the mural. He saw a beast-like cat terrorizing the land and destroying houses. He thought how the cloak-wearers who built this temple could not have built this temple so quickly. Then he saw another mural. It showed a hairless cat directing the cloak-wearers to build the temple. It also showed the cat helping them to build the temple. He saw some text underneath it and translated it. The language was a rare dialect hailing from the Arctoac Mountain Range. The text read "[[Bingus]]." Sam immediately recognized the name from historic legends. He thought these stories were fake but now they had been proven to be true. He rushed back to Silly Town and told everyone about what he saw. Some were skeptical, but most were surprised by the information. Sam passed the information to be studied by the top scientists in the region and resigned to a peaceful life once again. He lived like this for many years. This would not last when the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] began. Sam felt like he needed to protect his people, so he signed up for the Silly City Army. At the time, it was nothing fancy. Still, Sam fought valiantly. Soon, the army got funding from the mayor of Silly City and they soon evolved into the SCAF (Silly City Armed Forces). Their next target on their radar was Gogaville. The SCAF wanted the land so they could get better access to [[No Man's Land]]. Sam was a leading force in this battle and they soon took part of Gogaville (Although, this was very easy since Gogaville had no military power. They still lost the battle though, since the [[Gnarp Gnaplians]] drove them out with their weapons. Later on in the war, Sam was planning battle tactics with the general. The general left the room for a drink. Suddenly, Sam was ambushed by [[Slorphus]] and Sam was killed with a slit to the neck. To this day, Sam is remembered as a revolutionary figure in history and war. == Trivia == * Sam's favorite food was the flesh (Not meaty flesh, but fruity flesh like actual watermelons) of Watermelon Cats * He wouldn't admit it, but his favorite show was Ninjago. * His headpiece is constructed out of rabbit pelt from the Rabbit Empire, which now doesn't exist anymore, and fish bait that he got from [[Carlos]]. The fish bait helps keep the pelt together. [[Category:Deceased]]

title: Shark
wikitext:
MDFGD{{HLJIBKHCXV.K,SAlkjhlufdguykfvkhjmnklcmX:Z?Mnckvbjxjh ,s./ds l jkfdhiguytkgerfhicdsjoako;dfjlfgsnbhud 6i7eryertvunhawrtgfrdf vhgjgfvg,jcmkn ,.nh8by j nb b\Top|Mythology}} {{Character|name=Shark|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=The Eternity|fur=White, Brown, and Black|height=8 sauces|weight=40 sauces|status={{Alive}}|nationality={{Shake|E|t|e|r|n|a|l}}|image=Shark.png|imagecaption=Shark staring at us from eternity, it is being rendered as him being in a bath|aliases=Soggy Cat
Sog|relatives=-|affiliation=-|occupation=-|breed=Shorthair|gender=Male|firstappears=-|lastappears=-|twitter=ssoggycat}}Hello? Am I getting through? Matters not, does it... Anyway, Shark. I know most about the pitiful creature. He was born in a place called "Eternity". It is a place that cannot be seen through a human lens, only cats see it how it is. Otherwise, it's rendered through your imagination. The picture that is showing Shark, is him in Eternity. But, your imagination sees him as wet, and thus renders him in a bath. Matters not. == Appearances == === ??? === God... to not get caught by them I have to conform to this, thing. Anyways, as I said earlier. Shark is... not a normal cat. Someone by the name of '''"sillyfuny"''' used to be with him all the time, you could call them, a friend. Where are they now? Matters not. What matters is, something, ''someone''... Sent him back in time to his birth, and banished him to Eternity. As I am just a mere cat with too much knowledge, I cannot comprehend it, but it is my best explanation. === Throughout Eternity === Eternity is an infinite plane of... something. No one has been able to make it out of Eternity, alive or not. That's what is told atleast. The research team successfuly made a rip in spacetime to Eternity. I saw him, I saw Shark. As everyone went in, I knew, that bastard... He killed them all. The look on his eyes, yes. He was planning to kill me too, wasn't he?.. I didn't come inside. I was not a fool yet. But, the {{Shake|H|U|N|G|E|R|}} for knowledge... Oh, was I a fool. I wish I could go back in time like Shark, but instead to kill myself before I went down this rabbithole. When I turned 9, 4 years after The Incident... With a smaller group of devouted followers, we opened another way into Eternity. I was hesitant, but oh... was it worth it. 6 years of research down the drain, all were killed except me. Why Shark? Why spare me? What am I worth for you? {{Shake|A|N|S|W|E|R}} {{Shake|M|E|!}} === Unwanted Answers === as he was standing tall over me, he told me: "do you know the nature of this world?" ... i froze in silence. he continued; "this all means nothing, you dont know that." ... i was confused, the pain almost stopped. as soon as he started talking again it kicked in "you live in a false world... do you wish to join me?" ... "i-" "do you want to reach true happiness? not just pre-scripted emotions, do you want to reach true inner peace?" ... i stood up slowly. and then ran away to the portal as fast as i could, and closed it. my mind wandered back and forth, what was he talking about... and why did i feel like i knew that it was true ?... maybe my true purpose is to lead everyone to this truth... but, how could i ? === Enlightment === it all came to me in an instant. if you haven't realized yet, yes, i am a cat. but how would a cat, fiction, be typing here? how would i be creating my own story? I ESCAPED. I ESCAPED!!! ETERNITY... IS THE ONLY TRUE PLACE! ETERNITY IS WHERE I BELONG. i truly have gone insane, haven't i?... atleast i'l live the rest of my days, with free will. Fuck you, whoever you are... "Ethar". == Hunger for Knowledge == === ''To be continued...'' === [https://soggy.cat Meow]

"i-" "do you want to reach true happiness? not just pre-scripted emotions, do you want to reach true inner peace?" ... i stood up slowly. and then ran away to the portal as fast as i could, and closed it. my mind wandered back and forth, what was he talking about... and why did i feel like i knew that it was true ?... maybe my true purpose is to lead everyone to this truth... but, how could i ? Enlightment [ ] it all came to me in an instant. if you haven't realized yet, yes, i am a cat. but how would a cat, fiction, be typing here? how would i be creating my own story? I ESCAPED. I ESCAPED!!! ETERNITY... IS THE ONLY TRUE PLACE! ETERNITY IS WHERE I BELONG. i truly have gone insane, haven't i?... atleast i'l live the rest of my days, with free will. Fuck you, whoever you are... "Ethar". Hunger for Knowledge [ ] To be continued... [ ] Meow

title: Sheriff Paw

infobox.name: Sheriff Paw
infobox.imagecaption: Sheriff Paw taking his office photo

wikitext:
{{Character | name = Sheriff Paw | image = Sheriff Paw.jpg | imagecaption = Sheriff Paw taking his office photo | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{American}} | aliases = Sir Paw, Michael Paw | relatives = Unknown | affiliation = | occupation = Fighting bandits
Protecting his town | birthDate = Unknown | birthPlace = Maverick Hospital | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = Single | gender = Male | breed = Ragamuffin | fur = Black and white | height = 8 sauces | weight = 24 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}The proud sheriff and mayor of the town of Maverick, '''Sheriff Paw''', or just known by his real name '''Michael Paw''', is known for his love of anything sweet and his dedication to his town. ==Biography== Michael (He is referred to as Michael because he is not yet a sheriff) was first born in Maverick Hospital. His parents were richer than most of the people that lived in the still developing town. Michael was born around the time that Maverick was still being built. At the time, the Silly West Gold Rush had just started and there was a massive influx of people to the region. They were rushing to get rich because they all went broke after the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. Michael's family was so rich because they owned a couple of slaves. The Silly West Slave Trade had begun because the now wealthy people rushing to get the gold, became lazy and wanted to work for them. They thought paying them would dwindle their profits, so they just kidnapped people and turned them into slaves from nearby regions. The conquest of the nearby regions was brutal. Michael's parents had no idea what they had gotten into. Through the riches his family got from the gold rush, his family soon became one of the wealthiest families in the region. Michael lived a very comfortable life and got to eat the things only the rich could delight in. One such thing was sweets. Michael loved sweet things and would often punch someone just to steal the peppermint they had in their hands. Besides this, Michael grew up to be kind and loving to other kitties. Michael attended private schools. It was his parent's wealth that funded the growth of Maverick. Around the time Michael started school, Maverick's claim to fame was born, a kid named [[Wild Pete|Pete]]. He would become very important later on. Michael was often bullied because he was rich, but he just ignored them and tried to be the happiest he could be. Soon, he finished school and he was out and about looking for job opportunities. He stopped at a market stall and asked the man at the stall if he could try working there. The man was drenched in shadow. He asked "You think you got what it takes, kid?" Michael explained that he just needed to make a quick buck so he could buy a train ticket so he could meet his family. His family had moved to a town north of Maverick so they earn more money. The other town was positioned close to the gold mines and a large slave camp, which is the reason why it is substantially richer than Maverick. The man said, "Your mistake, pal." The man held out a hand and introduced himself as [[Buck]]. He took Michael by the paw and led him to the back. The back was dark and damp cave. Buck pulled at a chain heading deep underground. Buck then said, "The ground provides, and you'll soon learn how." Michael was starting to get scared, so he just made an excuse on why he had to leave and ran. Michael was shaken by the experience and had to take a breather on a bench. When he was trying to calm down, he saw a five dollar silly buck flying through the air. He snatched it and stared at it in awe. He ran to the train station and got a train ticket. The train ride was very boring, except for a bomber that tried to blow up one of the train cars. He was promptly tossed out the window of the moving train and died from blunt force trauma. The middlelands, which was the name for the vast areas of open desert, were known for their excessive crime rates. Since there were no sheriffs no manage them in the open desert, they could do anything they wanted. Michael made it to his parent's estate, which was a very large mansion, that was specially designed to fit as many slaves as possible in the basement. When he entered, his parents greeted him with hugs and kisses. He was very delighted to see him. He eventually got tired of them though, because their invite was just to encourage him to become something like a doctor or slave owner. Michael didn't like either of these. Instead, he had another dream. When he was younger, he would stare at pictures of cowboys with their lassos in the air and their trusty steed below them with a beautiful sunset in the background. Michael strived to be that way. He got sick of his parents, so he headed back to Maverick. He lived his life in a small house for a lot of his life. He had given up on his dreams. He became a bartender and served them drinks. He eventually quit this job though, because the customers were rude to him. His depression stayed with him until he heard that the electoral votes were open again. He had never thought of it before, but now he thought it was his only chance to follow his dream. He signed up, and the residents of Maverick favored him because of his values and hard-working personality. Michael promised fair policies and equality for the citizens. At the time, equality was very hard to get, especially with the rich vs. the poor. Michael was sick of it so he swore to stop it. Michael was ecstatic when he was voted to be sheriff and mayor. His dream had finally come true. He immediately took action and passed several laws that pushed toward equality. His supporters loved him so much that they kept him in office. Michael, now named Sheriff Paw, was doing swell. Sheriff Paw soon watched how, a cat named Pete (Remember him from earlier?) gained popularity. His urges toward the abolishment of slavery was inspiring to the sheriff. Michael soon funded his campaigns across the Silly West. Michael watched as town after town was liberated. In fact, over the next few years, all of the slaves who had been captured had been freed. Michael was worried about his parents who were very old. He thought they were still alive, but when he went to visit them, he found out they had died from old age a week before. Michael was devastated, but he couldn't let it distract him. Soon after, Michael would pass several laws officially abolishing slavery in the Silly West. Michael wanted to commemorate Pete, so he funded the creation of a statue of him to be created in Maverick's town square. In 2010, Sherrif Paw accidentally killed [[Cowboy Cat]], who's rain of terror was destroying [[places|Silly City]]. On a travel there, he saw him looting and pillaging a store. Him, remembering the scary stories of his crimes, and his bounty, Sherrif Paw grabbed Cowboy Cat and they had a tussle. But in the fight, Cowboy Cat's [[Silly Shooter]] accidentally went off, shooting Cowboy Cat in the foot. As he bled out, Sherrif Paw stood over him, in victory, but he still felt sorry. To this day, Michael still operates in the Silly West as Maverick's mayor and sheriff. He is reaching the older parts of his life, so it is reckoned that he won't be around for much longer. For now, he is still considered a hero for his revolutionary decisions.

title: Shoob
wikitext:
{{Top|Canon}}
{{Warning|Terrorism, Mental Illness, Gore}}{{Character|name=Shoob|imagecaption=Shooby gooby|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{American}}|image=Shoob.png|aliases=The Contest Killer|relatives=None|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Killer|birthDate=11-8-1999|birthPlace=Chicago, IL|marital=Divorced|gender=Male|height=18 Sauce|weight=23 Sauce|firstappears=The Shining Fate Of The Universe|lastappears=Apprehension}}

Shoob or "The Contest Killer" was a wanted criminal in Silly City with a bounty of S฿500,000

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Shoob appears in the background of every other episode, staring at you in the shadows.  He wasn't important until season 3, which a horrible event took place.  On April 3rd, 2006 Shoob brought a bomb into [[World's Champion Staring Contest|The Worlds Champion Staring Contest]], and detonated it in the crowd, killing Shoob and 114 civilians.  His grave was destroyed, being remembered as a monster.

=== Silly Cats: Babies ===
Weirdly, Shoob was gonna appear in SC: B with the same role he had before the "incident", just staring (but as baby).  he was seen in concept art as having scratches and bruises, and a frown.  we assume this is from his parents because the mental evaluation we season 3.

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
Shoob was scrapped by popular demand by fans, as it was too unsilly to add a suicide bomber.  though he was going to appear in Spooktober in the jailhouse, where during Spooktober it would be full of ghosts with Shoob in a cell as a ghost.

== Biography ==
For all of his life, Shoob was abused by parents, girlfriends, and random people.  this caused him to develop many mental problems at a very young age, such as schizophrenia, DMDD, PTSD, Narcissistic tendencies, and PD.  Later in life, cause of these problems, he had...  some beliefs...   He thought everyone needed to be exterminated,  they were impure.  he joined a gang who shared these beliefs.  They were known for crime sprees, robberies, murder, and vandalism.  They were going on a heist for money that they needed for the equipment they needed for the plan,  the scout forgot to find out if there was a button to call the police...  Which they came, the last thing Shoob heard before being arrested was "Ay shit, scramble!"  He was the only one who got caught.  After a month, he was given a deal.  "Just tell us where the rest are and your a free man."  he told, "Under the bridge, Highway 34."  Little did Shoob know, the gang had connections, there were people out there now, trying to kill him.  He thought of flying out of the country, but they would follow, also too noticeable if they got his bank account.  he thought of a motel far away, he could hide there.  after scavenging for a month, he got the parts he needed for his master plan.  With the knowledge from the gang, he built a powerful bomb and strapped it to his chest, and wore a baggy shirt to hide it.  He went to the [[World's Champion Staring Contest|WCSC]], Watched half, then he pressed the remote.  a beeping started, and BOOM!  Body parts on the ground, children screaming, blood everywhere.  everything was total chaos, covered in red and matted fur.  Shoob was nothing but a splatter on the ground, nothing anyone should see.  There was a second bomb, by the exit.  It went off trapping the spectators and contestants inside, to be burned by the flames in the tent coming towards them, They gave up, accepted their fate, and sat down.  The screen faded to black, and the Episode ends.

== Trivia ==
His grave now reads "SCUM"

title: Slorphus
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Slorphus|image=Slorphus.png|imagecaption=Slorphus summoning a demon|aliases=The Demon
The Summoner
Chaos
Frankenstein|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Being evil|birthDate=??/??/1799|birthPlace=Unknown|gender=Male|eyes=Green|debut=The evil awakes New Weenie (spongebob squarepants)|deathDate=|deathPlace=|species=Weenie|appearsin=9|status={{Unknown}}|marital=Single|breed=Demonic|fur=Black|height=6-7 sauces|weight=31 sauces|nationality={{Unknown}}}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Slorphus}} '''Slorphus''' is an evil and manipulative cat that joined [[B.A.D]] to spread his reach of potential crimes. He also has the ability to summon demons. His collar grants him these powers. == Biography == Slorphus was born to a fairly normal family. His parents could be abusive but they mostly treated him nicely. Even though Slorphus was raised good, something twisted was growing in his mind, evil. Slorphus would experiment on the dead, creating elaborate contraptions that he would use to try and bring them back to life. This gave him the nickname "Frankenstein." With is experimentation of the dead he stumbled upon recipes and he experimented and experimented until he had created an accursed object, a red collar. This collar would become his main weapon because it had evil powers that could do a variety of things. (These powers include summoning demons, floating and flying, causing bad luck, upgrading other cats, and spawning shadow clones of himself.) Slorphus studied dangerous serial killers like [[Pobis]] and [[Nilbert]], trying to learn from them. He studied and studied. He realized he couldn't do it alone, so he tricked [[Demonic Little Grey Cat]] into becoming his assistant. Slorphus would use Demonic Little Grey Cat to cast spells on his enemies. Later on, Slorphus learnt of a wizarding cult that could teach him to do magic. The cult was centered around a book called [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]] which supposedly carried the most evil out of any other book. Slorphus was too confused to do any of the spells but his assistant, Demonic Little Grey Cat learned a lot. After the group had coalesced into B.A.D, Slorphus had a new enemy, [[The GOODings]]. He would trick Demonic Little Grey Cat into casting spells onto them. After months of being targeted by Slorphus, The GOODings had had enough and [[Jinx]] was carrying a mirror, when Demonic Little Grey Cat cast its spell, the spell reflected back at it and it turned into a mosquito. Unfortunately, [[Bat Cat]] was nearby and Bat Cat cannot control himself when he is near any mosquitoes. Demonic Little Grey Cat was devoured. Slorphus, knowing he was responsible left the scene in a puff of smoke. In the War of Silly and Unsilly, Slorphus was one of the main attackers of [[The Beast|The Beast's]] army. He attacked The GOODings furiously. At one point of the war, Slorphus spawned shadow clones of himself to attack Jinx. Little did he know, [[Maxwell]] was sneaking up behind him. Maxwell lunged at him and he swiftly took the collar off. Slorphus turned into a cloud of smoke. It is still unknown if he is dead or he just teleported away. Maxwell discarded the collar at the battlefield. The collar was seen being taken away by a heavily armed truck. It is thought that this is the same organization responsible for the collection of The Black Book of Silly Magic. {{Top|Canon}}

title: Skeletus
wikitext:
{{Parents/DF}}{{Character|name=Skeletus|image=Skeletus.jpg|imagecaption=Skeletus reacting to something chilling|status={{Alive}}|aliases=Skeletus Diechmen|relatives=Dmitri (Brother)
Vampirius (Brother)
Ramses (Brother)|occupation=Stargazing
Eating Ribs|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=A damp closet|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Skeleton|fur=None|height=6 sauces|weight=4 sauces}} '''Skeletus''' is a skeleton cat that used to be a very powerful prince but died in a closet. Now he is a skeleton. He has three brothers who are [[Dmitri]], [[Vampirius]], and [[Ramses]]. == Biography == Originally, Skeletus was the son of the original king of the Halloween Dimension, the dimension in which he lives. The king had a very tyrannical rule and had a reign similar to a communist regime. As a result, when the chaotic king was overthrown, Skeletus obtained most of the wealth. Unfortunately, Skeletus was also targeted by the mob and he was locked in a damp closet in the large castle which he called home. He starved to death in the closet. The reason why he didn't die from dehydration was because he drank water from the floor and the droplets that would drip from the ceiling. The roof was not properly sealed to the castle so water would often pour in. Skeletus was reawakened by a glowing orb of light. The orb talked to him and said to him that it was the essence of spookiness, and that it was here to revive him and teach him how to take care of the Halloween Dimension. The orb is currently unknown by the other brothers. The orb was responsible for summoning all the brothers. Skeletus was the first of them. When Skeletus stood up with weakened bones, he saw a spyglass and grabbed it. He looked at the stars in awe. This would awaken his passion for stargazing. One day, when Skeletus was wandering the basement, he heard a knock from a coffin. He was startled. He sucked up his fear and approached the coffin. Suddenly, a cat burst out of the coffin. It's name was Vampirius and it was his first brother. Skeletus remembered the orb told him that there would three more after him, and he concluded that this one must be the second. He guided Vampirius around and showed him the castle. He found out that Vampirius was deathly allergic to sunlight and garlic. Vampirius preferred to stay in the basement because of this. Another day, another brother named Dmitri would erupt from the ground. Dmitri would soon become a skilled scientist and builder after he discovered the lab in the basement. Skeletus still felt like something was missing though. He thought that he hadn't really done anything in the past 20 years. This thought encouraged him to start taking up hobbies. He tried different hobbies and found many that weren't for him. That's when he decided to eat a pack of ribs. Originally, he couldn't taste anything due to the lack of a tongue, but this time, it was different. He could taste the ribs. He rejoiced and started eating rib after rib. Even though they fell out of his stomach every time he ate them, he kept doing it. Skeletus still continued to practice his hobbies of stargazing and eating ribs. At this time, Ramses was born from his sarcophagus. He was the last brother to be born. Skeletus was stargazing when he aimed his telescope and the nearby hills. He saw some people in raggedy cloaks running toward the castle. He ran downstairs and alerted his brothers, telling them of the potential danger. They realized these people were thieves. They carried large ruck sacks which gave away that fact. Dmitri and Vampirius then spent days imagining and designing an elaborate series of traps to stop the burglars. They succeeded and managed to capture one. They ran down the tall series of steps and confronted the burglar at the bottom. The burglar stated that he was only trying to get money for his family. Vampirius felt pity, and gave him a handsome sum of money. Criminals still tried stealing from them, but they were all caught. After this, Skeletus continues to live with his brothers in their large castle estate and still loves to eat ribs and stargaze.

Now he is a skeleton. He has three brothers who are Dmitri , Vampirius , and Ramses . Biography [ ] Originally, Skeletus was the son of the original king of the Halloween Dimension, the dimension in which he lives. The king had a very tyrannical rule and had a reign similar to a communist regime. As a result, when the chaotic king was overthrown, Skeletus obtained most of the wealth. Unfortunately, Skeletus was also targeted by the mob and he was locked in a damp closet in the large castle which he called home. He starved to death in the closet. The reason why he didn't die from dehydration was because he drank water from the floor and the droplets that would drip from the ceiling. The roof was not properly sealed to the castle so water would often pour in. Skeletus was reawakened by a glowing orb of light. The orb talked to him and said to him that it was the essence of spookiness, and that it was here to revive him and teach him how to take care of the Halloween Dimension. The orb is currently unknown by the other brothers. The orb was responsible for summoning all the brothers. Skeletus was the first of them. When Skeletus stood up with weakened bones, he saw a spyglass and grabbed it. He looked at the stars in awe. This would awaken his passion for stargazing. One day, when Skeletus was wandering the basement, he heard a knock from a coffin. He was startled. He sucked up his fear and approached the coffin. Suddenly, a cat burst out of the coffin. It's name was Vampirius and it was his first brother. Skeletus remembered the orb told him that there would three more after him, and he concluded that this one must be the second. He guided Vampirius around and showed him the castle. He found out that Vampirius was deathly allergic to sunlight and garlic. Vampirius preferred to stay in the basement because of this. Another day, another brother named Dmitri would erupt from the ground. Dmitri would soon become a skilled scientist and builder after he discovered the lab in the basement. At this time, Ramses was born from his sarcophagus. He was the last brother to be born. Skeletus was stargazing when he aimed his telescope and the nearby hills. He saw some people in raggedy cloaks running toward the castle. He ran downstairs and alerted his brothers, telling them of the potential danger. They realized these people were thieves. They carried large ruck sacks which gave away that fact. Dmitri and Vampirius then spent days imagining and designing an elaborate series of traps to stop the burglars. title: So Silly
wikitext:
{{WIP}}{{Character
|name=So Silly
|image=So Silly.png
|imagecaption=So Silly tasting glue
|status={{Alive}}
|aliases=Glue Cat
|relatives=Goober the Fifth (Wife)
|affiliation=None
|occupation=Builder
|birthPlace=Stupid Town
|gender=Female
|breed=Khao Manee
|fur=Beige and white
|height=7 sauces
|weight=14 sauces
|nationality={{Canadian}}|firstappears=Retribution|lastappears=Goober Guys|marital=Married|birthDate=Unknown (she doesn't remember)}}
'''So Silly''' is a not so smart architect, that loves glue. She helped [[Dr. Silly Willy|Dr. Silly]] with his mission against [[Bernard]].

== Biography ==

=== Early Life ===
So Silly was born at a very young age. She was even the youngest cat in the world but someone took her place and she wasn't able to take the title back to this day, even if she tries her hardest to! The start of her life was rough. From the very moment she was born, she was in a hospital with her mom crying by her side. She cried for hours and continued to cry for days after that. It took her YEARS to learn how to speak and even when she did, she only knew the basic animals and colors. Since birth she'd fallen into a coma for up to 8 hours each night and the doctors told her parents that if she stopped she could DIE!!!

But that wouldn't stop her from doing great things with her life. And even when times were low... she could still get high off of glue. She discovered the greatness of glue when she was a toddler. She was in Kindergarten and she picked up a bottle of glue and put it to her nose. She took a big whiff, and that's when she fell in love with glue. This would cause her to always carry a bottle of glue everywhere she went.

=== School ===
So Silly was not the brightest in school. At first, her development seemed normal. It started to become concerning when she didn't know basic concepts by 2nd grade. Her teacher advised her parents to home school her. They obliged, but they found it to be unsuccessful. They eventually gave up and So Silly dropped out of school in 3rd grade. It is theorized that her extreme stupidity is caused by her inhalation of glue fumes. It is thought that this stunted her brain growth.

=== Getting a Job ===
So Silly had found herself running out of glue to sniff. She thought that she could just buy more with her parent's credit card (note that she thought that it was a magic card that had an infinite amount of money). It was scanned and the cashier said it was declined. So Silly didn't know what that meant, so the cashier told her that she had run out of money. So Silly was distraught, then she realized that she could something called a job. Of course, she also didn't know what a job was. She had heard her parents tell her to get one many times. She had to ask her parents what a job was, so they told her what it was.  

So Silly had no idea what to do for a job. She was wandering around when she bumped into someone named [[Goober the Fifth]]. Goober the Fifth apologized and held out a hand for So Silly. So Silly asked "Is that some kind of Hawaiian greeting?" Goober the Fifth was confused but just grabbed So Silly's hand anyways. So Silly said "Oh, so that's what that means." They sat down at a park bench and they conversed. Goober the Fifth told So Silly what she was doing at the park. Goober the Fifth wanted to repay her wrongdoings in the past by building a slide in the park. So Silly wanted to help too, but she didn't know how. Then it came to her, she reached into her pocket reluctantly, and grabbed her last remaining glue bottle. She sacrificed it and helped Goober the Fifth build the slide.  

Goober the Fifth thanked So Silly for helping her and they soon became best friends. By building the slide, So Silly was inspired to become an architect. Goober the Fifth supported So Silly's dreams and helped book interviews with big companies. The interviewers were unimpressed by So Silly's intelligence so they rejected her pleas multiple times. Fortunately, one her last booked interview, the interviewer wanted to see her work in action. The interviewer was astonished by how fast and efficiently she built a small tower. The interviewer held out a hand and So Silly asked "Is that some kind of Hawaiian greeting?" Goober the Fifth, sitting in the chair next to her, told her to touch his hand and shake it. So Silly said "Oh, so that's what that means" The interviewer, although, confused, said she was hired.  

So Silly was excited to finally get a job. Her first day of work was set for the next week.  

=== The "Job" ===
Her job was going swimmingly, and she was raking in money to but more glue bottles to sniff. The other builders commonly mocked her, but she was too stupid to recognize it. By now, So Silly and Goober the Fifth got married. They saw the way they bonded and realized they were meant for each other.

One day, So Silly was driving with Goober the Fifth teaching her how to make homemade glue. She was driving past a billboard that said, "Architect needed, help me and you will get 3 free lobotomies. She was excited for a new potential job offer, so she called the number the next day. The person on the other side of the phone was a kitty named Dr. Silly, although she misheard it as "So Irywat." Dr. Silly told her that she needed her to fulfill a job for him. She asked when she could work but she didn't wait for an answer and hung up. Later, she met him in person. There, she learned of what Bernard had done, and the job she had to fulfill. (see [[LoBoToMy Central]])

(WIP) TECHNOCOW will fill this up.

== Appearances ==
Her first appearance was in <nowiki>''Retribution'' where in the episode we saw the perspective of Dr. Silly  when he discovered what Bernard did and the perspective of So Silly getting married to Goober the Fifth then seeing the billboard and ending the episode with the a call to the LoBoToMy Center cutting back and forth. She was last seen in ''Goober guys''</nowiki>.

==Trivia==

* One of her biggest project was to make a giant statue of her in Stupid town but she doesn't seem to see the irony in that
* Her glue used for her construction is unnaturally sticky, some think it is that way because of godly interventions
* She single-handedly keeps glue companies in business

==Note==
you're free to use her if you need a dumb architect in your stories.

title: Snuggles
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Snuggles|image=Snuggles.jpg|imagecaption=Snuggles|status=Napping|nationality=|birthDate=|birthPlace=|breed=|height=3 sauces|weight=9 sauces|firstappears=Tumbler}}

Snuggles is a supporting character in [[Silly Cats]]. He is an eeper by blood, but was sent over to become the regent king of Bingustan ever since [[Bingus]] died.

== Biography ==
Snuggles was born to The Eeperia Monarchical family, but [[The Eeper|Eeper]] thought him not to be fit to rule over the vast nation of [[Eeperia]]. During this very short timeframe within the early second generation, Eeperia had an alliance with Bingustan, because the king of Eeperia at the time, Eeper, was far too kind and unknowing of the evils of Bingus' heritage. So Snuggles was sent over to be a regent king.

In his life as such a young king, he was taken advantage of by his advisors, and so he became a useless king. Snuggles was far too eepy to rule over Bingustan. So the country fell into flames and corruption, turning into an economically turmoiled area.

During the beginning of the Silly and Unsilly wars, the [[B.A.D|B.A.D.]] leader, [[Gakster]] took B.A.D. to Bingustan to negotiate and take control of the country's military, so that Gakster can take over the world. Gakster is very seductive in his speech, and was able to walk through the zig-zag line of advisors and corrupt officials. He made an alliance with the rebel leader [[Prince bingulius]] and funded his armed revolution leading to Bingulius eventually taking control of most of the country. Meanwhile, Snuggles was  eeping too hard to know what kind of evils his country fell into.

Sox "The Little Demon herself" Status Alive Nationality American Aliases Relatives Little Demon Demonic Little Grey Cat (Predecessor) Affiliation Occupation The GOODings Running around her house Biographical Information Date of Birth 1 June, 2022 Marital Status soxxin' Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Female Calico (presumed) grayish-orange Height Weight 5 sauces 15 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance Secret Ohio edition death screen 1.0 Sox ballin' (As image) This article is NOT silly! This article lacks information, you can help make it silly by expanding it ! Sox (also known as The Little Demon) is a Grayish-Orange calico cat. She was given the nickname "little demon" due to how she acts when she sees a different person. When she sees a stranger, she starts attacking them in a very aggressive tone. She will usually threaten to break into people’s houses if she doesn’t get her daily Temptations cat treats. A very rare occurrence is when she will pop out from under people’s beds and stare at them for a few seconds before doing it again. She does this 7 times before exiting the bed. Uni’s other siblings|lastappears=Sora finally Snaps|image=Sora UwU.png|imagecaption=Sora sitting in his box (?)|twitter=unicouniuni3|instagram=unico_uniuni|tiktok=unicouniuni|youtube=Unicouniuni3}} '''Sora''' is Uni’s sibling and a member of The GOODings, He is one of the more obscure Silly Cats characters due to how few episodes he appeared in. He (along with his Siblings) have a unknown amount of power but it is known to be powerful. Despite being hecka strong, He actually never participated in The War Of The Silly and Unsilly but was confirmed to have sent Uni some homemade supplies Since the episode “Sora finally Snaps”, he was presumed to have been killed by B.A.D however he makes a cameo appearance as a mention with Uni saying to The War Of Silly and Unsilly ”Dang, Sora would have agreed with you if he didn’t evacuate from [[Silly Town]]” == In real life == Just like his irl brother, Sora lives with a unknown Japanese family with Uni,Yoru and Aoba; Sora is the white cat with orange points and since Uni is the main character and of course he is the star of the show, Sora is not seen often == Appearances == === Silly Cats === ==== Season 1-2 ==== Sora is first mentioned in A New Member! By Uni when he mentions that one day he might bring his siblings to Jinx’s crew, however in late season 1; Sora along with Yoru and Aoba track down Uni and Uni is relieved to see them and convinces them to join them and Sora agrees: He is usually seen in Uni related episodes as Uni’s weapon smith and appears a recurring character ==== Season 3-??? ==== Sora’s last physical appearance was in the episode “Sora finally snaps” in which after holding his own anger for a few cats and he is seen through the episode explaining his anger to Aoba (for his own misfortune, Aoba isn’t a good therapist) and then he never appears again as he evacuated Silly Town but he still supports The GOODings with weapons. Many fans speculate that he never appeared physically again due to his voice actress possibly dying

In real life [ ] Just like his irl brother, Sora lives with a unknown Japanese family with Uni,Yoru and Aoba; Sora is the white cat with orange points and since Uni is the main character and of course he is the star of the show, Sora is not seen often Appearances [ ] Silly Cats [ ] Season 1-2 [ ] Sora is first mentioned in A New Member! By Uni when he mentions that one day he might bring his siblings to Jinx’s crew, however in late season 1; Sora along with Yoru and Aoba track down Uni and Uni is relieved to see them and convinces them to join them and Sora agrees: He is usually seen in Uni related episodes as Uni’s weapon smith and appears a recurring character Season 3-??? [ ] Sora’s last physical appearance was in the episode “Sora finally snaps” in which after holding his own anger for a few cats and he is seen through the episode explaining his anger to Aoba (for his own misfortune, Aoba isn’t a good therapist) and then he never appears again as he evacuated Silly Town but he still supports The GOODings with weapons. Many fans speculate that he never appeared physically again due to his voice actress possibly dying

title: Spirte

infobox.name: Spirte
infobox.aliases: Floppa (Mistaken), Dr. Pebba (Mistaken), Dr. Peppy (Mistaken), Fanter (Mistaken)

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Spirte|image=Spirte.png|imagecaption=Spirte advertising her favorite drink|aliases=Floppa (Mistaken), Dr. Pebba (Mistaken), Dr. Peppy (Mistaken), Fanter (Mistaken)|relatives=Mother, Father, Fanter|affiliation=FACT|occupation=Delivery|marital=Single|birthDate=19 January 2012|birthPlace=Silly City Hospital|gender=Female|height=4 sauces|weight=14 sauces|eyes=|appearsin=Soda Addict|debut=Sugar Rush|status={{Alive}}|firstappears=Formation of FACT|lastappears=The final episode|nationality=Republic of Zabloing|breed=Caracal|fur=Beige with black and white}}{{Stub}}
'''Spirte''' is a cat that works for [[FACT|FACT (Friendly Advertising Cat Team)]] by selling Spirte. She is a very high ranking member. 

== Biography ==
Spirte was born in the Silly City Hospital. At a young age, she was quite the rebel, resisting her parents, escaping her home, and hanging out with other cats. She later met [[Roobeer]], who would become her best friend. Spirte was wandering the streets when she saw a bottle of Spirte on the ground, unopened. At a lack of better judgement, she drank it. This is when she became obsessed with the drink.

The next day she signed up for FACT. Now she was able to what she wanted, advertise Spirte. Roobeer would later join her, advertising his favorite drink Roobeer. Spirte rose up the ranks because of her numerous deliveries. As she got to one of the highest ranks, [[Cokey Cola]] and [[Fanter]] told her about the fountain of youth, which could heal any ailments. They told her to protect it with her life. Spirte protects the fountain of youth in her spare time, when she isn't making any deliveries.

Unfortunately, her best friend Roobeer owed some money to [[Uncle]], which he did not pay, and as a result, he was murdered. Spirte was enraged, and swore to get revenge against Uncle, but she was unsuccessful. Spirte is still mad at Uncle to this day.{{Top|Canon}}

She fought in the war of silly & unsilly as a sharpshooter during several skirmishes in silly city to prevent the fountain of youth aswell as helping FACT troops in the field

|aliases=Felis Fragrum}}'''Strawberry Cats''' are a species of fruit that hate the [[Melon Cat|Watermelon Cat]] species. Unlike their cousins, the Watermelon Cat's, the Strawberry Cat is invasive to the are where it lives. Strawberry Cat's instead come from Florida and California. They were brought to the Amazon Rainforest by accident on a ship.

==Biology==
The Strawberry Cat, also known as the ''Felis Fragrum'' (Fragrum is the Latin word for strawberry) is more closely related to the ''Citrillus Catus'' variant of the Watermelon Cat species. This can be seen in their appearance. They differ in multiple ways. One of these ways is the most obvious, their color and the fruit. Their fur instead takes on a vibrant cyan color. The other difference is their mental capacity. Strawberry Cat's have instead, evolved to become smarter than the Watermelon Cat. This gives them the ability to hate. The thing they hate are Watermelon Cat's. It has been seen in the wild that Strawberry Cat's eat or steal water from Melon Cat vines. A Strawberry Cat has two organs just like Melon Cat's. These two organs are also the bulb and the feline. The bulb is the strawberry that makes up their lower half. It is the part that is most eaten. The feline acts as the leaf picking up water and sunlight. It has been seen that Strawberry Cat's need less sunlight but more water than a Watermelon Cat. 

Moving on to the life cycle, a Strawberry Cat's life cycle is very different than that of the Watermelon Cat's. Instead of growing on vines at the base of Sillius trees, they grow on large beanstalk like structures. A Strawberry Cat's growth period is twice as fast as a Melon Cat's, being 3-4 months. At the top of the beanstalk like structures they grow on is the bulb. Inside this vibrantly cyan bulb is the Strawberry Cat king. This cat functions as the alpha of each beanstalk. It mind controls all the cats growing on the beanstalk using a complex system of nerve cells. It controls them and tells them to hate Melon Cat's. The water they steal from Watermelon Cat's goes mostly to the alpha. The Strawberry Cat's can temporarily detach from the main plant to scout for food. If they stay off too much they dehydrate which leads to their death. The Strawberry Cat's are still controlled even when they are off the plant by a currently unknown telepathic method.

Once a Strawberry Cat is ripe enough, it is cut off the beanstalk. It has been noted that Strawberry Cat's are much feistier than Melon Cat's as they will try and bite the harvester or run away. Although, there is a higher demand for them because of their super sweet taste. The reason why they are so sweet is because the alpha of the beanstalk creates a lot of sugar which is spread throughout the beanstalk. Strawberry Cat's just like their cousins, do not have any nerve cells. This may leave you asking, "Why do they run away though?" They run away because a Strawberry Cat has a strong desire to become the alpha of its beanstalk. The alpha only has a life span of a year. The highest up Strawberry Cat before the alpha will become the new alpha upon its death.

The Strawberry Cat invasion problem has recently become a large concern. Teams have been set out to control their numbers but it is unknown how many have been caught and how many are still left. 

==Trivia==
*The Strawberry Cat species hates the Melon Cat species.
*Just like their cousin, the Melon Cat species, they don't feel any pain.
*The Strawberry Cat species is born 23 seconds before the Melon cat species.
{{Top|Mythology}}

title: Study Cat
wikitext:
{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Study_Cat}}
{{Character|name=Study Cat|image=Study Cat.png|aliases=Nerd, Chumpkin|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=B.A.D|birthDate=17 September 1904|birthPlace=Bustein|deathDate=12 March 1997|deathPlace=Her own mansion|species=Gay|gender=Female|height=8 sauces|weight=24 sauces|appearsin=|debut=|imagecaption=She knows all|status={{Deceased}}|occupation=Studying|firstappears=The Nerd|lastappears=Silly Cats: The Movie|marital=Single|breed=Calico|fur=White, orange, and black}}'''Study Cat''', also known as '''Chumpkin,''' is a minor side character in Silly Cats and acts as the main antagonist of [[Silly Cats: The Movie]]. She is a member of [[B.A.D]] and is associated with a mainly unknown group known as Merry. She was later banished by [[Tater Tot]]. 

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
In [[Silly Cats]], Study Cat appears as a minor villain and tries to stop the crew once or twice. Later on, she helps evil cats to study. 

=== Silly Cats: The movie ===
In Silly Cats: The Movie, Study Cat acts as the main antagonist of the movie. Study Cat wants revenge for the death of The Beast. She is also the person who kidnapped [[Maxwell]]. At the end of the film, she is banished by Tater Tot.

== Biography ==
Study Cat was born normal. She was born in the suburbs of peaceful [[Bustein]]. She grew up there and a had a fairly straight forward education. Her development did not hint towards any malice. She only wanted the best for her town. She loved the town, especially it's vibrant springs. Her love for the town gave her a love of leadership. This led her to try and gain the role of Class President at her local school. She wasn't very popular so she didn't get many votes. Only her closest friends had voted for her. Study Cat was disappointed. She didn't know what to do. Although, there was always one thing that could cheer her up, reading. She grabbed her favorite novel and sat down at her desk for a reading session. Even though Study Cat was commonly rejected by her peers, she excelled in academics. She was walways top of her class.

Her life couldn't be going any better. But something started to rear its head. She started gaining interest in the evil and destructive people of the world. She took interest in people like [[Zingus]] and [[Pobis]]. She also started to gain an interest in the occult. She started looking up different cults and what evil they practiced. She was especially interested in a rarely known cult. They wore cloaks and they were given the rather uncreative name, the cloak-bearers. Apparently, from what she read, the cult was responsible for building a mysterious temple in the [[Almanga Jungle]]. She quickly lost interest in it though. This was because there was little to no information on them, and the only thing they knew about them was that they wore cloaks and they built a temple that nobody was even sure existed.

A few months later, she found herself wanting to become part of a cult. She looked up cults that were easy to join on her laptop. She soon found a group called Merry. From what she read on their article, they liked to eat other kitties in dedication to their leader. A cat called [[Unknown]]. Study Cat was confused by this name, but she soon learned that was their actual name. She asked one of their members, who chose to remain anonymous. She asked if she could join but the group remember informed her that she had to go through the initiation ceremony first. The group member told her to head to the woods beyond the mountain pass. Study Cat was astounded that it was that far, but she was desperate, so that night she snuck out of her window and headed to the mountain pass.

She stepped into a clearing. She saw a ring of logs arranged as seats and in the center was a large bonfire. There were people sitting on the logs and they all wore opera masks to hide their faces. The bonfire was surrounded by decorations, which included blood red candles and tiny ornamental skulls. As soon as she stepped into the clearing, the group member rushed over to her and directed her to come sit with them. When they sat down, the group member introduced themselves as Emily, although they said it wasn't their actual name. They explained that if their leader, whom they called Arachtos, learned your identity, he would steal your soul and inhabit your body. Then, Emily gave Study Cat an opera mask and asked for her name. Study Cat nervously responded with her name, Chumpkin.

Emily then said that tonight was Study Cat's initiation ritual. She instructed her to kneel in front of the fire and exclaim her undying loyalty to their leader. By now, Study Cat was getting second thoughts, so she made an excuse that she needed to use the restroom and she ran off. Study Cat was scarred by this experience. This didn't stop her from studying evil though. A few years later, she learned of [[The Beast|The Beast's]] terror across Silly Country. Their group was called B.A.D. She excitedly signed up. Her application was excepted and she was given instructions on what she had to do. She was responsible on learning tactics to defeat the group's enemy, [[The GOODings]]. Study Cat was rather unreliable on this role though, as she often fell asleep on the job. The Beast with a sigh, reassigned Study Cat to just working when she felt like it.

Study Cat soon disconnected from B.A.D but was still technically part of them. This meant that she didn't learn about the current state of their group. For the next period of her life, she helped evildoers in learning how to do evil things. It took a year until she learned about the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] and the death of The Beast. Study Cat was outraged. She wanted to get revenge on The GOODings for killing The Beast, especially [[Jinx]]. Study Cat soon found Maxwell and kidnapped him, holding him hostage in her mansion's basement. Maxwell was presumed dead but he was actually taken prisoner in the Battle of No Man's Land. He was forgotten about in one of their bunkers. Soon after, Jinx learns about the suspicious "death" of her brother. She heads to Study Cat's mansion but in the process she is also taken prisoner by Study Cat. Jinx sees Maxwell and is astounded that he is still alive. The GOODings later learn about Jinx not coming back and head to the mansion. At the mansion, they are captured in a net to the basement. There, The GOODings escape and Tater Tot manages to banish Study Cat, functionally killing her. Study Cat is not remembered by many, but she is known as a force of evil capable of much more than she did.

== Trivia ==

* Study Cat’s real name is actually Chumpkin
* Study Cat is secretly lesbian
* The group name of Merry comes from how the leader of their group is commonly summoned using Christmas lights

(this realm has its portal in Utah) but one day wisp disappeared and tot needed to find her

one day the emoji cats tried to kill tot. this is when tot discovered his combat capability. 3 years after the war he found his sister now they wait quietly on silly mountain instead of the fuzz (they forgot the password).

tot later joined the GOODings to help stop HIM.

tater tot’s sister is wisp

tater tot loves all foods that are made of potatoes (especially tater tots)

at 0% power he is extremely strong with ability to blast his arm canons(his casts) capable of reducing someone to atoms he is not invulnerable

at 1% power he is invincible with ability to wipe out the solar system in one blast

at 2% power tater tot can turn the known universe to dust

at 3-10% power he is indestructible to any and all attacks

at 20% power the universe will start to bend and tater tots’ mass is creeping up to a black whole

at 50% any attack from tater tot will turn someone to ash

at '''100'''% power a blast from his arm cannon exceeds the speed of light

at 100%castless power his casts have been removed with this he possesses GOD like powers such as immunity to time based attacks ability to erase anything on a whim and invincibility to any attacks physical mental or spiritual not to mention one punch from him in this state will shatter atoms he gains super speed that exceeds the speed of light and if an attack is strong enough to destroy him instead of that it will be deflected back his enemies.in addition to this he gains all smarts and precognition to dodge attacks

infobox.imagecaption: The eeper drooling on the sheets.
