wikitext:
{{Character|name=The Eeper|aliases=El Pano Malie|relatives=El Gato (Mistaken for)
The Meeper (Brother)
The Mimir (Brother)
The Squeeper (Nephew)
The Squeeker (Son)|affiliation=Eeperia|occupation=Eeping|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Silly City Outskirts|deathDate=|deathPlace=|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=2 sauces|weight=5 sauces|eyes=Blind|appearsin=|debut=|image=The Eeper.png|imagecaption=The eeper drooling on the sheets.|firstappears=Eeperia Meeting|lastappears=Unaired pilot and a cameo in episode 2 from season 5|status={{Alive}}|breed=Tabby|fur=Ginger}} {{Stub}} '''The Eeper''' is the first-born of the [[Eeperia]] family, and the first heir to the throne of Eeperia. He is the father of [[The Meeper]] and [[The Mimir]]. The Eeper's family tree is known to love eeping. "Unless someone like you really cares, nothing will ever get better." -The Eeper. == Biography == Eeper's origins are unknown, but it is known that he was born on the lands of modern day Eeperia. His family is the first family of silly cats native to Silly Planet, so they have existed ever since the times of The Banishing. Eeper created a complete country quite quickly, and with the same speed as Bingustan. He also established that eeping become a central part of Eeperia culture because he himself, loved to eep. Eeperia was bordering right next to the new settlements of the ancient country of Bingustan, whilst still under the rule of [[Bingus]]. Eeper made a very useful alliance with them, and so even when Bingus died and the country fell into a civil war, he sent his illigitemate son, Snuggles to rule as a regent king in place, since Bingustan had no clear ruling family. This is why many Bingustanis have inherited traits from the eeps even today. But the alliance fell short when Bingustan Was embroiled in civil war between [[Prince bingulius]] and Prime Minister Bing Bingo (the current prime minister) () as Bingulius Decided to stage a false attack against the eep royal family and blame it on Bingo causing the alliance to fall apart When Eeper died, the throne was passed down to his brother, The Meeper, and then to the Mimir. Surprisingly, since the family was so tight knit, they did not have many fights over who became king, and Eeperia is counted as one of the most peaceful monarchies. During the Mimir's rule, [[The GOODings]] were invited over to a safehouse in Eeperia in order to fight off B.A.D.s, which supported them heavily during the wars of silly and unsilly.{{Top|Canon}} [[Category:Deceased]]

Harborer of evil|birthDate=Near the beginning of time|birthPlace=The Void|species=|gender=Male|eyes=|height=6 sauces|weight=14 sauces|deathPlace=The Battlefield|breed=Beastly|firstappears=Prologue|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly Pt. 3|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{German}}
{{Nazi German}} (formerly)}} '''Edward "The Beast"''' was a former nazi soldier who rose to the rank of ''Generalfeldmarschall'' in the Luftwaffe during World War II and is the main antagonist of the Silly Cats franchise. == Biography == === Prologue === Born into a struggling family in Berlin, The Beast grew up fed up with the tough times of the Weimar Republic and the political mess in Germany. When [[Kitler]] started talking about making Germany strong and proud again, Beast thought he'd found the answer to all his problems. He signed up to join the army and threw himself into everything Nazi, going to rallies and shouting their slogans. Beast was all in, believing in Kitler's ideas and feeling like he finally belonged somewhere. When war broke out, he eagerly volunteered to fight, wanting to prove himself as a loyal Nazi soldier. But as the war went on and seeing everything is starting to fall apart, he started to blame everything on kitler reckless decisions. During the last minute of the War, The Beast assassinated Kitler for failing at everything. Beast hide somewhere where he cannot be found elsewhere and blended in with the civilized society === Season 1 (Probably) === The Beast was created after [[Bingus]] was killed and his evil soul created The Beast and his brother [[The Yeast]]. One day in the void, The Beast had to shed a tooth, this event would later be called "The Shedding." The tooth flew into the hands of [[Gakster]]. Gakster did not know what to do with the tooth, so he handed it to [[Buh]], one of the three knights. Buh decided to hand it to [[Glumbus]]. Glumbus began wearing it as a chain. This began Glumbus' and Gakster's rivalry. Gakster would trap Glumbus in a sock for three centuries and steal the tooth back. Gakster used the immense power of the tooth to grow his own gang. This gang would later be called [[B.A.D]]. [[Plimpus]] heard of this and stole the tooth, and kept it in a cache for many years. The Beast and The Yeast would cause chaos in the void until [[Bungus]] put a stop to it in an event called "The Banishing." The Beast and The Yeast were locked into deep into a cave on silly planet. One day, a kitty stumbled upon the cave by accident. This kitty's name was [[Billy]]. Billy accidentally bumped into a boulder keeping the two brothers inside the cave. This led to their escape, and the chaos they caused across the world. The Beast would later incorporated himself into B.A.D. Although he wasn't the creator of B.A.D, he soon became the face of the clowder through the sheer chaos he caused. Many kitties were scared to confront him, but one kitty decided to step up to the challenge, [[Jinx]]. The Beast soon came to know Jinx's pestering. Jinx later founded [[The GOODings]]. Jinx brought other cats along to help defeat him. These cats included [[Bentley]], [[Floppa]], [[Milly]], and [[Maxwell]] (Maxwell is Jinx's brother). In one his attempts to foil The GOODings was when he forged a weapon, he called the [[Beastenator]]. It could shoot plasma blasts. It didn't last long though, as it was destroyed by Maxwell. Before The Beast could deal with Jinx, he had an old foe to deal with. The Beast visited his brother. The Beast battled The Yeast, and he eventually gained the upper hand, striking The Yeast fatally. The death of The Yeast is thought to be a major contributor to the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]]. In this war, thousands of silly kitties were killed. Also in the war, The Beast took many prisoners and locked them in a temple called the [[Temple of the Beast]]. The temple was created by evil worshippers a long time ago. These prisoners were later freed by Jinx. At the forefront of the battlefield was The GOODings and B.A.D. Many members on both sides were killed. One of these members was [[Future Kitty]], who in a battle was fatally struck by The Beast. B.A.D on the other hand, suffered heavy losses. Plimpus realized in the midst of the war that the tooth could be used to defeat the rest of B.A.D. So he gave Jinx the tooth. Jinx knew what she had to do. She lunged forth towards The Beast, catching him completely off guard. She struck him the back completely paralyzing him. The tooth killed him. The Beast's reign of terror was finally over. But his evil and terror could be felt decades after. == Trivia == * The Beast's weapons is called the [[Beastenator]] * His real name is Edward (Not to be confused with the other [[Edward]]) ==Silly Gallery== [[File:Beast attack.png|alt=So much evil.|border|frameless|177x177px]] The Beast biting it's victim. [[Category:Deceased]]

==Early Life==
Terrance, originally a female, was found abandoned under a bucket on a construction site alongside his brother, Baddicus. They sought refuge in The Cat Cove, and soon Terrance became an enemy of $24.50, the current ruler of The Cat Cove. 

Very quickly it was found out that Terrance was actually a male. His tiny testicals could not be seen through his copious amount of fur. This marks his transition into a male cat. He then got his balls chopped off, making him a female once again. He is still referred to as a male, though. 

== Dethroning $24.50 ==
As Terrance grew, he quickly gained strength and followers in The Cat Cove. This was before Mailbox moved in, so he was by far the largest threat to $24.50's power. Eventually, he led a revolution and overthrew $24.50, and became the King of The Cat Cove. With this newfound power, he opened the borders and welcomed Mailbox and Kittytoe into the land. Soon after, he would also grant entry to Sheamus, Possum, and Motorboat. 

== Modern Terrance ==
After dethroning $24.50, Terrance sought to execute the former ruler. After much evasion, $24.50 was sentenced to air jail and eventual execution. After surviving the execution, he went into hiding. Soon after, a mysterious presence haunted Terrance's throne, and he was removed from power supernaturally. Terrance now finds himself running from the youngsters and being a momma's boy.

}}'''Terrorist Cat''' was a feared terrorist that was born in the vast Afghan desert.

==Biography==
Terrorist Cat when he was born, didn't know his parents. This is because he was born in the middle of a desert. Later in life, when he had gotten enough money by selling beetles, he flew by plane to Silly City, where he would live the rest of his life. In this time, Terrorist Cat was humble and well mannered. He would sell artichokes on the street to make a living. Although, he did have some curiosity around military weaponry. He would buy a lot of guns, and his neighbors would often call the cops on him. The cops never arrested him though because he handled the guns safely. He would keep up this act for a while but he got his guns taken away when they found out he didn't have a gun license.

Without his guns, Terrorist Cat had to find other ways to entertain himself. While reading a magazine he saw an advertisement for [[B.A.D]]. He signed up and was accepted. He joined a gang of two, [[Shoob]] and [[Criminal Cat]]. The two already had plans and invited Terrorist Cat to join them. Their plan was to bomb was to bomb the Silly City towers. They instructed Terrorist Cat to swallow some explosives to which he obliged. Shoob hijacked one of the planes. Terrorist Cat and Criminal Cat headed into one of the towers and went into the bathroom. They equipped themselves with armored vests. Criminal Cat also got on a machine gun. Shoob managed to cut off all the communications, and he prepared for the plane to strike the first tower. Terrorist Cat out of the bathroom and the bomb he had ingested went off and it destroyed one of the pillar supports for the tower. Miraculously, Terrorist Cat survived and he equipped his 2nd suicide vest. Shoob prepared the second plane to strike the second tower. It succeeded. This terrorist attack killed more than 5,000 silly kitties. Terrorist Cat, Shoob, and Criminal Cat all espaped unharmed.

The government was still on the lookout for Terrorist Cat. They eventually found where he was, his own home. The police ambushed him in a violent shootout and Terrorist Cat was shot 17 times. Unsurprisingly, he didn't survive. Terrorist Cat will always be remembered as one of the orchestrators of the most violent terrorist attack on Silly City in silly cat history.

Terrorist Cat will always be remembered as one of the orchestrators of the most violent terrorist attack on Silly City in silly cat history.

wikitext:
{{Character
 | name         =The Fry Stealer

 | status       ={{Alive}}

 | occupation   =None

 | weight       =6 sauces
 | firstappears =The Fry Heist
 | lastappears  =The Fry Heist
 | twitter      =
 | instagram    =
 | tiktok       =
 | youtube      =
}}'''The Fry Stealer''' is a small kitten that loves to steal fries from unsuspecting kitties.

==Biography==
The Fry Stealer was born in a McDonalds. He loved it there, especially playing in the play place. He became friends with the regulars. One regular caught his eye though, [[Cheeseburger]]. The ferocity at which he ate his big macs intrigued him. The Fry Stealer was prohibited by the employees to eat any of the food, especially the fries. Cheeseburger reminded him that he can't let others tell him what to do, and The Fry Stealer took some fries and ate them. It was like heaven. The Fry Stealer became obsessed with fries and would steal them out of customers hands whenever he got the chance. The employees were mad that it kept happening even when they yelled at him to stop, so they kicked him out of the restaurant. The Fry Stealer was upset, this was his home, and they just kicked him out of it with no remorse. The Fry Stealer continued stealing fries, by sneaking into the restaurant at night or hiding in the dumpster until they threw away the leftover fries. The employees caught on though, and they locked the doors and the dumpster to prevent The Fry Stealer from stealing anymore fries.

The Fry Stealer gave up, seeking that he couldn't steal from this restaurant anymore. So, he began to move onto other restaurants. He became a McDonalds location's worst fear. The company was losing a lot of money, so they sent people to get him but he escaped, unscathed every time. The Fry Stealer was planning something big, the ultimate fry heist. He knew about a secret fry vault deep underground, protected by the strongest of personnel. He planned and planned, and on the 2nd of March of 2023 he started his plan. He would hack into the security systems and disable the lasers and cameras. And then he would distract the guards by exploding one of big mac canister outside of the building with C4's. He still had one last problem, he didn't know the code to the vault. He guessed and typed 832 into the vault and it opened. Right before him was the largest stockpile of fries he had ever seen. The golden glow of the salted potatoes lured him in. He jumped into the pile and basked in joy. Little did he know that when he blew up the big mac canister, he also blew up the ketchup canister as well. He started hearing the screams and the sound of a wood chipper. He realized who it was, but he thought it was only a story. It was the infamous and extremely dangerous, [["832"]]. The Fry Stealer dashed out of the vault, carrying as much fries as he could, he didn't turn back, as he was afraid of what he could see.

The Fry Stealer, even with the trauma of the "832" incident, gained the reputation of McDonalds biggest enemy. He costed millions in stolen fries and almost made McDonalds bankrupt. He is still on the run to this day. His capture is the highest priority to McDonalds. His friend Cheeseburger is now his mortal enemy, as he is the CEO and the creator of McDonalds.

|affiliation=Eeperia|occupation=Mimimiing|marital=Single|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Silly City Outskirts|species=Eeper|gender=Male|height=4 sauces|weight=16 sauces|eyes=Blind because of mimimimimmimmimim|appearsin=Season 1 credits|debut=The first credits|image=The Mimir.png|imagecaption=The only image of mimir, found in the credits of every episode.|nationality={{American}}|status={{Alive}}|breed=}}{{Stub}} Not to be confused with [[The Eeper]], '''The Mimir''' is a cat who eeps so hard he mimimimimimimis, which is the hardest form of eeping. When he mimimimimimimimimis, he is able to enter the land of eepers, where he can see other eepers eeping and give them dreams. Out of all of his family, he is the most dedicated to the [[Eeperia]] way. The Mimir is the third born of his brothers, The Eeper and [[The Meeper]]. ==Biography== The Mimir was born in a pickup truck on the outskirts of Silly City. The area is known for being filled with crime. Luckily, The Mimir was brought safely to downtown Silly City. The Mimir is almost always eeping, which makes it impossible for him to land jobs. Which is why he is broke and currently relies on the money made by The Meeper to live. He hasn't done a lot besides waking up once in the summer of 2016. He has not been seen awake since. At this momemnt The Mimir is still eeping to this day and shows no signs of stopping. He is currently lying in a cot near the Silly City Outskirts in his family's home.{{Top|Canon}}

title: The Pizzer
wikitext:
{{Character|name=The Pizzer|image=The Pizzer.png|imagecaption=Pizza Boi|status={{Alive}}|aliases=Pizza cat Tasty Snack(mistaken for)|relatives=|affiliation=None|occupation=Pizzing
Pizza place worker|birthDate=30 January, 1999|birthPlace=Silly City Hospital|deathDate=Pizzer never dies|deathPlace=None|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Egyptian Mau|fur=Grey and black|height=14 Sauce {with pizza)|weight=33 Sauces|firstappears=Pizza Pie|lastappears=Food Fight}}{{Top|Canon}}The Pizzer is an Egytian Mau with a slice a pizza permanently affixed to his head. He likes pizza. == Biography == The Pizzer's life began like any other normal silly kitty. He was born in the Silly City Hospital. He was born to a middle-class family. The Pizzer found his love for pizza at a young age, when he snatched a piece of pizza off of a table. One day, during one of his famed pizza parties (These parties were extravagant, you can hear the music from two blocks away), a piece of pizza fell on his head. The pizza perfectly fit. The Pizzer would parade around with it on his head, proclaiming his love for pizza. Unfortunately, The Pizzer was hit by a stray evil spell by the [[Wizard of Spells]]. This spell would result in the piece of pizza, becoming part of him. This means that the pizza cannot be removed by any means other than at the atomic level. The Pizzer currently works at a pizza place, so he can fund more of his pizza parties.

== Appearances ==

==== Silly Cats: ====
The Shadow Lurker works with the [[The GOODings]] in the episode The coming storm, in which he hunts for [[gakster]] alongisde [[Maxwell]] & [[Big Poo]] but fails in the end due to him being attacked by [[George]] (resulting in a draw in which both parties were forced to retreat). After This (and a few times before) he makes a small or cameo appearance taking down one of his bounties

== Biography ==
The Shadow Lurker Is a cat that can often be found hiding in dark enclosed spaces pretending to be a shadow. He is a professional bounty hunter and uses his shadow lurking to sneak up on his targets. His Capture rate against his marks is 95% with only two individuals evading his capture. Those being Gakster and [[Bentley]]. He is A big name in the criminal underworld taking bounties from the likes of  [[Babem]] and [[Uncle]]. He is very Picky About His Targets And only targets those who he think deserve their bounty. He in part does this to fund the glumblers and the freeing of [[Glumbus]] as he is personal friends with glumbus

title: The Snoozer

wikitext:
{{Character|image=Die.png
|imagecaption=The Snoozer sleeping with a carrot plushie|status=eepy|nationality={{Japanese}}|aliases=The eeper, munchkin, sleepy cat|relatives=None|affiliation=Unknown|occupation=snoozing the day away|birthDate=unknown|birthPlace=A star|gender=Unknown|breed=Tabby|fur=White with tan stripes}}{{Stub}}

== About ==
The Snoozer also known as eepy cat, sleepy cat, munchkin, and other names relating to slumber, is what appears to be a tabby cat who is known for sleeping on beds with various types of items. The Snoozer has been described as an otherworldly being, capable of erasing matter and time as we know it if they exit their slumber.

== Origin ==
While no exact origin is detailed, The Snoozer is believed to originate by a Japanese poster, uploading videos of themselves tucking The Snoozer into bed. The Snoozer gained popularity on out of context cat accounts and just random posts with the Snoozer sleeping with a random item. Many images have been edited and shared across social media like twitter and discord.

== Biography ==
The Snoozer was born at the beginning of time in the heart of a star. From what we can gather, they are a harmless tabby cat with the anomalous property to sleep for an indefinite amount of time. X-Rays have shown that The Snoozer has an antimatter bomb in their chest that when startled, is theorized will detonate and effectively erase the universe. They ended up on Silly Planet through undisclosed means, and has laid in a bed dormant.

== Trivia ==

* The Snoozer is nicknamed differently and interchangeably, most notably the sleeper, sleeping cat, munchkin, and a bunch of Japanese stuff i cant name here because i am a dumb American.

* If you want to indulge in Snoozer content, reverse image search the image listed on the right.

The Squeeper is also a well-known singer. He is a member of [[Eeperia]], because he is a member of the family even though he is not eepy. The Squeeper's real name is Charlie "Squeep" Pillsberry. == Biography == The Squeeper was born in the Silly City Hospital. He was born to a very rich father, The Meeper. Unexpectedly, The Squeeper was not eeping upon birth. In fact, as he grew he didn't eep as much as the others. He also, slowly, turned his eeping prowess into a squeeping prowess. To The Meeper's surprise, his son was actually interested in the music industry. The Squeeper wanted to use his squeeping prowess to sing. The Meeper embraced this ideology and gave The Squeeper some money to start his career. The Squeeper took off, as his way of singing surprised and impressed other silly kitties. He gained fame and this fame would allow him to collaborate with other artists like [[Yoinky]] and even with his own father, where they made the song "Squeepin", which was an instant hit. Today he lives luxuriously and his happy with how far he has come.{{Top|Canon}} [[Category:Characters]]

==Abilities==
The sitter is a very unique kitty because she can clone herself an infinite amount of times, when he does him and his clones all sit around campfires and tell silly stories.

What a strange kitty.

raw_text: The One Of Them "Just two of them" Status Unknown Nationality Russian Aliases Relatives William and Thomas Just two of them Affiliation Occupation Goob Being one of them Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth Unknown Bed Date of Death Place of Death Shortly after the war of the silly Ruined village Physical Description Gender Fur Color Male Grey and fluffy Height Weight 1 sauce 5 sauces Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance The Wrath Of Toby (Filler Arc) The Wrath Of Toby (Filler Arc) One of the two of them. The two of them were considered heroes until they attempted to stop Toby . The fight was going in their favor until Toby threatened to destroy their village and all the kittens inside. They then turned themselves into Toby to try and protect the village. They are now stuck on a bed at the edge of the universe, imprisoned and depressed they decided that they would sing a song about the two of them. Toby hated the fact they were finding joy in hopelessness and he got mad... now there is only one of them left, singing the song about the other friend he used to sit on the bed with. The village he once aimed to protect has been destroyed, his only friend was killed by Toby. Nobody knows if the one of them is alive since hes so deep in space its like Schrodinger's cat Both them and Toby's story are in a filler arc called " The Wrath Of Toby "

title: Thurston Waffles
raw_text: Farewell, Thurston Waffles Unfortunately Thurston Waffles has passed away in real life due to nasal cancer at 8th September 2022 . May Thurston Waffles rest in peace. [ Source ] Thurston Waffles "The one who meows" Status Deceased Nationality British Aliases Relatives None Unknown Affiliation Occupation Meowerland President Of Meowerland Biographical Information Date of Birth Place of Birth 6-9-2007 United States Date of Death Place of Death 1-24-2022 United States Marital Status Single Physical Description Gender Breed Fur Color Girl Turkish Van White Height Weight 18 Sauce Same as cuh Appearances First Appearance Last Appearance The Battle Of Meow Evil Cat's Attack Social Media Instagram ThurstonWaffles thurstonwaffles YouTube ThurstonWaffles Thurston Waffles is a white cat that meows. He appears as a side character most of the time during the show and is usually shown doing his iconic scream meow. Similar to other side characters not much is known about him other then the fact that he was born with much stronger vocal cords then other cats allowing him to scream so loud. At the end of the show he fights in the war of the silly where he is then killed by evil cat, though before he dies he releases the loudest meow ever heard which was said to echo around the world hurting cats ears. In real life it is theorized that he has died of cancer

His picture is usually used to say "ok." because of his large hand with a thumbs up, the cat species, behavior and other thing linked to the cat are still unknown. Research [ ] However, scientist and cat vet has been looking for the cat owner to ask the owner if they can research or learn more about the cat. Unfortunately according to the internet the cat is already dead however this was proven false because when their source was found it was sketchy website that tiktoker actually believe. This ended up spreading but fortunately it was quickly confirmed as false, the cat is still confirmed to be alive.

title: The Yeast
wikitext:
{{Character|name=The Yeast|aliases=The Beast (Mistaken for)|relatives=The Beast (Brother)|affiliation=The GOODings (Formerly B.A.D.)|occupation=Fighting with his brother|marital=|birthDate=1930|birthPlace=Berlín, Weimar Republic (Now Germany)|deathDate=|deathPlace=Somewhere in Silly City|species=Evil|gender=Male|height=14 Sauces|weight=36 Sauces|eyes=black|image=Yeast-gif.gif|imagecaption=The Yeast yeasting about.|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{Nazi German}} (Formerly)
{{German}}}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/The_Yeast}}{{Stub}}The Yeast is the brother of [[The Beast]], He was a former nazi soldier along with his brother however he was in the ''generaloberst'' ranks of the Luftwaffe, A tier lower than his brother; He is a major antagonist turned minor duetergonist in the Silly Cat Universe == History == === Prolouge === Born into a struggling family in Berlin along with his sibling, The Beast. He grew up fed up with the tough times of the Weimar Republic and the political mess in Germany. When [[Kitler]] started talking about making Germany strong and proud again, Yeast was convinced by The Beast to support the nazis, after he thought he'd found the answer to all his problems. He signed up to join the army along with his brother and threw himself into everything Nazi, going to rallies and shouting their slogans as long as he and the Beast were together. It got into the point where he was all in, believing in Kitler's ideas and feeling like he finally belonged somewhere. When World War II broke out, he eagerly volunteered to fight, wanting to prove himself as a loyal Nazi soldier just like his brother and even went near his ranks. After sometime he was captured by the British, never knowing about the fact that Kitler was assasinated by his brother. After being spared by some British officers, he went back to Germany were he would blend in with the rest of society === Season 1 (?) === [[Category:Deceased]]

{{Stub}}

{{Top|Canon}}Canny Cat is a brave warrior, who fought with his own brother and sacrificed himself for the greater good of the Silly Universe.

== Trivia==

=== Early Life===
'''Uncanny Cat''' is the Dark side of Canny Cat, His '''Dark''' aura covering all over his body, He can't escape from the '''darkness,''' He is permanently '''UNCANNY''' 

===Canny VS Uncanny Fight===
In the Main universe, the canny cat was sitting peacefully in the Comfy chair. Suddenly Uncanny cat from the negative universe attacked the canny cat, as a brave warriror the canny cat 

===The Lab===
Canny Car packed his bags and went on a long journey for the 'Secret Lab' that was abandoned and, in folklore, had a secret gem that could turn you into a powerful being. Canny Car searched and searched for weeks and months, but to no luck. As Canny Car was going to give up, he saw it. The Lab. He quickly ran over to it, banged on the door, and tried sneaking inside, a few moments later he had found the gem. He grabbed it and before he knew it, he was transformed into the Uncanny Cat. Canny Car didn't have control of his body anymore, and the Uncanny Cat took data from Canny Cars mind. Since in Canny Cars mind, it is mentioned he wants 'revenge on '''Canny Cat'''<nowiki/>', that makes the Uncanny Cats soul think to DESTROY '''Canny Cat'''.

===A Fight===
'''Canny Cats''' fame had come from the fact that he joined the military and was a solider with 'different colored eyes'. During a war, the Uncanny Cat snuck up behind '''Canny Cat''' and began fighting him, with a powerful beast and an entire army trying to kill you, '''Canny Cat''' couldn't fight back and was badly injured. Uncanny Cat was shot multiple times, and he seemed to have died. They dragged '''Canny Cat''' away and to a hospital.

===Universe In My Hands===
Uncanny Cat gets stronger when he is harmed, so when he was shot multiple times, he gained power. As Uncanny Cat awakened, he started causing destruction upon the town that '''Canny Cat''' lives in, they sent some police after him, that made him stronger. The army went after Uncanny Cat, stronger stronger STRONGER! Uncanny Cat began to grow in size, he began to fly into the sky, gravity seemed to have been deleted as everyone began floating into the air, Uncanny Cat began a horrifying inky monster... '''Canny Cat''' had realized the monster was his brother, and he knew he had to do something.

===Sacrifice===
'''Canny Cat''' noticed that he could see Uncanny Cats heart, as the inky beasts chest opened to reveal sharp teeth. He hatched a plan, get a spear, anger Uncanny Cat, charge forward as he opened his mouth and impale his heart.

'''Canny Cat''' began to act quick, slowly trying to move while floating around in the air, he saw a long piece of wood and grabbed it, he shouted out to Uncanny Cat, who screeched at '''Canny Cat''' and began flying towards him, the chests mouth opened to reveal the heart, this is it! '''Canny Cat''' got the piece of wood in position as Uncanny Cat charged towards him, the beasts chest mouth widened and widened until...

The piece of wood went through the beasts heart, but in the process, the chest mouth closed and '''Canny Cat''' was trapped. gooey acid began to fill the beats inside, where '''Canny Cat''' was stuck. He began trying to escape, but it was no use. He burned in the acid. As the beasts stomach filled with acid, he exploded and Uncanny Cat was no more.

===Aftermath===
The only thing that remains of '''Canny Cat''' is the piece of wood he used. He will never be forgotten.

"Uncle" Is a mafia boss in the silly cats universe, known as uncle for being involved in many events, he is quite high up in the mafia
== Life and crimes ==
He was born in a hospital in paris

=== Education and early years ===
His education was rough, painful at times

"Yknow, learning was really what started my crime" was something uncle said, he however said it was a joke minutes after
He soon found himself stealing candy from stores and making small explosives, his mother was oblivious to this

=== Rise to fame ===
After he found himself staring in a music video as a dancer and backup singer, he took it on and made his own music, it got mocked but that didn't deter him

He moved all the way to the most populated country to try and get more popular

=== The downfall ===
Soon he lost money and interest from his few fans, and turned to his early years for some inspiration

The first heist was with [[Demetrus P. Dinklebottom|Demetrus]], he made dynamite to blow up a bank to steal money, he however got caught and sent to jail, breaking out easily he continued his life of crime

He broke into many banks and joined forces with many mafias to make more money

=== Another uprising ===
He soon became rich, becoming the leader of many mafias to join into a bigger mafia, uncle made cash, profit and fame

=== The end ===
After the beast awoke, his mafia was split up into many small groups, he decided to retire and live the rest of his life being a good person

He used all the money he had gained to continue making music and making other people happy

title: Vampirius
wikitext:
{{Parents/DF}}{{Character | name = Vampirius | image = Vampirius.jpg | imagecaption = Vampirius exploring the castle grounds | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = | aliases = Vampirius Diechmen | relatives = Dmitri (Brother)
Skeletus (Brother)
Ramses (Brother) | affiliation = | occupation = Hiding from sunlight
Drinking the finest wine | birthDate = Unknown | birthPlace = Castle Basement | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = Single | gender = Male | breed = Vampire | fur = Black | height = 6 sauces | weight = 22 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Vampirius''' is a cat that resembles a vampire. He has three brothers named [[Dmitri]], [[Ramses]], and [[Skeletus]]. Vampirius is much like a traditional vampire, he is allergic to sunlight and garlic. He is born in a family that all share the trait of being spooky. ==Biography== Vampirus was born in his castle basement. He was born in the Halloween Dimension. He was deathly allergic to sunlight, so he was confined in the basement. The basement was very boring to him so he started planning on how to make a cloak that could allow him to survive in the sunlight. He kept failing and failing until he eventually succeeded. The cloak worked but would only allow him to be outside for short periods of time. When he wasn't trying to explore the outside he was taste tasting wine, which was one of his favorite activities, and it still is today. His brothers originally disliked him because of his snobby personality, but they started feeling pity for him in his disabled state. So they started to treat him nicely. Vampirius didn't know how to react at first but he realized the kindness of his brothers and started acting the same. Now that the brothers were on good terms, they started working together more. The brothers were living peacefully until one day, when the Giant Skeleton Cat stood in front of their castle and threatened to destroy it. The only way it said to save their castle was to give it peanut butter. It was a weird request for an all powerful deity, but they obliged. From then on, they went undisturbed. Many kitties knew there were lots of riches hidden within the castle. The reason why the castle held so much wealth was because it was all inherited from the original king of the Halloween Dimension, who was their great great grandfather. The king had a tyrannical reign similar to a communist regime. The residents of the Halloween Dimension eventually got fed up and overthrew him. Still, the enormous wealth he had was in a vault underneath the estate. Many kitties stole from them and they were starting to run out of money. They had to think of something quick. That was when Vampirius did the unthinkable, watch a Christmas movie. The movie was ''Home Alone'', and upon finishing it, Vampirius was filled with ideas. It only came at the cost of permanenetly staining the sofa with vomit after seeing a Christmas tree. With the help of Dmitri, a skilled builder, Vampirius built an elaborate series of traps that could catch any burglar. The brothers at in wait at the basement door. That was when a criminal went in and they watched as he got trapped in the traps they had created. They ran down the tall set of steps and confronted the thief in the net they captured him in. The thief said that he was only trying to get money to feed his family, and that this was the only place he knew had any. Vampirius, feeling bad, gave a couple hundred coins to the criminal. They cut him out and let him go. Still, even after that, thieves still tried stealing money from them, but they were always captured in the traps they had set. Vampirius lives peacefully with his brothers in his castle estate. He still taste tests wine and he continues to use his cloak to explore the castle grounds.

The king had a tyrannical reign similar to a communist regime. The residents of the Halloween Dimension eventually got fed up and overthrew him. Still, the enormous wealth he had was in a vault underneath the estate. Many kitties stole from them and they were starting to run out of money. They had to think of something quick. That was when Vampirius did the unthinkable, watch a Christmas movie. The movie was Home Alone , and upon finishing it, Vampirius was filled with ideas. It only came at the cost of permanenetly staining the sofa with vomit after seeing a Christmas tree. With the help of Dmitri, a skilled builder, Vampirius built an elaborate series of traps that could catch any burglar. The brothers at in wait at the basement door. That was when a criminal went in and they watched as he got trapped in the traps they had created. They ran down the tall set of steps and confronted the thief in the net they captured him in. The thief said that he was only trying to get money to feed his family, and that this was the only place he knew had any. Vampirius, feeling bad, gave a couple hundred coins to the criminal. They cut him out and let him go. Still, even after that, thieves still tried stealing money from them, but they were always captured in the traps they had set. Vampirius lives peacefully with his brothers in his castle estate. He still taste tests wine and he continues to use his cloak to explore the castle grounds.

"The Strongest" |status=Alive |relatives=Liam, Jinx, Maxwell |occupation=Sitting in a box |birthDate=March 27 2020 |birthPlace=Box |marital=Single |gender=Male |breed=Minuet Napoleon Tuxedo Cat |fur=Bicolor |height=4 sauces |weight=15 sauces |nationality={{Japanese}} |firstappears=A New Member! |lastappears=War of the Silly |twitter=unicouniuni3 |instagram=unico_uniuni |tiktok=unicouniuni |youtube=Unicouniuni3|affiliation=godly beings}} {{Stub}} '''Uni''' is a silly little cat goober who holds an unstable amount of power. He has stubby legs and a black face except for his chin, giving him a :3 appearance. He looks a lot like [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YRvOePz2OqQ Maxwell] but has enough differences to be told apart. He loves boxes, and constantly fuses into them. ==In real life== Uni is owned by an unknown family in Japan with 3 other lil' goobers, his sister Yoru, Aoba, and Sora. You can tell Uni and Yoru apart by the white patterns on their faces. Uni also loves to go in boxes :3. ==In the series== Uni is of a higher power, an omniscient being that watches over the events of the series but refuses to take any action. It is unknown if this lack of action is because of disinterest or because of some universal law preventing action. His power is contrary to his adorable appearance, leading many to underestimate the strength he wields. Uni and Yoru often get into fights to show off their power. Due to Uni's short legs, he is usually at a disadvantage. Uni is secretly the great and legendary Uni Claus around the Christmas season. He delivers treats and goodies to all good silly kittens and kitties. Very little is known about his backstory or purpose but one thing that is very clear is that he is very cute :3. ==Biography== {{Top|Canon}}Uni was born in a box near the edge of the universe. He wandered far in wide looking for a purpose. when he found his purpose he went to study cat for advice on how to feel himself. Study cat told him that finding himself was the best way. So Uni changed his way. In his Culture Hatsune Miku was popular So he became a singer finding his place on the stage making the world feel like a better place. === Pride === Uni is a icon in the lgbtqa+ community Being Gay or trans or bisexual. He is loved by fans and other around the world. [[Category:Alive]]

title: Unknown
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Unknown|image=Unknown.png|aliases=Arachtos|relatives=None|birthDate=Unknown|birthPlace=Pocket Dimension|deathDate=24 June 1997|marital=Unknown|gender=Male (?)|imagecaption=Unknown being summoned|status={{Deceased}}|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Being evil|deathPlace=Military Bunker|fur=Unknown|height=8 sauces|weight=25 sauces|firstappears=Indirection|lastappears=The Unknown Ritual|breed=Demon|nationality={{Unknown}}}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Unknown}}'''Unknown''' was a demonic cat that hailed from a small pocket dimension. He was responsible for many evildoings across Silly Country and beyond. He was eventually killed by [[Milly]].

== Biography ==
Unlike many other demonic cats, Unknown was created by a [[Bingus|mysterious hairless entity]]. Unknown was inserted inside a small pocket dimension created by the same entity. Unknown waited in this pocket dimension for centuries. His creator had forgotten about him. He did not care about this though, as his disdain for [[The GOODings]] was at the top of his head. His creator had planted the seeds of evil within his mind. That led him to hate every good and nice cat. All Unknown wanted to do was destroy The GOODings. He stayed in this dimension for what ages until he saw a light emerge from the pitch red around him.

It was an opening of some sort. He climbed through the hole and emerged through the floor of someone's garage. He was confused at the kitty standing in front of him. He was surrounded by red Christmas lights. It turns out that this kitty had researched ways to summon demons and the kitty had stumbled upon an online version of [[The Black Book of Silly Magic]] produced by [[Future Kitty]]. They found his way to summon him and they had summoned him in hopes he could fulfill their deepest desires. Instead, Unknown just killed the naive kitty and escaped the garage. He was on the lookout for potential nice kitties. When he found them, he would always kill them. Some citizens started to hear about these killings and many pursued him in the hopes they could kill him. Many failed though and they were killed too.

This kept on, until Unknown smelled the energies of someone being nice inside a church. He entered the dark church, looking for the nice kitty. Instead, he found a priest holding a bible and a cross. The priest knew he was coming, so he had prepared. The priest ordered his accomplice to grab him and the accomplice held him down by the paws. The priest held to the cross to his head and recited bible verses. He threw holy water at him and it seared his skin. By now, a cross-shaped burn had been scorched into his forehead. Unknown let out a beastly growl and a red pentagram made of fire burned slowly around him. Soon, the pentagram opened into a fiery pit and Unknown plummeted into the flames.

At the bottom, he was face to face with an [[Grinwatcher/Underling|Underling]]. The Underling under its rulers orders, carried Unknown to the [[Grinwatcher]]. The Grinwatcher sniffed him and recoiled in disgust He exclaimed that he was not supposed to be here. They then found where he originated but found out the pocket dimension had collapsed due to dimensional instability. They then found another pocket dimension and they tossed him inside. This pocket dimension was much bigger than his last pocket dimension. Still, he eventually became bored and sat alone for years. That was until another light emerged from the darkness. He climbed through the hole again and found himself in someone's bedroom. This kitty felt different than the first so he did not kill them. This kitty bowed down to him as if he were a god. Unknown liked the appeasement, so he asked the stranger what it was they needed. The stranger said they did not need anything and that they were only appeasing their supreme leader.

Unknown was confused so he tried to climb out of the hole but this time there were invisible shackles keeping him connected to the dimension. Unknown pulled as hard as he could but he could not budge the chains. Defeated, he slinked back into the dimension and sat, bored. Against Unknown's knowledge, the stranger he had met had grown into a group of cult members, and they called themselves Merry (Merry is literally the name of the cult). The next time Unknown was summoned, he arose in a small park. The hole was bigger so he could move more. Unknown was flattered by the attention and he was more determined to break out. This time, his followers had brought a sacrifice. Unknown proceeded to grab the sacrifice and enter his mouth. This was the way that Unknown would possess people. He now had control of the body. He ventured for days with his body, but he was soon forced out of it because he was hit by a bus.

Unknown was forced back to his pocket dimension. He was lucky though, as Merry had grown even more. They had learned of a spot that he could easily emerge. This spot was a location beyond the mountain pass and in the forest. They lit a giant bonfire and summoned Unknown once again. They were now wearing opera mask and they had an initiation ritual. These summonings and rituals went on for about a year and a half. His group had finally secured a powerful host. He possessed the host and he could finally walk again. He abandoned his followers and involved himself in evil groups. He then heard about a group called [[B.A.D]], but he didn't join until later. He caused acts of evil all across Silly Country for the next few years. One thing he helped with was the acquisition of the [[Temple of the Beast]] for B.A.D.

When the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] broke out, he hid in his pocket dimension until the war ended. After the war, he emerged from his pocket dimension. He camped out in an abandoned military bunker for the next few years. After The GOODings successfully defeated [[Study Cat]], they accidentally found Unknown trying to go back to his pocket dimension. Fortunately, [[E. Scrunk]] had just given them a reality destabilizer for whatever reason. [[Floppa]] quickly pressed the button, destroying the dimension. Unknown was enraged and he lunged for Floppa. Milly saw this and jumped in front of him with a cross in hand. [[Jinx]] kicked Unknown in the back and Milly, with a bit of hesitation, plunged the cross into Unknown's chest. Unknown fell to the floor, writhing and screaming. He glowed white in energy and with a flash of light, he was turned into nothing but a scorch mark in the floor.

Unknown is known today as one of the many sources of evil thwarted by The GOODings. His murders are taken as an example to never try internet challenges.

== Trivia ==

* The name for Merry is based off of how Unknown was mainly summoned with red Christmas lights
* Unknown was a narcissist that only gave you things if you complemented him
* He hates the smell of pine needles
* Nobody knows his true fur color since he was always bathed in a red glow
* His followers call him Arachtos
* goes by the name demon cat in the MPMC universe

==Tole Tole ==
Tole Tole/Mei Mei is a cat whose owner goes by the username of tangtang_656<sup>[citation needed]</sup>. In December 2023, the user had posted a video with [https://www.instagram.com/p/C3F5cnuJNpT/ the iconic cat being held], with the background sound as "Moka Chan Oshiete Kureta Irona Mita". During that time, the user had grown popularity. In January 2024, the user completely skyrocketed, leading to Mei Mei being known as the "Tole Tole" cat, or "Vro", turning it into a meme. Now there are videos from all across the internet with Mei Mei. One viral meme of her is of [https://www.instagram.com/p/C4JK0tGvjtm/erun.gif Mei Mei running away], that later got some background music and effects and that went viral, along with the original video that started it all.<sup>[citation needed]</sup>

==Who is Mei Mei?==
Mei Mei is a bob-tailed domestic shorthair with a black ticked tabby coat. She was a pregnant street cat when she was placed in a shelter. On the 15th of June 2022, the shelter owners contacted the user asking if they would be willing to adopt her. They happily agreed and adopted the cat now known as Tole Tole. Shortly after the adoption, they discovered she had no teeth and had injured legs, leading them to believe she had been previously abused. A few days after Mei Mei's adoption, she gave birth to her kittens. The kittens were later rehomed, so their current whereabouts are unknown. Mei Mei now lives with several other cats: Tang Tang, Nei Nei, Oscar, twins Nini & Bruce, also with other pets: dog Chestnut, rabbit, capybara Ounce, gopher Mole Mole and is well-fed and cared for in her new home.<sup>[citation needed]</sup> 

== The Oscar Family Tribe (fictional) ==
Tole Tole lives in an ''Oscar Family Tribe'', which means she is in the role of the Tole Tole, one of the top leaders of their tribe. As a Tole Tole, she fights Dole Dole either when they disagree on something, or the tribe needs to vote on a decision. The Tole Tole is also an archetype similar to the Mole Mole, where both are aggressive yet small in counterpart to the Dole Dole and Cole Cole roles, where they are passive and big.<sup>[citation needed]</sup> 

Tole Tole is one of the most important roles in an Oscar Family Tribe, without it an Oscar Family Democracy can't happen because the people would not have someone to vote on when they need to decide on something.<sup>[citation needed]</sup> 

== The Vrolings (partly fictional) ==
Recently, on the 3rd of March 2025, ''The Vrolings'' were introduced in this [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1jLOKovRI8c video] . They might be related to Tole Tole and they go by many different names: Vrolings, Vrolecules, Mini Toles, or Vromunculi. They are tiny kittens that Tole Tole takes care of in the tribe. They will take the place of the Mole Mole and Tole Tole when those roles are open in the family.<sup>[citation needed]</sup> 

==Extras==
Tole Tole videos can be found on an app called Rednote (Xiaohungshu in China) under the search term 奥斯卡和糖糖姐 (it also can be found on the [https://space.bilibili.com/8965873?spm_id_from=333.337.0.0 Chinese Bilibili]). Tole Tole content can also be found on rydrayn on [https://www.tiktok.com/@rydrayn?lang=en TikTok] or [https://www.instagram.com/rydrayn Instagram], [https://www.instagram.com/daily_tole_cat/ daily_tole_cat on Instagram], and Tole Tole fan pages. The account 2gmvugqk on TikTok contains videos of Mei Mei with the original sound, and seems to be the account posting the original videos without rydrayn's sound.  

[https://www.instagram.com/p/C3drvdDPsmA/ A tole tole edit]

title: Toby

infobox.name: Toby
infobox.imagecaption: The only image of Toby ever

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Toby|relatives=Unknown|affiliation=B.A.D|occupation=Evil >:3|birthDate=17 June 1893|birthPlace=Silly City Hospital|species=Cat?|gender=Male|image=[[File:Toby.png]]|imagecaption=The only image of Toby ever|aliases=None|status={{Deceased}}|marital=Single|breed=Calico|fur=Black & White|height=5 sauces|weight=12 sauces|firstappears=Unknown Threat|lastappears=The War of the Silly and Unsilly|deathDate=18 March 1994|deathPlace=No Man's Land}}{{Move|New Website=https://sillycatsbook.miraheze.org/wiki/Toby}}'''Toby''' was a normal kitty but he turned into a demon after he was killed. His only goal was to kill [[Maxwell]] after he died. He succeeded in killing thousands of kitties who he thought was Maxwell.

== Biography ==
Toby was normal kitty living a happy life in Silly City. He would help kitties in need and he liked to hike. At this point in his life, his life was pretty uneventful. The light in his life was his friends and family, who he cared for deeply. Until one day his life would change forever. In a fight between Maxwell and [[The Beast]], Maxwell was struck back into his family's home. At the time they were having a family reunion, so his whole family died. His friends died as well since they were also there. Toby was outraged and he swore revenge.

Toby tried killing Maxwell multiple times, but he kept accidentally killing kitties that looked similar to Maxwell. Later the SCPD (Silly City Police Department) caught on and issued a warning a warrant for his arrest. Toby went into hiding and kept killing people. On one pf Toby's killing sprees, Maxwell saw him and managed to take one picture of him, which is the only one known. For the next portion of his life he went through this cycle. Toby then learned about a group that wanted to defeat [[The GOODings]]. He joined enthusiastically, thinking he would finally be able to kill Maxwell. In one of their attacks on The GOODings, Maxwell learned about Toby. Maxwell cornered him into a corridor and killed Toby.

In heck, the [[Grinwatcher]] saw him and gave him a second chance, resurrecting him into a demon. Toby grew even more powerful. He went back into [[B.A.D]] and killed even more kitties. Toby even managed to kill some of The GOODings. Eventually, in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]], Toby would meet his end. In the Battle of No Man's Land, Toby and Maxwell went into a standoff. Toby yelled at Maxwell that he killed his entire family and that he was gonna pay. Maxwell responded saying that Toby had caused even more harm than he intended and that he had turned into a monster. After that statement, Toby lunged at Maxwell. The two fought furiously. The battle was close. Maxwell managed to knock Toby out. Toby opened his eyes to see a bible and a vile of holy water. Toby hissed. Maxwell exorcised Toby and with that Toby had finally been defeated.{{Top|Canon}}

Chupis became viral almost immediately after being posted on Maya’s TikTok account l and was given names like Wagoogus Jr, Dinky cat and clinically insane cat. Chupis continues to live her life with her mom and owner in San Diego, there are updates of Chupis on Maya’s TikTok account ( gloomyvampira ).

As of November 13th, 2023, Wagoogus Jr. has eaten 5,371 pieces of kibble. One day Wagoogus Jr. ran a McDonald's out of business because he ordered too many big macs.

== Real Life ==
Chupis AKA Wagoogus Jr. Was born unexpectedly by Meep in her owners closet. Maya (owner) did not know Meep was pregnant as she showed no signs. Meep suddenly gave birth at midnight to the legend herself (Chupis). Chupis became recognized after Maya sung a little melody to her one day and posted it a year later. Chupis became viral almost immediately after being posted on Maya’s TikTok account l and was given names like Wagoogus Jr, Dinky cat and clinically insane cat. Chupis continues to live her life with her mom and owner in San Diego, there are updates of Chupis on Maya’s TikTok account ( [https://www.tiktok.com/@gloomyvampira gloomyvampira] ).

==Trivia==

* Wagoogus Jr. likes Spongebob Squarepants
* When Wagoogus Jr.  is feeling extra silly he can float one meter off the ground
* Wagoogus is so eepy that he once eeped for two whole days.
* Wagoogus is so smol that he can spy on the enemy.
* If Wagoogus is sad he causes people minor inconveniences like taking someone else's belongings and hiding them somewhere else, playing loud and obnoxious music, and more. But he is always forgiven
* {{Rainbow|He likes to say "YIPPEEE!"}}
* He has S฿1,000,000 to his name

wikitext:
{{Character | name =Watermelon Cat | image = Melon Cat Species 1.png|Felis Lanatus Melon Cat Species 2.png|Citrillus Catus | imagecaption =A Watermelon Cat sitting on a countertop | status ={{Alive}} | nationality ={{Brazilian}} | aliases =Melon Cat
Felis Lanatus
Citrillus Catus | relatives =Strawberry Cat (Cousin) | affiliation =None | occupation =Hanging off of vines | birthDate =Unknown | birthPlace =Unknown | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital =None | gender =Melon | breed =Melon Cat | fur =Gray & Black | height =10 sauces | weight =14 sauces | firstappears =Melons! | lastappears =Melons! | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Watermelon Cats''' are a species of fruit cat related to [[Strawberry Cat|Strawberry Cats]]. They populate the Amazon Rainforest. They live among all the tribes that inhabit the forest as well. They are regularly eaten by the locals and the Watermelon Cats don't even mind. ==Biology== There are two species of Watermelon Cat, the ''Felis Lanatus'' and the ''Citrullus Catus'' (Lanatus and Citrullus are parts of the Latin word for watermelon). The different species differ in appearance with the ''Felis Lanatus'' it has a more brownish coat meanwhile, ''Citrullus Catus'' has a more gray coat. The ''Citrillus Catus'' also differs from the ''Felis Lanatus'' in that it has a large IQ, this was discovered when it tried stealing a vile of water from a biologists back pocket. The Watermelon Cat consists of two major organs the bulb which contains the fruity insides and the feline which absorbs water and sunlight much like a leaf would. These sections grow together as a Watermelon Cat grows. It will grow and size and ripeness the older it gets. The harvesting season happens every 6-8 months. In fact, the Watermelon Cat industry is bustling and is worth quite a large sum of money. They are also very easy to farm as well which is why they are so common. Watermelon Cats can be found in almost every grocery store. Thankfully, they cannot feel pain, and they are perfectly fine with being consumed. Through evolution, they didn't need any nerve cells, so they never grew any. To this day, Watermelon Cats are still farmed and sold everywhere, and they still grow in the Amazon Rainforest. Although they face endangerment from Strawberry Cats. Strawberry Cats are haters of Melon Cats and have been seen eating and stealing water from Watermelon Cats.{{Top|Mythology}}

title: Wild Pete

infobox.name: Wild Pete
infobox.imagecaption: Wild Pete taking a break at a bar

wikitext:
{{Character | name = Wild Pete | image = Wild Pete.png | imagecaption = Wild Pete taking a break at a bar | status = {{Alive}} | nationality = {{American}} | aliases = Petey, Buck-Eyed Pete, Pete | relatives = Angelina (Wife) | affiliation = | occupation = Lassoing bandits
Liberating slaves | birthDate = Unknown | birthPlace = A small house in Maverick | deathDate = | deathPlace = | marital = Married (Angelina) | gender = Male | breed = Western | fur = Beige and white | height = 8 sauces | weight = 21 sauces | firstappears = | lastappears = | twitter = | instagram = | tiktok = | youtube = }}'''Pete''', often called by his nickname, '''Wild Pete''', is a bandit catcher and liberator known for his work in the Wild Silly West. ==Biography== Pete was born in a small house in a town called Maverick. Maverick was built alongside the railroad tracks that ran all through out the Wild Silly West. Pete's family abandoned him and left him at the footstep of an orphanage. Pete was bullied relentlessly by the kids there for his small stature and timid ways. Pete took in all of the bullying and didn't repel. Pete, defeated, walked to the window of his room. He looked up at the stars, dreaming of being a hero. He suddenly had a vision, the stars spoke to him. They told him to follow his dreams and never give up. The next morning, during breakfast, the kids were about to start picking on him again. That's when Pete sucker punched the biggest one in the cheek. The large kid, named Ernie, was shocked. Pete saw his opportunity and shoved Ernie into a barrel. Ernie was the same roundness as the barrel so he became wedged inside it. Spontaneously, all at once, the other kids laughed hysterically. With that, Pete gained the respect of his peers. One day, when Pete was enjoying his freshly made grilled cheese, he saw a new kid, named [[Ernesto]], enter the orphanage. He saw the kid was bullied just like he was, so he felt bad for him. After dinner, Pete walked to his bed, and held out a hand. He asked the nighttime activities were just beginning. Pete introduced himself and he saw a glimmer of doubt in Ernesto's eye, but Ernesto grabbed his hand and responded his name. Pete took Ernesto behind the orphanage and there was all of the older kids rounded up showing their talents. The other kids were still being mean to Ernesto and told him all he got to use was a sack of potatoes. Pete shrugged, not knowing what else to do. He saw, stunned, the way that Ernesto effortlessly carved a potato into the shape of a cactus. From then on, Ernesto wasn't bullied anymore. Later on, Pete and Ernesto were released from the orphanage and went their separate ways. By the time Pete, was released, he had heard about the recent enslavement of kitties from nearby regions for the Silly West Gold Rush, which was in it's last years. This meant that the kitties running the organization started selling their slaves off to individuals who wanted to use them for their own personal gain. Pete was disgusted by this. He trained by himself for years. Pete was filled with courage. He donned his cowboy hat he had fashioned himself and his family heirloom that his mother had given to him when he was a kitten. Pete set out on his adventure. In the months that followed, the event would come to be known as the Liberation of the Silly West. The bandits started calling "Wild Pete" because of the way he destroyed their settlements and freed all of their slaves. They saw him as a tyrant, but the slaves saw him as a hero. Soon after, his liberating began he met the love of his life, Angelina. They fell in love through their love of drinking and of movies. Unfortunately, Pete had to leave his new found love due to troubles brewing within the slave trade. By now, the slave owners had heard what he was doing, and had hired mercenaries to take him out. Pete soon heard word of a huge trade happening in the mountains in the center of the wild west region. There was a train said to pass through that carried hundreds of captured civilians. Pete planned and he soon came up with a plan to hijack the train. He set out on his quest and stumbled upon the tracks. Then, he heard rustling from the bushes behind him. Suddenly, someone lunged towards him with a machete. Pete reacted fast and lassoed the mercenary. He questioned him and got the information that he was set up. The mercenary said the actual trade was happening underground. Pete knew there was no chance he could get there in time. Then he realized. He bought a couple hundred sticks of dynamite and brought them to the location of the trading site. The bandits thought they had just gotten away when they hear a gigantic "BOOM!" come from the ceiling above them. The roof of the cave collapsed and the rubble covered the bandits and guards. Pete took all of the slaves and freed them. This would be known as the last and single biggest liberation in the entire Liberation of the Silly West. After this, Pete and Angelina got married at a small church. Pete soon became the unofficial leader and defender of the Silly West. Pete was at bar when he saw a face that looked familiar. It was Ernesto. Pete felt excited and went over to greet his old friend. Ernesto recognized him and they hugged. They chatted long into the night, catching up on what they had done in the past few decades they hadn't been in contact together. Pete offered Ernesto to join him, but Ernesto declined, saying he had already found his passion. To this day, Pete's impact can still be seen today. He is commemorated by a statue situated in Maverick's town square.

After dinner, Pete walked to his bed, and held out a hand. He asked the nighttime activities were just beginning. Pete introduced himself and he saw a glimmer of doubt in Ernesto's eye, but Ernesto grabbed his hand and responded his name. Pete took Ernesto behind the orphanage and there was all of the older kids rounded up showing their talents. The other kids were still being mean to Ernesto and told him all he got to use was a sack of potatoes. Pete shrugged, not knowing what else to do. He saw, stunned, the way that Ernesto effortlessly carved a potato into the shape of a cactus. From then on, Ernesto wasn't bullied anymore. Later on, Pete and Ernesto were released from the orphanage and went their separate ways. By the time Pete, was released, he had heard about the recent enslavement of kitties from nearby regions for the Silly West Gold Rush, which was in it's last years. This meant that the kitties running the organization started selling their slaves off to individuals who wanted to use them for their own personal gain. Pete was disgusted by this. He trained by himself for years. Pete was filled with courage. He donned his cowboy hat he had fashioned himself and his family heirloom that his mother had given to him when he was a kitten. Pete set out on his adventure. In the months that followed, the event would come to be known as the Liberation of the Silly West. The bandits started calling "Wild Pete" because of the way he destroyed their settlements and freed all of their slaves. They saw him as a tyrant, but the slaves saw him as a hero. Soon after, his liberating began he met the love of his life, Angelina. They fell in love through their love of drinking and of movies. Unfortunately, Pete had to leave his new found love due to troubles brewing within the slave trade. By now, the slave owners had heard what he was doing, and had hired mercenaries to take him out. Pete soon heard word of a huge trade happening in the mountains in the center of the wild west region. There was a train said to pass through that carried hundreds of captured civilians. Pete planned and he soon came up with a plan to hijack the train. He set out on his quest and stumbled upon the tracks. Then, he heard rustling from the bushes behind him. Suddenly, someone lunged towards him with a machete. Pete reacted fast and lassoed the mercenary. He questioned him and got the information that he was set up. The mercenary said the actual trade was happening underground. Pete knew there was no chance he could get there in time. Then he realized. He bought a couple hundred sticks of dynamite and brought them to the location of the trading site. The bandits thought they had just gotten away when they hear a gigantic "BOOM!" come from the ceiling above them. The roof of the cave collapsed and the rubble covered the bandits and guards. Pete took all of the slaves and freed them. This would be known as the last and single biggest liberation in the entire Liberation of the Silly West. After this, Pete and Angelina got married at a small church. Pete soon became the unofficial leader and defender of the Silly West. Pete was at bar when he saw a face that looked familiar. It was Ernesto. Pete felt excited and went over to greet his old friend. Ernesto recognized him and they hugged. They chatted long into the night, catching up on what they had done in the past few decades they hadn't been in contact together. Pete offered Ernesto to join him, but Ernesto declined, saying he had already found his passion. To this day, Pete's impact can still be seen today. He is commemorated by a statue situated in Maverick's town square.

title: Wire Cat

infobox.name: Wire cat
infobox.occupation: Seeking the one truly wireless device

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Wire cat|image=Wire_Cat.png|imagecaption=>buy wireless device >look inside >wires|occupation=Seeking the one truly wireless device|marital=Single|birthDate=6th of March 1999|birthPlace=Muztagata Mountain, Kyrgyzstan|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=5 sauces|weight=3 sauces|eyes=Dark green|appearsin=Some episodes|debut=Season 2: Wireless}}'''Wire cat''' is a cat that loves buying wireless devices, expecting them to lack wires. Outside, they appear to be, however, once taking them apart, Wire cat is constantly disappointed in finding wires inside the device. He has a slight love for the taste of lead.
==The Struggle==
Wire cat has bought copious amounts of 'wireless' devices in his lifetime, however, each time he takes one apart, he is confounded. There are wires inside of the so-called "wireless" device. He will only know true happiness once he accomplishes his goal. The one and only, truly wireless device. Until then, he is tortured by the harsh reality. This struggle is, however, mostly used for comedic effect.
==Death (And reincarnation) ==

In the war of silly and unsilly, he took down a wireless tank only to find wires, this tank exploded with him still nearby, killing him, however he came back to life, this is one of the few characters to die and come back permanently, some theorise that its not the same cat but some say that the [[Grinwatcher]] or [[gusic]] had something to do with it

title: Wit Kit
wikitext:
{{Dead|Cause=old age|Time=October 18, 2025}}

== Real Life ==
Kitty was 20 Years Old before the end, please remember her.

== About ==
{{Character|name=Wit Kit|image=Wit Kit.png|imagecaption=The Wit Kit Being Derp|status={{Deceased}}|nationality={{American}}|aliases=Luna (Inner Demon), Jinx|relatives=None|affiliation=The GOODings|occupation=Annoying Everyone But The Cat God...|birthDate=2005|birthPlace=Everywhere|gender=Girl|breed=Turkish Angora|fur=White|height=6 Sauces|weight=20 Sauces|firstappears=The Start Of Reality|lastappears=The Final Day|deathDate=October 18, 2025|deathPlace=United States}}

<math>Inner Demon Luna + Wit Kit = DEATH</math>

The Wit Kit (White Kitty) is an immortal kitty with an insatiable hunger for annoying all it can see. Its origin is unknown, but as most other cats of unknown origin, it is thought to have been part of the Esoteric Council, though there is not much evidence leading to its presence in the group in The Black Book of Silly Magic. It is said to have an equal power to the elusive Inner Demon Luna.

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
Wit Kit appears in [[Silly Cats]] as a side character, with minimal appearances consisting of cut-away gags and other such things, though later on in the series, she provides as a plot device to advance the wars of silly and unsilly.

=== Silly Cats: Babies ===
Wit Kit appeared multiple times in archives of previously aired episodes of the failed show, [[Silly Cats: Babies|Silly Cats: Babies.]]

== The End ==
The Wit Kit passed away due to old age after a whole 20 years of supporting the cats and helping, her old age caused enough problems.

== Trivia ==
Wit Kit is theorized to be the godbrother of Inner Demon Luna.

title: Wires Frootlooper
wikitext:
{{Shipwreck}}
{{Character|name=Wires Frootloops|image=Nofing.png|imagecaption=frootloop|status={{frootloop}}|nationality={{frootloop}}|relatives=frootloop|gender=frootloop|breed=frootloop|fur=frootloop|instagram=frootloop|tiktok=frootloop|youtube=frootloop|aliases=frootloop}}

=== '''Frootloop''' ===
Frootloop, ah yes, the very cute and mysterious cat, but what is his story? Wires Frootloop is not your ordinary cat. He is a tangled enigma, always seen playing with wires, cables, and—of course—his beloved Frootloops. Wires Frootloop became an overnight sensation when a video of him unrolling an entire spool of wire while balancing a Frootloop on his nose went viral. The internet couldn't get enough of his unique combination of chaos and cereal flair.

In January 2024, Wires Frootloop's fame truly skyrocketed when a fan edit of him tangled up in wires, with the caption "Frooty Loops and Twisty Wires," hit social media. Fans everywhere began to remix the video, adding their own twist on the wired Frootloop saga. The hashtag #WiresFrootloopChallenge trended for weeks as people tried to recreate his legendary wire antics with their own pets.
----

=== '''Where’s Wires Frootloop From?''' ===
Frootloop used to be a stray cat, always found tangled in wires behind an electronics store. The staff at the store took him in, realizing this cat wasn't just any stray—he had a special bond with the wires, as if they were part of his essence. They named him Wires Frootloop and made him their official store mascot.

But that’s not all. Wires Frootloop also had a peculiar obsession with Frootloops cereal. Every time someone opened a box, he’d be there, pouncing and playing with the colorful loops. No one knows exactly how or why this cat became enamored with cereal, but his antics quickly became the stuff of legend on the internet.
----

=== '''Extras''' ===
Wires Frootloop now lives in a cozy apartment filled with wires of every kind—charging cables, ethernet cords, headphone wires, and even some antique telephone wires. His owner ensures that Wires is always well-fed, both with his favorite kibble and, of course, the occasional bowl of Frootloops.

Want more Frootloop content? Follow the official fan pages on Instagram, TikTok, and Little Red Book. For the latest videos, check out "Frootloop Chronicles" or the viral #WiredFrooty challenge. The fandom is ever-growing, and there's always something new to discover about this quirky kitty.
----''(Creator's Note: If you haven't seen Wires Frootloop in action yet, you're missing out! Check out the hilarious fan edits and see why everyone is looping in on the fun!)''

title: Wizard of Spells
wikitext:
{{Character|name=Wizard of Spells|imagecaption=Wizard of Spells casting spells|image=Wizard of Spells.png|status={{Alive}}|aliases=Wizard of the Silly|relatives=Unknown|occupation=Casting evil little spells mueheheh 😈|birthDate=October 31st, 1001 (According to Wizard of Spells)|birthPlace=Castle of Wiz|marital=Unknown|gender=Male|breed=Wizard|fur=Black & White|height=4 sauces|weight=27 sauces|firstappears=The Red Eye|lastappears=War of the Silly and Unsilly pt.1|nationality={{Unknown}}}}
{{Wave|H|E|L|P| |H|E|‎ |C|U|R|S|E|D|‎ |M|Y|‎ |T|E|X|T}}

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
In [[Silly Cats]], he appears as an evil wizard that wrote the evilest book known to silly kind.

=== Silly Cats: Online ===
In [[Silly Cats: Online]], he appears in a secret cave, and when you talk to him he gives you asks you if you want to join him or not. If you say yes you will given a quest to retrieve some ingredients for his potions. If you say no you will be zapped by an electricity spell and killed.

== Biography ==
'''The Wizard of Spells''' was a mostly normal kitty in his younger years, although he did have a fascination with wizarding. When he grew older, he attended wizarding school. There he met another brooding wizard named [[Bob]]. The two swiftly became friends and studied together. Later on though, the two became mortal enemies and they had a great showdown in the woods, but the Wizard of Spells was defeated. The Wizard of Spells was a lot smarter than the other wizards at his school.

Unfortunately, something sent him down a dark path. The untimely death of his mother led him into an infatuation with the occult trying to bring his dead mother back to life. The Wizard of Spells studied and studied his spells and elixirs. One of his spells was responsible for the creation of [[Demonic Little Grey Cat]]. He tried using them as an assistant but they were useless so they kicked them out. He kept all of his spells into many books.

In his studying he searched old catalogs and found a book with no name. He looked inside and he was amazed at the amount of knowledge and information that was held within the book. He stole the book and brought the book to his wizarding dungeon. He also inserted some of his own recipes into the book. Knowing how dangerous the book was, he locked it into Ristle Cave, the same cave that [[The Beast]] was unleashed from during the fight between [[Billy]] and [[Bentley]]. 

One day, he walked inside the cave and found the book missing from its pedestal. He reviewed the security footage and found [[Glinkert]] had stolen the book and slipped into a time portal. Glinkert would give it  to his past self, and his past self would later found The Cult of the Black Book of Silly Magic. The Wizard of Spells was outraged, he time travelled and joined the cult and pretended to be a new apprentice. The Wizard of Spells showed his skills and he began a power struggle. the [[Grinwatcher]] saw this and threw Glinkert out of the cult. The Wizard of Spells revered the Grinwatcher and considered them a god. He soon became an underling of them and became a a member of the new cult, The Cult of the Grinwatcher.

After the transition, the book ended up in the hands of [[Pobis]] but the Grinwatcher stole it from him and gave it to [[Grinwatcher/Right Hand Smiles|Right Hand Smiles]]. Right Hand Smiles was later intercepted by the SBI and the book remained in their catalogs until Glinkert took the book and gave it to his past self. After the cult dissolved and turned into B.A.D, the Wizard of Spells left and he's trying to steal the book back but he is still unsuccessful and will never be because of the timeline debacle. It is currently unknown where he resides, but he may make an appearance.

title: Yoinky

infobox.name: Yoinky
infobox.occupation: Making rap songs such as “One Bad Gloop"

wikitext:
{{Character|name=Yoinky|aliases=|relatives=Abernathy (Wife)
Pepsie (Brother)|affiliation=|occupation=Making rap songs such as “One Bad Gloop"|marital=Married|birthDate=18 March, 2007|birthPlace=Silly Countryside|species=Cat|gender=Male|height=Unknown|weight=Unknown|eyes=Blue|appearsin=All episodes|debut=Pitch bible|image=Yoinky.png|imagecaption=Yoinky confronting paparazzi|status={{Alive}}|fur=Orange and white}}{{Stub}}
Yoinky is a famous rapper known for his song “One Bad Gloop".

== Biography ==
Yoinky's life began when he was born on a cot in the silly countryside, with his brother [[Pepsie]]. Yoinky worked on the farms for the beginning of his life. But when he was watching TV he saw a rapper. He was inspired and dreamed of what it would be like to live in Silly City.

Yoinky was determined, so he set off for silly city. He wandered the silly city streets. He found a rapping studio. He went inside. He trained and trained. And eventually, he made his first song. But it would take a bit for  his songs to gain traction. That's when his song "One Bad Gloop", took off, and it instantly became a hit. The fame he garnered for this song would surround him with media coverage. It also allowed him to meet his future wife, Abernathy.

Abernathy and Yoinky tied the knot on June 17th, 2014. His fame also allowed him to meet other rappers like [[The Squeeper]] and [[The Meeper]]. One rare meeting was also with the esteemed rapper, [[Floppa]]. Yoinky now spends his days with his wife in the Silly City downtown, and he continues to make raps to this day.{{Top|Canon}}

That's when his song "One Bad Gloop", took off, and it instantly became a hit. The fame he garnered for this song would surround him with media coverage. It also allowed him to meet his future wife, Abernathy. Abernathy and Yoinky tied the knot on June 17th, 2014. His fame also allowed him to meet other rappers like The Squeeper and The Meeper . One rare meeting was also with the esteemed rapper, Floppa . Yoinky now spends his days with his wife in the Silly City downtown, and he continues to make raps to this day.
