Yuji is a Elder god of the silly cats universe, serving as the god of knowledge and learning he observes and chronicles all knowledge in the silly cats universe and is a major force for good when the need comes

=== Biography ===
Yuji was brought into being a few years after [[Cwawa]] created the 7 gods. it is unknown exactly how Yuji came to be but we do know he came to the god void from some other plane. He is a sworn brother of [[Gusic]] and the two have a friendly rivalry. Yuji rarely gets involved in mortal matters but it is believed he is willing to intervene when necessary. He apparently can see everything and remembers everything he sees but cannot see the future and experiences time linearly. though this is not because he cannot time travel or change the influence of time, he can he just doesn't want to because despite knowing everything one could know and being the wisest being in existence he still finds time travel stuff too complicated. He appears in some episodes to help [[The GOODings]] with his wisdom and allows them to ask him certain questions. eventually he tries to reason with [[Grinwatcher]] not to give [[The Beast]] negative silly energy but is declined. Yuji has an endless library of knowledge that he slowly provides knowladge from to his followers. The only reason he would not have something in his library is if it doesn't exist or was removed deliberately. Yuji is often polite and friendly but also often intentionally mysterious. He sometimes games with Gusic but is much worse than him at every game exept for strategy game that he often wins.

== Appearances ==

=== Silly Cats ===
'''Zim Zorp''' acts as a spy for Geeble and Gnapy to find enemies and herbs for the two of them, and has been seen spying on the main cast. 

=== Silly Cats Babies ===
Before Silly Cats Babies was cancelled, he was going to be a supporting character (if you can even call anyone in the show that) as seen in the beta episodes and scripts.

== Biography ==
Zim Zorp was born in Sector B, and quickly became aggressive from a young age, later he was enlisted in the Gnarp Army, and met Geeble.  Geeble was the only one who somehow could calm down '''Zim Zorp,''' causing them to be good friends and sneak out with Geeble to meet Bleemk, Glorpo, and Gnapy. on i mission after the revolution against [[Skeeble Beeble]] they are sent on a mission to spy on Jinx, but his anger gets the best of him and they attack Jinx, but Jinx easily crushes '''Zim Zorp''' leading to them being destroyed, leaving a green splatter on the ground.

== Personality ==
Aggressive, Energetic, Mean, Loud

== Trivia ==

'''Zim Zorp''' has bitten all of the Gnarp Gnaplians in Sector B, Including Geeble

"The reason '''Zim Zorp''' looks like an average size kitty in the image, is because the guy holding him is actually really small. Around the same size as '''Zim Zorp'''. A lot of people think he is a normal sized kitty because of his image. But he isn't. His height is 1 sauce and his weight is 0.5 sauces." - VerySilly during an interview

Taken from Xorgus' Zoptify Page - DJ Jorr (AKA Xorgus) is hailed as one of KITY's most successful music artist of this millennium, mixing a blend of West Gnarp Drill and Xirxir-core. His music is well known for it's lyricism and deep meaning, helping [[Gnarp Gnaplians|Gnarp Gnaplians]] from all Sectors through tough times amassing millions of die-hard fans.

==Appearances==

===Silly Cats: Online===
Xorgus has made many guest appearances in his life as DJ Zorr, one being a limited time unlockable character in the hit game [[Silly Cats: Online]] to promote his new experimental single [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXuI15qRsd0&t=2s two possums in a potato sack]. He was a healer who would play mad rad beats that would uplift and buff teammates during battle giving a tactical advantage.

===Gnarp-Gnight LIVE===
appearing in an interview with Glorpin Zanks on Gnarp-Gnight LIVE where they talked about what Xorgus thought about being criticized on making various songs that talked about [[Glorpo]], a notorious and nationalist beast of war. in which he responded that Glorpo's experiences in the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] drew parallels to Xorgus' rage when being picked on by various goons from many suburban gangs that lingered around his neighborhood. He also responded about dissing a rival Gnarp Drill artist G-ZeeZee in the song '''I Got My Zapper''' where he doubled down on the fact he ''still'' looks like a absolute gnardphard '''(meaning an ugly blue alien)''' Fans say this is the spark that ignited the gang war between the two artists but only G-ZeeZee seems to be interested in having a Zapper dual .

===Zorr-Beats (Lost Media)===
Zorr-Beats was a soon to be released Rythm mobile game featuring the top hits from DJ Zorr's catalogue, very little footage of the game being played was released mostly being shown and promoted at various music festivals he attended. The game had lots of hype surrounding it but unfortunately one day while Xorgus was playing with the only build of the game on his phone, the phone died, and to this day Xorgus cannot find his phone charger and thus the game will forever remain lost.

==Biography==
Having grown up in the lesser developed Sector G on Planet K.I.T.Y., Xorgus had a very hard time growing up as various gang members would steal his lunch money and beat him up. seeing as every other gnaplian was significantly taller than him his ability to defend him self in hand to hand combat was very slim. It was at this time Xorgus had gained an interest in West Gnarp Drill and started his music career as a independent artist channeling his hate and frustrations in his lyrics instead of violence, as he would gain followers he would also make enough money to relocate to a different more developed sector of Planet K.I.T.Y. Unfortunately the [[War of the Silly and Unsilly]] had just begun which called for all [[Gnarp Gnaplians]] to enlist into the Gnarp-Gnaplian army and to be shipped out to Planet Silly as soon as possible. Xorgus didn't want to be killed in the Silly and Unsilly war and thus went into hiding creating a fake name for himself which we know as DJ Zorr. Unfortunately for him during this time he would have to spend all the money he saved on relocation to now funding his government hiding for the next four years, This would not keep him down though as he would continue to make more music to critical acclaim making a new name for himself. although he hasn't completely monetarily recovered, as of now he continues to humbly play at Club Gonk, a very popular club among Sector G inhabitants.

Banana Cat is an off-screen character of [[Silly Cats]] that appears in [[Silly Cats: Online]] as a playable character exclusive to the game. From the game, we can collect that Banana Cat is a very sensitive cat, and is prone to tantrums because of his traumatic childhood. 

== Biography ==
Banana Cat was born to unknown parents on the Oyeal Islands of China. In his childhood, he was beaten very often, and verbally abused as well. This would make Banana Cat cry at the smallest issues. At the age of 14, he ran away from home, and began living a nomadic life, exploring Silly Planet, and creating the character we love today.

== Trivia ==
Abilities of Banana Cat:

* Banana cat can transform into other cats.
* If he looses his banana he is significantly weakened and he will start crying
* The banana is resistant to un-sillyness as well as acting as a shield that can deflect bullets
* Banana cat's tears can heal all wounds
* The banana is very cozy to wear and keeps banana cat warm in extreme cold temperatures. This allows him to visit antarctica. (He enjoys the snow and solidarity there.)
* fun fact, banana cat enjoys botany and owns a blueberry bush

{{Character|name=Bathder|image=Bathder.png|imagecaption=him|status={{Alive}}|aliases=None|relatives=Stormy & Tiny (neither have pages)|affiliation=The Orange Cat Gang|occupation=Gangster|birthDate=March 6, 2022|birthPlace=Wales|deathDate=None|deathPlace=None|marital=Single|gender=Male|breed=Tuxedo|fur=Black and white|height=7 sauces long|weight=12 sauces heavy (he is fat)}}'''Bathder''' is 1 year old, born on March 6 2022 with idk colour eyes I'm colourblind and seven sauces long. he is my friend's tuxedo cat and his name is a misspelling of his actual name (Badger) which we all call him because it sounds silly. '''Bathder''' is "most gooberesque"-Uriel, and "extremely rude and violent but also pretty cute"-Mael. 

Most people's opinions of him are that he is just a cute little guy but deep down, he is much worse. He has many confirmed kills such as: mice, birds ,and a suspected hedgehog.
== Life ==
'''Bathder''' has gone missing many times across his lifespan, it's suspected that the reason for this is that he is involved with the elusive "Orange Cat Gang" and has performed many silly deeds with them. Some of these acts include: taking too much food, scratching up his owner's couch, and evading taxes.

'''Bathder''' is an outdoor cat which would usually be fine, except from the fact that this silly man ran away and lived with different people on multiple occasions, which was very rude but my friend gets him back every time.

== Occupations ==
'''Bathder''' is very talented and so has many jobs, some of which being: expert pipe bomb maker

==About==
'''Apple Cat''' also known as '''Zhuangzhuang''' in real life, is a Chinese white cat that always holds and sleeps on top of fruits, mostly known for sleeping on top of apples. Born on an unspecified date, Apple Cat is one of the seven stray cats that was adopted by goodnight.meowstar, The other six cats are rarely seen on his TikTok. There are several examples of Apple Cat's greed knowing no bounds, with image evidence of him laying on top on two apples, in his videos or lives apple cat has been seen sleeping the most while they deliver apples to him!

==Origin and Spread==
'''goodnight.meowstar''' started posting on TikTok at [https://www.tiktok.com/@goodnight.meowstar/video/7287993991797296417 9 October 2023], the video gained popularity because of it's eepy and silly interaction. Only a week later under a different video, titled "[https://www.tiktok.com/@goodnight.meowstar/video/7290960939510172961 You're so good, I'll give you big dried fish tomorrow~]" hit the mainstream media and reached 1M views and 200K likes in just 2 weeks. A month later on [https://www.tiktok.com/@goodnight.meowstar/video/7301728687592869153 15 November 2023], another video was posted, Apple Cat can be seen holding an Orange this time and it went viral again, reaching 2.8M views and 700K likes as of January 2024.

{{Background|file=apple cat bg.png}}

== Trivia   ==

* Apple Cat goes by many names, usually variations of the spelling such as "appel car", "aple cat," "aplel cart", or "alpel catr".

* Apple Cat has many brothers that also love to sleep on various fruits and other household objects.

* The latest videos of Apple Cat (or Zhuangzhuang) can be found on [https://www.youtube.com/@GoodnightMeowStar/ the youtube channel of goodnight meowstar.] (which are in Chinese).
